Name: Angoalissar - Comércio e Indústria Lda
Description:
Founded in 1992, Angoalissar is today Angola’s leading distributor of fast-moving consumer goods and the founding force behind an industrial ecosystem that supports the development of the country’s food sector.

Over more than three decades, the company has played a critical role in ensuring national food supply, including during challenging periods such as the civil war and the pandemic, maintaining a responsible, resilient approach aligned with the public interest.

With more than 2,000 employees, a fleet of over 200 trucks with nationwide coverage, and operations across multiple provinces, Angoalissar stands as a benchmark for scale, reliability and reach within Angola’s food sector. In 2024, the company was recognised by the Angolan Tax Authority as the country’s largest corporate taxpayer, in acknowledgement of its economic impact, integrity and long-term commitment to Angola’s development.

Beyond distribution, Angoalissar acts as a driver of national industrialisation, having been at the origin of wheat mills, dairy units, pasta factories, confectionery plants, oil refineries and soap production facilities. These investments contribute to more secure supply chains and to strengthening Angola’s food sovereignty.

More than a distributor, Angoalissar is a long-term partner to the country, generating employment, strengthening local value chains and operating with a clear strategic vision and strong social purpose.

Angoalissar
Your Food World

Name: Atacadão Dia a Dia
Description:
Excelência, agilidade, humildade, integridade e inovação - aqui estão alguns dos pilares do nosso negócio.

Nosso time é composto por talentos que buscam proporcionar uma experiência positiva para os clientes, respeitando nosso princípio de abastecer lares e negócios com qualidade e descomplicação. 

Jamais esqueceremos de onde viemos e o caminho que percorremos até aqui. Por isso seguimos construindo um ambiente de trabalho agradável e agregador. 

Temos como cultura a mentalidade diferenciada. Por esse motivo, nosso negócio é uma escola sem professores, na qual todos têm visão de futuro, proatividade, comprometimento e, claro, entusiasmo e paixão.

Conecte-se com a gente #TônoDD.

Name: Funkie
Description:
On a voulu changer le monde, on a commencé par le petit-déjeuner !

Face aux produits ultra-transformés et trop sucrés auxquels nous avons été habitués en supermarchés, Funkie marque une rupture. Nous revisitons les incontournables du rayon petit-déjeuner version “zéro ingrédient bizarre” : avec des produits made in France, bio, sains et responsables — et avant tout très gourmands.

Pari réussi, comme le montre le succès de nos céréales (21 ingrédients de moins que le leader du rayon) ou encore de notre pâte à tartiner (la 1e pâte à tartiner sans huile de palme ni huile du tout !).

Aujourd'hui, Funkie c'est :
- 2 produits vendus toutes les 30 secondes
- +130 000 followers uniquement sur Instagram & TikTok
- + de 4 000 magasins dont Intermarché, Monoprix, Franprix, Carrefour, Auchan...

Ce projet est né de la rencontre entre Camille et Adrien, à un moment où leur histoire personnelle les poussaient à vouloir "faire leur part" autour d'une alimentation plus responsable. 

Après avoir entretenu un rapport compliqué avec l’alimentation pendant son adolescence, Camille a commencé à travailler sur ce projet à 21 ans pendant ses études (Sciences Po Paris).
Quant à Adrien, après plusieurs années à travailler en finance, il a commencé à avoir de nombreux problèmes de santé liés à son alimentation. Il payait en fait le prix d’une alimentation surtransformée et bourrés d’additifs typique de la grande distribution, à laquelle il avait été biberonnée depuis sa plus tendre enfance. Il était hors de question pour lui de condamner ses enfants aux mêmes dégâts.

Name: SAMBAZON
Description:
Founded in 2000, SAMBAZON, an acronym for Sustainable Management of the Brazilian Amazon, was the first company to introduce “certified Açaí” to the world, supplying organic and Fair Trade certified Açaí products from a proprietary supply chain to ensure transparency from the “palm of the tree to the palm of your hand.” 
SAMBAZON recently launched Seeding Change, a documentary highlighting mission-driven brands operating on triple-bottom-line business models and using commerce as a vehicle to create a more prosperous future for the people and the planet, similarly to how SAMBAZON uses the Delicious Powers of Açaí.

All SAMBAZON products, including Smoothie Packs, Smoothie Cubes, Ready to Eat Açaí Bowls, Juices, Energy drinks and Açaí Bites are made from USDA Organic, Non-GMO, vegan, and Fair For Life Fair Trade Certified Açaí.
SAMBAZON’s Fair Trade certification has helped to protect the Amazon Rainforest and its rich biodiversity and has helped to positively impact thousands of local growers. 
With the commitment to invest a percentage of local Açaí purchases back into the community, SAMBAZON has contributed over $1 million to build build healthcare centers, community centers and schools.

For more information about Seeding Change and SAMBAZON’s mission and products, visit www.sambazon.com

Name: Export Packers Company Limited
Description:
Export Packers is a proudly Canadian, leading diversified international food company headquartered in Brampton, Ontario. Since 1937, we have built a global reputation for innovation and quality in the import, export, marketing, and production of food products.
Operating across three key business segments: International Trading, Foodservice, and Retail, we serve customers throughout Canada and around the world. Our Canadian-produced and marketed products can be found on the shelves of leading retailers and in a wide variety of restaurants across the country. We are trusted leaders for providing private label products. Meanwhile, our International Trading division sources and supplies high-quality food products globally through import and export.
 
As a privately held, family-run organization, we take pride in fostering a positive corporate culture driven by our values-based leadership, reflected in our strong employee retention and long-standing client relationships.
 
At Export Packers, we strive to lead with innovation, operational excellence, and a deep commitment to sustainability. Through responsible sourcing, efficient logistics, and customer-focused solutions, we aim to make a lasting, positive impact in the communities where we operate and across the global food landscape.

Name: Pacific Spice Company Inc.
Description:
For over 50 years, Pacific Spice Company has supplied customers in the food industry with expertly sourced and processed spices, herbs, and seasonings that have enhanced the flavor of food consumed by millions. 

We are proud to be a leading provider of quality herbs and spices for food manufacturers, foodservice distributors, restaurant chains, and retail spice companies. From Allspice to Za'atar, we offer a comprehensive line of spices, herbs, and blends, as well as a sizeable list of organic products.

Based in Commerce, California, and serving the entire world, Pacific Spice Company sources raw material globally and processes domestically in our modern, 150,000 square foot facility. Manufacturing in-house ensures that we can supply our customers with the highest quality, safest, and freshest product on the market. 

In addition to our extensive library of spices, we are dedicated to remaining at the forefront of flavor innovation. Our state-of-the-art in-house Research and Development lab is staffed with flavor professionals with decades of combined experience who work directly with customers to create innovative and customized blends. From initial idea to final packaging, we bring your flavors to life.

Pacific Spice is a testament to our ambitious founder, Akiba Schlussel, who immigrated from Czechoslovakia and started selling spices out of the back of his station wagon. From its humble beginnings, Pacific Spice has steadily grown into a powerhouse spice importer, manufacturer, and supplier for customers throughout the United States and the world.

While our size and capabilities have greatly expanded, some things haven’t changed: Our focus on quality, integrity, and our family’s involvement in the business.

Culture Pop Soda is Whole30 Approved, certified non-GMO, gluten-free, plant-based, shelf-stable, and kosher.

Name: Gautam General Trading L.L.C
Description:
Gautam General Trading LLC (GGT) stands as a globally recognized leader in premium rice, with a heritage spanning over 80 years since its origins in 1940 as a dedicated rice milling enterprise. Based in the UAE, GGT is renowned for delivering exceptional rice quality across the Middle East and beyond. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in our full control over the supply chain, advanced milling technologies, and our unique two-year aging process, which enhances the rich aroma and flavor of our rice. With a legacy built on trust and innovation, GGT remains dedicated to refining our products and services to consistently exceed customer expectations worldwide.
Gautam General Trading LLC boasts of having a network of around 600+ customers in the U.A.E and 200+ customers in the GCC which includes Wholesalers, Supermarkets, Catering, Hotels, Restaurants, etc. This has resulted in GGT having the highest market share in the U.A.E rice industry hence becoming the largest distribution of rice in the U.A.E. GGT has been able to achieve these milestones due to its comprehensive and systematic procurement base and long heritage in the rice industry which has helped it to maintain its stable quality and sustain its competitive pricing.

GGT has an extensive customer base all around the world which includes; Kenya, Uganda, Nigeria, Rwanda, Conakry, Ivory Coast, Mauritius, Zanzibar, UAE, Oman, Bahrain, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, USA, Canada, India, Pakistan, etc.

Further GGT also trades in other commodities such as Sugar and Palm Oil. GGT has a strong supplier base for sugar sourcing. GGT imports brown and white sugar from India, Pakistan, Brazil and Thailand. Currently GGT are importing cooking oil from countries like Malaysia and Indonesia.
For more information, do visit our website www.gautamgroup.com.

Name: RM SALT Pakistan -  Himalayan Salt Experts

RMSALT is the fastest-growing Himalayan Salt Manufacturer & Exporter and the most trusted source of authentic Himalayan Salt products to wholesalers, importers, and retail markets worldwide. 

We have the most extensive manufacturing production & packaging line in Pakistan with a capacity of over 20,000 pieces per day. Our purpose-built four manufacturing units are well equipped with modern facilities to produce the wide-range Himalayan pink salt product line including Edible Salt, Seasoning line, Home Décor, Health & Wellness, Bath-line, Kitchenware, and building decorative products.

We are dedicated to improving and searching for excellence and everything proves the great efforts from the manufacturing process to product quality control to an effective support service. We can offer you tailor-made products in light of your unique requirements.

To accentuate our commitment to purity & quality, the RM Salt team works tirelessly to deliver authentic, handcrafted, premium products through an innovative process that ensures lasting impurities and preserves the artisan craftsmanship.

WE ARE DIFFERENT:
• We are the largest Himalayan Salt products manufacturer and exporter. We produce all-natural, premium handcrafted edible and décor- lifestyle products.
• We offer Private labeling, customized manufacturing, and make-to-order products.
• We have four manufacturing units with huge production capacity to produce traditional and innovative Pink Salt products.
• We strictly follow quality standards. All procedures comply with the FDA, CE, ISO, HACCP, PCSIR, GMP FOOD, BRC, and SEDEX.


OUR VISION:
We strive to be the ultimate source of Himalayan salt products and enhance people's daily lives.

OUR MISSION:
We strive to provide our customers with products that allow
them to savor the experiences of life.

Name: Fortali
Description:
A Fortali é composta pela Distribuidora Fortali e a Loja Armazém Fortali.
A distribuidora é dedicada ao mercado de Food Service com atuação no estado do Ceará.   Disponibilizamos aos nossos clientes mais de 1.800 produtos em parceria com 136 das melhores indústrias do segmento.  Somos associados ao Grupo RB que se destaca entre os maiores distribuidores do Ceará e desde 1979 atua com serviços voltados à distribuição. 
 
Para atender melhor as especificidades de cada segmento, estruturamos a equipe comercial em duas frentes, uma focada em panificação e outra em restaurantes, hotéis, bares, lanchonetes, rotisserias, cozinhas industriais, buffets e lojas de conveniência.
 
Nossa estrutura principal fica em Fortaleza onde dispomos de em um armazém seco de 1800m2, e de 2 câmeras frigorificadas, uma para produtos resfriados e outra para produtos congelados e uma Adega para vinnos. 
 
Somos a única distribuidora do Ceará integrante do DIEF, que é um grupo de DIstribuidores Especializados no mercado de Food Service que tem por objetivo a  troca de informações para desenvolvimento das melhores práticas de atendimento para este mercado.  Além dos DIEFs,  somos a única distribuidora da América Latina integrante do grupo IFDA (Internacional FoodService Distributors Association).  A IFDA é sediada nos Estados Unidos e é hoje o maior grupo do mundo de distribuidores focados em Food Service. 

Objetivamos ser a melhor distribuidora especializada no segmento de Food Service do Brasil até 2018.
Atualmente contamos com uma loja para um contato mais direto com o público MEI que trabalha com alimentos e bebidas; o Armazém Fortali. Seguindo o planejamento de crescimento do grupo, em 2012 na cidade de Marabá (PA), nasce a TMZ alimentos. 
Hoje, 15 anos após o início de suas atividades, o grupo T&T alimentos, ocupa uma posição de protagonismo nas regiões em que atua. 
A T&T alimentos está presente nos estados de Goiás, Pará (TMZ alimentos), Ceará (desde 2016) e São Paulo (desde 2021). 
Sua operação conta com 450 colaboradores diretos e 200 indiretos, o grupo comercializa mais de 4000 toneladas de produtos refrigerados e congelados por mês, incluindo marcas renomadas como a Friato Alimentos.
Com estrutura física moderna e localização estratégica, o grupo T&T alimentos é reconhecido pela logística pontual, pois, dispõe de suporte tecnológico avançado e dos melhores recursos disponíveis para o mercado de distribuição.

Name: Wild Vegan (Pvt) Ltd.
Description:
We are a vegan brand that is dedicated to wildlife and nature conservation. After years of discussion, the brand was created to bridge the gap between commercial businesses and environmental conservation. Normally as humans, we take resources from nature without considering the sustainability of the resource. At that point, a model was required to demonstrate how to actively participate in environmental protection while conducting business. That is how the venture was founded by Kasun Benaragama who is a conservation artist and an innovative designer, and Iranga Thejana who is a young professional in the food industry and an enthusiastic nature photographer. They wanted to create a business model that connects both ends in the food chain, the environment, and the consumer in an active way of giving back to nature.

Wild Vegan will not be a traditional business; we intend to donate 50% of our profits to projects related to environmental sustainability and wildlife conservation. This business is planned and based on environmentally friendly methods and processes, and giving back such a percentage of our profit will be a remarkable thing in this industry. And this will benefit everyone from farm to fork, including farmers, consumers, the environment, and those attempting to make a positive impact on the environment. A bigger percentage from that 50% will be funded to a non-profit organization called “WILD ISLAND FOUNDATION” and all the projects like “Forest Connect”, “Species” are done under our supervision. This venture will be a role model for all industries that try to make some impact on nature conservation while doing their business.

Name: Wezapp
Description:
Wezapp: L'Innovazione Incontra il Gusto e la Sostenibilità
Noi di Wezapp siamo un'azienda dove tecnologia e innovazione si fondono per offrire esperienze uniche ai nostri clienti. Abbiamo creato un ecosistema digitale che celebra la qualità alimentare italiana a filiera corta, supportando piccoli produttori selezionati e certificati.

Il nostro e-commerce (B2C) è il cuore pulsante della nostra offerta: chiunque può esplorare e acquistare prodotti alimentari genuini e di alta qualità, portando sulla propria tavola il sapore autentico del territorio italiano.

Ma Wezapp è anche un partner strategico per le aziende (B2B). Offriamo soluzioni innovative per il welfare aziendale attraverso la somministrazione di coupon utilizzabili come fringe benefit. Le aziende possono così fornire ai propri dipendenti un benefit concreto e apprezzato, che va oltre il classico bonus: un accesso privilegiato a prodotti alimentari d'eccellenza. Questo non solo migliora il benessere del personale, ma rafforza anche la cultura aziendale con un'attenzione alla qualità della vita e al consumo consapevole, il tutto con vantaggi fiscali sia per l'azienda che per il dipendente.

Il nostro vero fiore all'occhiello è l'iniziativa di adozione digitale. Con Wezapp, puoi "adottare" a distanza un ulivo, una vite, una mucca, una gallina, un campo di grano o di birra, un campo di pomodori e ortaggi, o un alveare. Questo progetto ti permette di vivere un'esperienza immersiva nel mondo dell'agricoltura e dell'allevamento, seguendo passo dopo passo la crescita e la produzione del tuo "adottato", con aggiornamenti digitali e la possibilità di ricevere i frutti (o i prodotti) del tuo contributo. È un modo innovativo per connettersi con la terra, promuovere la sostenibilità e assaporare il vero significato della filiera corta.

Our success is built on our commitment to quality, integrity, and customer satisfaction. We believe in creating lasting partnerships with our customers, suppliers, and employees, and we strive to provide the best possible service at every step of the way.

As we continue to expand our business across the globe, we remain true to our values and our passion for dates. We look forward to sharing our delicious and nutritious products with more customers around the world and invite you to join us on this journey.

With businesses in England, Scotland, France, Germany, and the Netherlands, Wismettac Europe offers a diverse and unique place to work with many opportunities to collaborate globally from within a European organization.

Name: Neuenschwander R. & H. AG
Description:
Amore per la tradizione.

Neuenschwander is specialized in the development of innovative specialties and the distribution of fine food. Customers include the most important Swiss retailers as well as specialized retailers. 

Since 1947, Neuenschwander has been offering unique inspirations with exclusive products, sensual pleasure experiences and excellent service. For its customers and thus the end consumer, Neuenschwander develops innovative specialties of very high quality in collaboration with its suppliers.

The best from around the world
Over the decades, our culinary treasure chest has been filled with hundreds of exquisite products. These include a wide range of the best olive and spice oils, vinegars, pasta, rice, traditional tinned vegetables, savoury and sweet pastries, chocolate, spirits and our own inventions such as white balsamio. Our specialities come mainly from Italy, the Mediterranean and other regions of Europe. 

Products with soul and taste
We attach great importance to ensuring that the "soul" that the producers impart to the specialities remains perceptible to the end consumer. That is why we sometimes offer our customers culinary journeys to the place of origin of the products and tell them the stories behind the specialities - stories about the people who make them, the intricacies of the production processes, the peculiarities of the local food culture, the landscape and the raw materials.

Name: Fru Hansens Kælder
Description:
I Fru Hansens Kælder brænder vi for børnemad og vi forstår vigtigheden af at daginstitutioner og skoler hver dag kan servere måltider af rene råvarer, gode smage, høj kvalitet og økologi.

Vores viden om børnemad omsættes hver dag til sund mad til mere end 17.000 børn. Vi tilbyder et helstøbt koncept, der indeholder alt, hvad der skal bruges til at servere sunde og lækre måltider til alle slags børn, i alle slags institutioner og i alle slags køkkener. 

Selv i en travl hverdag, skal det være muligt at servere et sundt og lækkert frokostmåltid. Derfor tager vi os af alt det praktiske forarbejde og hjælper jer med alt fra opskrifter, menuplanlægning, ernæringsberegninger til bestillinger, så I bedre kan fokusere på det allervigtigste - nemlig ungerne. Vi holder jer i hånden hele vejen igennem og står altid klar til at rådgive og dele ud af vores mere end 20 års erfaring. 

Vi har mættet små maver siden 2004, men vores ambitioner rækker længere end til bare at mætte børnene. Vi vil skabe vaner. Gode sunde vaner - og de skal gerne være for livet. 

Kontakt os, hvis I vil snakke om frokostordning i jeres institution eller på jeres skole - vi står altid klar til at hjælpe!

Name: Bongiovanni Srl
Description:
Siamo sognatori, crediamo nei campi, nel potere del sole e nella bontà del lavoro che trasforma.
Siamo orgogliosi: affondiamo le mani nelle nostre farine dopo la macinatura e solleviamo una nuvola che diventerà pane di domani, una torta di compleanno o i tajarin della domenica.

Siamo testardi, contro ogni regola imprenditoriale abbiamo una filiera in gran parte biologica (Bioagricert), certi che il mondo possa cambiare iniziando dalle nostre tavole.
Siamo tradizionalisti, lavoriamo solo con macine in pietra naturale.
Siamo puristi, per non utilizzare sostanze chimiche conserviamo farine e altri prodotti in celle frigo a temperatura e umidità controllata.

Soprattutto, siamo liberi: ogni giorno scegliamo di offrirvi solo l’eccellenza, senza compromessi.

Name: Makymat
Description:
En Makymat tenemos como objetivo el brindarle Ingredientes y Sistemas de Alta Tecnología y diferenciación, dirigidos a la manufactura y empaque en la industria Alimentaria y de Transformación.

Desde nuestra fundación en 1989 como parte de  Corporación Premium, y a través de  experiencia y conocimiento del mercado hemos logrado conjuntar un grupo de representaciones de empresas importantes a nivel mundial en cada uno de sus ramos, además de utilizar sus Ingredientes para la formulación de soluciones a su medida.

Nuestro  enfoque está apoyado fuertemente en el servicio, basados en un sistema de Gestión y FSSC22000, el desarrollo de una relación de sociedad con nuestros clientes en una relación ganar-ganar.  El cliente está en el centro de nuestros procesos, de ellos vivimos, para ellos trabajamos.
Somos una Empresa consciente y respetuosa  del medio ambiente y participes de una mejora y  contribución social además de constantemente buscar la promoción del desarrollo integral de todos nuestros colaboradores.

Gestionamos nuestra empresa a través de un sistema de Mejora Continua.  Buscamos estar siempre innovando y mejorando para servir mejor a nuestros clientes.

Todas nuestras acciones están enfocadas en la visión de convertirnos en una empresa líder dentro de nuestro ramo.

Description: Porque sabemos que tu belleza comienza con tu alimentación, nuestra misión es poder brindarles productos nutritivos y de calidad.

Name: Now Yacht Supply
Description:
If you need yacht provisioning in Sicily, NOW YACHT SUPPLY can deliver anything you need, everywhere you need it.
 
We provide our clients with the highest quality yacht provisions. With our extended network of partners and suppliers you have access to both local and imported provisions everywhere in Sicily!
 
We strive to support yacht owners, chefs, crew members and guests in receiving the best charter supplies available.
 
 
FISH & SEAFOOD
Fish in Sicily is legendary! We do select the very best produce directly from the fish market, to let you taste a perfect meal just as it was just out of the sea. We pay extremely attention to the local and legal organic stop for our species. It's a way to protect our environment!
 

Fruits e VEGETABLES
An excellent selection of beautiful and delicious fresh produce both from KmO and from importation.

Bread & BAKING

Bread is famous in Sicily: pls ask a generous selection of local bread, baked twice a day, fresh or frozen to let you have it anytime during your cruise.

SWEETS & CAKES
Try the original taste of our famous sweets and cakes: Cassata, Cannoli, icecream are a joy for the taste and for the eyes!

 
Meat & GAME

The best selection of meat, vacuum-packed and cut in the size you need. Ask our experts for a great sselection for your barbecue.

CHEESE & DIARIES
We know how important diaries are in daily diet: we offer you a wide selection of local, national and international variety of cheese and diary products.

Wines & Spirits

Either do you need international wines or fancy to taste and experience our best Sicilian wines, you can count on us. We perfectly know how to match your guests' desires and preferences.

 
We provide our clients with the highest quality yacht provisions. With our extended network of partners and suppliers you have access to both local and imported provisions everywhere in Sicily!
 
We strive to support yacht owners, chefs, crew members and guests in receiving the best charter supplies available.

Description:
Real Drinks en dansk importør, grossist, distributør og forhandler af kvalitets drikkevarer. Vi kan tilbyde alt fra hjemmebrygget øl til økologisk sodavand. Vores kundegruppe er primært segmentet i HoReCa-branchen, samt vinforhandlere, gårdbutikker og lignede, der går lige så meget op i at servere og sælge kvalitet som vi selv gør.

Real Drinks startede i 2010, som en mindre importvirksomhed, og vi er siden vokset gennem fokus på drikkevarer med høj kvalitet og stor smag – til et firma med et unikt produktsortiment. Vi distribuerer nu i hele Danmark, og lægger et stort arbejde i at give vores kunder den bedste service og vejledning – og selvfølgelig de bedste produkter!

Name: Healthyfy Exports
Description:
Delivering Excellence in Makhana Wholesale & Retail Exports

Healthyfy Exports LLP specializes in the export of premium-quality Makhana (fox nuts, Lotus Seeds), serving clients worldwide for over five years. Renowned for our exceptional quality, customer-centric approach, and ethical practices, we’re committed to making this superfood globally accessible.

About Us

Founded to promote the health benefits of Makhana, Healthyfy Exports LLP has grown to become a trusted exporter to markets in Asia, Europe, North America, and beyond. Our Makhana is sourced directly from reliable farms, processed with state-of-the-art techniques, and rigorously quality-checked to meet global standards.

Our Core Values

Quality Excellence: Upholding the highest standards in sourcing, processing, and packaging.

Customer Satisfaction: Providing tailored solutions to meet unique client needs.

Sustainability: Empowering local farmers and adopting eco-friendly practices.
Integrity: Ensuring transparency and trust in every transaction.

What We Offer

Wholesale Supply: Bulk raw and processed Makhana customized for distributors and manufacturers.

Retail Packaging: Consumer-friendly, fresh, and quality-assured packages for stores.

Private Label Services: Customized branding solutions for businesses.
Innovative Products: Flavored and ready-to-eat Makhana snacks for modern tastes.

Why Choose Us?

Uncompromised Quality sourced directly from trusted farms.
Global Reach to over 20 countries with efficient logistics.
Health-Focused Products rich in protein, antioxidants, and fiber.
Customer-Centric Approach offering personalized support.
Sustainable Growth fostering ethical practices and community upliftment.

Let’s collaborate to make Makhana a global staple! Connect with us today.

Name: Intégrhalles - grossiste fruits et légumes
Description:
C'est au plein cœur de Rungis, plus grand marché de produits frais du monde, au milieu des fruits et légumes, que l'aventure Intégrhalles a vu le jour. 

Nous accompagnons chaque année une centaine de clients : 
 GSS (Grandes Surfaces Spécialisées), 
 GMS (Grandes & Moyennes Surfaces), 
 PMS (Petites & Moyennes Surfaces), 
 Quick-commerce...

 Pourquoi prêter une attention particulière à son rayon Fruits & Légumes ?
Le rayon fruits et légumes est un élément clé de l'offre de nombreux magasins de proximité. Il peut représenter jusqu'à 60% du chiffre d'affaires. L'attractivité de ce rayon est donc importante pour le succès du magasin, car elle peut influencer les décisions d'achat des clients. Il est donc important de s'assurer que les produits proposés sont de bonne qualité, bien présentés et attractifs.

 Comment peut-on vous aider à performer ?
Chez Intégrhalles, nous révolutionnons votre rapport au grossiste en nous inscrivant comme un partenaire qui est partie prenante dans la réussite de votre business. Votre réussite est notre réussite !

Nous mettons en place pour vous un plan de suivi :
 Offre fruits et légumes : plus de 450 références (en bio et en conventionnel).
 Logistique : nous mettons à votre disposition notre flotte logistique afin d’assurer la livraison en 24h dans les meilleures conditions.
 Accompagnement : nous vous aiguillons sur les produits qu’il est indispensable d’avoir en rayon, et sur les produits qui viendront ajouter une plus-value à celui-ci, en fonction de votre zone de chalandise.
 Merchandising : nos équipes vous accompagnent dans la mise en place de votre rayon, afin qu’il soit le plus attractif possible.
 Consulting : notre missionnons une agence indépendante qui vous aidera à atteindre de meilleurs résultats.

Vous manquez de temps pour analyser votre rayon F&L ? Vous manquez de connaissances sur ce secteur ?  Contactez-nous !

 contact@integrhalles.com
 www.integrhalles.com

Name: Distribuidora DLF Esquivel

Name: Alimentos AJA
Description:
Somos uma empresa atuante no segmento alimentício a 38 anos. 
Realizamos o recebimento, seleção, logística e entrega de diversos produtos no formato B2B e B2C.
Nosso carro chefe são os ovos de galinha desde nosso início. 

Em nossa instalação possuímos um espaço reservado para o SIF (Serviço de Inspeção Federal), que realiza o acompanhamento e a rastreabilidade de nossos produtos desde sua produção até seu consumo final, o que garante e certifica, através de laudos técnicos, a qualidade de nossos produtos e serviços.

Em 2008 realizamos a expansão da empresa e a tornamos um grupo formado pela nossa Própria Indústria de acompanhamentos e temperos (Farofas, Molhos, Cremes, Tapiocas, Alhos Processados, entre outros), além de nossa Distribuidora, que aumentou seu catálogo com o armazenamento e distribuição de outros itens base da alimentação de nós brasileiros (Ovos, Cebola, Alho, Batata, Abóbora, Azeite, Macarrão, Pescados, entre outros).

Atualmente a empresa atende toda a Grande São Paulo, Região Metropolitana e algumas cidades do interior próximas a capital paulista.
Possuímos equipamentos com alta tecnologia, frota própria de veículos e funcionários treinados e qualificados para levar a qualidade e a credibilidade que nossos clientes merecem.

O QUE FAZEMOS?
Vendemos produtos alimentícios que geram VALOR percebido de maneira única por cada cliente.

COMO FAZEMOS?
Aproximamos produtos do consumidor final, buscando a SATISFAÇÃO de todos os elos que compõem a cadeia.

PORQUE FAZEMOS?
Existimos para formar uma família COMPROMETIDA, ENTUSIASMADA e com VALORES ELEVADOS  que tem como meta estabelecer relação de CONFIANÇA com todas as pessoas e empresas as quais se relaciona.

ALIMENTOS AJA - Estabelecendo relações de confiança entre pessoas e empresas.

Name: Al Jawad Premium - Foody Food
Description:
Welcome to Foody Food – your premier destination for high-quality food products tailored exclusively for the vibrant HORECA sector in Saudi Arabia. With an unwavering commitment to excellence, we have quickly become synonymous with quality, taste, and authenticity, enriching the culinary landscape of our region one dish at a time.

At Foody Food, we take immense pride in our diverse range of culinary essentials, meticulously crafted to meet the discerning needs of our esteemed clientele. Whether you're in search of tantalizing potato specialties, delectable baked goods, succulent meats, savory sauces, or indulgent syrups and premium oils, our extensive catalogue boasts an array of products guaranteed to elevate every dining experience to new heights.

Collaborating with renowned brands such as McCain, Dixie Mills, Martins, Knorr, Hellmann's, Monin, and St. Helen's Meat Packers Limited, we ensure that each product we offer meets and exceeds the highest standards of quality, taste, and authenticity. Our partnerships with these esteemed brands reflect our unwavering commitment to excellence and our dedication to providing only the best to our customers.

With a proven track record of successful partnerships with over 50 esteemed customers, including hotels, restaurants, catering services, and cafes, we are confident that our products and services will resonate with your esteemed establishment. Whether you're looking to enhance your menu with premium ingredients or streamline your supply chain with reliable and efficient service, Foody Food is here to exceed your expectations.

Join us on our journey to culinary excellence – discover the Foody Food difference today.

Name: Padovana Macinazione Srl
Description:
Distributore di prodotti biologici, ingredienti alimentari e farine speciali.

La nostra esperienza e la continua ricerca di prodotti, ci permette di offrire standard qualitativi elevati garantendo maggiore sicurezza alimentare alla nostra clientela.

Per questo motivo la nostra azienda investe da oltre 25 anni le sue risorse nel mondo biologico.

Da anni selezioniamo i migliori produttori in ITALIA e nel mondo per offrirvi la serenità di poter contare su materie prime certificate, tracciate e documentate.
Ricerchiamo materie prime in ogni parte del mondo. Una volta trovate e testate, selezioniamo e certifichiamo partner qualificati ed affidabili. Seguiamo con attenzione tutto il ciclo, comprese le condizioni di trasporto al fine di garantire l’integrità e la qualità dei prodotti prima che arrivino presso i nostri magazzini.

L’azienda è certificata per la distribuzione di prodotti biologici in accordo alle norme UNI EN ISO 22000 UNI EN ISO 22005 e secondo gli standard BRC for storage and distribution, inoltre rispetta gli standard Demeter.

#bio #biologico #organic #senzaglutine #glutenfree #food

Name: DISNA S.A
Description: En DISNA Honduras, formamos parte del Grupo Zablah, con más de 60 años de experiencia en distribución regional. Desde 2005 hemos desarrollado una operación sólida en Honduras, liderando la distribución de productos de consumo masivo a nivel nacional. Con más de 4,500 clientes y cobertura en los 298 municipios del país, somos sinónimo de crecimiento, innovación y servicio.

Name: SEPAL
Description:
Depuis 1980, SEPAL incarne une véritable passion pour l’alimentation. Entreprise familiale française, animée par des valeurs fortes, SEPAL a su évoluer pour répondre aux besoins des professionnels de la restauration et de l’industrie agroalimentaire.

Tout a commencé avec un produit : la tomate, notre spécialité, que nous sélectionnons avec soin pour garantir sa qualité et sa saveur. Au fil des années, notre offre s'est enrichie de nombreux autres produits, chacun choisi avec la même exigence :
 Des fruits savoureux, comme l'abricot, la pêche, le litchi et bien d'autres.
 Des légumes d'exception : artichauts, cœurs de palmier, asperges, poivrons…
 Des produits de la mer, à commencer par notre thon soigneusement sélectionné.
 Et bien sûr, des condiments de qualité pour relever vos plats : olives, pickles, huiles, vinaigres…

Chez SEPAL, nous sommes fiers de notre savoir-faire en matière d'importation, de stockage et de livraison, un savoir-faire qui a permis de tisser des liens solides et durables avec nos partenaires. Chaque produit que nous livrons raconte l’histoire d’un engagement à long terme pour offrir des solutions fiables, variées et adaptées aux besoins des professionnels.

Plus qu’un fournisseur, nous sommes un partenaire de confiance pour les professionnels du goût.

FROM THE TREE TO THE TABLE WITH MAXIMUM EFFICIENCY QUALITY AND FRESHNESS.

With a strong focus on customer service, we always try and deliver our products in a systematic way. We have a strong distribution network meaning we are able to deliver 6 days a week and offer next day delivery where possible. Our multi-temperature supply chain gives our customers full consolidation of frozen, ambient and chilled products on the same delivery, which makes life easier for them and is a point of difference.

Description:
Entreprise familiale belge depuis plus d’un siècle, Bruyerre est un partenaire de choix pour tous les professionnels des métiers de bouche. Nous mettons à votre disposition une large gamme de matières premières, petit matériel et équipements professionnels, rigoureusement sélectionnés pour répondre aux exigences des boulangers-pâtissiers, chocolatiers, glaciers, traiteurs, restaurateurs et bien d’autres artisans passionnés.

Name: innotaste GmbH
Description:
Since its' foundation in 2004 innotaste (from „innovation“ and „taste“) has been the flavour distribution partner in Germany for the international Firmenich group. Within a few months further strategic principals have joined and innotaste has expanded its business activities to several European countries. The aim of these co-operations is to improve the service to our common food and beverage clients.

To achieve this, experienced Firmenich employees from Sales & Marketing and distribution experts from German C.H. Erbslöh group have become a unity by founding innotaste GmbH. Since then innotaste has taken the responsibility for the food activities of the parent company C.H. Erbslöh which has already been operational with own subsidiaries in several European countries for many years. Since its foundation back in 1876, C.H. Erbslöh is a family-owned modern distribution company in 5th generation which successfully links international producers of high quality specialties with European clients. This creative merger clearly differentiates innotaste from its’ competitors.

With the selective and market driven extension of the product portfolio innotaste has a clear focus on only a few suppliers rather than offering an entire product portfolio from A-Z.

A computer-aided warehousing (4000 tons capacity, DIN ISO-9001:2015) and own regional application labs make innotaste a reliable and flexible partner on the European market for food and beverage ingredients.

The keys to success are:

Quality of products
innotaste concentrates on high quality products that meet the market requirements

Fast service
innotaste, as a rule, delivers products on stock within one week

Flexibiliy
innotaste adapts product quantities and forecast planning to the clients’ needs

Close to the client
focus on “real” needs of the clients; innotaste in close collaboration with R&D, Purchasing, Marketing
innotaste sees itself as a partner for innovative solutions. The tailor made service package is made

Name: Unidex
Description:
Unidex is a family business founded in 1989, driven by a passion for authentic food from around the world.

With a team of more than 100 people, we bring the best flavours of African, Caribbean, Asian and Middle Eastern cuisines to European retailers. From our headquarters in De Zilk, the Netherlands, supported by sales offices in Belgium, Great Britain, Portugal and Spain, and our own production facility in Thailand, we operate close to both source and market.

Our mission is simple: to make high-quality, authentic exotic flavours accessible to everyone, anytime and anywhere.

As consumer tastes continue to evolve, demand for exotic food and drinks keeps growing. Every day, our team works to ensure a reliable and consistent supply of the best products from around the world — all under one roof.

Beyond distribution, we act as a partner. Our account managers support retailers with category advice and tailored assortments that fit their customers and markets. From independent local stores to national supermarket chains, Unidex is your partner in exotic food.

We are Unidex.
Your specialist in exotic food concepts.
We deliver authentic taste. We offer a world of taste.

Description:
Bakalaros Group is the fastest growing commercial network in Greece, employing more than 200 associates. We reach, with own means and resources, a 6000 POS Market via 9 (nine) Last Mile sites – hubs, supporting established Brands in the Food & Beverage Industry,  by delivering On Time In Full. 

We fully exploit a solid business model to enhance customer experience in the HORECA market and the organized Retail, collaborating with the biggest companies of the industry such as Athenian Brewery, Carlsberg Group, COCA COLA Hellenic Bottling Company, Diageo, Nestle, Pernod Ricard, Zagori  - just to name a few.

At Bakalaros Group, our values reflect our DNA and Legacy: Reliability, Integrity, Efficiency, Consistency drive our business forward and are well respected within the Group.

We are a customer-oriented Organization striving for excellence. Our mission is to deliver results and add value respectively across the supply chain – from Industry to Customers and finally to Consumers, fully supporting the brand at the POS.

Bakalaros Group is the parent company of 6 entities : Fdrink S.A (Athens), Thanasoulas S.A. ( Agrinio ), Depirus S.A ( Ioannina with Hubs in Filippiada & Igoumenitsa ), Cava Koulieris S.A. ( Kalamata ), Bakkar S.A. ( Patras ) & Bakalaros S.A. ( Patras ) which hosts the operating headquarters. The driving force of our success is our people. We invest highly on talent, technology, and knowledge. 

We deliver what we promise. 

Join our network!

Name: Gunz Warenhandels GmbH
Description:
Gunz Warenhandels GmbH was founded in 1986. We are a family-run enterprise with headquarters in Mäder, in western Austria.

The focus of our business is the development and distribution of our international own-brand range in the food industry. Currently our portfolio includes 20 internationally registered Gunz brands, which we export to over 100 countries worldwide.

We offer an international range of foods that includes more than 1200 attractive products for a wide range of markets: confectionary, pastries and bakery products, chocolates and chocolate, snacks, nutriments, beverages, international products, licensed products and seasonal products.

Our products are created worldwide by more than 150 different suppliers. These are often market leaders in their individual segments.

Name: NATURAL FUNCTIONAL INGREDIENTS
Description:
NATURAL is a french company based in Angers in the heart of Loire Valley. 
Our team is dedicated to providing its customers with a large range of natural and functional ingredients.
ISO 22 000 and Organic certified, NATURAL control the quality of its products. More than an ingredient supplier, NATURAL is a real partner for the ingredient investigation, quality control and regulatory support, up to the shipping to your production plant.

Name: Aqunion
Description:
Aqunion is one of the world’s leading abalone businesses and a proud pioneer of South Africa’s abalone industry.

We sustainably farm, process, and export premium Haliotis midae abalone — a species unique to the pristine, nutrient-rich waters of South Africa’s southern coastline, where the cold Atlantic meets the warm Indian Ocean. 

Our product range includes canned, dried, frozen, vacuum-sealed, and live abalone, with our iconic SP-code canned abalone trusted for quality since 1966.

Based in Walker Bay, South Africa, we proudly serve global markets with sustainably sourced, top-grade abalone. Our responsible aquaculture practices are backed by GLOBALG.A.P. certification and green status from WWF Hong Kong and WWF’s South African Sustainable Seafood Initiative (SASSI).

At Aqunion, sustainability and innovation are the cornerstones of our philosophy. We honour the ocean that provides for us by producing responsibly, uplifting our communities, and preserving the marine environment for future generations.

Sustainably produced • No additives • No preservatives

With exclusive brands, strategic partnerships, and a commitment to serving both formal and informal markets, Angolatino is more than just a distributor. We are Angola's trusted one-stop destination for premium products, ensuring every customer finds what they seek. Premium, Values, Creativity

Name: APIKA Kaffeerösterei & Kaffeemaschinen Center
Description:
Wir kümmern uns um die Kaffeeversorgung am Arbeitsplatz und in der Bäckerei, stets unter dem Motto: Kaffee neu erleben!

Unser Unternehmen ist spezialisiert auf Beratung und Verkauf von Kaffee-, Verkaufs- und Serviceautomaten für verschiedene Standorte. Wir bieten eine breites Sortiment an Kaffeemaschinen und Verkaufsautomaten sowie Wasserspendern an.

In Verbindung mit unserer Kaffee-Großrösterei bieten wir unseren Kunden abgestimmte Kaffeekonzepte mit der Qualität einer Kaffeemanufaktur zu bezahlbaren Preisen.

Darüber hinaus entwickeln und produzieren wir Eigenmarken bereits ab geringen Mengen um unseren Kunden, welche größtenteils aus Bäckereien bestehen, eine Positionierung im Markt mit klarer Abgrenzung zum Wettbewerb zu verschaffen. 

Unser Servicenetzwerk ermöglicht es uns bundesweit zu agieren und zeichnet sich durch hohe Kundenorientierung und schnelle Reaktionszeiten aus.

Name: Western Edge Seafood
Description:
Western Edge Seafood is a leading U.S. importer, producer, and distributor of frozen seafood, serving national restaurant groups, foodservice distributors, retailers, and wholesalers across the country.

Founded in 1988, our business was built on a deep understanding of fresh seafood—and when the market shifted, we brought that same expertise to the frozen category, scaling with integrity and precision.

Today, Western Edge is one of the top importers in the U.S. and a trusted supplier of the most consumed seafoods, including Tilapia, Swai, Catfish, Ocean Perch, Pollock, Cod, Haddock, Shrimp, Salmon, Tuna, Mahi, and more. We are also the nation's largest importer of Ocean Perch and one of the top importers of Tilapia and Swai.

While we’ve made our name in commodity seafood—especially Tilapia, which we import at volumes exceeding 12 million lbs annually—we’re actively expanding our reach through value-added innovation.

Our value-added products are designed to solve real-world challenges in the foodservice space—streamlining labor, minimizing prep, and delivering consistent quality. We also develop value-added solutions for retail partners, offering versatility in both branding and product formats.

We maintain deep partnerships with our farms and processors and hold all suppliers to strict standards of workmanship, food safety, and product consistency. Our integrated supply chain ensures every product we ship reflects the care and experience behind it.

Private label and controlled brand programs are available for qualifying partners.

Our Philosophy:
With decades in the seafood industry, we’ve learned that quality and integrity never go out of style. We lead with experience, listen closely, and work hard to deliver what our customers need—every time.

 We are The Fish People.

Name: Halema
Description: Somos una empresa peruana con más de 30 años de experiencia, líder en la importación y distribución de productos cárnicos congelados a nivel nacional. Name: NICE RICE ¦ B Corp
Description:
What's NICE RICE? Put simply: it's rice, done better. And by that we mean:

 Better tasting rice.
 That's better for the planet. 
 And a better way of doing business, too. 

Why? Because conventional rice farming produces massive amounts of methane, a powerful greenhouse gas that is contributing to climate change. In fact, beef is the only food responsible for higher global emissions. And we believe our planet deserves better.

The GOOD NEWS? A solution exists! A sustainable way of farming rice that cuts methane emissions, saves water, and improves farmers’ livelihoods. And like millions of farmers and climate scientists from around the world, we believe it’s the future of rice.

So where does NICE RICE come in? Our role is to build the demand for a better rice industry, because we believe that when enough people demand change, change will happen. So, our rice connects people looking for more sustainable ways to enjoy their food, with pioneering rice farmers who are leading change in the industry. By offering the more sustainable option without compromising on taste or convenience, we make it as easy as possible for people to be part of a positive change for our planet, one pack of rice at a time. 

Launched online in May 2023, with exciting news coming soon. Watch this space…

Rice International PLT (LLP0019778-LGN)

Name: Seven Stars Cash and  Carry
Description:
OUR JOURNEY
The journey of the firm from Ever Fresh Dairy to the new venture of Seven Star Cash and Carry has a very interesting beginning. We started the business with a mere £36 investment by selling eggs and bread to the local cafes and earning next to Nil profits. But low profits never stopped us from pushing ourselves over the edge. The expansion started and the company began dealing with milk and in a very little time, it grew into a variety of drinks, cheese, and many other dairy products.

Since the beginning, the journey of Ever Fresh Dairy has been nothing but inspiring and it will not be incorrect to state it in a similar fashion of ‘Rome was not built in a day’. Yes, Seven Stars Cash and Carry brings along a history! We believe bringing the company from dust to dawn to a position so tall is always a success story worth giving all ears. When expansion takes place, new additions are always good to carry along. Established in 2018, the company began the journey by supplying eggs and bread to small cafes and takeaways in London. With hard work and determination, the business then developed rapidly, and the supply chain turned into wholesale retailers!

When you have the right strategy and high aims, no night seems too small. With passing years, each day witnessed some highs and lows. The story has many successful chapters; we started with selling minimal and had only 2 products, now we have over 2000 products with 7 Star Cash and carry, for our customers to choose from!

Today we have embarked our journey with uncountable achievements, certifications, and strong relationship-based clients. The celebration of achieving each milestone is a bookmark of the journey of ‘Seven Star Cash and Carry’.

But as demand grew, we did not compromise the quality of the products and in fact raised the bars!

We believe in keeping the trust of our clients as our aimed priority and never let the expansion compromise with it. We make sure that they still feel that they are take

Name: Virtue
Description:
Our own quest to improve gut health led to us falling in love with artisan sourdough pizza and we have been preaching the virtues of it ever since!

Pizza is more than just food - it’s an experience. It has a unique, almost magical way to bring people together, regardless of age and culture. With the nation’s health in a perilous state, we saw an opportunity to inspire as many people as possible to make better food choices through the power of pizza.

Our mission now is to create artisan pizza experiences that are healthier without compromising on taste or quality. 

Who do we serve?

We supply to both the hospitality and catering industry, as well as home pizza enthusiasts through retail channels.

Catering and hospitality chefs: For those who want to offer consistent, healthier, high-quality pizzas but may lack the time to craft their dough from scratch.

Retailers: Looking to provide consumers with a healthier, artisanal pizza option to enjoy in the comfort of their own home.

Nos diferenciamos por implementar tecnología de maduración industrial italiana, lo que nos permite entregar frutas en su punto justo, listas para su comercialización o consumo.

Name: GRO-CONNECT.COM
Description:
Facts everyone should be aware of:
Food waste in the US consumes 21% of all freshwater, 19% of all fertilizer, 18% of cropland and 21% of landfill volume. Retailers throw away 40+ billion pounds of food annually, equivalent to 10% of the total food supply at the retail level. This problem is most pronounced in fresh produce, which consistently sees 12% losses. 
GRO-CONNECT.COM has been able to demonstrate 25% food waste reduction with initial customers, which at scale could have massive environmental impacts. Additionally, GRO-CONNECT.COM can enable retailers to make better margins on fresh food, it should become more available and affordable to consumers.
(https://www.nrdc.org/sites/default/files/wasted-food-IP.pdf)

Name: !MPROV Cocktails
Description:
We have no spirit. Literally. But we do have a whole lot of love for giving you  options. See, everyone’s out here telling you how to drink. “All or nothing.”  “Sober is the new cool.” “Real cocktails only.” Blah, blah, blah. 
At !mprov? We don’t care. 
Spike it, or don’t. Grow up, or don’t. Black out, or—okay, maybe rethink that  one. But seriously, we’re not here to babysit. We’re just here to hand you a  great drink and let you do whatever the hell you want with it. Because it’s your choice. And all we want is for you to make Pour Choices.  (See what we did there?) 
Want it straight-up? Fantastic. Want to splash in some booze? Go for it. Want  to mix it with something questionable and call it “your thing”? You do you!  We’re not in the business of judging, preaching, or pretending we care what’s  in your cup. We just make the drinks - you call the shots. 
So, whether you’re feeling a tipsy-toast or a sober-sip, one thing’s for sure:  you’re in control. 
And that’s all we care about. 
Wait—did we say we care? 
Whoops. We don’t.

Name: DisCo
Description:
thedisco.tech 

Brands and producers need to be involved in the process of getting their products to shelves and on plates. The industry feels very segmented in the sense that a producer, unless they’re DTC, has to lean on their distributor “partner” for everything after the product leaves their facility. There is little to no visibility as to what is happening behind the curtain. Brands and producers should have full visibility to how their items are performing, sell through rates, customer profile and volume, pricing, etc. The distributor should be a force multiplier, not a necessary evil in the supply chain. Included in The DisCo package is a full suite of transparency and analytics tools available to vendor partners. Vendors will have direct access to their customers supported by The DisCo. On the other hand,  we are comfortable with every level of engagement from our vendors; if they want to have The DisCo be their sales force, we are happy to do so.  We are firm believers in competitive advantage; vendors can focus their energy on their products while we handle getting it to customers.

Name: It’s Your Coffee
Description:
Bij ons draait alles om koffie van uitzonderlijke kwaliteit, geproduceerd met respect voor mensen, natuur en vakmanschap. We geloven dat échte kwaliteit begint bij de oorsprong. Daarom selecteren we uitsluitend koffiebonen van boeren die met zorg en toewijding werken aan hun product. Deze bonen kopen wij rechtstreeks bij de producent, zonder tussenkomst van tussenhandelaren of anonieme verkoopkanalen. Hierdoor ontvangen boeren een eerlijke en transparante prijs, en bouwen we samen aan langdurige, duurzame relaties.
Duurzaamheid vormt een essentieel onderdeel van onze identiteit. Door direct in te kopen, stimuleren we niet alleen een betere levensstandaard voor de boeren, maar verminderen we ook de ecologische voetafdruk die ontstaat door onnodige schakels in de keten. Daarnaast letten we scherp op teeltmethodes, biodiversiteit en sociale omstandigheden op de plantages, omdat goede koffie alleen kan ontstaan in een gezonde omgeving.
Na de oogst worden de bonen met uiterste precisie verwerkt en vervolgens toevertrouwd aan een ambachtelijke, speciaal geselecteerde Drentse branderij. Daar worden ze geroosterd door vakmensen die hun ambacht tot in de finesse beheersen. Geen massaproductie, maar zorgvuldig afgemeten brandprofielen en aandacht voor detail en daarmee private label verzorgt. Deze liefde voor het vak proef je terug in de rijkheid van de smaak en ruik je in de volle, uitnodigende geur van onze koffie.
Of je nu een horecaonderneming, kantoor of particuliere koffieliefhebber bent: wij helpen je graag bij het vinden van de koffie die past bij jouw smaak, jouw gasten en jouw merkidentiteit. Met kennis van zaken, korte lijnen en een passie voor kwaliteit staan we klaar om je te adviseren.
Onze belofte:
Van plant tot kop leveren we koffie die eerlijk, duurzaam en ambachtelijk is, mét een smaakbeleving die elke dag bijzonder maakt.

Name: Alba Food Trading B.V.
Description:
Precies 22 jaar geleden begonnen we aan een reis met de droom om een bedrijf op te richten dat zich kon aanpassen aan de veranderende dynamiek van de zakelijke wereld en klanttevredenheid centraal stelde. Destijds zagen we de uitdagingen in de bevoorradingsprocessen van supermarkten en de leemte in deze sector. Ons doel was niet alleen om producten te leveren, maar ook vertrouwen en waarde te bieden. Deze visie heeft ons vandaag tot een toonaangevende speler gemaakt met een assortiment van meer dan 4000 verschillende producten.

We begonnen met een klein team. Als leverancier van basisbehoeften van supermarkten bedienden we onze eerste klanten. Ons productaanbod was destijds beperkt tot een paar categorieën, maar de tevredenheid van onze klanten gaf ons groei een flinke impuls. Elke nieuwe klant bracht ons meer verantwoordelijkheid en tegelijkertijd nieuwe kansen om te groeien.

In de loop der tijd hebben we de behoeften van onze klanten beter leren begrijpen door de werking van supermarkten grondig te bestuderen. Door veranderingen in consumentengewoonten te volgen, hebben we ons productportfolio uitgebreid. Vandaag de dag bieden we een breed scala aan producten in vrijwel alle categorieën die in supermarkten worden verkocht, waarmee we zowel kleine als grote supermarkten volledig kunnen bedienen.

We hebben niet alleen een breed scala aan producten geboden, maar ook systemen ontwikkeld om de bevoorradingsprocessen zo efficiënt mogelijk te maken. Met snelle leveringen, regelmatige voorraadcontroles en een klantgerichte aanpak streven we ernaar om onze klanten niet alleen producten, maar ook oplossingen te bieden.

In dit proces zijn we niet alleen een leverancier geweest, maar ook een partner die heeft bijgedragen aan de groei van onze zakenpartners. Hun succes vormt de basis van ons eigen succes. Vandaag de dag zijn we, met 22 jaar ervaring, een symbool van vertrouwen in de sector.

Name: DIN Distribuidora
Description:
Desde 2000, trilhamos nossa jornada em Contagem, MG, como pioneiros na distribuição de produtos industriais. Nosso foco: atender com excelência o varejo alimentar, pequeno e médio, de maneira única e inovadora.

Nossa essência está na distribuição, mas vamos além. Superar expectativas e surpreender nossos clientes é o que nos move. Cada segmento é tocado pelo nosso estilo singular, redefinindo o serviço tradicional e elevando a experiência no mercado.

Nossa estratégia se apoia na parceria, focando no desenvolvimento de marcas e distribuição, otimizadas por um mix de produtos cuidadosamente escolhido. Com um Centro Integrado, oferecemos diferenciais como Câmara Fria, Televendas eficientes e processos modernos, tudo para elevar a qualidade e proporcionar a melhor experiência de distribuição na região.

Esses são os pilares que guiam o planejamento desde o início da operação pelos nossos fundadores Frederico e Felipe Melo.

#ConteComADIN

Name: Upgrowth Solutions Aps
Description:
Specialister i inhouse dyrkning til professionelle køkkener

Upgrowth Solutions ApS udvikler, tester og leverer komplette inhouse dyrkningsløsninger til professionelle køkkener, kantiner, restauranter, plejehjem, skoler og offentlige institutioner.
Vores systemer gør det nemt at dyrke mikrogrønt, krydderurter, salater og grøntsager direkte dér, hvor maden tilberedes.

Dansk udvikling og rådgivning
Med over 25 års erfaring inden for teknisk udvikling, salg og ledelse kombinerer vi teknologi, design og brugervenlighed.
Vores team arbejder dagligt med innovation og optimering, så systemerne lever op til kravene i moderne storkøkkener.

Demorums og testafdeling
I vores demonstrationsrum kan kunder og samarbejdspartnere opleve vækstsystemerne i drift.
Her afholdes præsentationer og workshops, hvor deltagerne lærer om dyrkning, drift og brug af mikrogrønt i professionelle køkkener.

FoodLab – smag, teknik og plantebaseret udvikling
Vores FoodLab er et kreativt udviklingsrum, hvor teknikere og kokke tester nye sorter, smagsprofiler og dyrkningsmetoder, som styrker den plantebaserede madkultur.
Her omsættes idéer til løsninger og opskrifter, der fremmer en grønnere og mere effektiv madproduktion.

Fremtidens inhouse dyrkning
Målet er at gøre lokal dyrkning til en naturlig del af professionelle køkkener.
Vi kombinerer teknisk ekspertise og fødevareforståelse for at skabe driftssikre, energieffektive og brugervenlige systemer, der fungerer i hverdagen.

Fordele ved vores vækstsystemer:
– Reduceret ressourceforbrug og driftsomkostninger
– Kortere transportveje og mindre madspild
– Lavere klimaaftryk gennem lokal produktion
– Enkel betjening og stabil drift

Partnerskab og innovation
Vi samarbejder med storkøkkener, kantiner og institutioner for at fremme lokal produktion og teknologisk udvikling inden for microfarming.
Upgrowth Solutions ApS skaber funktionelle, driftssikre og fremtidssikrede vækstsystemer, der gør en reel forskel – for brugeren, køkkenet og klimaet.

Name: Hermanos Rodríguez Barbancho
Description:
Nuestra historia es un testimonio de pasión por la tradición y la excelencia. Desde nuestros humildes comienzos en la salazón y curación de jamones y embutidos en los años 60, hemos estado arraigados en la tierra fértil de Los Pedroches, donde las condiciones ambientales y la calidad de la materia prima son inigualables.

Cada paso en nuestro proceso es un testimonio de nuestro compromiso con la calidad. El resultado son el sabor único de cada una de nuestras marcas. Nos hemos especializado en la creación de jamones ibéricos y serranos excepcionales. Especial énfasis en el jamón ibérico de cebo y el jamón ibérico de bellota, ambos elogiados por su calidad inigualable.

A lo largo de más de 50 años, hemos ganado la confianza de nuestros clientes. Reconocen la dedicación incansable que ponemos en cada uno de nuestros productos. Hermanos Rodríguez Barbancho no es solo una empresa, es una historia de éxito construida sobre tradición, calidad y pasión.

Description:
Huize Horeca is de nieuwe naam van onze overkoepelende organisatie voor onafhankelijke horecagroothandels met klanten in Noord-Holland, Utrecht en Flevoland. Wij leveren vrijwel alle merken van vrijwel alle (speciaal) bierbrouwerijen, wijnhuizen en (non)foodproducenten.

Bikkels, met kennis van zaken en een ouderwets gevoel voor service en gezelligheid. Bij sommige klanten komen we al meer dan 60 jaar over de vloer.

Van restaurants en cafés tot snackbars, van strandpaviljoens tot sportkantines, van hotels tot campings: wij zijn er voor élke horecagelegenheid. Door onze krachten te bundelen hebben we een sterk assortiment en onze logistiek dik op orde. We zijn snel en flexibel, nemen ons vak serieus en laten onze klanten nooit zitten. De horecawereld wordt sneller en zakelijker. Juist daarom vinden wij het belangrijk om nog tijd te maken voor een praatje, onze klanten te leren kennen. Doen we dan onder voor de grote jongens in de branche? Integendeel. We zijn een volwaardige horecapartner, met alle producten marktkennis in huis. Wat ons onderscheidt, is onze persoonlijke betrokkenheid en uitstekende service. We geven altijd thuis, ook op onverwachte piekmomenten.

Name: Yaamarra & Yarral
Description:
Yaamarra & Yarral - "sheaf & stone". In our Gamilaraay language "yaamarra" is a sheaf of native grain, and "yarral" is stone. We bring the two together to produce stone-milled native grain flour. 

We are a 100% Gamilaraay owned and led social enterprise dedicated to reawakening the Gamilaraay people's native grain foodways; and dedicated to increasing First Nations participation in, benefit from, and leadership of the broader food and agriculture industry.

Our first step on our intergenerational journey is to begin processing our native grains, alongside other ancient and contemporary grains, by using a handcrafted stone mill to produce authentic, nutrient dense, stone-milled flour.

Name: Lauze Boissons
Description:
SAS Lauze Boissons est une entreprise familiale qui existe depuis 1886. Elle est spécialisée dans la distribution de boissons en CHR/CHD. (Bières, alcool, soft drinks, jus de fruits, café, vins...)
L'entreprise existe depuis 1886 lorsque Louis Lauze dit « Tantusse » est venu s'installer à St Privat de Vallongue et a commencé à vendre du vin en vrac.
En 1906, son fils Elie reprend l'affaire et après la guerre 1914-1918, il ajoute l'embouteillage de la bière ainsi que de la limonade « la pétillante ».
En 1942, c'est Aimé Lauze qui à son tour développe l'entreprise. Michel son fils, reprend l'affaire en 1972 et l'activité du négoce s'étend géographiquement. Le vin embouteillé s'appelle désormais « le Tantussou » et sera vendu jusqu'en 1985.
Depuis 1997, Gilles Lauze continue de maintenir cette activité en étendant son secteur et en se spécialisant dans le domaine des vins de la région Languedoc Roussillon. Aujourd'hui avec ses enfants Clément, Ysaline, et Valentin, il est présent sur tout le département de la Lozère. 
Six générations se sont succédées, dans le négoce des boissons.
L'entreprise approvisionne les bars, hôtels, restaurants, fêtes votives… sur le département de la Lozère. 
L'entreprise propose des vins de toutes les régions de France mais aussi plus particulièrement ceux du Languedoc Roussillon tels que Gauby, Daumas Gassac, Hortus, Mas Jullien, Grange des Pères etc. Les vins sont présents sur la plupart des cartes des restaurants du département.
En 2004, Gilles a développé la vente de vins vers un public plus large en rachetant « le Bouchon Cévenol » cave implantée à Florac.
En 2006, la société s’installe à Mende en ouvrant un nouveau dépôt.
En Septembre 2010, une autre cave à vins « Comptoir des Vignes » voit le jour à Mende.
En Juin 2015, Lauze Boissons rachète France Boissons Alès. La société est désormais présente dans le département du Gard.

Backmeister, EDV-Spezialisten, Techniker und Betriebswirtschaftler führen darüber hinaus Beratungen, Projektierungen, Schulungen und Wartungsarbeiten bei unseren Mitgliedern durch. So unterstützen wir sie in ihrer Weiterentwicklung und helfen ihnen in (wirtschaftlichen) Notlagen.

The program carried out by Kinarya will adhere to the four pillars of core values adopted by Petrosea as the parent company which is also in line with the Sustainable Development Goals (“SDGs”). The pillars are Education (Training Center), Health (Private Clinic), Economic Empowerment (Coffee Production Center / Forest to Cup), and Environment (Food Waste Management / Food Waste to Compost). 

Kinarya carries a mission to improve people's lives in Indonesia through the company's four main pillars. The Social Enterprise is built to support Petrosea‘s social activities while also solving broader social issues in Indonesia. Kinarya uses a triple bottom line approach that is committed to 3 dimensions of performance results, namely People, Planet, and Prosperity. Through the concept of social enterprise, Kinarya pledge to share a percentage of its profits back to the society and environment.

Pizzadeeg heeft tijd nodig om tot de beste kwaliteit te rijzen. Dit heeft Deegmeesters al voor jou gedaan. Jij kunt de bodem dus direct gebruiken.

Deze perfecte bodems zullen jou en je bedrijf laten groeien en bovenal ontlasten in je proces en je een hogere winstmarge bieden.

Deegmeesters verzorgt de basis voor jouw pizza en kan je ook ondersteunen met kaas, tomaten saus en toppings die zorgvuldig zijn uitgekozen en uitvoerig zijn getest.

Het enige wat jij hoeft te doen is 3,5 minuut wachten tot de perfecte pizza uit de oven komt en daarmee je klanten tot vaste klanten maakt.

Heb jij net als onze bestaande klanten een pizzeria, een hotel, een camping, een kantine en wil jij in 3,5 minuut de perfecte pizza op tafel zetten neem dan contact met ons op.

Voor beginnende ondernemers bieden wij via onze partners ook ondersteuning bij het uitzoeken van de perfecte oven voor jouw bedrijf en bieden we je ook ondersteuning op locatie!

Description:
HMS – Hanseatic Marine Services has more than 170 years of experience and a long tradition in ship supply worldwide. 

HMS has its head office in Hamburg but also has premises at the locks on the North Baltic Sea Canal in Kiel and Nuremberg.
With our worldwide provision service we serve all types of merchant vessels, a wide range of ocean and river cruise vessels as well as ferries. For our ocean and river cruise vessels we specialize in providing quality provisions and bonded stores, we also prepare customized solutions for customers with individual requests for gourmet foods and fine wines. 
From our warehouse in Hamburg, we supply merchant vessels with provision and bonded stores in many North European ports. Our teams of Provision Supply Management and Technical Supply Management experts in Hamburg deal with orders and organise deliveries for more than 75 shipping companies.
In Kiel we supply our merchant vessels with provision, bonded stores and technical stores from our warehouse while the vessels are passing through the locks.
In addition HMS provides, to all the vessels under its management, through its Galley Support department, a wide variety of services covering all aspects of galley related issues ranging from assistance with recipes and meal planning to nutritional recommendations as well as offering online training sessions for chief cooks. Furthermore, our team of well-trained boarding officers carry out on-board visits to give operational support in optimising a wide range of galley processes and any other aspects of provision management.
Our Technical Supply Management service offers support in planning and executing all orders within the bounds of a pre-set consumables budget, taking into account the required quality, allowing the shipping companies to concentrate on their core business.
We are more than just your ship supplier we are your worldwide supply partner with customized solutions to suit your every need.

Through this platform, we bring authentic, real-time updates directly from Pakistan’s seafood markets — including daily prices, export trends, catch volumes, and trade insights that matter to buyers, exporters, and industry professionals worldwide.

Our mission is to bridge the information gap between Pakistan’s fishing communities, processors, and global importers by sharing verified market data, export news, and trend analyses that reflect the evolving dynamics of the seafood trade.

Whether you’re a global buyer seeking reliable supply, an exporter monitoring market movements, or an industry analyst exploring trade patterns, our updates provide a clear view of how Pakistan’s seafood market connects with global demand and sustainability trends.

Stay informed, stay connected — and discover how Pakistan’s seafood sector is shaping the future of international trade.

Our manufacturing, production, and packaging facilities in Pakistan operate with a large capacity. Our product ranges include Edible Salt, Home Decor items, Health and Wellness products, Bath line essentials, Kitchenware, and Building Decorative products, all tailored to meet the diverse needs of our global clients.

At NGM Himalayan Salt Pakistan, we are committed to continuous improvement, product innovation, and exceptional quality. Every stage, from sourcing to manufacturing to quality control, reflects strict standards and dedicated craftsmanship. Our team is fully equipped to offer customized and tailor made products based on your specific requirements.

With a strong commitment to purity and excellence, the NGM team ensures that every product is refined, handcrafted, and produced through an advanced process that removes impurities while preserving the authentic artisan character of Himalayan salt.

NGM Himalayan Salt Pakistan is dedicated to delivering quality, trust, and value to customers around the world.

Name: SUNTAT Europe GmbH
Description: SUNTAT ist ein Kunstwort und setzt sich zusammen aus den Silben „SUN“ für die Heimatstadt der Familie Baklan, nämlich Sungurlu und der Silbe „TAT“ was das türkische Wort für Geschmack ist. Damit symbolisiert die Marke die Herkunft der mediterranen Lebensmittel, die noch heute den Kern des Unternehmens ausmachen. Im Laufe der Zeit, wurden diese Lebensmittel auch immer mehr unter dem Biosiegel produziert, da die Bewahrung unserer Natur ein Kernanliegen der Firma ist. Unter dem Zeichen der aufgehenden Sonne vertreibt die Lebensmittelhandelsgesellschaft SUNTAT mittlerweile an die 3000 Produkte – und ist weltweit in mehr 50 Ländern erhältlich.

Name: Tamar Fresh
Description:
Tamar Fresh is a family-run food supplier based in Saltash, Cornwall, serving Cornwall and Devon with fresh produce, dairy, meats, and grocery essentials. Founded with over 30 years of industry experience, the company has built its reputation on quality, reliability, and local sourcing. Tamar Fresh works closely with growers and producers across the Westcountry, particularly in the Tamar Valley and surrounding regions, ensuring seasonal produce and sustainable farming practices remain at the heart of their offering. This commitment supports local communities while providing customers with fresh, ethically sourced products.

The company caters to a wide range of customers, including schools, hospitals, hospitality businesses, and households. For domestic customers, Tamar Fresh operates Tamar Fresh at Home, an online delivery service offering convenient fresh produce boxes, dairy items, meats, and store cupboard essentials. Trade clients benefit from a dedicated ordering system that streamlines bulk and scheduled deliveries. With a strong focus on customer service, Tamar Fresh provides flexible ordering options and reliable delivery routes across the region.

Beyond fresh produce, Tamar Fresh also supplies prepared foods such as its popular “Proper Sarnies” sandwich range, appealing to convenience outlets and catering services. The company actively engages with its community through social media, sharing seasonal updates, supplier stories, and recipe ideas to promote local produce. Its values center on sustainability, supporting regional agriculture, and delivering quality products at competitive prices.

In a competitive market, Tamar Fresh continues to thrive by combining modern convenience with traditional values, ensuring freshness, trust, and community remain at the core of its operations.

Name: Central Supplies (Brierley Hill) Limited
Description:
Central Supplies was established in 1988. Over subsequent years the business has grown in size and now is recognised as one of the leading distributors of chilled and ambient foods to the wholesale and cash and carry sectors. The business is now part of the Kitwave wholesale group.

We have 2 storage, picking and distribution operations based in Halesowen and Peterlee. We deliver to the entire UK (excl NI) with most post codes delivered to a minimum of 3 times weekly. This is possible because of our considerable scale and a further 4 strategically located distribution hubs.

Deliveries are made via a group fleet of over 100 multi temperature vehicles.

Today we deliver to over 450 wholesale and cash and carry customers. Our customers vary in size from independently owned to multinational sited businesses. We have strong working relationships with all major buying groups including Confex, Unitas, Country Range and Fairway.

We collaborate with most major food manufacturers to offer a consolidation supply service to the wholesale and cash and carry sector.

Our consolidation solution includes, supply chain management, a flexible approach to customer management and competitive rates.

We strive continually to improve our range and offering. Today we hold in stock over 300,000 cases covering more than 900 individual items.

Name: Frites Dorées
Description:
Bienvenue chez Frites Dorées, partenaire de votre succès

Frites Dorées, un leader de la distribution en gros de produits agroalimentaires, dédié au service du secteur alimentaire en France. 

Qualité, diversité et avantages tarifaires au cœur de notre offre : 
Chez Frites Dorées, nous présentons une gamme étendue de produits de haute qualité, comprenant des frites croustillantes, des sauces authentiques, des viandes sélectionnées, des kebabs gastronomiques et des emballages. Notre engagement envers la qualité et la diversité alimentaires vise à répondre aux besoins spécifiques de nos partenaires grossistes. 

Répondre aux besoins uniques des grossistes : 
Frites Dorées reconnaît les défis opérationnels auxquels sont confrontés nos partenaires grossistes. C'est pourquoi nous sommes prêts à adapter nos offres pour répondre à vos besoins spécifiques. Notre objectif est de simplifier le processus d'approvisionnement en proposant une sélection variée de produits répondant aux normes de qualité les plus élevées. 

Partenariats commerciaux de confiance : 
Notre succès est également attribué à des collaborations précieuses avec des marques globales de cette industrie telles que Ekin Frites, Lamb Weston, Nawhal's, Colona, Nubi, et plus encore.   

Excellence Bpifrance et Champions de la Croissance : FRITES DORÉES a fièrement obtenu le label Bpifrance Excellence en 2017 et 2018. De plus, nous avons obtenu une place dans le classement "Champions de la Croissance 2018" par Les Echos, mettant en avant les 500 entreprises françaises les plus dynamiques et efficaces. Avec une croissance annuelle remarquable de +17% depuis 2013, nous avons fait nos débuts à la 404e position dans cette liste prestigieuse. 

Si vous recherchez un partenaire fiable pour diversifier et améliorer votre offre alimentaire en gros, FRITES DORÉES est là pour vous; info@fritesdorees.fr. 

#FritesDorées #DistributionAlimentaire #Grossistes #PartenariatCommercial
