Name: Better Than Booze
Description:
Better Than Booze is committed to bringing better tasting options to those seeking high-quality non-alcoholic beverage choices by offering delicious cocktail-inspired social drinks.

HOW IT ALL STARTED…
Co-founder and CEO of Better Than Booze, Drea Groeschel, is not only a lifelong entrepreneur and Nashvillian, but also a mom who sought to find a way to unwind at the end of the day without the foggy haze of alcohol and its negative effects. In 2022, Better Than Booze was born from this desire to swap out her regular glass of wine for a “Better” alternative.

Now, busy professionals and social butterflies seeking an alternative to alcohol have real options to enjoy a comforting, craft cocktail without ill side effects or sacrificing flavor. In fact, we spent countless hours choosing ingredients that would perfectly mimic the tasting notes of classic cocktail recipes.  Our commitment to the experience you’ll have with every sip of Better Than Booze has resulted in pitch-perfect dupes for the real thing (…and a growing list of awards).

Not only do our social tonics taste good, but we’re equally committed to making sure our beverages are truly better than most products you can get on the market today. Whether you’re drinking one of our 100% spirit-free mocktails or experiencing the gauzy buzz of one of our hemp-derived CBD/THC blends, each drink is water-based, low-calorie, gluten-free, vegan, and naturally flavored. 

“I just want people to have options when it comes to social drinking sans alcohol without having to sacrifice flavor. Can’t get better than that!” – Drea Groeschel, Co-Founder & CEO, Better Than Booze

Name: Dubai Food District
Description:
Dubai Food District (DFD) is a landmark DP World development designed to
meet the growing demands of global food trade. Expanding to more than
double the size of the existing Al Aweer Fruit and Vegetable market, the
district will span 29 million square feet and serve as a central platform for
fresh, gourmet, staple, and speciality food trade.



The district brings together the full food trade value chain within one
ecosystem, including temperature-controlled warehousing, processing,
storage, and distribution. 



Through seamless integration with DP World’s logistics and multimodal
infrastructure, Dubai Food District connects food businesses to more than
20 global markets, strengthening supply chain resilience and long-term
economic value.

Description:

Em 2008 a Adega Muf´s foi apontada como a distribuidora mais citada na noite curitibana e nos anos de 2010 a 2018 recebeu o prêmio “destaque no segmento de bebidas do Paraná” pelo SENAP (Serviço Nacional de Opinião Pública). Hoje o Grupo Muf´s possui, um novo e moderno Centro de Distribuição com uma área de mais de 4500 m² e mais de 93 funcionários. 

A área comercial do grupo Muf’s constitui-se de uma loja e um escritório, sendo eles o Empório Muf’s Café e a Adega Muf’s – Festas e Eventos:

Além disso, você também encontra queijos, chocolates, antepastos e kits para presentes.

•	Adega Muf’s – Festas e Eventos, com o serviço oferecido de bebidas 100% consignadas, traz a proposta de realizar degustação e tranquilidade na escolha, assim entendo o que realmente o cliente precisa para o seu evento.

Em 2016, completando vinte anos de trajetória, a Muf’s dá um salto e lança no evento Prêmio Bom Gourmet 2016, o Espumante Muf’s Reserve, com a variedade de (Moscatel, Demi-Sec e Brut). Assim Realizando um grande sonho do empresário Marcos Almeida. 

Em 2017 a família Muf’s Reserve vem crescendo ainda mais, com o Muf’s Reserve Ice Rosé, o primeiro Ice do Brasil. O lançamento aconteceu no evento Casa Cor Paraná 2017.

A direção deste empresário está sempre voltada para o futuro, com a razão no momento presente e sem esquecer do passado, pois ele sabe que a sua vida não é uma corrida de cem metros, mas sim uma longa, extenuante e estimulante maratona.
A Capacidade de relações humanas, dedicação, esforço, foco, perseverança e ousadia são virtudes necessárias e amplamente atribuídas ao empresário Marcos Almeida.     

MUF’S Uma saga, uma vitória, uma grife!

Nuestro equipo humano está formado por una plantilla media de 40 profesionales, y desarrollamos nuestra actividad en las provincias de Cádiz, Sevilla y Huelva, con centros operativos en El Puerto de Santa María (Cádiz) y Alcalá de Guadaíra (Sevilla).

Además, ponemos a disposición de nuestros clientes una plataforma online que permite realizar pedidos de forma ágil y sencilla, desde cualquier dispositivo, con entrega en un plazo de 24 a 48 horas directamente en su negocio o domicilio.

Welcome to Optima Farm to Table, your gateway to a symphony of flavors that transcend boundaries! Name: GES eG
Description:
GES Großeinkaufsring des Süßwaren- und Getränkehandels eG is an independent and self-determined cooperative of medium-sized beverage wholesalers, specialist store operators and convenience wholesalers from all over Germany that was founded in 1950 and is not dominated by food trade or industry organizations. There are partnership-based business relationships with over 1,000 contract suppliers and 829 members. Over 90% of the largest beverage wholesalers in Germany with a focus on beer, AfG, sparkling wine, spirits and convenience products are members of GES. With centralized settlement sales of € 1,150 million in 2022, GES eG achieved the best result in the company's history. 

The GES Group, with its affiliated and sister companies Bremer Spirituosen Contor, SchokoRing, Horst Lehmann Getränke, Order Systems and Rising Brands, stands for many years of experience and the highest level of expertise in purchasing goods for specialist wholesalers. The strategically clever corporate structure is proving to be extremely successful economically and forms a solid foundation for the future direction.

Name: FreshSpoke
Description:

Description:
Implantée sur la Côte d'Azur depuis plus de 40 ans, Caviar Prestige est devenue une référence indéniable. Son fondateur, Jérôme Bottier, formé par le prestigieux chef Jacques Maximin, a élevé l'art du caviar à des sommets inégalés.

Sa passion pour les perles marines les plus rares se traduit par une sélection et une présentation artistique minutieuse, offrant ainsi à sa clientèle des expériences gustatives uniques et mémorables.

Under the leadership of Jérome Bottier, the caviar selling company established on the French Riviera for over 40 years has become an undeniable reference. Trained by the prestigious chef Jacques Maximin, Jérome has elevated the art of caviar to unparalleled heights.

His passion for the rarest marine pearls translates into meticulous selection and artistic presentation, to offer his clientele unique and memorable gustatory experiences.

Name: Wild Era Energy Tea Co.
Description:
An ancient energy source breaks free from the ordinary! Wild Era’s Sparkling Energy Teas are a truly unique natural energy drink. They contain only 6 natural ingredients, are non-GMO and contain 120mg of naturally occurring caffeine from Guayusa tea leaves! Responsibly sourced from the Amazon jungle this cousin of yerba mate delivers naturally occurring caffeine and chlorogenic acid, a powerhouse antioxidant. We sweeten only with organic agave, a natural and low-glycemic plant based sweetener. They come in three fruity flavors: Berry Blast, Orange Mango and Elderberry Acai. 
Wild Era was born from a desire to create something as bold and unique as the people who drink it. But it became so much more. It became a reminder to break free from limits and chase life’s greatest adventures. Every sip is crafted to inspire you to seize the moment and step boldly into your Wild Era—a time to let loose, chase your dreams, and know your story is one-of-a-kind. Life’s an Adventure – Go Wild!

Name: globalfoodtraders.world
Description:
Global Food Traders is a leading international supplier of high-quality food products, specializing in the import and export of a wide range of culinary delights. With a global network of suppliers and customers, we connect food producers from different parts of the world, enabling them to reach new markets and expand their business.
Our mission is to bridge the gap between food producers and consumers by providing efficient and reliable trading services. We are committed to sourcing and delivering the finest food products, ensuring that they meet the highest standards of quality, taste, and freshness.
At Global Food Traders, we understand the importance of sustainability and ethical practices in the food industry. We prioritize working with suppliers who follow responsible farming methods, promote fair trade, and maintain environmentally friendly practices. By doing so, we contribute to a more sustainable and equitable global food system.
Product Offerings:
Fresh Produce: We offer a wide variety of fresh fruits, vegetables, and herbs sourced from different regions. From tropical fruits to seasonal vegetables, we ensure that our produce is of the finest quality and delivered promptly to our customers.
Dairy and Cheese: Our selection includes a range of dairy products such as milk, cheese, yogurt, and butter. We work with reputable dairy producers to provide our customers with premium dairy products that are both delicious and nutritious.
Meat and Seafood: We supply a diverse range of high-quality meat and seafood products, including beef, poultry, pork, fish, and shellfish. Our suppliers adhere to strict standards of animal welfare and sustainable fishing practices.
Grains and Pulses: We offer an assortment of grains, including rice, wheat, oats, and quinoa, as well as a variety of pulses like lentils, chickpeas, and beans. Our products are sourced from trusted suppliers to ensure superior quality.

Name: Shilajit Brothers
Description:
Shilajit Brothers ontstond vanuit een persoonlijk verhaal.
Een van onze oprichters vluchtte uit Afghanistan en bracht later de traditionele shilajit uit zijn thuisland mee naar zijn werk in Nederland. Toen collega’s merkten hoe goed het werkte, groeide het idee om echte Afghaanse shilajit op een transparante en legale manier naar Europa te brengen.

Wij leveren premium vloeibare shilajit met een volledig traceerbare supply chain van winning in de bergen van Afghanistan tot zuivering, export en onafhankelijke laboratoriumtesten in Nederland. We werken direct met de lokale bevolking en vermijden alle Taliban-gestuurde handelsroutes.

Reseller Programma
We bieden twee samenwerkingsmodellen:

Private Label: start je eigen merk met volledige ondersteuning. Wij verzorgen productie, branding, verpakking en alle compliance-documenten (CoA, CoO, SDS, labresultaten). Jij beheert je voorraad en bouwt je eigen premium productlijn.

Partner Reseller Network: verdien commissie door ons merk te promoten zonder voorraad of logistiek. Je kunt optioneel nieuwe partners introduceren en extra verdienen op hun verkopen. Dit model is gebaseerd op echte productverkopen en interessant voor personal trainers, coaches, sportschoolhouders en mensen in e-commerce.

Onze missie is helder: de standaard in de markt verhogen, neppe shilajit verdrijven en authentieke, hoogwaardige shilajit toegankelijk maken voor iedereen.

We werken graag samen met bedrijven en individuen die eerlijkheid, kwaliteit en echte resultaten waarderen.

Name: TenuteSeidita
Description:
We are a three generation of olive oil makers since 1922, situated in the South west coast of Sicily - precisely between Castelvetrano and Campobello di Mazara.

As a company but mainly as a family, values have always been based on an unconditional passion for good food, dedication to our land and love for the cultivation of olive trees. Tenute Seidita covers over 100 hectares of land, with 15.000 olive trees, predominantly Nocellara del Belice. Harvesting is done exclusively by hand, and the extra virgin olive oil comes from cold pressing, to secure all the benefits of the fruit in the final product. 

The entire production is made in house. From sowing and harvesting our land, to transforming the product in our factory within 12 hours since we harvest, up to packaging. We look after every single step of the process, and we package only once there is a request to secure the freshness and quality of our products.

Name: Novas&Mar
Description:
Los orígenes de Novas & Mar se remontan al año 1.987 cuando Manuel Novás en Santiago de Compostela y como trabajador autónomo se empieza a dedicar a la comercialización de angulas y lampreas con la colaboración de su mujer Mar Rodríguez Abad.  

En 1.995 el matrimonio traslada su domicilio y actividades a Sigrás, A Coruña, donde continúan con la actividad comercial de venta de angulas y lampreas e incorporan además la venta de caza y anguilas, siendo el inicio de la comercialización de una de las gamas de productos más importantes del negocio en aquel entonces, hasta el punto de convertirse la perdiz en el primer logotipo de la empresa.

En el año 2000 se produce un cambio cualitativo importante en lo que fue la evolución de un básico negocio de compra - venta a la creación de las bases de una empresa distribuidora.
Se crea una sociedad mercantil limitada, con Mar Rodríguez Abad y Manuel Novas como socios y bajo la denominación Novas y Mar Especialidades S.L.

Este mismo año se construye la nave en la que actualmente esta ubicada la Empresa, en Os Campóns – Sigrás Novas y Mar S.L. se va haciendo un hueco cada vez más importante en el mercado de alimentación - hostelería y basándose, como en sus orígenes, en productos tradicionales y de calidad.

2006 es otro año importante en la historia de NOVAS Y MAR, se amplían las instalaciones y se estrenan instalaciones de frío que permiten a la Empresa introducirse en nuevos mercados y aportar nuevas gamas de productos a sus clientes.

Es en el 2013 cuando se acomete la segunda ampliación, con el fin de continuar con el desarrollo de nuestra gama de producto. Por este motivo, se crean las salas de despiece y producción, salas que han continuado creciendo hasta la actualidad y nos ha permitido dar un toque distintivo al producto.

En 2022 se comienza una reforma integral y ampliación de las instalaciones con el objetivo de continuar el crecimiento experimentado en los últimos años y consolidarnos como un referente del sector.

Welcome to Nature Bio Foods America, the frontier of organically grown and sustainably sourced food ingredients. We leverage a rich 27-year legacy in organic farming, and strong partnerships across Africa and India, to provide you with superior quality, certified organic food ingredients.

Our story is rooted in our unwavering commitment to sustainability and social responsibility. We collaborate with over 64,000 organic farmer families, cultivating diverse crops on 94,000 hectares of organic land. This is more than farming; it's a passion, a way of life, a commitment to preserving the earth and providing nourishment to our customers and the world.

Our extensive network ensures a steady supply of organic products to meet your needs – no matter how large or small. We take pride in our annual grain processing capacity of 100,000 MT, all handled at our five state-of-the-art facilities that are designed to maintain the integrity and quality of our produce.

Our just-in-time delivery system stands out, providing businesses across America with seamless access to a wide array of food ingredients - grains, pulses, seeds, and more. It is our mission to support our customers' success by ensuring they have the ingredients they need, when they need them, sourced responsibly and delivered efficiently.

At Nature Bio Foods America, we are not just a supplier but a partner in your journey towards sustainability and health. We welcome you to join us in promoting organic farming and nourishing lives – one grain at a time.

Wir legen großen Wert darauf, maßgeschneiderte Lösungen zu entwickeln, die genau auf die Bedürfnisse des Kunden zugeschnitten sind. Unsere Flexibilität und unsere Erfahrung ermöglichen es uns, innovative Wege zu finden, um unseren Kunden den bestmöglichen Mehrwert zu bieten. Ein besonderer Fokus liegt für uns auf verlässlichen Partnerschaften und der gemeinsamen Wir betrachten unsere Kunden nicht nur als Kunden, sondern als Partner, mit denen wir zusammenarbeiten, um kontinuierlich Verbesserung und Wachstum zu erreichen. Von Anfang an stehen wir unseren Kunden mit Rat und Tat zur Seite, um den Weg zu erfolgreichen Lösungen gemeinsam zu gehen.

Die Zusammenarbeit auf Augenhöhe, Service, Offenheit und gegenseitiges Vertrauen sind die Eckpfeiler unserer Beziehung zu unseren Kunden. Durch die Bereitstellung vielfältiger Dienstleistungen und der Pflege einer offenen Kommunikation schaffen wir die Grundlage für eine enge Zusammenarbeit. Wir sind überzeugt, dass wir nur gemeinsam mit unseren Kunden wachsen können und streben deshalb eine starke Partnerschaft auf Augenhöhe an - nur so können wir unser volles Potential ausschöpfen!

Andrew's passion for cheese took on a new meaning when he decided to leave the Army to manufacture and distribute his father's 30-year old, locally famous cheese dip recipe for the world to try. Name: Curatyx
Description:
We love to help our clients solve their problems.

We’ve worked with the biggest and best food companies from across the world. We’ve worked with the smallest entrepreneur bootstrapping their business with a credit card.  We’ve worked with National Brands and Own Brand.  We’ve worked with High/Low promotions and Everyday Low Price. We’ve worked with all the service providers in the food sector from marketeers to logistics operators.

We’ve done all of that in one of the most competitive and developed food retail markets in the world.  So we’ve learnt a thing or two about how to succeed in the food sector. Over the last twenty years we’ve build an unrivalled network of over 2,000 manufacturers, as well as subject matter experts, that we can partner with to find solutions to consumer based problems. 

We wanted to share all our learnings with others to help them grow and innovate.  Curatyx is our way of sharing our experience.

Curatyx is focused on delivering outcomes for its clients whether they be advisory, brand building or in food sourcing.  Sometimes our clients just want advice and other times they want us to further and run or incubate their operations for them.  We can adapt our model to work with clients in a way that works best for them.

In the case of Own Brand we work with one of the world’s leading retailers of Own Brand products, Sainsbury’s, to export and grow their brand overseas with carefully selected partners.  Those partners are also our clients and so we enjoy the rare privilege where all our stakeholders’ objectives align on a shared vision.  Our goal is to curate that vision so that together they can change the world.  We like helping them do that.

Would you like to change the world?

We invite you to learn more about the Chef’s marché  Cultural Beliefs.



BUILT ON CONVENIENCE, LOW PRICES AND EASE OF SHOPPING
Our history with the foodservice industry runs deep and our focus has been on helping small, independent operators keep their costs low, without sacrificing the quality of their food products. We choose the products we carry carefully in order to ensure quality and consistency throughout our stores. A LOCAL WHOLESALE FOOD STORE FOR GROCERIES, KITCHEN SUPPLIES AND MORE

That’s why we stock only the highest-quality wholesale food items, from meats and seafood to the freshest produce and bakery items. We also provide our culinary partners with bar and beverage supplies, canned and dry ingredients, frozen foods from appetizers to entrees, and much more. 

As a supporter of our vibrant restaurant communities, our primary goal is to help our partners in any way we can! We are in the business of helping your business succeed, which is why we’re the go-to source for excellent products that are competitively priced. We look forward to working with you!

Name: Enesis USA
Description:
Enesis is an award-winning leader in natural health and wellness products. Our philosophy is very simple: We help people lead happier and more-fulfilling lives with our natural, life-improving products. Because health is your most precious possession — and when your mind, your mood, and your body are harmonized and healthy, the world is a much more joyous place to be. 

Life really is that simple: When you’re healthy, you’re happy. Being well leads to well-being. This belief, combined with the strong sense of art & science, is the reason Enesis continues to grow and grow. Because we don’t simply measure our success in profits or market shares. Our greatest achievement as a company, and what we strive for each and every day, is seeing people healthier, happier, and living the best life they can. 

The origins of Enesis reach back to 1988, when our company’s founder, Ivan Chin, developed Singapore’s first natural mosquito-repelling lotion. Named Soffell, this botanically based product resulted in countless lives being saved from the spread of Dengue fever and other diseases, and is still today the best-selling repellent across Asia and the Middle East.

Our founder’s vision of healing naturopathy and age-old alternative medicines are written into the DNA of everything Enesis creates. Our ever-growing portfolio of products infuse ancient Eastern remedies with modern Western science, and all the research-backed formulations of our products incorporate aromatherapy, herbology, or homeopathy as the main ingredients. Many of these healing methods have been practiced for thousands of years by humans all over the world.

Our proven products and trusted reputation have made Enesis one of the fastest growing leaders in the global health market. Although we’ve been in the business of bringing wellness, happiness, and joy to people’s lives since launching onto the world’s stage over 35 years ago, we are excited to consider 2023 the year of our launch into improving your life.

Name: Get Wasted
Description:
As an online marketplace for food surpluses, Get Wasted puts an end to food waste.

We do this by bringing together all links of the food supply chain - from farmers to producers, wholesalers and the processing industry - in one circular ecosystem. On Get Wasted you simply give value to food surpluses or residual flows by selling them at an affordable but competitive rate to your ideal match in the ecosystem. This can be a processing company that turns it into a new product, actors from the social economy who buy fresh food at an affordable rate, or catering businesses that want to make their range more sustainable.

This project is co-funded by the European Union and supported by Circular Flanders, la Ville de Bruxelles and Growzer.

www.demitri.com 

THE STORY OF THE PERFECT BLOODY MARY MIXES BEGINS WHERE MANY BLOODY MARYS DO — WITH A BARTENDER, AND A PASSION.

In 1988, working at the popular jazz club, The New Orleans Restaurant in Seattle's Pioneer Square, Demitri Pallis was frustrated at the inconsistent flavor and quality of his bar's Bloody Marys. Like in many establishments, from bartender to bartender, day to day, a customer couldn't count on consistent and delicious Bloody Mary recipes.

Demitri set out on a journey in mixology that would change the course of his life. Demitri took him over a year to develop the perfect Bloody Mary recipes, with the help of dozens of unsuspecting customers telling him, "too hot, not hot enough, needs this or that..."

At the end of it, Demitri was armed with a recipe that is now synonymous with the perfect Mary. Instead of battling the age-old effort to get everyone to follow a complex recipe, Demitri mixed his fourteen natural ingredients in advance so that any of The New Orleans' bartenders could simply add a shot glass of spices to tomato juice and they'd have it. This resulted in an always fresh, exact consistency Bloody Mary mix recipe nobody could touch.

Everyone, including neighborhood bartenders, loved Demitri's new Bloody Mary recipes, and he soon found himself making his secret recipe sauce for other bars in the area.

Добре дошли в Panda-IP EOOD, където иновативните идеи срещат борбеност, последователност и реализация!

 За нас: Гордеем се, че сме водеща компания и надежден партньор, специализирана в търговията с хранителни продукти на територията на Република България. За две десетилетия непоколебима ангажираност, Panda-IP EOOD се превърна в основен компонент в хранителната индустрия.

 Нашите клиенти: Основният ни фокус е обслужването на държавни институции в областта на общественото хранене. Към момента Panda-IP EOOD извършва доставки в 45 града на територията на България и осигурява хранителни продукти за над 80 000 човека.

 Сертифицирано съвършенство: Бъдете сигурни, че всички наши хранителни продукти са сертифицирани за съответствие с най-високите пазарни стандарти. Вярваме, че всяко хранене трябва да бъде здравословно и наслада за сетивата.

 Осигуряване на качеството: Полагаме допълнителни усилия като годишно правим над 12 000 лабораторни теста, за да гарантираме съответствието на всеки наш продукт с наложените стандарти.

 Член на American Chamber of Commerce в България от 2006г.: Като горд член на AMCHAM, ние активно участваме в насърчаването на бизнес постиженията и растежа в региона.

 Иновациите като движеща сила: Ние се стремим към постоянен прогрес на знания и нови технологии в сектора. Като част от това през 2023 г. инвестирахме в 15 нови специализирани камиона за транспортиране на храни, оборудвани с вградени хладилни агрегати, по този начин сме сигурни, че продуктите ни ще достигнат свежи до всеки наш клиент. Също така успяхме да добавим в нашият арсенал и нови усъвършенствани хладилни съоръжения за съхранение.

Присъединете се към нас по пътя ни към подобряване нивото на хранителната индустрия в България. Ние сме повече от компания; ние сме обещание за стандарт, доверие и иновации. Свържете се с нас, за да опознаете вкусовете на съвършенството.

Name: The Cookie Department
Description:
The Cookie Department was redesigned and restructured in 2024 by a new executive team set on making snacks that are both indulgent and beneficial. Built on innovation and purpose, the company continues to push boundaries and set new standards, reshaping the future of snacks with every product we create.

Our Products:

Fully Functional Cookies are being completely redesigned in five mouthwatering flavors, each packed with 15 grams of protein and formulated to support muscle recovery. These protein-packed indulgences are crafted to fuel performance while delivering the taste of a real cookie.

Crispy cookies bring together clean, premium ingredients and nostalgic flavor, available in Chocolate Chip, Double Chocolate Chip, and Salted Caramel. Nut-free and kosher, these snack-sized cookies are made for everyday indulgence without compromise.

Buy A Bar Give A Bar is our mission-driven snack bar line, designed to make an impact beyond the pantry. For every bar purchased, we donate a bar through our partnership with Feed the Children, helping to fight food insecurity and fuel communities nationwide.

Our Culture:

At The Cookie Department, we believe that great snacks and a strong sense of community go hand in hand. Our company culture is built around inclusivity, innovation, and purpose. We are proud to foster a workplace that welcomes diverse perspectives, encourages creativity, and empowers every team member to contribute to meaningful growth. Through our philanthropic initiatives and mission-driven products, we’re working to create a future where good food fuels even greater change — one bite at a time.

Welcome to The Cookie Department—where every cookie is crafted with purpose.

Partner affidabile per la fornitura di un’ampia gamma di prodotti conservati per i clienti dell’intero territorio nazionale, Sama garantisce servizi di logistica e trasporto molto competitivi e veloci. 
Grazie al nuovo e moderno deposito aziendale di Ponso (PD), movimenta 800 container in entrata e 1.200 autotreni in uscita all’anno utilizzando sistemi informatici per assicurare la tracciabilità del prodotto con gestione FEFO mediante codice a barre. 
Il deposito doganale interno (Certificazione AEO – Operatore Economico Autorizzato) e la capacità di stoccaggio di 15.000 posti pallet, agevola la veicolazione dei prodotti in tempi brevissimi (5 giorni lavorativi, 7 giorni per le isole).

Name: Buddy Brew Coffee
Description:
Our dog Buddy, the Labrador retriever of our logo, faithfully kept watch over our small Diedrich roaster of our early days. Labs are boundless joy, loyalty and unconditional love. That's what excellent coffee is about too, not edginess or snobbiness.

Our "Brew Good Do Good" mission is just that: nourishing the global coffee ecosystem and our local communities through the simple joy of a great cup of coffee.

The best of the best specialty grade coffees, ethically and sustainably sourced from around the world and artfully roasted to bring out the unique and amazing characteristics of each lot — crop to cup — just for you.

Coffee is what we do. Love is why we do it.

Name: Madero
Description:
Nata nel 2002 dall'esperienza di tre generazioni nella coltivazione, lavorazione e importazione del Pistacchio, Madero opera e affonda le sue radici a Bronte, cittadina ai piedi del vulcano Etna che, con i suoi oltre 3000 ettari in coltura specializzata, è la patria del rinomato Pistacchio Verde di Bronte D.O.P., l’Oro Verde frutto della mineralità dei suoi terreni lavici e delle sue estati calde e siccitose, apprezzato in tutto il mondo.

Uno scenario produttivo unico al mondo, un patrimonio inestimabile di conoscenza della materia prima e un heritage fatto di cultura, territorio, passione e saper fare sono stati il punto di partenza per costruire Madero The Pistachio Company, la prima azienda al mondo specializzata nel pistacchio.

Name: VANOZZA
Description:
LA DOLCE VITA FOR US AND OUR PLANET

– that is our mission. We present to you plant-based alternatives, that are perfectly suitable for cooking. We combine traditional cheese manufacturing methods with innovative technology. We take vegan cheese to the next level!

VANOZZAs products are remarkably real and work with a wide range of recipes.

Name: Boibom
Description: Somos uma indústria e distribuidora de produtos alimentícios frigorificados.

Name: United Coffee Brands
Description:
Welcome to Retail Group Coffee Trading! We are a dynamic company dedicated to the import and export of green coffee, wholesale distribution and roasting. With our own expanding network of coffee shops and automated coffee stations, as well as emerging online store, we bring the finest specialty coffee experiences to our customers.
In 2023, we proudly established our own office in the UAE, further expanding our global reach. As a young and energetic company, we are eagerly seeking driven individuals who are results-oriented and want to grow alongside us. Join our team and become part of an exciting journey where passion for coffee meets unlimited potential.

Name: Pods & Spices
Description:
We are very excited to bring to you the most coveted spice in the world!

We are an importer of Premium Organic Vanilla beans, vanilla products, Madagascan spices and Saffron. Over the years, we have built a strong reputation around the concept of providing superior quality product at fair and reasonable prices.

Our premium vanilla beans are naturally organic, sustainably grown and fairly traded. We won't settle for less, and we are committed to providing superior quality products at fair prices at all times - guaranteed!

Our goal is to deliver an outstanding customer experience and we remain available to guide the customer through the process and ensure his confidence in shopping with us.

Name: Zom Dairy
Description:
As Kurdistan’s original 100% grass-fed organic dairy, our mission is to bring healthy, organic, 100% grass-fed dairy products to families nationwide, while also empowering livestock farmers and creating sustainable income opportunities. We only sell grass-fed organic dairy because we believe products produced through these regenerative agricultural processes are healthiest for consumers, and are done in a way that is healthiest for the environment. Our network of organic 100% grass-fed farmers has grown from 10 farms to 500+ in 2023, and we are now one of the fastest-growing dairy brands in the market.

To further empower farmers, we have 20 state-of-the-art collection stations strategically located along geographical boundaries, reducing the burden on farmers while encouraging economic growth in the region. With Zom, we prioritize keeping domestic capital at home, investing in local projects and enhancing dairy cow quality, ultimately producing more income for farmers. Join us to be part of this positive change today!

Name: Lee's Frozen Food Sdn Bhd
Description:
Lee’s Frozen Food, a leading player in the food distribution industry since 1962. Today, Lee’s are one of the largest food importer and distributor in the region with operations in Malaysia, Vietnam and Cambodia. We currently employ more than 500 employees with distribution across all major cities in these countries.

Lee’s ultimate vision is to be people’s favourite choice and place to work. As we journey towards this destination, the company focuses on making Lee’s a good place to work by treating its people right and making their lives better. These key initiatives also work hand-in-hand in helping the company attract, retain and develop its talents, which are critical elements in achieving the organization’s growth.

We pride ourselves by maintaining products and services of top quality while continuously offering the best products sourced from every continents of the world. At Lee’s we do everything to make it easy for you. We are a company with the buying power to offer our customer consistently great quality and prices across a wide range of products.

With over 600 product lines, you can be sure we’ve got everything covered. Our experience with such a comprehensive range of products and industries ensures that we will know and understand your business and be best placed to offer advice and guidance should you required it.

In line with our rapid expansion locally and regionally, we are looking for ambitious and committed talent to join our journey to becoming SEA most influential food supplier. We aim to add value wherever possible to the service we offer you, and not only meet your needs but exceed them from your very first order.

After all, this is our business and our world. We are honoured to invite you to join and be part of Lee’s family!

Name: Kamoká Alimentos
Description:
A empresa que possui o Sabor do Brasil!

Desde 1990 a Kamoká tem experiência em fabricação e comercialização de produtos alimentícios, atua fortemente na Região Metropolitana de Campinas (RMC), interior do Estado de São Paulo, e distribui seus produtos para todo o território nacional.

Suas linhas de produtos enquadram mais de 500 opções, dentre elas: temperos, farináceos, chás, grãos, alhos, pimentas, potes e compotas, condimentos e doces, todos de excelente procedência, com qualidade controlada por uma rigorosa seleção de matérias-primas.

Em 2009, a então Pajé Alimentos adquiriu a marca Kamoká, ampliando sua gama de atuação e colocando à disposição dos clientes novas opções de escolha, com a característica mais marcante da nossa empresa: qualidade.
No ano de 2016 inseriu a linha de produtos gourmet La’ Pierre! , dentre os produtos: farofas crocantes e molhos diferenciados, que com a mesma qualidade, adquiriu seu espaço nos melhores mercados.

No ano seguinte, os azeites Do Porto tomaram conta das gôndolas dos mercados da região. Com sabor nobre e composição honesta, os azeites vem conquistando as donas e os donos de casa, que amam uma saladinha bem temperada.

Para conhecer um pouco mais sobre a Kamoká Alimentos, utilize nossos canais de atendimento aos clientes e consumidores. Entre em contato conosco, será um prazer atender você!

Name: naVitalo

Name: Pro Chef Kroketten
Description: ProChef is een leverancier die zich toespitst op het ontwikkelen en verdelen van ambachtelijke kroketten. Jarenlange ervaring in de sector staat garant voor een hoge kwaliteit en service. De aangeboden producten komen uit diverse keukens met één gemeenschappelijke deler; handgemaakt en eerlijk. Op deze manier kan ProChef het beste van de sector aanbieden voor uw handels- of horeca zaak.

Name: SQUP
Description:
packaged plant-based ice cream with no added sugars in Europe.

Our mission is to generate a positive impact in people's lives by redefining the pleasure of ice cream and making it accessible to everyone.

To achieve this goal, our business idea is to offer innovative, delicious and functional ice cream, produced with people and the environment in mind.

SQUP is a delicious 100% plant-based ice cream, rich in fibre and with no added sugar, packaged in eco-friendly packaging, characterised by reduced calorie intake, gluten and lactose-free.

In 2022 it was listed among the world's most innovative ice creams, the only Italian company.

Each individual here can bring their own purpose to life through their work, to make a real impact on the company and the World.

Join us

Name: Smith and Brock Ltd
Description:
Smith & Brock is a wholesale supplier of fresh & prepared fruits & vegetables to hotels, restaurants, event and contract caterers, bars, pubs and schools. The business also supplies dairy, chilled goods and a smattering of dry store products, which is mainly customer-led.

The business started trading in July 2016 from humble beginnings with a solitary hire van, brothers Joe and Nick and a driver. Whilst Joe and Nick have been in the industry for more years than they would like to admit, the impetus to create Smith & Brock was born out of frustration with being part of something that wasn’t doing things properly. So their mission, very simply, is to have the best people supplying the best product with the best service at the right price to customers who value these attributes in a supplier. ‘Simples’ – as they say…’’

Today the business employs over 180 members of staff. The business is owned and financed by Joe & Nick and is located centrally in South London, SE5, where it has 9,000 sq ft of temperature-controlled warehousing and offices. The central location enables the business to provide a flexible delivery schedule to customers and they are very responsive to 2nd deliveries. 

They also have a skilled team offering freshly prepared produce and this ensures that we have absolute control over the quality and supply of our sliced leeks, washed salads, peeled potatoes, Jenga chips, fresh juices, sweet potato wedges etc.

Lots of companies wax lyrical about how important people are to the business so we won’t. They prefer to walk the walk. For Joe and Nick, it was critical to create a business and culture which attracts the best people and empowers the team to grow, develop and flourish – a nice place to work put simply. If you speak to any of their team you will hopefully hear that the business is akin to a family. It’s a very flat structure, but they have a clear strategy and direction everyone mucks in, and is proud to do so. There are no ivory towers here at S&B

Name: Bonservis
Description:
Bonservis, Şevket Sabancı ve ailesi tarafından 2005 yılında kurulmuştur. ESAS Holding iştiraki olarak Ev Dışı Tüketim (EDT) & HoReCa sektörüne hizmet verir. İşletmelerin mükemmeliyet yolundaki ortağıdır. 

Yerli ve uluslararası güçlü bir çok gıda ve gıda dışı markanın satış ve dağıtımını yapar, dağıtımını yaptığı ürünleri iklimlendirilmiş kuru depolarda (+4 / -18 °C) saklar ve çift rejimli (+4 / -18 °C) araçlarla sevk eder. Hijyen, sağlık ve tüm paydaşların memnuniyeti, bir numaralı önceliktir. 

Bonservis’in amacı, tüm müşterilerinin ihtiyaçlarını doğru tespit ederek onlara en uygun ürünü sunmaktır. Bu bağlamda ürün portföyü her gün genişlemekte ve güncellenmekte, paydaşların hassasiyetleri tüm stratejimizi şekillendirmektedir. İlkesi siparişleri en uygun koşullarda, eksiksiz ve zamanında teslim etmek olan Bonservis, yalnızca üstün kalitede ürünler üreten, hijyen performansı yüksek ve izlenebilirlik ilkesine uygun prensiplerle çalışan üreticilerle çalışır.

Name: Agrigoods S.A.S
Description: Ofrecemos una alternativa práctica, y sustentable de productos cómo flores, arándanos, pulpas y barras de granola.

Name: WJT International Group
Description:
WJT International Group is a leading global provider of food solutions,
specializing in fresh produce, food service products, and supply chain
management. Headquartered in Essen, Belgium, with established operational
offices in Lebanon and Egypt, and a strong presence across multiple countries,
We are dedicated to delivering tailored food solutions that meet the diverse
needs of importers, retailers(supermarkets, specialty stores), and food service
providers (hotels, restaurants) worldwide.  

Our strategic locations enable us to provide food solutions to clients across Europe, Africa, and beyond, ensuring that we meet the needs of diverse markets.  

Déan Gourmet is our flagship brand, representing our core values and capabilities. Alongside growing our own brand, we partner with global leaders to facilitate their successful expansion into European and African markets.

Name: Even Distribution
Description:
Even Distribution regroupe des activités de distribution alimentaire en vente à domicile (Argel) et en restauration hors domicile (Alliance Atlanterra, Réseau Krill, réseau Capella). 

Even Distribution est organisé autour de 4 axes, dont la mission consiste à faciliter la vie de ses clients pour la préparation, chaque jour, de repas savoureux et équilibrés à domicile, et à aider les professionnels des métiers de bouche à satisfaire leurs clients.

Even Distribution regroupe 2 850 collaborateurs et a généré en 2024 un chiffre d’affaires de 765 millions d’euros.

Name: Tradeverse
Description:
Tradeverse is a Specialized Brand Management company, where we aim to bring specialty brands from around the world to the UAE. 
With a collective expertise in the regional, tech, marketing and logistics industry we provide our clients an end to end solution to launch and scale their products in the UAE.

Our Services
Brand Registration
Product Promotion
Product Distribution
Marketing Management

Name: Comercial Castro S.A.
Description:
Empresa chilena, de origen familiar, con 57 años de experiencia en el rubro mayorista y también con venta al detalle. Actualmente comercializamos carnes, abarrotes, lácteos, bebidas, productos de higiene entre otros destinados a cubrir las necesidades del cliente.  
Estamos presentes en la Región Metropolitana con 10 locales en el Mercado Mayorista Lo Valledor, en Santiago con presencia en la Vega Poniente y la Vega Central, con 5 supermercados ubicados en Recoleta, Pedro Aguirre Cerda, San Bernardo y Calera de Tango. Próximamente tendremos nuestro sexto supermercado que coincide que será el de mayor tamaño, casi 2.000 metros cuadrados para potenciar nuestra oferta mayorista, con más productos y más variedades, además nuevas innovaciones que sorprenderá a nuestros clientes y proveedores.
Contamos con distintos formatos de ventas Supermercado Mayorista, Venta al Mesón, Autoservicio y con una clara mirada a la creación de nuevos negocios, tal como en comenzamos en mayo de 2020 con el e-commerce ante la necesidad la comunidad de que lleguen los productos básicos al hogar, sin necesidad de salir de sus casas. Puedes encontrarnos en www.Cmarket.cl donde somos MercadoLider Platinium por la excelencia en atención.
Comercial Castro S.A. es una empresa cuyos valores están relacionados con la honestidad e integridad en nuestros negocios y con los socios comerciales (como proveedores) que integran nuestra comunidad. 

Para Mayor información visítanos en:
Sitio Web: www.Castro.red
Facebook:  ComercialCastro.cl
Instagram: Comercial.Castro
Carnes Premium: www.CorteMaestro.cl 
YouTube: ComercialCastroSA

Name: B&B Frutta Srl
Description:
Founded in Verona in 1982 thanks to a brilliant brainwave of the CEO & Owner Loredano Brentegani, B&B Frutta today is one of the Italian leader in fresh apples worldwide trade.

Our history began with an old green FIAT 625 pickup with which we started to sell apples at the local market and over time we have been expanding our business horizons more and more.
Currently we export high quality apples of our territory to over than 50 countries worldwide, using our experience to help our customer understand not only the product and packaging that best meet his needs, but also the best transport solution by providing a complete logistics service.

B&B Frutta warehouse is currently equipped with cutting-edge technologies for calibration, storage, preservation of apples and fruit packaging: thanks to highly automated production processes and to corporate control, we can provide our customers with important and useful information on the traceability of the goods and on the supply chain: everything is on the label!

At B&B Frutta we take great care of food security: external auditors and experts together with our team of specialists guarantee the highest quality level, in conformity with the strict quality control regulations and the international certifications, from the orchards to your table.  The same goes for our packaging which is fully traceable to ensure the maximum protection and reliability, and constantly improved to minimize wastes. Furthermore, ALL our apples are Non-GMO!

B&B apples are known and marketed under two different labels: the historic  brand Rossella and the newest trademark Appeal.  

Beware of imitations, look for the original B&B Frutta apples!

Name: CLArg SA
Description:
Somos una distribuidora exclusiva de productos de Cervecería y Maltería Quilmes. Nuestra casa central se encuesta en Resistencia, Chaco y tenemos sucursales en Corrientes Capital, Goya, Saladas e Ituzaingo, en Villa Angela, Chaco y en las ciudades de Reconquista y Villa Ocampo en la provincia de Santa Fe.

Nuestra actividad vinculada a la comercialización, logística y distribución en el mercado de bebidas data del año 1995, obteniendo la franquicia en la zona del NEA de productos ABInbev. Desde el inicio, la captación y selección del recurso humano fue la clave del éxito y desarrollo de nuestros negocios. Fuimos logrando conformar una estructura de gerenciamiento altamente profesionalizada, diseñando un modelo de gestión basado en dos pilares fundamentales: management y calidad.

Los resultados comerciales y de gestión en las distintas etapas de evaluación del negocio han sido excelentes. Gracias a fuertes inversiones en marketing y una política comercial dinámica.

La consecución de logros, se debe básicamente a la estructura de RRHH, capacidad de gestión y cultura de la organización, que ha sabido mantener una clara orientación a resultados, clientes y a la mejora continua en todos los procesos.

Name: Genuport
Description:
Genuport is one of the leading distribution partners for fine foods and groceries in Germany. As an independent marketing and distribution organization, we have experienced significant growth in recent years by expanding into new segments and acquiring exciting brands. Our portfolio includes sweet pastries, chocolate, savory snacks, confectionery, beverages, breakfast products, functional foods, frozen foods, and gourmet items. Currently, Genuport manages over 50 major national and international food brands in Germany. For about 75 years, our company has been synonymous with the highest competence and modernity in distribution and marketing. 

We are proud that our company holds an IFS (International Featured Standard) certification. This prestigious accreditation demonstrates our commitment to maintaining the highest standards of food safety and quality throughout our operations. We continuously strive to uphold these rigorous requirements to ensure the trust and satisfaction of our customers and partners. 

Additionally, we offer exciting career opportunities in various fields, including sales, brand management, online services, IT, purchasing, human resources, finance, as well as apprenticeships and internships. Our corporate culture is characterized by flat hierarchies, significant personal responsibility, and open communication.

Name: U.S. Trading Company
Description:
For over 40 years, U.S. TRADING COMPANY has been a family-owned business and a trusted name in the distribution of authentic Asian foods, serving customers across the United States and global markets. With expertise in Thai and Southeast Asian flavors, we provide high-quality products that meet the diverse needs of food service, wholesale, and retail industries.
 
Our extensive selection includes products sourced from Thailand, Taiwan, China, the Philippines, South Korea, Japan, and beyond. We are proud to distribute leading brands such as Dragonfly, Honey Bee, Apple, Pink Lotus, 999, Chuon Chuon, Bonus, Double Happiness, Hello Beebee, Toyu, Global Deer, Joyluck, Tutubi, Brown & White, and many others. As an exclusive or major distributor of TAS, Tasco, and JHC products, our portfolio covers essential grocery items, including rice, noodles, canned goods, sauces, seasonings, beverages, snacks, frozen foods, and household staples.
 
Headquartered in Hayward, CA, U.S. TRADING COMPANY ensures reliable coast-to-coast distribution in the U.S. and exports to international markets. With a commitment to quality and service, we continue to be the preferred partner for businesses looking for authentic Asian food products.

Name: JB Traders
Description: Since 1982, we have become leading supplier in the food industry offering wide range of spices, pulses, grains, dry fruits, edible oils, tinned foods, and essential pantry staples, serving the needs of the hospitality sector, food service businesses, retail chains & supermarkets, institutional kitchens, healthcare & wellness facilities, and educational institutions. After serving the hospitality industry for years, JB Traders has evolved into JB Grocers with a goal of providing premium quality essentials to the hospitality industry across India.

Name: Tip Top Foodservice
Description: Tip Top Foodservice is the specialist foodservice bakery division of George Weston Foods, offering an extensive product portfolio from some of Australia's most trusted brands.

Name: Peterfrut
Description:
Somos a Peterfrut, uma renomada empresa composta por uma equipe de mais de 1000 profissionais, que há 30 anos está empenhada em entregar o mais nobre da natureza para você! 

Nossa trajetória diversificada impulsionou nossa incessante busca por inovação e pela introdução de novas culturas agrícolas. Graças à vasta experiência em variados cultivos, assumimos o compromisso de fornecer o que a natureza tem de mais nobre à mesa dos brasileiros. 

Nossa principal aspiração é estabelecer uma conexão entre as pessoas e alimentos de excelência. Por isso, com um um firme compromisso socioambiental, priorizamos a proveniência e a rastreabilidade dos alimentos, ao mesmo tempo em que apoiamos pequenos produtores familiares, fomentando oportunidades de crescimento e geração de renda. 

Confiabilidade, qualidade e entrega pontual: faça negócios com a Peterfrut e sinta a diferença!
Location: Venda Nova do Imigrante, Espírito Santo

Name: JOI
Description:
Our plant bases and concentrates are made from minimal, whole, all natural ingredients. We supply food service concepts, manufacturers, and retailers nationwide.

Whether you're using JOI to make pure, customizable plant milks, or using it as a base in your recipes, our plant bases are extremely versatile and easy to manipulate because of their clean ingredient lists!

Our concentrates take up 90% less space than typical boxed milks, and can be stored at room temperature for up to 12 months. That means you save precious refrigerator space, can get 9x more product per shipment, and reduce food waste from spoilage.

Name: PEGGA Ventures
Description:
PEGGA Ventures is your trusted partner for top-quality fresh farm produce, food supplies, cooling van rentals, and catering services. 

We partner with farmers and traders from key markets in the north and central regions to ensure our clients—including hotels, local restaurants, fast food outlets, shops, other corporate organizations and individuals—receive the freshest produce.

Our corporate catering services help businesses run their in-house canteens by delivering delicious, hygienic meals, allowing companies to focus on their core functions. Our well-trained and committed staff consistently exceed customer expectations with excellent service delivery.

We offer competitive pricing and flexible payment options, ensuring the best value for our clients. Among the esteemed clients we currently serve includes: Eko Hotel, Marriott Hotel, Providence hotel, Chicken Republic and Tasty Fried Chicken.

Though registered in 1998, PEGGA Ventures was in stealth mode until 2013 when the Founder after having relinquished her position as Logistics Manager - Ground & Inflight Services with Virgin Nigeria Airways (later known as Air Nigeria) assumed control. 

Today, PEGGA Ventures is known for quality, customer service and reliability.

Name: Gilmours Wholesale Food & Beverage
Description:
We are committed to being the Preferred Foodservice Partner in the North Island. 

We understand your needs and challenges, because we’re 100% New Zealand Owned and Operated. We not only provide you with a range that’s relevant to your business, we provide you with solutions outside of simply product & price, that help you grow a successful business within your industry.

Gilmours has been operating for almost 100 years, so we truly understand the Foodservice industry and look for ways to share our expertise with you to give you a competitive edge.

As a wholesaler, we offer you great deals relevant to your business on volume purchasing and buying in bulk.

Name: Holy! Water
Description: Holy Water is a women-founded, PhD-led non-alcoholic beverage company with 20 years of experience in consumer goods. We are dedicated to crafting innovative beverage solutions for a variety of everyday use occasions.

Name: PMZ ALIMENTOS LTDA
Description:
Since 1979, PMZ Alimentos has been a company specialized in the processing of rice, rice flour, and rice starch, with a strong focus on customer satisfaction. It continuously invests in the quality of its products, driven by new ideas. The company encourages the development of its staff to uphold its mission, vision, and values.

Mission:
To produce and market healthy, functional, and safe food products with sustainability and social responsibility, meeting the expectations of shareholders, consumers, customers, and employees.

Vision:
To build and establish strong brands, becoming the natural choice in the global market by constantly pursuing excellence in quality and innovation.

Values:
Commitment; customer focus; ethics; human value; respect and trust; transparency; efficiency; effectiveness.
Location: São José do Rio Pardo, São Paulo

Name: Abdullah Hasan Shehata & Sons Co.Ltd
Description:
في عام ١٩٨٠ كانت البداية ، لتجربة جديدة ومميزة، للبحث عن أفضل وأجود مصادر المواد 
الغذائية المجمدة بأنواعها من لحوم الأبقار والأغنام والدواجن والأسماك والخضراوات والفواكه.
ابتداءاً بأوروبا ثم أمريكا الجنوبية مروراً بالولايات المتحدة إلى تركيا والهند وأستراليا ونيوزيلندا
وصولاً إلى اليابان ، حرصاً لاستيراد الأصناف ذات الجودة العالية والسعر المنافس لتكون متاحة 
لكم من خلال توريدها للمطاعم والفنادق وشركات الإعاشة وغيرها ومع مطلع عام ٢٠٢٠ م 
قمنا - بفضل الله - بإنشاء سلسلة متاجر وجهة الغذاء لبيع منتجاتنا بالتجزئة حتى نكون اقرب 
إليكم في انحاء مدن المملكة ضامنين لكم تجربة مميزة في كل مره .

Name: Vieille Graine
Description:
Vieille Graine a pour but de créer des débouchés aux agriculteurs français  qui se tournent vers de nouvelles cultures céréalières plus résilientes face au changement climatique, en développant et commercialisant des produits alimentaires gourmands et sains qui font résonner positivement notre combat pour une alimentation plus vertueuse. 
Ces cultures ? Le sorgho et le millet, récoltes anciennes et céréales de demain !

Name: Dates Al Arab
Description:
Dates Al-Arab is well-known Trading Company and specialized in Packing & Exporting proudly across Worldwide the finest Arabian Dates (Khalas, Sukary, Khudri, Sagaee, Majdool, Ajwa, Safawi, Mabroom, Amber & Barhi) under own brand name “Dates Al Arab” as well as private labeling, utilize modern facilities, equipment and skilled labor, presenting Premium Arabian Dates and products competitively its kinds, types, grades and categories as Natural Loose in bulk, Rigid Packed Loose, Processed Pitted, Vacuum packed and Dates Paste, customize as per customer, distributor and agent’s demand and necessities, which can compete in the international markets in terms of their best qualities and presentations. Our Dates are wisely selected, sorted and graded from the main largest Dates farms across the Kingdom, having the production of more than 30,000 tons per annum. We deliver across UAE as well as export globally. Leading in marketing and exporting worldwide the Arabian premium quality certified Dates and its made products by adopting international standards and choosing the desired & feasible kinds, we carefully focus to represent according to the Eastern and Western tastier types as per international market demand.
 “Customer’s taste is always our top priority and our reward is their satisfaction.”

Name: Bio Partner Schweiz AG
Description:
Bio Partner Schweiz AG ist der führende Partner im Biomarkt Schweiz. Kunden im Biofachhandel, Detailhandel, in der Gastronomie und verarbeitenden Industrie beliefern wir mit einem Vollsortiment an Bioprodukten und Dienstleistungen, wir unterstützen Unternehmer im Biofachhandel dabei, sich im wachsenden Marktumfeld weiterzuentwickeln und führen eigene Biofachgeschäfte.
Unser Hauptsitz und Logistikzentrum befinden sich in Seon (AG) und wir betreiben Standorte in allen Sprachgebieten der Schweiz. Unsere rund 400 Mitarbeitende bedienen Biokunden mit schmackhaften Bioprodukten und inspirierenden Geschichten. Mit unserem Handeln leisten wir einen einzigartigen Beitrag an eine existenzsichernde und nachhaltige Landwirtschaft, einen starken Biofachhandel und die gute Verfügbarkeit besonders hochwertiger biologischer Lebensmittel für bewusste Konsumenten.

Name: Packaging Environmental
Description:
Packaging Environmental Limited is a leading supplier of sustainable and eco-friendly food & drink packaging with a focus on products made from renewable materials. We pride ourselves in having supplied over 18K businesses from small delis and independent coffee shops to multi-national organisations across the UK and Europe. 

Formed in London in 2007, we had the vision to provide our customers with sustainable, high-quality and cost-effective packaging made from compostable and recycled and recyclable materials. Our ethos is to encourage our customers and end-users to move away from non-sustainable oil-based packaging options that were traditionally available at the time. In April 2023, we launched our very own Carbon Neutral packaging range.

In 2020 we opened our European online stores into different territories in France, Germany, and Italy. We aim to continue our expansion by opening further online stores in Europe in the future, offering the best sustainable packaging alternatives at competitive prices to our European and UK customers alike.

We love to work shoulder to shoulder with our customers, providing solutions to their packaging requirements and custom packaging design, no matter how large or small; we will gladly adapt to your needs with friendly and exceptional service. 

Please contact us on 020 3006 2432 or info@packagingenvironmental.co.uk for further information.

Name: MAHAAN EXPORTS
Description:
About Us:
At MAHAAN EXPORTS, we are an agricultural export house providing premium oyster mushrooms, organic herbs, speciality spices, and fresh farm produce to international buyers. Our operations combine time-tested cultivation with modern post-harvest handling to deliver traceable, export-ready produce with consistent quality.
Founded to bridge smallholder quality farms with global markets, Mahaan Exports focuses on sustainable cultivation, hygienic processing and export-compliant packing. We partner with chefs, retailers and distributors to supply seasonal and year-round crops with dependable lead times.

Our Values:
Sustainability: Responsible substrate sourcing and minimal waste practices.
Quality First: Consistent grading, lab checks and batch standardisation for every shipment.
Partnership: Transparent terms, dependable programs and long-term relationships with buyers.

Name: Holleys Fine Foods

Name: MCS Marketing und Convenience-Shop System GmbH
Description:
Das MCS-Netzwerk beliefert in Deutschland rund 14.000 Kunden, darunter Tankstellen, Kioske, Bahnhof-Shops, Lebensmittelgeschäfte, Convenience-Shops, Kantinen, Bäckereien, Getränkemärkte und andere Verkaufsstellen.

Unser Angebot umfasst Getränke, Süßwaren, Lebensmittel, Tabakwaren, Prepaidprodukte, Eis, Saisonartikel, Eigenmarken und andere, bedarfsgerechte Sortimente.

Name: H Fruits & Co
Description: H Fruits & Co is a Kolkata-based supplier of premium domestic and imported fruits, delivering freshness, quality, and reliability to businesses across India. With a wide product range and strong sourcing network, we ensure our clients get the best produce, every time.

Name: Gestion Locaal
Description:
Who has never dreamed of having a dish freshly prepared by a professional chef and deliciously cooked with local and seasonal products - without the hassle of grocery shopping or preparation!

This is the challenge we are undertaking at Locaal! We are a startup, with significant financial resources, currently working on a major investment project in the fast-growing segment of online sale of fresh ready-to-eat meals, and more specifically in the high-end segment of this market.

Curious to learn more? Stay tuned, the launch is expected in 2020!

Name: coffee perfect GmbH
Description:
Beyond Standard – das ist unser Motto.

In dem Streben, mit uneingeschränktem Fokus auf Qualität und Kundennutzen, ein erfolgreiches und vor allem stabiles und zukunftsorientiertes Familienunternehmen aufzubauen, leben wir dieses Motto jeden Tag.

Gelegen am Hafen von Osnabrück, befindet sich der Hauptsitz der coffee perfect GmbH an einem der schönsten Straßennamen der Republik: Dem Netter Platz 1. Dank des kontinuierlichen Wachstums gründeten wir 2015 in Österreich und 2018 in Dänemark vollständige Tochtergesellschaften. Diese kümmern sich vor Ort um die Wünsche und Bedürfnisse unserer österreichischen und dänischen Kunden und tragen so unseren hohen Anspruch über die Grenzen der Bundesrepublik hinaus.

All unsere Geschäftsbereiche greifen ineinander und ergänzen sich gegenseitig. So können wir unseren stets hohen Ansprüchen gerecht werden und immer ganzheitlich am Puls der Zeit bleiben. 
Der Erfolg gründet sich hierbei auf dem erfolgreichen Zusammenspiel unserer drei Säulen:

• Vertrieb von Kaffeevollautomaten, Frischwasserspendern, sowie Snack- und Getränkeautomaten
• Vertrieb von Füllprodukten, wie beispielsweise Kaffee, Topping und Kakao
• Herauseigenes technisches Wartungs- und Serviceangebot

Name: RAW Pet Gourmet
Description:
Born out of the owners love and passion for raw feeding, RAW Pet Gourmet was established in 2020.

What started as a service where the owner's helped friends and families to easily provide healthy raw food for their pups, quickly grew when word of mouth got around on the positive benefits raw feeding brought.

Over one year later, RAW Pet Gourmet expanded and developed into one of Indonesia’s leading raw food brand, boasting a variety of raw food menus across life stages for dogs and cats, as well as other complementary dietary products such as supplements, treats and toppers. 

Today, Raw Pet Gourmet's formulation is supervised by Certified Pet Nutritionist from the United States, lab tested locally, utilizing fresh human grade ingredients from responsible and trusted resources, helping pets live a healthy and quality life.

Name: Hotspur
Description:
Founded by Andy, a former member of UKSF (United Kingdom Special Forces), the business was created to embody the core principles from UKSF selection process. These include honesty, integrity, humility & to be relentless in the pursuit of excellence. Values we strive for every day within our business. 
 
The business began in the shadows, solely suppling discreet military units and related entities with premium quality spirits & bespoke laser engraved items. We earned a reputation for quality, discretion and a ‘name’ for creating truly unique products for unique people. We grew steadily through personal recommendation. 
 
Due to demand and market feedback the team decided to launch to a wider military audience. but in a flooded market place, we needed something different to capture the attention of the market. 
 
Andy was on a hunting trip in the Scottish Highlands with some former colleagues and after a few drams came up with the idea of putting a Commando Dagger in a bottle and pouring the liquid through the handle. The idea was deemed as crazy, but not one to give up easily, Andy started developing a product and prepared it for market launch.   
 
From a chance whisky induced idea in the Scottish Highlands, the blade series was born and the initial Commando Dagger project with the Royal Marines was a rapid sell out success! From one initial product we now have over 15 in the blade series.  We stand by our unwavering commitment to quality, premium spirits and world class packaging for all of our customers. 
 
We welcome out of the box thinking & crazy ideas. Nothing exciting ever happened re-inventing the wheel. From humble beginnings we have now formalised international licensing deals with global players - we are exporting products to numerous different countries across all sectors, military & now civillian. 
 
We hope you enjoy our website and products, we appreciate your ongoing support.
 
Thank you for reading, we look forward to working with you,  
 
Hotspur

Name: MAT!
Description:
MAT ! La boisson est une histoire de convictions. 

Nous sommes un groupe familial, spécialisé dans la distribution et production de boissons.  

Notre mission est de proposer une offre de produits et services autour d'un marqueur commun, la boisson, aussi inventive qu'adaptable, aussi visionnaire que diversifiée. 

Nous sommes avant tout pluridisciplinaires. Notre souhait est d'impulser une vision nouvelle du marché de la boisson par le biais de notre expertise agile et éprouvée. 

 Nos marques de distribution : Cozigou, Les Caves du Trégor, Gloups...
 Nos marques de production : Kafeta (avec Cafés Coïc, 44 Café, Brûlerie du Menez-Bré ou encore Atelier des Comptoirs...) et les Brasseries BRO (avec Brasserie Hirondelle, Armoria, Brasserie du Baril, Philomenn...).
 Notre solution technique : Comptoir Service et son programme 2ème Vie, spécialiste du reconditionnement des équipements CHR.

Name: Krogab Waffles UK no1 Hospitality Choice
Description:
Choosing Krogab for your waffle needs is a decision that promises quality, convenience, and exceptional service. Here’s why:

**1. Premium Quality:** Krogab waffles are crafted from the finest ingredients, ensuring a delicious, crispy, and golden-brown treat every time. Your guests will savor the perfect texture and taste that only Krogab can deliver.

**2. Tailored Solutions:** We understand that each hospitality business has unique needs. That’s why Krogab offers a full bespoke service, customizing our offerings to suit your specific requirements. Whether you need a variety of flavors or special dietary options, we’ve got you covered.

**3. Reliable Equipment:** Our state-of-the-art waffle makers are designed for efficiency and durability, making them ideal for high-demand environments. With easy-to-use controls and consistent performance, you can serve perfect waffles every time.

**4. Comprehensive Support:** Krogab stands out with our exceptional service and support. We offer service repairs, callout breakdown assistance, and maintenance with no hidden fees. Our dedicated team is always on hand to ensure your equipment runs smoothly, minimizing downtime and maximizing customer satisfaction.

**5. Customer Satisfaction:** At Krogab, we prioritize your success. Our commitment to high-quality products and unparalleled support means you can focus on what matters most: delighting your customers. Happy guests lead to repeat business and positive reviews, boosting your establishment’s reputation.

**6. Versatility:** Whether you’re running a hotel breakfast buffet, a cozy café, or a bustling restaurant, Krogab waffles fit perfectly into any menu. They are versatile, easy to prepare, and loved by all ages, making them a must-have item.

**7. No Hidden Fees:** Transparency is key to our service. With Krogab, you can trust that there are no hidden costs. We offer clear, upfront pricing and comprehensive support plans, ensuring you know exactly what to expect.

Name: FMCG-Excellence B.V.
Description:
About FMCG-Excellence B.V
FMCG-Excellence B.V. is FMCG official distributors as well as a trading company, specialized in the selection, distribution and export of branded FMCG such as Nestle, Heinz, Mars, Barilla, Ferrero, Van Melle, Ritter Sport, Red Bull, Coca Cola, De Cecco, Masterfoods, only to mention a few. (As for non-food items, we have good opportunities with P&G, Nivea, and more with product sector in Toiletries, Dishwashing, Laundry & Detergents, Universal Cleaner,Personal care,Dental Mouthwashes, Shaving Foam & Gels, Perfume, Deodorant, Bath Supplies, Shampoos & Conditioners, Soaps & Showergels, Baby care, Batteries, Beer, Chewing Gums, Coffee and Tea, Cookies, Chips, Breakfast / Cereals, Baking Goods, Cosmetics, Pastas and Sauces. (As for non-food items, we have good opportunities with P&G, Nivea, and more).).
As a trading company, our sector of activities includes Dairy products, alcoholic and non-alcoholic beverages, Chocolate and confectionery, tea and coffee, baby food and baby care products, Cosmetics and hygiene products.
We have been operating successfully on the exceptionally competitive sales market for more than 10 years owing to our ability to develop and adjust to ever-changing trends.
We create availability and sales of a wide range of products of leading producers in the food and beverage market as well as non-food products.



How it works
We execute numerous trading contracts as a worldwide supplier from the Netherlands.

We have clients in Italy and Spain, who cover the Mediterranean area, clients in Denmark and Sweden who work in North-Europe, a client in Dubai who works with Afghanistan, Uzbekistan and some African countries and one in Slovenia who deals with all the former Russian countries like Belarusian and Ukraine.

Our business partners have indeed no direct contact with Principals, because they are not able to order volumes that are necessary to have relations with official distributors.

Name: Pegasos S.A.
Description:
Pegasos S.A. was founded in 1979 and is one of the largest and most successful sales & distribution companies in Greece.

It undertakes commercial representation of global fast-moving consumer brands & snacks, in Greece. 

Pegasos S.A. partners Haribo, Panini, Lindt, Corny, McVities, Capri Sun and Durex.

Its strategic aim is to build and establish the brands it represents, by offering sales-execution excellence. 

In its drive to meet this goal, Pegasos has built one of the largest sales networks in Greece, with a sales team of more than 100 colleagues, among the biggest in its industry.  

They maintain relationships with 3.000 Organized Trade stores, 250 local wholesalers and 16.000 points-of-sale in traditional trade, in 100% of the country’s territory. 

It's logistics network operates 4 logistics hubs in Attica, Thesniki and Crete, which consist the majority of national market, while its distribution fleet delivers directly to 7.000 points of sale. 

The combination of direct engagement, in both modern & traditional channels, consists a distinctive characteristic of Pegasos S.A.  

The company’s vision is to be the most strategic partner in FMCG commercial distribution in Greece.

Description:

Name: AMK Exports
Description: AMK EXPORTS brings to you only the finest and purely organic products from the land of gods. AMK EXPORTS situated in Kinnaur India provides you with heavenly products such as Apples, Pine nuts, Apricot oil, Walnuts, Morel Mushroom and black Cumin. All our products are grown and harvested by the local farmers. Kinnaur is one of the most beautiful and enchanting places one might ever come across. The place is filled with a blanket of snow for more than 183 days in a year. Main source of income for the local’s in the upper Himalayas is farming and agriculture giving the local’s only 6 months to sow, reap, harvest and trade. The total population of the Northeast Himalayas is only 0.57% of India’s total population. AMK EXPORTS helps the farmers by buying their goods from them at the best price and exporting organic products for you to use. We only give you the best products, packed with proper hygiene and controlled environment to retain the nutritional value and purity of the products. Usage of products containing chemicals can harm our body as well as affect our mental health and aging. Hence we see to it that our products are grown using organic methods such as permaculture, natural pest management, manual weed control etc. Farming in Kinnaur is mostly done on the upper regions at elevation between 1000 meters to 3350 metres. The temperature up there in winters are unimaginable hence the locals have to travel almost half way up every day for cultivation of Himalayan beauties which are made available to you at its purest, organic and tastiest form.

Name: Moldes Ruibal S.A.
Description: Empresa dedicada a importar y distribuir prestigiosas marcas de alimentos y bebidas. Tres generaciones orientadas a la excelencia.

Name: KHUMSUB
Description:
KHUMSUB is a full-service food trading and sourcing solution provider, managing the entire sourcing process from vendor selection to following up on shipment schedules on behalf of our clients. 

We support our clients in strategic sourcing activities of food items throughout Asia with offices in Thailand, Vietnam, Pakistan, India and Indonesia. 

Together with our production partners we offer the complete range of commodity and retail products, such as fresh to canned fruit, fresh and canned meat/seafood/fish items, frozen, snacks, rice, salt, corn/maize and private label solutions. 

We take pride in collaborating with quality producers, compliant with established standards, such as HACCP, ISO22000, GMP, BRC, IFS, MSC, ASC, BAP, GAP, BSCI, ORGANIC etc.

Name: jack & annie's
Description:
We believe that food shouldn’t just be "based" on plants--it should be, you know, plants. That's why we make nuggets, sausages, and all your other favorites with real, whole plants. Namely, with jackfruit: the meatiest plant on the planet.

Our founder, Annie Ryu, was working on a healthcare venture in rural India when she met Jack. She quickly realized that jackfruit was an underutilized miracle crop with the power to improve the lives of farming families, make our diets more sustainable, and offer a delicious meat alternative that's actually made from real plants.

So, jack & annie's was born. Every day, we help people eat less meat with more joy. And we're proud to say that our super-tasty, stellar-for-your-health-and-the-planet whole plant foods aren't "based" on anything.

Name: Qebaa
Description:
Qebaa is considered one of the largest companies in the exclusive agencies and the commercial distribution sector in the Egyptian market.
Our dedication is to quality has made us an exclusive agent for the top food manufacturing companies in the MENA region.
