Name: Maple Ridge Farms
Description:
Founded in 1979, Maple Ridge Farms is the largest company in America specializing in corporate food gift programs. We have built our business on one, fundamental principle: Your gifts should be recognized for their outstanding quality and exceptional flavor! We guarantee that every gift is one that you will be proud to give (and would be happy to receive). 

Business gifts are our only business. After years of listening, we understand what you need. We also know what customers, clients and employees expect and enjoy. So take advantage of our expertise, sit back, relax, and enjoy the holidays. 

Maple Ridge Farms products are available from promotional products professionals; the same people from whom you would purchase business gifts, gift baskets, or products bearing your logo. A Google search using the key words 'Maple Ridge Farms' will provide you with a list of many of our partners. You can also find them listed in the Yellow Pages under Advertising Specialties, Promotional Products, or Business Gifts.

Our quality is quite simply, the best. Whether it's the richness of our handmade chocolates, the crunchy freshness of our fresh-roasted nuts, or the exceptional flavor of our smoked meats, we've built our reputation on high standards of excellence. .

Name: Swiss Gourmet Group
Description:
Since founding SWISS GOURMET in Switzerland in 2001, we have quickly become a well known quality supplier of edible nuts and dried fruit. With 7 processing factories and 5 procurement & sales offices around the globe, we are present in the most important producer-  as well as consumer-markets. Thanks to our strong vertical integration, we can offer our products "from tree to table" along the whole value chain. 

SWISS GOURMET  ships all  products directly from certified processing facilities to customers.   We can  guarantee  highest quality and 100 % freshness !

We believe in relationship and trust as the key ingredients to future growth.

SWISS GOURMET strives for constant improvement of quality and service, in order to reach our ultimate goal: sharing success with our business partners.

Name: KAMBLY France SAS
Description:
Présente en France depuis 1989, Kambly France est la filiale du groupe familiale suisse Kambly, fondé en 1910. Acteur reconnu de la distribution dans l’univers des biscuits, nous mettons chaque jour notre savoir-faire au service de notre marque propre et de nos marques partenaires.

  Notre mission : faire rayonner des marques de qualité sur le marché français
Nous distribuons avec passion la marque Kambly - référence incontournable de la biscuiterie fine - ainsi qu’un portefeuille de marques à forte notoriété internationale : WALKERS, LOACKER, PICK UP! et FILIPINOS. Notre expertise commerciale, notre exigence logistique et notre connaissance des attentes consommateurs font de nous un relais de croissance fiable pour les marques que nous représentons. 

 Des valeurs fortes au service d’un engagement durable
Entreprise familiale, nous plaçons l’humain et la qualité au cœur de notre développement. Nous sélectionnons des partenaires aux valeurs communes : des entreprises familiales répondant aux plus hauts standards, dans le respect des savoir-faire. 
Ensemble, nous cultivons le goût, la qualité, l’authenticité et une même vision du développement.

Name: Simon George & Sons
Description:
At Simon George & Sons, we’re proud to be a family business with strong roots and big ambitions.

Simon George & Sons began back in 1927 with the vision of our great grandparents who set out to deliver fresh, high-quality fruit and vegetables to the members of their community. 

Our business has grown a lot since then and we’re now proud to operate in five locations across Australia, in the capable hands of our fourth generation of leaders. We’ve built partnerships with some of Australia’s leading hotels, restaurants, retailers and institutions, not to mention countless amazing local farmers and producers.

Name: Shan Distribution Network
Description:
SHAN DISTRIBUTION NETWORK is a company based in Carol Stream, IL, and is involved in the sales and distribution of products catered by well-renowned companies such as Mezban Foods, AL-SAFA, Shan Foods, KRBL, Knorr, Nestle, Shezan, Matco Foods, Shahzada, Menu, and Hemani. We take pride in being able to carry quality products to the market and work with well-established food brands. We currently distribute products in Illinois, Michigan, Ohio, Indiana, Minnesota, Iowa, and Missouri. 

Visit shandistributionnetwork.com for more information on our products and what we do! And if you have any questions, call us at 630-480-0616 and we will be happy to assist you.

Name: Abu Khalifa Trading
Description:
ABK stands as Qatar's premier supplier of fresh fruits and vegetables, delivering approximately 200 tons daily across diverse sectors including retail, wholesale, HORECA (Hotels, Restaurants, and Catering), and online platforms.
With a workforce of over 600 dedicated professionals and state-of-the-art facilities, ABK upholds the highest standards of quality and service. Our operations are supported by rigorous adherence to international standards, as evidenced by our ISO 22000:2018 and ISO 9001:2015 certifications. These accreditations underscore our unwavering commitment to operational excellence and customer satisfaction.
ABK is devoted to enhancing the supply chain and ensuring the delivery of premium produce to meet the varied needs of our clientele.
The first to supply new and exciting products, we are the leading supplier for the Qatari market and have the largest platform area (Rambas) within the wholesale auction market.

Name: M&S Distribuidora
Description:
A nossa empresa preza pela atenção à higiene irrestrita aos seus produtos, métodos de armazenamento e logística indispensáveis no setor, com peculiaridade e profissionalismo singulares. Propomos aos nossos clientes não somente produtos de alta qualidade, mas uma atenção especial aos nossos colaboradores que são devidamente qualificados à excelência ao trabalho que desenvolvem. NOSSA MISSÃO
Prosperar, fornecendo produtos e serviços de qualidade e com eficácia, por meio de uma forte parceria com fornecedores e colaboradores, visando superar as expectativas dos clientes.

NOSSA VISÃO
Ser referência no Ceará como produtora e distribuidora confiável de produtos e serviços inovadores, sendo uma das melhores empresas para se trabalhar.

NOSSOS VALORES
Valorizamos: Honestidade e Ética, Justiça e Respeito, Qualidade e Segurança em nossos produtos, colaboradores, fornecedores e clientes.

Name: SLAGRO SP. Z O.O.
Description:
Backed by a global and highly specialized team in the fresh and frozen fruits and vegetables sector, SLAGRO operates an integrated supply chain covering every stage — from origin sourcing and supplier coordination to quality control, cold storage, and distribution. This approach enables us to deliver high service levels and a consistent flow of products in the volumes and quality required by modern markets.
SLAGRO places a strong focus on citrus fruits, particularly oranges, through carefully structured supply programs designed to ensure year-round availability and stable quality, aligned with the needs of wholesale and retail markets across different seasons.
Polish apples represent another core pillar of SLAGRO’s product portfolio. Through strategic partnerships with selected growers and packing facilities in Poland, we ensure reliable year-round supply, meeting market-specific specifications for various destinations.
Our operations are supported by a robust sourcing network spanning Europe, Africa, and selected overseas origins, allowing us to maintain flexibility in volumes, consistency in quality, and responsiveness to seasonal and market fluctuations.
We work with continuous supply programs supported by strict quality control standards and full traceability, ensuring products reach the market in optimal condition and are ready for efficient wholesale and retail distribution.
SLAGRO’s logistics model includes professional cold storage, coordinated transportation, and full compliance with European standards for handling fresh and frozen produce.
By working closely with trusted suppliers, packing houses, and logistics partners, SLAGRO guarantees stable supply volumes, consistent quality, and transparent operations — enabling clients to compete with confidence in dynamic markets.
SLAGRO serves wholesale markets, distributors, and retail chains across the EU & UK, as well as selected markets in Asia and GCC, positioning itself as a reliable long-term partner.

Name: Economy Produce
Description: Economy Produce, established in 1978, is a distribution company that ensures the timely delivery of the freshest products to our valued clients. Our primary goal has always been to supply high-quality produce to both retail and food service distributors. With access to a wide range of over 2500 products, we have built a reputation for delivering exceptional service at affordable prices across the United States. Recognizing the importance of freshness in the produce industry, we strive to source the finest fruits and vegetables available. Our commitment to freshness is matched by our unwavering dedication to providing superior quality. We firmly believe that our customers deserve nothing but the best, which is why we carefully handpick each item in our inventory. Additionally, we are committed to offering excellent value to our customers, ensuring that they can access top-quality produce at competitive rates.

Name: Asia Food Trading
Description: Asia Food Trading is specialized in importing Chinese and Asian food. Our retail stores are located in Riyadh and Khobar, Saudi Arabia. We supply restaurants, catering companies, hotels and supermarkets.

Name: Al Mahmasani
Description:
Established in 1975, Al Mahmasani embodies a legacy of excellence, craftsmanship, and refined taste.
What began as a passion for perfecting the finest nuts has evolved into a pursuit of gourmet mastery — curating exceptional ingredients from around the world and transforming them into products of unmatched quality and elegance.

At the heart of Al Mahmasani lies a dedication to premium nuts, roasted and seasoned with precision, complemented by a selection of artisan chocolates, delicate dates, and authentic homemade Mouneh — traditional gourmet creations prepared with care and authenticity.

From our boutiques in Dubai and Abu Dhabi, we continue to set the standard for luxury gourmet experiences, offering bespoke assortments and elegant corporate gifting solutions that celebrate sophistication, heritage, and taste.

Name: Blind Coffee ApS
Description:
Blind Coffees mission er at tilbyde kaffeprodukter af høj kvalitet, samt at operere med et stort fokus på bæredygtighed og socialt samfundsansvar gennem hele værdikæden. 
Vi tilbyder kaffebønner, der er nøje udvalgt fra bjergtoppene i Syd- og Mellemamerika, samt Afrika og som vi håndrister på vores mikroristeri i Danmark. 
Derudover har vi i Blind Coffee et brændende ønske om at skabe interessante beskæftigelsesmuligheder for mennesker med et synshandicap.  
Så hvorfor kaffe? Når kaffe nydes, er det især din smags- og lugtesans, som kommer i spil. Din synssans er ikke essentiel her. Blinde kan derfor, på lige fod med andre personer, også vurdere kvalitet og nuancer af forskellige kaffeprodukter.

Name: Heal Aroma
Description: Heal Aroma offers the premium quality & high grade Cardamom for you & your family. We always supply freshly packed & healthy Cardamom by collecting from the hill range of the western ghats - the spice growing heartland in Idukki, Kerala and store in well sealed packages away from light and heat. Enjoy tastiness of natural Cardamom…!

Name: VANCARD PERU
Description:
In the heart of Peru, Vancard was born with a clear mission: to bring the purity of the Peruvian land to the world. We grow not only ginger and turmeric, but also relationships based on trust and quality.

Our journey begins in the fertile Peruvian fields, where each plant is cared for with sustainable agricultural practices. We are not just farmers; We are stewards of the environment and defenders of local communities. Each ginger root and each turmeric rhizome goes through a rigorous selection and processing process to ensure only the best reaches your table.

With Vancard, you not only get fresh and organic products, but also a commitment to excellence and sustainability. From the field to export, each step reflects our passion for offering superfoods of the highest quality. Join us and discover how nature and innovation come together in each delivery.

Name: Herbert Widmann GmbH
Description:
Seit der ersten Nennung auf dem Münchner Großmarkt 1912 ist einige Zeit vergangen:
Heute sind wir in Deutschland Marktführer für Beeren und Wildpilze. 
Wir importieren nicht nur frische Ware aus aller Welt, sondern bauen auch immer mehr selbst an. 
Wenn eine Frucht in Deutschland Saison hat, kommt sie von einer unserer regionalen Anbauflächen. 
Damit unsere Beeren das ganze Jahr über verfügbar sind, 
haben wir weitere Eigenproduktionen in Österreich, Rumänien, 
Spanien, Südafrika, Namibia und Chile. 
Was wir nicht selbst anbauen, beziehen wir von ausgewählten, langjährigen Partnern.

Den Drehpunkt unseres Handelns bildet ein großes, 
hochmodernes Umschlaglager mit Packstation in Taufkirchen. 
Von hier aus machen sich unsere Früchte, Mixbeeren, handgeschälten Physalis und Pfifferlinge über den Lebensmitteleinzelhandel und Großhandel auf den Weg: in Deutschland, nach Österreich oder den angrenzenden Ländern.

Unserem Ursprung bleiben wir treu und das als Familienunternehmen in 3. Generation: so sind wir noch immer auf dem Münchner Großmarkt zu finden.

Name: Pouliquen
Description:
Pouliquen : expert en négoce d'échalotes, oignons et légumes frais

Présence internationale : plus de 20 pays couverts

Leader sur l’échalote traditionnelle en France, en Allemagne, ainsi qu’en Italie, nous proposons également un large éventail de légumes frais, tels que choux, artichauts, tomates, pommes de terre et légumes anciens.

Exportation mondialeAu-delà de l’Europe, nous desservons des marchés tels que les États-Unis, Singapour et l’île de la Réunion. Une équipe dédiée accompagne nos clients dans leur développement sur ces zones stratégiques.

Plus de 100 ans d'expertise avec les producteurs locaux
Depuis plus d’un siècle, Pouliquen collabore étroitement avec les producteurs locaux pour offrir des échalotes traditionnelles d’exception. Nous distribuons également une gamme variée de légumes frais, en conventionnel et biologique, répondant aux attentes des consommateurs les plus exigeants.

Emballage et conditionnement sur mesure
Nos légumes sont issus des maraîchers du Nord de la Bretagne, et conditionnés selon vos besoins : filets de 250 g à 500 g, vrac de 5 kg à 20 kg ou big bags. Nous proposons également des solutions de packaging personnalisées sous votre marque.

Qualité et traçabilité garanties
Notre implantation sur le bassin de production nous permet de travailler au plus près des producteurs. Grâce à notre service qualité, nous assurons des contrôles rigoureux et une traçabilité complète de nos produits. Depuis le bassin maraîcher de Bretagne Nord, nous servons la grande distribution, les grossistes, importateurs et distributeurs à l'international. 

Le terroir breton : gage d’excellence
Le climat et le terroir de Bretagne, alliés à notre engagement pour des certifications exigeantes, garantissent des produits de qualité tout au long de l'année.

Pouliquen est certifié IFS Food, Global Gap, FDA, et Ecocert pour notre gamme de légumes

Description:

Με έδρα το Αυλωνάρι Ευβοίας και τρία υποκαταστήματα σε Χαλκίδα, Αλιβέρι και Σκύρο η εταιρία μπορεί να εξυπηρετήσει τις περισσότερες περιοχές στη κεντρική και νότιο Εύβοια, από Κύμη έως Χαλκίδα και Κάρυστο, το νησί της Σκύρου καθώς και στο νομό της Βοιωτίας περιοχές όπως Σχηματάρι, Οινόφυτα, Δήλεσι, Αυλώνα, Άγιο Θωμά και Ωρωπό.
Με ιδιόκτητους αποθηκευτικούς χώρους, συνολικής έκτασης πάνω από 5.000τμ, με πάνω από τριάντα οχήματα διαθέσιμα και έμπειρο προσωπικό πενήντα ατόμων η εταιρία μας μπορεί να εγγυηθεί για την ασφαλέστερη και ταχύτερη μεταφορά των προϊόντων στο χώρο σας μόνο με ένα τηλεφώνημα.
Αναλαμβάνουμε τον πλήρη εξοπλισμό όλων των καταστημάτων, όπως είναι χώροι διασκέδασης και εστίασης, μίνι μάρκετ και ψιλικά, περίπτερα και ξενοδοχεία.
Συνεργαζόμενοι με πάνω από 1000 προμηθευτές σε όλη την Ελλάδα και έχοντας μακροχρόνιες συνεργασίες με τις μεγαλύτερες εταιρίες τροφίμων και ποτών μπορούμε να προμηθεύσουμε τους πελάτες μας με μία πολύ μεγάλη γκάμα προϊόντων σε ποτά, αναψυκτικά, χαρτικά και τρόφιμα όλων των ειδών και στις πιο ανταγωνιστικές τιμές τις αγοράς.
Από το 2005 η Αφοί Κούκη Α.Ε ξεκίνησε να δραστηριοποιείται και στον τομέα των logistics προσφέροντας υψηλής ποιότητας υπηρεσίες αποθήκευσης, διανομής και μεταφοράς.

Name: Africa Beans
Description:
Africa Beans agri-commodities trading desk operates across contract farming, collection centers, processing, warehousing, and export logistics in Africa. We have developed unique, hybrid models that combine sustainable business with responsible purchasing as an alternative to conventional trading methods; our approach entails a profit-sharing model, among other creative financing structures, that are collectively underlined by fair trade practices geared towards maximizing the bottom line of small-holder farmers and suppliers, as well as improving the living standards of the local communities.

Africa’s GDP is largely agriculture-driven, with broader potential to become a global food hub through its substantial supply of arable land and water reserves. As one of the world’s best producers of Coffee, Cocoa, Cashew Nuts, Sorghum, Peanuts, Sesame Seeds, pulses, Spices, Wheat, Berleys, animal fodder, and other niche commodities, Africa Beans exports are predominantly composed of these verticals and their processed derivatives. With Africa Beans's operational strength in Africa merged with its deep product expertise, it is ideally positioned to address clients globally through top-tier offerings. Africa Beans approaches every contract with extreme diligence; we understand the critical nature of reliable on-time delivery and top-quality assurance.

We have built substantial market knowledge and a strong network of credible small-holder farmers, third-party suppliers and agriculture processors during our decades of operating in Africa. Through this experience, Africa Beans has accrued the capacity to supply products directly as well as through export partners to secure client requirements during unforeseen demand spikes, while also leveraging logistics synergies to maximize operational optimization. In doing so, we have diversified our food basket and sourcing capabilities to manage price risk and ensure supply continuity for clients worldwide.

Name: Vinify
Description:
Vinify is the culmination of many years’ worth of research, learning and making relationships with people within the wider wine community. It’s our vehicle to express ourselves and our wine circle, as well as bring value to the Australian wine landscape

The ethos behind our portfolio is as simple as it is important, great wines from great growers, which first and foremost have a sense of place. This key ingredient is what we firmly believe makes the wine industry such a fascinating one, and without it we would be selling you just another product. In many cases our wines are benchmarks for quality or value, often both, but through our close relationships with our growers we know that they are always working to better the wines they produce every vintage 

Choosing wonderful wines to sell though is the easy part (so to speak), where our business lives and dies is by the quality of the people within it. Our team of ambassadors, admin, accounting, logistics and marketing are here to guide and assist you when you need it

As well as day-to-day service we want to provide you with ways to engage with us and our brands in all forms, especially through modern events and social media. We like parties and experiences and education, and while we understand that wine needs to get taken seriously sometimes, we don’t have to take ourselves too seriously. We write tasting notes because we like to, and hope that you get something out of them, but everyone has their own taste so use them as a tool, reference point or suggestion only if it suits you

Vinify has a simple goal, to be Australia’s best wine business. We are early in the journey but hope you’ll join us for the ride. Like any good modern business, the best way to keep in touch is where we live on Instagram, LinkedIn or Facebook

Christian Canala & the Vinify team

Name: SPILL tea
Description:
The big secret in tea.
(this starts off gloomy but gets better).

Tea is too cheap. 
It used to cost more than gold. Now it's cheaper than a penny sweet. 
Mad.

Hard work goes into tea. But the rewards for doing each job are not equal. 
Most of the money is made in the UK. Too little is made where the tea is grown. 
And smallholder tea farmers mostly live in poverty.

Traditionally, bulk tea is bought from different countries and blended all together.
It can be bought in a mixture of ways...
Factory, auction, brokers, traders. Sometimes, a mix.

This makes things complex. 
And difficult to know what the smallholder who grew the tea has been paid.

That's the bad bit done.

So we thought "let's start again".

> Find a great tasting tea that hits the spot.
> Buy the tea direct.
> Talk to farmers, understand what they need.
> Pay the farmers more.

Be open about payments to farmers.

For you, a better cuppa. For the farmer, a better price.

Name: Cereal (Center for Research Europastry Advanced Lab)
Description:
Somos un equipo de inconformistas, con un ojo puesto en el pasado y otro en el futuro, reinventando la cultura de la panadería.

Cereal es un centro de innovación abierto a chefs, panaderos, empresarios y marcas que quieran transformar sus necesidades específicas y sus insólitas ideas en productos reales.

También es un espacio de encuentro para compartir las tendencias y las mejores experiencias del mundo de la panadería a nivel internacional. Un sitio donde hablar de lo que más nos gusta, compartir y experimentar juntos.

Somos el centro de Innovación de Europastry y nuestros orígenes provienen de una familia de panaderos tradicionales de Castellterçol.

Cereal tiene la misión de conservar esa tradición, difundirla y usarla para el futuro mejor. De ahí nace nuestra academia, un lugar donde compartir nuestro mejor hacer con todos los panaderos del mundo.

Academia: https://cerealacademy.com/

Y nuestro obrador, donde los panes elaborados por maestros panaderos siguen el proceso tradicional: largas fermentaciones, ingredientes 100% naturales, formados a mano y horneado en suela de piedra.

Tenemos el objetivo de hacer la vida de la gente más fácil, más saludable y más feliz. Eaboramos productos excelentes que generan 0 emisiones de CO2,  respetando el medio ambiente y reduciendo el impacto de nuestra actividad con la naturaleza.

Cuidamos nuestra relación con el campo y las materias primas, priorizando siempre las buenas prácticas y la proximidad para garantizar máxima calidad de los productos. El futuro lo creamos nosotros, y debe ser verde.
Por ello, si tienes un negocio, te presentamos nuestra gama de productos para profesionales de la hostelería y la restauración. Entra en nuestro canal profesional y conoce Alma de Cereal.

Canal profesional: https://almadecereal.com/

Name: CK Foods Holdings Ltd.
Description:
Established in 2000, CK Foods is an independent family-owned UK business consisting of 4 companies.
• CK (Fast Food Suppliers) Ltd. (Est. 2000)
Suppliers of quality food, packaging and cleaning products to catering establishments and fast food outlets.
• CK Foods (Processing) Ltd. (Est. 2005)
Food manufacturers specialising in the production, processing and supply of premium quality halal chicken finger foods, pizza cheese and dairy products.
• Haris&Co Supermarket (Est. 2021)
Retail supermarket supplying foods from around the world to the local community.
• Cooks Mart (Est. 2024)
Suppliers of kitchen equipment and utensils.

Name: GEVA GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
"BUSINESS ON THE ROCKS" - Mit der GEVA GmbH & Co. KG - The Beverage Solution Company 

Seit über 50 Jahren ist die GEVA eine der führenden Verbundgruppen im Getränkefachgroßhandel – und eine zentrale Drehscheibe der Getränkebranche. Wir verbinden Hersteller, Fachgroßhandel und Gastronomie und sorgen dafür, dass die Welt der Getränke zuverlässig ihren Weg in diese Vertriebskanäle findet.

Als unabhängige Gruppe vertreten wir die Interessen von über 100 Gesellschaftern und Getränkefachgroßhändlern in ganz Deutschland. Gleichzeitig profitieren unsere Anschlusshäuser im Rahmen der strategischen Partnerschaft von dem Know-how und Netzwerk der Transgourmet sowie der Radeberger-Gruppe. 

Unser Sortimentsschwerpunkt liegt im Bereich Bier, AfG und Wasser. Hier ist die GEVA Marktführer in Deutschland mit einem Zentralregulierungsumsatz von über 600 Mio. EUR.

Die Digitalisierung unserer Prozesse treiben wir konsequent voran. Mit der Einführung von SAP im Jahr 2024 haben wir unser digitales Service-Portfolio deutlich erweitert. Mit hochkarätigen Informations- und Kommunikationsplattformen bringen wir die Branche darüber hinaus regelmäßig zusammen und treten in einen konstruktiven Dialog.

Die GEVA, für Sie alles unter einem Dach!

Name: DESTOCKAGE EN GROS
Description: Depuis le debut 2021, nous travaillons avec les principaux acteurs de la grande distribution et les industriels de l’agro-alimentaire pour les aider à optimiser leurs dons de produits auprès des associations. Avec le lancement de la plateforme https://destockage-en-gros.com en Mai 2019, nous voulons franchir une nouvelle étape en proposant à tous les acheteurs professionnels, de toutes tailles, d'accéder à des lots de destockage à des tarifs très attractifs. Derrière https://destockage-en-gros.com ce sont 15 hommes et femmes, tous basés en France, dédiés aux destockages et aux dons.

Name: MIDA - SARL DAMA
Description:
Fondé il y a plus de 30 ans, MIDA est né de la passion d'un amoureux de la gastronomie italienne qui, en quittant son Italie natale pour la France, avait un rêve : faire découvrir aux Français les trésors culinaires authentiques de son pays. C'est ainsi que MIDA a vu le jour, avec pour mission d'importer et de distribuer des produits alimentaires italiens de qualité.

En 2024, MIDA entame un nouveau chapitre avec un nouveau dirigeant, lui aussi passionné par la gastronomie et le commerce. Son objectif est de développer la marque tout en perpétuant l'héritage en restant fidèle à son ADN de qualité et d'authenticité.

Depuis sa création, MIDA s'est forgé une réputation solide en tant que grossiste de confiance auprès des restaurateurs et des revendeurs spécialisés, tels que les épiceries fines, fromagers, charcutiers, et traiteurs. Ce qui nous distingue, c'est notre approche familiale et humaine, valorisant des relations de proximité avec nos clients, mais surtout notre offre unique de produits. En effet, MIDA est l'un des rares acteurs du secteur à importer directement 100 % de ses produits d'Italie, garantissant ainsi une qualité et une authenticité inégalées.

Mais MIDA ne se limite pas à la distribution. Notre entreprise fabrique également ses propres produits dans notre laboratoire en Seine et Marne, proposant une gamme variée de sauces, plats cuisinés et pâtes fraîches. Chaque produit est élaboré avec le même soin, qu'il soit sourcé directement auprès de producteurs italiens rigoureusement sélectionnés ou fabriqué dans nos installations.

Rejoignez nous pour "Goûter à l'Italie"

Name: Foodtel
Description:
En tredjedel av all mat som produceras i världen slängs bort. Det vill vi ändra på – en vara i taget.

Vi köper överskottsmat som leverantörer har svårt att sälja och ser till att den snabbt når butiker, restauranger och storkök till låga priser. 

Det gör vi via vår digitala marknadsplats för överskottsvaror och klippartiklar, där vårt breda leverantörs- och köparnätverk inom dagligvaruhandel och foodservice flyttar stora volymer snabbt, transparent och med rättvis prissättning – från producent till kund.

Kombinationen av svinnrisk och vår förmåga att snabbt flytta stora volymer gör att varorna ofta kan säljas med större rabatter och till bättre priser.

Leverantören blir kvitt stora volymer varor som de har svårt att sälja, vilket är bra för plånboken, lagret och CSR-arbetet.

Inköparen hittar bra produkter till bra priser - samtidigt som vi tillsammans räddar mat. 

Vissa kallar oss en hållbar matleverantör. Vi kallar oss mat-räddare: vi räddar god mat, hjälper företag spara pengar och gör en konkret insats för planeten – tillsammans med aktörer som vill minska matsvinnet.

Name: Grupo Serhos Food Service, S.L.
Description:
Grupo Serhos Food Service, S.L. es un grupo español dedicado a la venta y distribución integral de productos de alimentación con marca propia a grandes cuentas de colectividades, sector hotelero y restauración; tenemos 15 almacenes logísticos que abarcan todo el territorio nacional.


Misión

Ser un referente en la distribución y comercialización de productos de alimentación en el canal Horeca, ofreciendo nuestras marcas propias y primeras marcas comerciales, manteniendo la flexibilidad necesaria para garantizar las satisfacción de nuestros clientes, excelencia en el servicio y seguridad en la calidad.


Visión

Convertirnos en un agente de cambio líder en la distribución y comercialización de productos de alimentación, generando valor y promoviendo el crecimiento sostenible en todas las regiones, manteniendo los más altos estándares de calidad y excelencia en el servicio.

Los valores nos guían en nuestras acciones junto con las experiencias y soluciones estratégicas que ofrecemos a nuestros clientes, así fomentamos relaciones comerciales duraderas y aumento de la competitividad de los negocios tanto de los clientes como con las sociedades, además de crear una cultura de confianza, solidaria y de compromiso en donde remamos todos en la misma dirección:

- Integridad, Transparencia y Comportamiento Ético
- Innovación, Sostenibilidad y Liderazgo
- Satisfacción del Cliente
- Excelencia Profesional 
- Compromiso con la calidad y seguridad alimentaria
- Trabajo en equipo

Name: TOGA FOOD SA
Description: TOGA FOOD SA is an import and trading company for food products. It is integrated in the Swiss food market as an distributor for specialties and well-known brands from the European region.

Name: CBL Bakeries Ltd
Description:
CBL Bakeries supplies grocery retailers and food distributors with our unique cinnamon rolls and twists, throughout North America and internationally. 
Located in Calgary, AB, Canada, with over 28 years in the wholesale baking industry.
Only quality ingredients are used in our bakery creations: 
-Canadian Wheat sourced from local farmers.
-Indonesian “Dragon” Cinnamon that is non-GMO, organic and sustainably grown.
-Kraft Philadelphia Cream Cheese with natural vanilla flavor in our secret recipe frosting.
-Rich Brown Sugar paired with our signature Dragon Cinnamon.
-Vegan margarine.
-Our recipe contains no artificial flavors or colorings.
-Our proprietary dough recipe creates a laminated like pastry made in a certified food-safe facility. Resulting in a satisfying moist, tender, fluffy bakery product. 
-Cinnaroll products have a frozen shelf life of 12 months and a 14-day ambient shelf-life.
Discover the potential of our Cinnamon Rolls and Pastries and why your customers will "Heat, Share, Eat, Repeat!"

Name: Comercial Souza Atacado Alimentício
Description:
A Comercial Souza iniciou suas atividades em 2000, no início eram somente os dois irmãos fundadores que compravam, vendiam e entregavam, e desde então viemos construindo uma história de sucesso.

Ao longo dessa trajetória buscamos sempre o comprometimento com nossos clientes, colaboradores e fornecedores. Nossa equipe é composta por profissionais especializados e capacitados para oferecer o melhor serviço e atendimento, nosso relacionamento se dá de maneira consultiva, visitando o cliente e entendendo suas necessidades.

Atualmente atendemos redes de supermercados e mercados de pequeno e médio porte com uma ampla linha de produtos, nos seguimentos: Alimentar, bomboniere, bebidas, perfumaria, limpeza e bazar, com mais de 3.000 itens, 5 supervisores e mais de 150 representantes externos.

Contamos com um amplo CD de armazenagem e tecnologia de ponta (ERP e Força de Vendas), a Comercial Souza vem se constituindo no mercado como uma empresa inovadora, temos agilidade em nossas entregas e com isso melhorando o abastecimento e rentabilidades em nossos clientes.

Name: Altimate Nutrition
Description:
Altimate Nutrition was founded to disrupt the food industry by creating innovative, sustainable products that can help tackle pressing issues like hunger and food insecurity.

At the core of our mission lies a commitment to leveraging insect (cricket) proteins as a tasty, nutritious, and eco-friendly solution. Cricket protein is the sustainable protein of the future, requiring significantly less water, energy, feed, and land while generating lower greenhouse gas emissions.

Beyond its environmental benefits, cricket-based products offer unparalleled nutritional advantages, including enhanced protein quality, a rich profile of micronutrients and essential fatty acids, and a low-calorie density. Notably, cricket farming's low-tech, low-capital requirements open economic opportunities even for underprivileged communities.

Join the revolution and be part of our mission to reshape the future of food.

Name: Africa Coffee
Description:
Since our founding in 2009, our passion has always been bringing you gourmet coffees from all over the world, roasted fresh to order in eco-friendly Loring Smart Roasters. We’re committed to quality, service, integrity, approachability, and sustainability. This means more top-notch coffee in your cup, more money in your wallet, and less impact on our environment.

Our coffees are roasted fresh to order, immediately packaged, nitrogen flushed, and shipped directly to your door. We want our customers to experience fresh coffee at peak drinkability, just a few days after being roasted to perfection.

We’ve built our business by roasting exceptional Coffee for Everybody, whether you’re a coffee connoisseur or just looking for a better cup to start your morning.

We have been fortunate enough to be named one of Inc. 500’s fastest-growing private businesses in the country in 2015 and 2016, and in 2017, we made the top 5000! This, however, is the beginning of our impact. Our dedication to our customers and our partners at origin continue to drive our business and our success.

Give us a try. We think you’ll find that one cup is all it takes to fall in love with Fresh Roasted Coffee.
Location: Dar Es Salaam, Select an option…

Name: Segue Harvest Pvt Ltd
Description: At SegueHarvest, we bring you the finest quality red chillies and chilli powder, sourced from India’s top chilli-growing regions. Our products are naturally sun-dried, carefully de-stemmed, and hygienically processed to ensure rich color, bold flavor, and lasting freshness. Whether you're cooking at home or buying in bulk, SegueHarvest delivers purity and taste you can trust.

Name: Cyprofood Limited
Description:
Cyprofood Limited is a UK-based wholesale food distribution and cash-and-carry business specialising in supplying high-quality food products to restaurants, caterers, retailers, and independent grocers. Operating from its primary distribution hub in North London, Cyprofood offers a diverse range of goods including fresh, frozen, dry, and specialty Mediterranean and Middle Eastern products sourced from trusted local and international suppliers.

The company combines traditional wholesale service with modern retail operations, offering both in-store and delivery channels to trade customers. Cyprofood’s operations span procurement, logistics, warehousing, and retail, underpinned by a focus on efficiency, product quality, and customer satisfaction.

Name: Casa Borrás S.A.
Description:
En Casa Borrás S.A. trabajamos constantemente en mantener nuestra visión y valores intactos, cuyos objetivos siempre han sido la aceptación de los nuevos desafíos para seguir creciendo y generando nuevos logros para ser una empresa modelo y adelantada. 

Nuestra misión es ser líder en la comercialización y distribución de alimentos, bebidas, perfumería y limpieza valorado por los clientes por la calidad de sus productos y por la imagen diferenciada de sus marcas en el Noreste Argentino (NEA). Apuntamos a ser una compañía rentable y líder en el mercado.

Desde nuestro Centro de Distribución se provee sin  interrupción a 5.000 clientes de las tres sucursales: Chaco, Corrientes y Formosa. Llegando a las bocas de expendio dentro de las 24 horas de realizado el pedido y entregando los productos que representamos.

Anualmente se recorren más de 700.000 km de preventa y 600.000 km en promedio para la distribución. Entregando en promedio 3.000.000 de bultos, que representan el transporte de 20.000 toneladas de mercadería.

Hemos logrado metas gracias a nuestros colaboradores y los equipos que se han formado. Por ello, nos comprometemos a continuar desarrollando sus habilidades y talentos; en un ambiente laboral de excelencia y motivados por satisfacer continuamente las necesidades del cliente; así como la mutua colaboración con nuestros proveedores.

Name: BiotoBio
Description:
BiotoBio nasce dall’incontro di due storiche aziende. Fior di Loto, fondata nel 1972, e Baule Volante, che ha visto la luce nel 1987, sono state le aziende pioniere del biologico in Italia. La condivisione di valori e d’intenti ha portato questi due capisaldi della distribuzione a un’alleanza strategica, che ha poi dato vita, a 2 anni dalla fusione, a BiotoBio srl. Con le stesse finalità, da gennaio 2021 si è unita La Finestra sul Cielo: una realtà verticale, che include stabilimenti di confezionamento, produzione e distribuzione di prodotti biologici ed opera nel mercato alimentare biologico dal 1978.

BiotoBio è il fornitore ideale di prodotti biologici all’ingrosso per la tua attività. Se hai un negozio alimentare, un’erboristeria, una farmacia o un’attività Ho.Re.Ca, BiotoBio rappresenta il tuo partner di natura: risponde alle esigenze del tuo punto vendita e ti sostiene nel far crescere il tuo business.

BiotoBio – azienda di riferimento nella produzione e distribuzione di alimenti biologici all’ingrosso, cosmetici naturali e detergenti ecologici – con un listino di oltre 8200 referenze ti offre un assortimento tra i più ampi del mercato.
Grazie a iniziative di marketing innovative, un’area business funzionale e intuitiva, servizi logistici all’avanguardia e programmi di formazione e di consulenza qualificata, BiotoBio è l’alleato professionale perfetto per lo sviluppo della tua attività.
I valori, l’esperienza e la capacità innovativa delle aziende pioniere del settore del biologico che hanno dato vita a BiotoBio sono gli elementi cardine che ne guidano l’operato.

Name: airasia grocer
Description:
Back in 2020, due to Covid-19 nationwide lockdown, Malaysia’s agribusiness supply chain was severely affected because of logistics & distribution disruptions. Farmers had to simply throw away their harvested produce causing losses worth hundreds of thousands.

With the support of the Ministry of Agriculture & Food Industries (MAFI), airasia grocer was established to connect farmers directly to businesses. The idea was to leverage airasia’s robust digital ecosystem and extensive air & land logistic capability to reduce the gap between the farmers and businesses.

Today, we have grown to be a trusted food supply partner for importers, distributors, supermarket chains, hotels, restaurants, central kitchens and NGO’s.
Location: Kuala Lumpur, Wilayah Persekutuan Kuala Lumpur

Name: Pantera Fresh
Description: Pantera Fresh is a hands-on fresh produce company that markets top quality fresh produce from Egypt to world markets. The team (Marwa Rahman, Donia Kamal and Salma Sedky) is connected with growers all over Egypt. In addition, they work closely with Jaguar's companies in Peru, Chile, South Africa and China to ensure that our spiderweb of fresh connections are at the service of all our customers.

Name: hector o bueno s.a.
Description: Empresa de representación y distribución en Mendoza y Gran Mendoza,  con más de 45 años de experiencia en venta de productos alimenticios, bebidas y de consumo masivo.

Name: BLUE HORIZON INTERNATIONAL LLC
Description: Blue Horizon International General Trading LLC is an accredited entity, involved in export/import and  trading a wide selection of products in the regional and international marketplace. With years of industry knowledge and experience, we import, export, and supply frozen and canned products globally. Our offered range of frozen products entails lobsters, fish, fillet, crab, shrimp, octopus, baby octopus, mussels, and squid among others. Besides, we deal in canned products like tuna fish, sardine fish, mackerel fish, and mixed vegetable. Our product line is sourced from the trusted names in the market. With their strong support, we have been successfully serving small and massive product demands of the clients.

Description: Usha Food Imports Pty Ltd is one of the pioneer ethnic food import and distribution company in the South, Northern & Western Australian region to make several Indian and South East Asian food brands a household name with Asian shops and stores in these territories. Productos 5ª Gama para profesionales de la hostelería y la restauración (HORECA). Carnes Premium de importación, Wagyu Japonés, Wagyu Australiano y Black Angus.

Name: ERENEX for Agriculture Investment and Export (EAIE)
Description: Eren Export Company is committed to produce Fresh agricultural products at a high quality level and safe to consumers in compliance with international quality and food safety standards.

Name: DIGITALDRINK AG
Description:
DIGITALDRINK – Die digitale Schnittstelle zum Schweizer Getränkemarkt

DIGITALDRINK ist die führende, neutrale E-Business-Plattform der Schweizer Getränkebranche. Wir vernetzen Getränkehersteller, Grossisten und Dienstleister, um den Informationsaustausch zu vereinfachen, Prozesse zu automatisieren und datenbasierte Entscheidungen zu ermöglichen.

Unsere Leistungen:

Zentrales Produktdatenmanagement: Strukturierte Pflege und Verteilung aller relevanten Artikel-, Preis- und Konditionsdaten an einem Ort.

Marketing & Kommunikation: Zielgerichtete Verbreitung von Neuheiten, Aktionen und Marktinformationen – inklusive automatisierter Newsletter-Funktion.

BI & Markt-Insights: Interaktive Dashboards und exklusive Einblicke in den Schweizer Ausser-Haus-Getränkekonsum.

Digitale Integration im Bestellwesen: Anbindung von Gastro-Bestellsystemen, B2B-Webshop-Lösungen und automatisierter Dokumentenfluss entlang der Lieferkette.

Digitales Branchennetzwerk: Standardisierte API-Schnittstellen zur ERP-Integration für einen sicheren und skalierbaren Datenaustausch.


Warum DIGITALDRINK?

Branchenweite Akzeptanz: Die etablierte Branchenlösung mit über 100 angeschlossenen Grossisten und führenden Herstellern.

Neutralität & Sicherheit: Unabhängige Plattform mit hohem Datenschutz und Vertrauen aller Marktpartner.

Kontinuierliche Weiterentwicklung: Modular erweiterbar, marktorientiert und zukunftssicher – gemeinsam mit der Branche gestaltet.

DIGITALDRINK – Gemeinsam gestalten wir die digitale Zukunft der Schweizer Getränkebranche.

Name: Olympic Foods
Description:
For more than 30 years we have been supplying the Greek market with innovative and quality raw materials for confectionery, ice cream and bakery products, and food service products.
Our commitment is to ensure the quality of our products, to adhere to high health and safety requirements for our employees, and to protect the environment.
Join us on the most delectable journey, filled with unique product and recipe ideas.
Learn more at olympic-foods.gr

Name: Etablissements Dupleix
Description:
Grossiste en chocolats, confiseries & biscuiteries depuis 1967.

Notre Cash and Carry est situé au 72 Boulevard de Grenelle 75015 au pieds du métro Dupleix, notre catalogue comporte plus de 1000 références de confiseries et de chocolats parmi les marques les plus reconnues.

Nous fournissons depuis plus de 50 ans des revendeurs, notamment les Duty free,  Epiceries, Confiseurs, Grands magasins, …

Mais aussi des utilisateurs comme  les Hôteliers, Restaurations collectives, Agences de communication,  Agence d'évènementiels, Associations,…

Tout ça, avec un service sur mesure, à l’écoute du besoin de chaque entreprise, de chaque service marketing et de chaque chef de projet.

Name: Cocina Sabrosa Food & Beverage Trade Expo
Description: Cocina Sabrosa Trade Expo and Marketplace gives the Latin food and beverage industry their own focused, affordable, unique, curated, visually appealing, and authentic wholesale Expo.  A culturally relevant space dedicated for networking, product discovery, discussion and wholesale buying and selling unlike any other.

Name: Flamarsul Distribuidora
Description: Flamarsul is a company based out of R. Dr. Washington Luís, 114 - Vila Veranopolis, Cachoeirinha, Rs, Brazil.

Name: Omni Source Pty Ltd
Description:
Omni Source Pty Ltd is a cross-border FMCG sourcing and market-access company built on a simple but powerful belief: in a truly interconnected world, every region is both a source of distinctive, high-quality products and as a destination for global goods 

Our name — Omni, of all things, from all places — embodies this philosophy. We exists to enable this two-way movement of value through structured, responsible trade.

Our Role
Omni Source operates at the intersection of global sourcing. We work across both sides of the trade equation - with manufacturers and brand owners at origin, and importers, distributors, and procurement-led buyers at destination - to enable responsible, de-risked cross-border FMCG commerce.

What We Do
Omni Source enables cross-border FMCG trade through a structured, execution-led approach that addresses the core commercial challenges of operating across international markets.
Cross-Border Market Access
Global FMCG Sourcing & Supplier Qualification
Compliance Readiness & Trade Structuring
Commercial & Pricing Discipline
Trade Representation & Partnership Development

Our Operating Philosophy
At the core of Omni Source is a commitment to STRUCTURE over SPEED and PARTNERSHIP over OPPORTUNISM.
Cross-border trade carries inherent regulatory, commercial, operational, and reputational risk. Our role is to reduce that risk by bringing clarity, discipline, and alignment to sourcing and market-access decisions.
Every engagement begins with fundamental questions:
•	Is the product right for the market?
•	Is the supply model scalable?
•	Are compliance expectations clearly understood?
•	Are incentives aligned across all parties?
We ensure these fundamentals are in place in all our engagements. 

Who We Work With
We partner selectively with:
•	FMCG manufacturers and processors
•	Brand owners seeking new markets
•	Importers and distributors
•	Procurement-led retailers
•	Wellness-focused product companies

Name: DGF - Pastry Ingredients
Description:
Founded in 1986, DGF is a Pastry ingredients supplier.
Since 2021, it is now part Délice & Création - POMONA Group.

Our products are dedicated to Pastry and Bakery Chefs, with the aim of supplying the best price & quality ratio for their daily needs.

Through a strong network of distributors, our products are available in more than 70 countries and more to come.

For more information or enquiries you can contact us directly : 
dcr-clv-export@deliceetcreation.fr

Name: Noble Spirits
Description:
We are an Australian based company established in late 2013 in recognition of the growing aspiration of Australian consumers to appreciate more genuine and higher quality alcoholic beverages.
We are a young, passionate and innovative company positioned at the high end of alcohol brands. We source the most delicious, the most authentic and the highest quality products possible from Australia and around the world in order to distribute to our clients. Our mission is to enrich alcohol brand choices for consumers and bring greater value to customers. Our team is made of passionate, knowledgeable, vibrant wine and spirit people who want to make the difference and add value to the Industry.

We are the proud partner of great authentic producers such as FAIR, KOVAL, Grown Spirits, SASSY Cidres, Champagne Frerejean-Frères, FLUERE Alcohol-Free Drinks, 44N Gin, Merlet, French Bloom, VERSA Cocktails, Chateau Les Mesclances, Maison Tramier and we are continuously on the hunt to expand our portfolio with like-minded brands.

Live Authentic. Drink Noble.

Name: Aryuv Agencies Ltd
Description:
Aryuv Agencies is a prime importer of food and consumables suppliers in Kenya, stewarding a diverse portfolio of brands and creating value for its customers and distributors.  These distinct brands that have grown to supply over a hundred different products include; Aryuv, Bummies, Aryuva, Royal Umbrella, Ustam Börek, and PKCell to keep up with our fast-growing customer base.

We stand proud in having long lasting, trusted relationships with dedicated suppliers to ensure premium products are made available to consumers at affordable prices. Our business decisions are driven by our core values that include providing quality products and reliable services with great focus on customer satisfaction. This has driven Aryuv Agencies in becoming one of the leading food and consumables suppliers in Kenya serving millions of customers and looking to develop that base across East Africa.

Name: AFRICAN BRAND
Description: La nature offre des meilleures choses, voilà pourquoi nos produits sont purement naturels : Les jus TANGANELLA, ANANNELLA et LEMONNELLA.

Name: Unico Food Group
Description:
UniCo is a members-owned buying group dedicated to serving the fast food and quick service restaurant (QSR) industry. With a collective turnover of £500 million, we harness our buying power to provide unparalleled value to our members.

Key Areas:
National Distribution Capability: Ensuring timely and efficient delivery across the UK.
2000 Suppliers: A diverse network offering a wide range of products.
400 Multi-Temperature Vehicles: Maintaining product integrity with specialized transportation.

Name: Maistà Food
Description:
Maistà Food – Italian Food Experience

Maistà Food è un’azienda svizzera specializzata nella selezione e distribuzione delle eccellenze enogastronomiche italiane. Da una piccola bottega di quartiere a Lugano, è nata una realtà in costante crescita, che oggi si propone come punto di riferimento per la ristorazione professionale in Svizzera.

Lavoriamo ogni giorno per portare sulla tavola dei nostri clienti non solo ingredienti di altissima qualità, ma anche il rispetto per le tradizioni, la cultura del cibo e l’autenticità del prodotto artigianale italiano.

Cosa facciamo:
- Selezioniamo i migliori produttori artigianali italiani, veri Maestri del gusto, capaci di tramandare ricette e lavorazioni antiche con attenzione moderna.
- Distribuiamo oltre 170 prodotti provenienti da più di 20 regioni italiane, con una logistica interna strutturata e una flotta attiva su tutto il territorio nazionale.
- Serviamo tre principali segmenti: HORECA, GDO e Vending, offrendo soluzioni su misura e packaging dedicati.
- Sviluppiamo progetti di private label per clienti che vogliono portare qualità e identità nel proprio brand.
- Creiamo contenuti e collaborazioni con chef e ristoranti in tutta la Svizzera per raccontare il valore dei nostri prodotti direttamente sul campo.

I nostri valori:
- Qualità: ogni prodotto è selezionato con criteri rigorosi di provenienza, filiera, lavorazione e certificazione.
- Tracciabilità: seguiamo l’intero percorso del prodotto, dal produttore alla consegna.
- Tradizione e innovazione: sposiamo la cultura gastronomica italiana con un approccio moderno, dinamico e orientato al servizio.
- Assistenza: siamo vicini ai nostri clienti, ogni giorno, con risposte rapide e supporto personalizzato.
- Passione: per noi il cibo non è solo nutrimento, ma racconto, identità e bellezza.
