Name: Smiling Wolf
Description: Smiling Wolf is a portfolio of Functional Non-Alcoholic Spirits that contain a blend of nootropics and active ingredients. We operate with a portfolio of Gin, Vodka, Aperitivo, Agave & Rum, produced in small batches of 1000l. Additionally, Smiling Wolf brings the most advanced spirits technology to the table, to provide an authentic cocktail experience that delivers on both taste and effect.

Name: Halle Bio d'Aquitaine
Description:
Grossiste en fruits, légumes et épicerie 100% BIO en Nouvelle-Aquitaine.

Nous sommes une jeune entreprise créée en 2017 par deux ingénieurs agronomes originaires du Sud Ouest. Installés au cœur de Bordeaux sur le marché de gros de Brienne, nous livrons chaque jour sur toute la Nouvelle Aquitaine.

Spécialisés dans les fruits et légumes frais, nous sélectionnons les meilleures productions biologiques et biodynamiques. Notre offre, composée d'une centaine de produits de saison, fait la part belle aux productions locales et gustatives. Elle est étoffée par sélection d'épicerie artisanale.

Indépendante et très loin de la taille des mastodontes du secteur, notre équipe jeune et dynamique est composée d'une dizaine de personnes qui font la liaison quotidienne entre les producteurs et les détaillants ou restaurateurs. Cette grande proximité nous permet d'assurer fraicheur, réactivité et une qualité de service hors du commun.

Name: ffoods | Friendly Foods
Description:
ffoods es una plataforma B2B que conecta marcas emergentes de alimentos responsables con el retail.

Acompañamos a proyectos de bajo y mediano volumen en su integración al retail, aportando estructura operativa, logística y experiencia comercial. Desde nuestra trayectoria trabajando con marcas propias y grandes cadenas, facilitamos procesos tanto para marcas como para retailers, con un enfoque claro, colaborativo y de largo plazo.

Name: Café Viana
Description:
Café Viana: Mais de 60 anos de Tradição e Sabor

Desde 1969, o Café Viana é um ícone da qualidade e tradição no universo do café. Fundado por José Ribamar da Cunha, nossa história teve início em Tocantins e se expandiu para Imperatriz, Maranhão, acompanhando o desenvolvimento da cidade.

O Café Viana é a escolha preferida de maranhenses, tocantinenses e paraenses, oferecendo um café autenticamente brasileiro, seja ele forte ou suave, com açúcar ou adoçante. Tornamos os momentos cotidianos especiais, sempre deixando o desejo de mais uma xícara.

Nosso compromisso com a qualidade começa na seleção criteriosa dos grãos e permeia cada etapa do processo de fabricação. Oferecemos versões tradicionais, garantindo a preservação do aroma e sabor durante a torrefação, moagem e embalagem.

Para atender aos paladares mais exigentes, oferecemos grãos para moagem, permitindo que os amantes do café desfrutem de frescor e sabor inigualáveis.

Nossa Indústria Viana, com 4.500 m² em Imperatriz, é um dos maiores parques produtivos da região. Equipada com tecnologia de ponta, nossos profissionais altamente qualificados garantem a qualidade, seguindo rigorosas normas de excelência.

Comprometidos com a preservação ambiental, buscamos constantemente práticas sustentáveis para proteger ecossistemas e recursos naturais. Nossa meta é ser uma indústria exemplar, economicamente responsável e ambientalmente consciente.

O Café Viana não é apenas uma bebida; é um pedaço da história econômica do Maranhão. Junte-se a nós e faça parte dessa tradição de qualidade, sustentabilidade e sabor que é o Café Viana.

Name: Ashabhai & Co. Pte Limited
Description:
Ashabhai & Company Pte Limited was incorporated in August 1977 as a limited liability company in Fiji Islands. The Company’s Registered Office and Head Office are located at Lot 1, Karsanji Street, Bhindi Industrial Sub-division, Vatuwaqa, GPO Box 908, Suva. 

The Company has branches in Nadi and Labasa. The business operations are strategically located to service the markets effectively. Suva Warehouse services the southern and eastern regions and Nadi Warehouse caters to the western region while Labasa Warehouse serves the northern region.

The Company employs over 500 people with a cohesive organization structure. 

The Company’s principal business activities include import, export, wholesale, and distribution of fast-moving consumer goods. It deals in over 2000 SKUs of quality products. The Company exports to Pacific countries. The products are distributed Fiji-wide through its own fleet of vehicles. 

The subsidiary companies: 
Ashabhai Pharmaceuticals Pte Limited is engaged in the Sales and Distribution of Pharmaceuticals, Medical Devices, and Cosmetics range products in Fiji and Pacific island countries. We are committed to offering best-in-class healthcare products to our customers at affordable prices. 

Novel Distributors Pte Limited, a fully owned subsidiary of the Company, is engaged in manufacturing activities. It produces baking products, and snacks while repackaging rolled oats, milk powder, bleach line, and other consumer products. 
These products are sold in domestic and international markets. Recently the Company has invested in setting up Ice-cream manufacturing unit. 

Western Dairy Pte Limited, based in Nadi, manufactures Yoplait yogurt and Fresh N Juicy juice, and a frozen range of pasta.

In its journey of over six decades, the Company has grown, expanded, and evolved. Major contributing factors are fundamentally strong business practices; focus on customer satisfaction, prudent funds management, and continuous process improvement.

Name: Ferdinand Bierbichler GmbH & Co KG
Description:
Wir stehen seit über 100 Jahren für Qualität und Service

Mit unserem umfangreichen Sortiment sind wir zuverlässiger Partner für Gastronomen, Hoteliers, Kantinen- und Kioskbetreiber, Schulen sowie Pflegeeinrichtungen. Unser Ziel ist es, Ihren Arbeitsalltag zu erleichtern – durch individuelle Beratung, maßgeschneiderte Lösungen und zuverlässige Lieferungen.

Lebensmittel sind unsere Leidenschaft

Was einst als Fischhandel begann, hat sich zu einem breit aufgestellten Vollsortiment entwickelt. Mit über 8.500 Lagerartikeln bieten wir Ihnen alles, was Sie für Ihren Betrieb benötigen – von Tiefkühl-, Trocken- und Frischwaren bis hin zu Non-Food-Artikeln.

Fünf Tage die Woche für Sie unterwegs

Unser moderner, umweltfreundlicher Fuhrpark beliefert Kunden in einem Umkreis von ca. 130 km rund um Rosenheim. Dabei legen wir größten Wert auf Qualität und Pünktlichkeit. Besuchen Sie unseren Webshop, um unser Sortiment zu entdecken, oder lassen Sie sich persönlich von unseren Fachberatern inspirieren. Gemeinsam erarbeiten wir Lösungen, die perfekt auf Ihre individuellen Bedürfnisse abgestimmt sind.

Als Mitglied im Service-Bund profitieren wir und unsere Kunden von zahlreichen Vorteilen eines starken Netzwerks. So können wir Ihnen nicht nur ein breites Sortiment, sondern auch innovative Konzepte, erstklassigen Service und attraktive Konditionen bieten.

Entdecken Sie, wie wir Sie unterstützen können – mit einem Service, der seit über einem Jahrhundert für Vertrauen und Qualität steht!

Name: American Tuna, Inc.
Description: Supplying one-by-one wild caught tuna and other sustainably sourced seafood products to grocery aisles, deli's, restaurants and homes across the United States.

Name: HAIFA MEAT
Description:
Butchery | Delivery | Wholesale | Halal-Certified

At Haifa Meat, we deliver more than just fresh cuts — we deliver quality, trust, and taste to every table and every business we serve.

Based in Ajman, Haifa Meat is a full-service butchery, delivery brand, and wholesale supplier, specializing in premium halal meat sourced responsibly and handled with care. From individual households to restaurants, caterers, and retail chains — we serve clients who value freshness, hygiene, and consistency.

Whether it’s a perfectly trimmed steak, bulk lamb for your kitchen, or custom-cut poultry delivered to your doorstep — Haifa Meat is built to serve.

Name: Corpse Reviver
Description: Corpse Reviver is your new favorite hydration libation crafted for every occasion and inspired by the traditional botanic beverage. This libation plays a simple role -- to offer a better-for-you beverage with simple ingredients needed to bring your body back to life. Whether you sip before heading to the gym, in-between a few boozy beverages, or while sneaking into a speakeasy, Corpse Reviver is there to refuel you and redefine classic.

Name: Hijazi & Ghosheh Group
Description: The beginning started out with the establishment of Hijazi and Ghosheh FMCG Company in 1985, which evolved to form the Hijazi and Ghosheh Group, which is currently known and pioneered in the field of meat and FMCG, which now includes several distinguished companies in various commercial and industrial sectors.

Name: 𝑩𝑹𝑻𝑪𝑶 𝑮roup
Description: BRTCO General Trading LLC is a Food and beverages distribution company based out of Dubai, United Arab Emirates. Our operational footprint reaches most of the eastern and central parts of Africa with supplies from all over the world.

Name: 𝑩𝑹𝑻𝑪𝑶 𝑮𝒆𝒏𝒆𝒓𝒂𝒍 𝑻𝒓𝒂𝒅𝒊𝒏𝒈 𝑳𝑳𝑪
Description: BRTCO General Trading LLC is a Food and beverages distribution company based out of Dubai, United Arab Emirates. We export to a few countries in East Africa like Somalia and Kenya, and to DRC in Central Africa.

Name: Sorted
Description:
We connect independent retailers with the biggest range of products, suppliers and digital solutions in one central location making it simpler, better and more efficient to do business every day. 

Sorted is backed by Metcash - Australia and New Zealand’s leading independent retail partner and wholesaler in food, liquor and hardware.

Name: Schürch Getränke AG
Description:
Schürch Getränke AG ist Ihre Adresse für zuverlässigen Getränkeservice und stellt in der eigenen Mosterei und Brennerei unter der Marke Amstutz Manufaktur exklusive Edelbrände und Gin her.

Unser Sortiment bietet eine vielfältige Auswahl an Softgetränken, Frucht- und Obstsäften, regionalen Weinen, Craftbiere und goldprämierten Amstutz Spirituosen.

Ob Lieferservice oder Abholung in unserem Getränke Abholmarkt – wir stellen Ihnen die gewünschte Ware und bei Bedarf auch Festmobiliar für Ihren Anlass bereit.

Das innovative Unternehmen beschäftigt am Standort Rothenburg rund 30 Mitarbeitende und führt vor Ort regelmässige Veranstaltungen für B2B- und B2C-Kunden durch.

Name: Pituca Chips
Description:
Marca premium de snacks peruanos 
 De la mano con los agricultores
 Vegano y libre de gluten
Estamos comprometidos con la responsabilidad social y sostenibilidad ambiental, promocionamos la cultura peruana en nuestros productos.

Name: BIO EATU Coffee
Description:
A sustainable organic coffee farm on the fertile land of Eatu, Buon Ma Thuot, DakLak. 

Bio Eatu Coffee is a project to develop one of the largest organic coffee farm areas in Eatu, Buon Ma Thuot. We grow organic Robusta coffee with the endeavor to promote Vietnamese amazing Robusta coffee to the world. Sustainable, fair and sharing are our priorities.

However, sustainable farming is still a big concern. Organic is the key to not only strengthening the quality of our beloved coffee but also giving a helping hand to our environment, people, and land. Join us on this exciting yet challenging journey!

Name: Badshah Chap
Description: We are the bulk manufacturer and  dealer of frozen food products , specially chaap and have a huge setup of modern technology which is of global standard.  Our motive of “Eat fresh and live healthy” makes us a reliable and trustworthy business supplier for hotels, institutions, and restaurants. We have many top brands to whom we are serving our products pan-India.

Name: Finest Food Distributing Co
Description:
Finest Food Distribution Co. was started in 1948 by brothers Sidney and Jack Adelstein. Initially, Finest was a pickle manufacturer/distribution company. As time went on ethnic specialty items were added to the mix.
With the influx of Caribbean, Finest Food saw an opportunity to outsource new products and found sources for manufacturing and importing a variety of Caribbean products.
Finest Food and Jamaican Choice have been a popular Trade Mark names since 1953; These well established brands are recognized in the Caribbean West Indian, Jamaican, African American and the Latino Community .
Widespread recognition made Finest Food a leader in today’s market with distribution in all major supermarkets, independent stores and drug chains. The extensive line is distributed in the Northeast via our unique DSD service and our top notch sales brokers.
Many items sold today have consumer cross over marketing and go beyond the ethnic boundaries.
As a family owned and operated business, we remain in touch with all aspects of this multi-faceted operation.
Larry and Steven, the current owners and second generation have a new goal: that is to work with, Yussel and Jordan, the third generation, the driving force for a dynamic company distribution company.

Name: Romano Beverage
Description: Romano Beverage is a next-generation spirits and wine business with a long-standing history. After more than a century in the industry, our experienced team continues to successfully distribute high-quality products to retailers throughout the Chicagoland area.

Name: Tiny Fish
Description: Tiny Fish is a sustainable and zero-waste initiative from the Scottish aquaculture industry to harvest small freshwater salmon for human food, pet food, zoos and aquariums.

Name: Torres Canarias Vinos y Destilados SLU
Description:
Pasión. Esta es la palabra que mejor nos define.

Pasión por el trabajo bien hecho, liderado por un equipo con una gran experiencia y que se mantiene siempre formado para poder ofrecer a nuestros clientes sus conocimientos sobre los mejores vinos y destilados. Preparados para aportar soluciones adaptadas y aconsejar las referencias adecuadas para sus establecimientos.

Pasión por representar una gran variedad de bodegas y marcas que cubren tanto la geografía vitícola de nuestro país como de las más importantes regiones productoras a nivel mundial. Bodegas familiares y en muchos casos centenarias, con las que compartimos valores como la tradición y la sostenibilidad. Jóvenes y nuevos bodegueros que combinan pasión con innovación. Marcas que representan a la perfección la excelencia.

En Excelsia Canarias Vinos y Destilados sabemos que esta pasión es pegadiza y por eso la compartimos con nuestros clientes, para que a su vez la transmitan a sus amigos y clientes.

Porque la vida, sin pasión, es media vida.
Location: SANTA CRUZ DE TENERIFE, Sta. Cruz Tenerife

Name: LC Food Distributor
Description: We are a distribution-focused company founded by restauranteurs for restauranteurs. We work diligently to grow our presence in the market, enhance our catalogue, and recognize the needs of our customers; distinguishing ourselves as an ally dedicated to customer satisfaction and excellent performance.

Name: Shapoor Sanat LLC
Description: Shapoor Sanat Iranian Int. LLC Company is an exporter and wholesaler of  high quality food products from Iran to the world wide, especially we are suppling nuts, pistachios, almonds, peanuts, dates, saffron, dried figs, dried fruits, dried damask rose, sunflower and pumpkin seeds, raisins and recently skimmed milk powder. your trust is our capital.

Name: PRIME TASTE
Description: FMCG

Name: PXT Alimentos
Description: PXT Alimentos distribuidora conceituada com mais de 10 anos no mercado.

Name: Florêve Paris
Description:
Beauty [IN] Balance.

Chez Florêve, nous sommes une source authentique de beauté, mettant en avant notre engagement envers des nutricosmétiques 100% naturels, fabriqués avec amour en France et aujourd'hui distribués dans 26 pays à travers le monde.

Inspirés par les rituels de beauté traditionnels chinois, nous nous plongeons dans les secrets de la nature, une source inépuisable de bienfaits pour la beauté. En mariant la sagesse chinoise à l'expertise en biotechnologie française, Florêve dévoile la beauté naturelle qui sommeille en vous.

Nous sommes convaincus que la beauté découle de l'équilibre, c'est pourquoi Florêve s'engage à offrir des produits parfaitement équilibrés en termes de saveur et d'efficacité, sans aucun conservateur ni colorant artificiel, préservant ainsi l'équilibre interne précieux de chacun.

Nos produits sont rigoureusement testés en clinique, sous la supervision de dermatologues et de pharmaciens, garantissant à la fois la sécurité du consommateur et le respect de l'environnement grâce à des normes de qualité strictes.

Chez Florêve, nos idées et nos convictions sont la philosophie et la clé de notre succès. Rejoignez-nous pour découvrir une beauté authentique et naturelle, puisée dans les trésors de la nature et magnifiée par la science.

Rejoignez-nous pour retrouver votre équilibre 
Notre site e-shop : Florêve (floreve.com)
Notre compte Instagram : Florêve Paris (@floreve.paris)

Name: Riquísimo リキッシモ・スペイン
Description:
Riquísimo, Family Foods from Spain, a selection of the best products of the Spanish Gastronomy is an initiative to export the finest Spanish products to Japan and other Asian markets.
Our associates are middle-sized companies founded and owned by Families or Cooperative Businesses. We believe in the power of family businesses to develop the Spanish economy. 
With offices and people in both Spain and Japan, we represent our asssociates attending and exhibiting at food fairs, as well as connecting companies and organizing events for potential customers in destination markets.
We are convinced of the quality and potential of Spanish food products and beverages and their ability to compete in the Asian markets.
Our current portfolio is formed by canned fish, spices. garlic, anxovies, skipjack and octopus; potato chips, ibérico ham, pasta, olive oil, cheese, fresh truffle and truffle products, natural honey, confectionary and much more.

Additionally we represent different wines from all over Spain including Rioja, Cava, Txakoli, Ribera del Duero or La Mancha, as well as premium spirits, mainly botanical gin.

We have helped our customers sell in Japan, Korea, Taiwan, Thailand, Cambodia, Laos, Indonesia and China.

We believe in Spanish Gastronomy because everything is Riquísimo!

Name: Gourmet de Paris
Description:
Located in the heart of the Rungis International Market, the GOURMET DE PARIS team is a structure dedicated to the export of Premium products.

The company is part of an international food group.
With our export experience, our role is to select for our customers the quality products that will satisfy our customers.

Our core business covers the sourcing of products from professional suppliers, product selection, quality control, negotiation of purchase prices and administrative procedures related to export.

Name: ONWO
Description: We are a complete sweetener solutions company. We offer customised sweeteners in bulk or retail packs.  We also offer pre-mixes for bakery and beverages.

Name: EFFELLE
Description:
Italian shellfish packed by net or MAP in different size.
Brand "Le Bontà da Amare", ready shellfish made without additives and preservatives, 100% gluten free with Italian souce.
Available organic products

Name: Corval Group
Description:
Corval Group Pty Ltd is an Australian, family-owned business with a history that spans more than 75 years. Its businesses include:

Conga Foods (www.congafoods.com.au)
Pakval Business Solutions (www.pakval.com.au)
MaxFoods (www.maxfoods.com.au)

Corval Group embodies its entrepreneurial and family roots by driving innovation with a growth mindset based in quality, ethical and socially responsible business.

Name: Arabian dates in bulk
Description:
Dates are our sole focus, which enables us to supply you with consistently and reliably high quality fresh Saudi dates no matter where you are in the world. By constantly investing in the well-being of our people and safety, striving for technology and efficiency.

Dates are all we do. Al-Wusayta’ farmland was the original home of Al-Mojel family 300 years ago. Lucky for you, we found the perfect location within the Sudair valley where the perfect conditions to grow palms. The knowledge and expertise harvested here is interchanged with our Saudi-wide farm-owner partners to get you covered on dates, to meet your business needs.

A passion for dates!! Our workforce breathes and lives fruit dates. And that passion and competency powers our aims for dates perfection. We are proud of thinking differently and we will continue to strive for practicability and pertinency for the dates industry. Not just packing and delivering, but also in what we can satisfy you and your customers.

Name: La Pernice s.r.l
Description: La Pernice produce e distribuisce in Italia e all’estero prodotti ortofrutticoli tipici del sud Italia. L’azienda, che ha sede in Puglia, in un’area incontaminata dislocata tra le città di Turi (Bari) e Mottola (Taranto). Si distribuisce su oltre 250 ettari di coltivazioni dirette e 10000 metri quadrati di uffici ed impianti destinati alla conservazione frigorifera, al lavaggio ed al confezionamento dei propri prodotti. Si rivolge ai mercati europei attraverso i canali della grande distribuzione veicolando prodotti di primissima qualità selezionata, orgoglio dell’impresa e motivo di scelta da parte di marchi internazionali legati alla grande distribuzione commerciale. Dal 2005 l’azienda ha attuato un programma di interventi mirati al miglioramento dei processi aziendali, ottenendo le Certificazioni British Retail Consortium e International Food Standard.

Name: Compre Mix Atacado
Description: O Compre Mix Atacado é uma empresa rio-pretense que nasceu grande por sua natureza. Concebida com o objetivo de fortalecer os negócios do grupo Compre Fácil Atacadista, que tem expertise no segmento atacado generalista há 18 anos, busca atender os consumidores e modificadores (Food Service), como bares, restaurantes, lanchonetes e padarias da região de São José do Rio Preto.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, São Paulo

Name: Neupert Ingredients KG
Description:
Die Neupert Ingredients KG zählt zu den renommiertesten Anbietern in Deutschland für hochwertige natürliche Rohstoffe und Lebensmittelzutaten aus aller Welt. Als Familienunternehmen mit Sitz im Großraum Hamburg bilden wir die gesamte Lieferkette ab: vom weltweiten Sourcing der Rohstoffe über den Import und die Belieferung der europäischen Lebensmittelindustrie bis hin zu Abfüllungen für den E-Commerce oder Lebensmitteleinzelhandel.

Unsere breite Produktpalette umfasst Binde- und Verdickungsmittel, Flohsamenprodukte (Psyllium), natürliche Zuckerersatzstoffe, pflanzliche Proteine und Mehle, Ölsaaten und Pseudogetreide, Antioxidantien, Säureregulatoren, Emulgatoren, Backzutaten sowie eine große Auswahl an Superfoods. Davon ist ein erheblicher Teil in zertifizierter Bio Qualität erhältlich. Der Anteil unserer Geschäfte mit Bio zertifizierten Produkten liegt bei fast 50 %.

Großabnehmer aus Industrie und Weiterverarbeitung profitieren von unserer jahrzehntelangen Erfahrung im Rohstoffhandel mit einem umfangreichen Produkt Know-how, einem streng konzipierten Lieferantenmanagement, der Qualitätssicherung aller Lieferprozesse und unserem welt-weiten Netzwerk an direkten Kontakten zu Produzenten mit den höchsten Qualitätsstandards. 
Ein umsichtiges Produktmanagement, die Erfahrung mit langfristigen Kontrakten sowie ein hohes Maß an Flexibilität zeichnen uns aus. Wir behalten den internationalen Markt stetig im Blick, sodass wir unsere Kunden bei erkennbaren Trends, über die Preisentwicklung und Kaufentscheidungen kompetent beraten können.

Name: Joyería Gastronómica
Description:
Nacimos en 2011 en Bogotá, cuando dos estudiantes de la Universidad de Los Andes decidieron transformar la gastronomía colombiana con ingredientes excepcionales. Fuimos pioneros en la importación del "Diamante Negro", la prestigiosa trufa negra, y desde entonces hemos ampliado nuestro portafolio con productos de alta cocina como foie gras, setas deshidratadas, aceites premium, vinagres artesanales y mucho más.

Hoy, seguimos evolucionando para satisfacer las necesidades de la creciente industria gastronómica en Colombia. En Joyería Gastronómica, ofrecemos más de 100 productos exclusivos de distintas partes del mundo: Francia, Italia, Filipinas, China, Nepal... Todos cuidadosamente seleccionados para garantizar la más alta calidad.

Más que ingredientes, traemos historias, tradición y experiencias que convierten cada plato en un verdadero viaje gastronómico.

Name: Fundo Sofruco
Description:
Somos Sofruco Alimentos, parte del Holding Sociedad Agrícola La Rosa Sofruco, somos cosechadores de trayectorias gracias a nuestros productos de calidad y 100% naturales, que nos hacen ser pioneros en área agroindustrial. Contamos con múltiples categorías de productos agrícolas como: frutas frescas, fruta deshidratada, frutos secos, miel de abeja y palma, y jugos 100% naturales.

Cada uno de estos productos se encuentra en Peumo, Sexta región. En este lugar existen 13.767,01 hectáreas con tierras ideales para nuestros cultivos, centrándose en ellas una alta variedad de saludables productos.

Exportación
La extracción que se realiza en nuestros fundos para una posterior exportación, es de manera estratégica y por sobre todo cuidadosa, con el objetivo principal de aprovechar cada uno de los nutrientes y beneficios que solo la fruta fresca puede entregar. Nuestra larga trayectoria y calidad, avala el nivel de producción que tienen nuestros productos, ya que nuestra filosofía de empresa es que cada producto que llegue a tu mesa sea lo más fresco y natural posible.

La dedicación con que cultivamos y seleccionamos nuestros productos se ve reflejada en el requerimiento que tenemos nacional e internacionalmente.

Name: Devaud - Réseau Le Saint
Description: La société DEVAUD est la référence du commerce de fruits et légumes en Vendée (85). Elle a rejoint le Réseau Le Saint en 2007 et fournit les acteurs de la RHD et de la GMS sur la région Pays de la Loire.
Location: La Roche-sur-Yon, Pays de la Loire

Name: Rotta Alimentos
Description:
Fundada em 1984, a Rotta Alimentos é uma empresa composta por um quadro de aproximadamente 70 colaboradores, cuja sede está localizada na Rodovia BR 467 KM 110, no bairro Canadá, na cidade de Cascavel, oeste do estado do Paraná.

Dispondo de uma harmoniosa estrutura física e detentora de uma frota capaz de suprir as necessidades do mercado, os produtos comercializados pela empresa são distribuídos semanalmente em mais de 150 municípios da região Oeste, Sudoeste, Noroeste e Sul do estado do Paraná.
O segmento da empresa está focado, há quase 40 anos, em produtos para panificação, confeitaria, chocolateria, massas frescas e laticínios. Essa diversidade de segmentos, se funda na preocupação em atender bem o público alvo.
A Rotta Alimentos, inspirada pela filosofia da justiça e do trabalho, acredita que tem uma função social a desempenhar, no sentido que, cada membro integrante da empresa, é considerada peça fundamental para o desenvolvimento da mesma. Afirmamos também, que a evolução do empreendimento é fruto da dedicada equipe de colaboradores e fornecedores, que não medem esforços para o cumprimento de nossa missão – a satisfação do CLIENTE ROTTA.

Name: Rue de France Importadora
Description: A Rue de France é uma importadora especializada no segmento de enogastronomia francesa, com foco em produtos alimentícios e bebidas. No mercado brasileiro, detemos a exclusividade de mais de 6.000 produtos, fruto de uma aliança de exclusividade forte com o terceiro maior conglomerado de alimentos e bebidas francês. Graças a essa parceria, somos exclusivos de mais de 20 marcas, todas originárias de 58 fábricas pertencentes ao nosso parceiro francês. Além disso trabalhamos com nossa equipe de sourcing na França afim de criar parcerias com marcas reconhecidas internacionalmente, sobre centenas de outros produtos franceses. Através de nossos produtos, acreditamos firmemente no poder transformador de uma boa alimentação, percebendo que a seleção de ingredientes de qualidade no preparo de uma refeição enriquece os alimentos, transformando a rotina em celebração. Com este propósito, elevamos o que já é bom a um patamar ainda melhor. Temos verdadeira paixão pela gastronomia francesa e nos dedicamos integralmente a ela. Para nós, o rito da comida é um elemento chave da vida, é onde se compartilham pensamentos e se vivem relacionamentos.

Name: Green Endeavour
Description: Green Endeavour is the company developed in alignment with the 1 July 2021 merger between Suncoast Fresh and Fruitlink. The merge between Suncoast Fresh and Fruitlink will deliver multiple opportunities to key stakeholders. Suncoast Fresh and Fruitlink will continue to operate as separate brands.

Name: KATE & KON
Description:

Name: MoleCola
Description:
ITALIANA VERA.
MoleCola, nata nel 2012 a Torino è il risultato della collaborazione tra aziende italiane che condividono la propria esperienza in questo progetto unico.
MoleCola è certificata da Italcheck, un'organizzazione no-profit che garantisce la tutela del Made in Italy e certifica l'impronta italiana dei prodotti.

Ogni ingrediente proviene da aziende italiane, gli aromi sono estratti e selezionati da un’azienda specializzata situata nel fiorentino, lo zucchero di barbabietola italiano è prodotto dall'ultimo produttore presente in Italia, che aderisce al progetto di una cooperativa di 5700 agricoltori. Elemento fondamentale è l’acqua di sorgente, minerale naturale, una delle più leggere in Europa, proveniente dalle Alpi Marittime del Piemonte. 

MoleCola amante dell’ambiente è un’azienda completamente plastic free, la sua iconica bottiglietta in vetro creata da Curve Studio di Torino si chiama 90.60.90 le cui forme evocano le curve delle dive degli anni '50 e gli eleganti dettagli incisi sul vetro si ispirano al mondo della sartoria italiana. 
Nel 2017 ha vinto l'ambito primo posto nella categoria Material Design agli International Design Awards (IDA) di Los Angeles, un importante concorso che premia ogni anno i migliori progetti di design.

Dal 2016 MoleCola sostiene Renken, un'associazione italiana che opera in Senegal con lo scopo di migliorare le condizioni di vita delle comunità in cui opera.

MoleCola è la giusta alternativa che abbraccia tutti i bisogni. Rispettosa verso l’ambiente, solidale e orientata verso il mondo. È questo il mix che la rende un prodotto unico in grado di esaltare un importante spirito di appartenenza, quello della cucina italiana nel mondo.

Name: Yorkvale
Description:

Yorkvale Trading is a well establish global leader in the procurement and sale of frozen meat, poultry, seafood and agricultural commodities products and their respective derivatives, with over than 15 years of experience.

Name: Madame Healthy (Lemonadha Product)
Description:
Lemonadha is a Tunisian drink. The base of lemonade is fresh lemon combined with its peel, which gives it a tart and tangy taste. The lemons used are typically local varieties, known for their juicy and aromatic qualities to create a balanced, thirst-quenching drink.
The business is named "LEMONADHA."
My Lemonadha is a Cold-pressed lemonade. It is a healthy, refreshing, and vibrant beverage made by extracting juice from fresh organic lemons using a hydraulic press. 
What sets cold-pressed lemonadha apart is that it includes the whole lemon, including the peel, resulting in a fuller, more healthy,  more robust flavor profile and a slightly cloudy appearance.

Name: Coco Locaux
Description:
Coco Locaux est le logisticien régional qui simplifie la distribution des produits locaux en centralisant l’offre. Nous sélectionnons nos produits en direct producteur et garantissons ainsi un modèle de circuit court !

 Nous sommes fiers de proposer une solution de fournisseur unique pour mettre fin aux contraintes qu’imposent les multiples commandes et multiples francos pour nos clients :
-	 GSS (Grandes Surfaces Spécialisées : EAP (Epiceries alternatives de proximité), Magasins bio, …),
-	 GMS (Grandes & Moyennes Surfaces),
-	 PMS (Petites & Moyennes Surfaces),
-	 Quick-commerce,
-	Restauration commerciale ( Restaurants traditionnels, rapides, …) et
-	 Restauration collective et d’entreprise…

 Nous facilitons également la vie de nos producteurs partenaires en leur permettant de ne préparer qu'une seule commande sans avoir à se soucier de la livraison.

 Nous avons à cœur de valoriser la qualité de leurs fabuleux produits, c'est pourquoi nous évitons tout stockage pour préserver leur fraîcheur et maintenir des prix justes pour nos clients et nos producteurs.

 Nous offrons également une sélection de produits d'épicerie en stock et décolisés pour compléter notre offre.

 Nous croyons en la mise en avant de chaque histoire et passion de nos producteurs. C'est pourquoi nous accompagnons chacun d'eux à travers différents outils de communication tels que de la signalétique en magasin ou des vidéos interview.

Name: Caffè Bristot | Bristot Hellas SA
Description:
Bristot Hellas is a subsidiary of Caffè Bristot - Procaffè S.p.A. (Italy), one of the leaders in the coffee industry.

Caffè Bristot - Procaffè S.p.A. has a solid experience of over 100 years in the roasting of coffee beans and is present in 65 countries worldwide.

The journey began in Belluno, Italy, nestled in the foothills of the Dolomites, where in 1919, Domenico Bristot embarked on a mission to make his vision a reality. Since then, the company strived to discover the finest ingredients, enhance its knowledge & skills and offer quality Italian coffee while adhering to the highest international standards. 

With a century of experience, Bristot has emerged as one of the leading companies in its field, with a relentless focus on implementing innovative techniques and technologies to cater to the distinctive needs of its customers.

After 14 successful years in the Greek market (through a network of Greek importers), Bristot Hellas SA was established (March 2023), an affiliate company to Caffè Bristot - Procaffè S.p.A.

The main focus of Bristot Hellas SA is to centralize procedures, strengthen the communication plan of the brand in the Greek market, establish certified Bristot Academies in the country and expand its network in Greece (additional areas & channels).   

Passion is a key characteristic of the DNA of Bristot! 

This philosophy is also reflected in our tagline: 

"Whatever you do, do it with passion".

Wir erschliessen den Schweizer Markt für international etablierte Healthy-Food-Brands ebenso wie für innovative Food-Startups und begleiten sie als langfristiger Partner beim nachhaltigen Markenaufbau.

Fruver steht für Spezialisierung im Healthy-Food-Markt, tiefes Markenverständnis und unternehmerisches Denken. Wir arbeiten mit Marken, die Haltung zeigen – und verkörpern selbst die Werte einer Generation im Wandel.

Wir leben, wofür wir stehen.
Fruver ist anders.

·	Ordena en línea desde cualquier lugar y en cualquier momento.
·	Accede a tus facturas, pedidos y pagos en un solo lugar.
·	Repite, ajusta o elimina productos con un solo clic.

Nuestro objetivo es liberarte de las tareas administrativas, para que te enfoques en la estrategia y el crecimiento de tu negocio. Queremos ser tu proveedor confiable, tu socio de crecimiento, tu aliado en el éxito.

Únete a nuestra comunidad de empresarios exitosos y experimenta la diferencia! En Ecocosecha, crecemos contigo!"

Description:
Kenon inizia la sua prestigiosa storia nel 1892 in territorio napoletano specializzandosi sin da subito nella selezione , torrefazione e nella vendita delle migliori origini di Caffè.

Negli anni, l’attività è cresciuta rapidamente di padre in figlio, registrando enormi successi nella produzione di eccellenti miscele da bar fino alla nascita, nel 1962, dell’Azienda Cafè Centro Brasil ad opera di Vittorio Wurzburger, che oggi è una moderna e tecnologica realtà produttiva e commerciale capace di coniugare, grazie all’esperienza ormai ultra secolare, l’artigianalità e la qualità dei prodotti con gli ultimi ritrovati in campo tecnologico, partecipando attivamente allo sviluppo e alla costruzione dei macchinari e degli impianti utilizzati.

Name: The Vintage Bakery
Description:
We are on a mission to cater the best desserts with the most authentic flavours in an extremely pocket friendly price.

We are on a journey to provide consistent, qualitative desserts for all your celebrations.

Name: V. Marchese Inc Official
Description:
Our humble origins take us back to 1934, when our namesake Vito Marchese, fondly known as the “banana man,” delivered fruits and vegetables from his hand-painted truck.
From gardens and farms to your kitchen, you can bet that our produce, dairy, and spices are the freshest of the fresh! Our intensive food safety procedures and certifications keep our facilities clean, safe, and exceeding industry standards.

Some things never change, like our commitment to quality in both our goods and our services. Nothing appeals to us more than the opportunity to show you how much we appreciate your business. Everyone in the V. Marchese family is happy to go the extra mile to ensure you have everything you need. We even share menu recommendations! Because at the beginning, middle, and end of the day, we’re produce people. But we’re also people people.

We helpen u graag via 072 534 7800 of sales@mercato-italiano.nl

Name: KambaExpress
Description:
O Kamba Express funciona de forma única em Angola. Somos o primeiro e-shop a garantir o fornecimento de produtos e a realizar entregas totalmente grátis.

Como conseguimos isso?
O Kamba é a ferramenta de compras virtual da Intermarcas, e parceira oficial da Angoalissar, maior distribuidora de alimentos de Angola e umas das empresas mais sólidas do país.

A nossa filosofia é facilitar o processo de compras da sua empresa, tornando o seu dia-a-dia mais prático, além de 100% digital.

Não vendemos para o consumidor final.
Para garantir que somos realmente o seu Kamba, reservamos os melhores preços apenas para a sua empresa, e assim não criamos concorrência ao vender directamente para o consumidor final. Todos os nossos clientes são devidamente registados e verificados.

Comece agora mesmo a abastecer a sua loja ou armazém!

Name: Spice Satchel LLC
Description:
Importer and Wholesale Spice Provider

Spice Satchel LLC is an Importer, Wholesaler and Distributor of Spices based in Houston, TX. Our aim is to expertly source and provide highest quality Spices  at competitive prices while maintaining safety standards. We ensure  traceability, reliability and consistency with all our orders.  

We serve businesses including but not limited to food manufacturers, custom blenders, food service operators, spice traders and brokers. We stock a wide range of both whole and ground spices. 

We abide by our commitment to provide highest quality spices by establishing quality control and assurance, as well as our commitment to build strong working relationships with our clients through good customer service and support.

Name: Big Kahuna Coffee Roasters
Description:
At Big Kahuna Coffee Roasters, our passion for coffee began with a simple love for a good cup of joe. As self-proclaimed coffee connoisseurs, we were frustrated with the lack of options for premium, fresh-roasted coffee. So, we decided to take matters into our own hands and bring the best beans from around the world directly to the coffee bosses like you.

Our mission is simple: to offer the finest coffee blends, carefully selected and expertly roasted to perfection, just for you. We believe that a great cup of coffee starts with quality beans and ends with proper roasting techniques. That’s why we source only the highest-grade beans and roast them in small batches, ensuring that every cup you enjoy is made fresh and to order.

At Big Kahuna Coffee Roasters, we believe that everyone deserves a quality cup of coffee. That’s why we’re dedicated to empowering the coffee boss in you, providing a unique, personalized coffee experience that you won’t find anywhere else. Whether you prefer a bold and robust brew or a smooth and silky blend, we’ve got you covered.
So, join us on our journey to bring the best coffee to the coffee bosses of the world. Because when it comes to coffee, we believe that quality should never be compromised. Roasted fresh and made to order, we invite you to taste the difference for yourself. Unleash the coffee boss within and join the Big Kahuna coffee community today.

Name: Repertoire Culinaire Vietnam

We never stop sourcing and believe that quality food is a work of art, as we take great pleasure and care in supplying only premium and exclusive products to our customers. 

Alongside our many partners, we operate a solid and reliable supply-chain thru 4 continents, based upon food-safety, consistency, and quality. We take pride in meeting our customers’ expectations and deadlines, always serving their needs and interests in first place. “Quality without compromise” is our mojo.

Contact us today to learn more about our services.
Location: ho chi minh, Thu Duc City

Name: Disposable Green
Description:
At Disposable Green, we are passionate about providing eco-friendly and sustainable food packaging solutions for businesses and individuals. We believe that everyone has a responsibility to take care of our planet, and we are committed to doing our part by offering high-quality, compostable, and biodegradable products that are both functional and affordable.
Our journey began with a simple idea: to reduce the amount of waste produced by the food service industry. We noticed that most food packaging options were made of plastic, which was not only harmful to the environment but also posed a risk to human health. We wanted to offer a better alternative, one that was not only environmentally friendly but also safe and practical.
With this in mind, we set out to find sustainable materials that could be used to create high-quality food packaging products. After months of research and testing, we discovered a range of innovative materials that were not only eco-friendly but also functional and affordable. We started by introducing palm leaf and bagasse tableware, and over the years, we have expanded our product range to include a wide variety of compostable and biodegradable options.
Today, we are proud to be a leading supplier of eco-friendly food packaging solutions, offering everything from compostable straws and cutlery to takeaway boxes and coffee cups. Our products are designed to be both functional and sustainable, providing businesses and individuals with a practical way to reduce their environmental impact.
We are a team of passionate individuals who are dedicated to making a difference. We believe that by working together, we can create a better, more sustainable future for our planet. Whether you are a business looking to reduce your environmental impact or an individual who cares about the planet, we are here to help. Join us on our mission to make the world a cleaner, greener place, one product at a time.

Name: Inter Rice Asia Pte Ltd
Description:
Japanese Sake has been the traditional drink of Japan for centuries. Many have enjoyed this national drink with its popular cuisine for the past decades. Singaporeans are all too familiar with it. However, there are many questions that need to be answered as its popularity grows. The typical questions are - Should I drink my sake hot or cold? How should I store my sake? How do I choose my sake?

Inter Rice Asia Pte Ltd entered the Singapore market in 2008 with the direction to promote sake, and to educate others on how to enjoy this amazing beverage. It imports directly from breweries in Japan, mainly in the Niigata prefecture, which prides itself to be "The Burgundy" region in Japan. Selected brands and types of premium sake are introduced to restaurants and pubs, giving a wider variety of options to the more discerning customers in Singapore. Private collectors of wine are beginning to also show interest in Japanese sake and learning how to enjoy the finer ones. 

Inter Rice Asia aims to educate and promote sake appreciation in Singapore and the nearby region.

Name: ORCA MAREE
Description:
ORCA MARÉE sélectionne et livre des produits de la mer d’exception aux restaurateurs exigeants, en France et à l’international. Basés à proximité de Rungis, nous allions un sourcing rigoureux, une logistique performante et l’expertise d’une équipe de passionnés pour garantir une fraîcheur incomparable.

Notre force ? Des femmes et des hommes engagés, dont beaucoup évoluent dans l’univers des produits de la mer depuis bien plus de 20 ans. Leur savoir-faire et leur exigence sont au service des chefs, qu’ils soient restaurateurs japonais ou cuisiniers traditionnels. Grâce à notre flotte de camions dédiée, Transport Marée, nous assurons des livraisons rapides et fiables, directement dans vos cuisines.

Un engagement responsable
Nous savons que la mer est une ressource précieuse. C’est pourquoi nous avançons chaque jour vers des pratiques plus durables :
 Emballages en carton pour remplacer le polystyrène
 Compacteurs pour optimiser le recyclage des déchets
 Mise en place d'une politique "Zéro Gaspi" pour valoriser les restes de poissons

Chez ORCA MARÉE, nous faisons plus que livrer des produits de la mer. Nous accompagnons les restaurateurs avec exigence, engagement et passion, pour que chaque assiette célèbre le goût authentique de l’océan.

 Envie d’en savoir plus ? Contactez-nous !

Description:
FISH LAB MARKET rappresenta una solida realtà con esperienza ultratrentennale nella vendita di Fresh Fish Wholesale.
In costante ascesa in Italia e all’Estero, l’azienda è specializzata nella lavorazione e la distribuzione di frutti di mare, selezione di ostriche, pescato locale e crostacei vivi, offrendo ogni giorno un’accurata selezione dei prodotti richiesti.
La missione di FISH LAB MARKET è di portare qualità e innovazione nel mondo della produzione e distribuzione ittica, proponendosi come PARTNER ideale per gli operatori professionali che ricercano per sé standard di QUALITÀ eccellenti.

Alessandro Esposito, giovane manager intraprendente e determinato a guardare lontano, ha raccolto la sfida di prendere per mano questa tradizione e accompagnarla verso nuove sfide e nuovi traguardi. 

FISH LAB MARKET è un hub unico nel suo genere, che fa della qualità e dell'integrazione della FILIERA uno dei suoi punti di forza: un’equipe esperta e fortemente qualificata garantisce un pronto servizio al cliente, una corretta conservazione mediante moderne attrezzature e macchinari alta gamma, tempestività di risposta e controllo giornaliero dell’offerta proposta.

La garanzia di un ottimo rapporto QUALITÀ-PREZZO, un servizio imbattibile e la competenza per seguire e consigliare il cliente passo dopo passo, nella ricerca della migliore soluzione d'acquisto ne fanno un partner perfetto per tutti coloro che operano nella ristorazione di qualità. 
A testimoniare l’eccellenza delle materie prime e di un lavoro ben fatto, sono già numerosi chef, catene alberghiere e ristoranti stellati che hanno scelto FISH LAB MARKET come proprio partner commerciale.

Name: 555 Amanda UK
Description:
555 Amanda is here to make Cod Roe sexy again!  

Cod Roe is back and it’s ready to uplevel your offer and keep those margins juicy! Cod roe is more than just a throwback to days gone by; today it’s a superfood and absolutely packed with Omega-3 fatty acids and high in protein. 

 

At Amanda Seafoods, we’ve been doing this since 1916—when we weren’t just the new kids on the block, but the pioneers of canned seafood in Denmark. Under the brand “555 Amanda,” we carved out a reputation for high quality, exquisite taste, and (way before it was cool) sustainable fishing practices.  

 

Fast forward to the 1950s, and we thought, “Why not press this bad boy into cans?” Boom—pressed cod roe was born, and it’s been a hit ever since, from across Denmark to the UK’s best fish and chip shops. We also have salmon roulade and frozen cod roe nuggets for easy, chuck it straight in the fryer alternatives. 

Versatile? You bet! Whether you’re running a pub, fish shop, or catering business, the 555 Amanda range is here to elevate your dishes, bulk up your protein, boost flavour, and keep your food costs in check. Think fisherman’s pies, seafood stews, or the tastiest fish cakes around. It’s a secret weapon that not only stretches your recipes but also widens your margins. 

Looking for some culinary inspiration? Use it in sandwiches, whip up a pate, tantalise with taramasalata, or go fancy with canapés. Check out some recipes from chef Steve Walpole on our website. 

So, if you’re after quality, convenience, and a touch of the forgotten past turned superfood superstar, 555 Amanda is your new best mate. Time to rethink cod roe—it’s your menu’s next big hit! Get in touch.

Name: Navis Food Partners
Description:
A holding company focused on building a premier independent foodservice distribution platform in the Northeast.

Navis aims to establish an industry-leading foodservice distribution platform serving independent customer channels across the region.

We believe in the vibrant and diverse independent food venues that define the food scene in New England and the broader Northeast. By uniting companies with unique capabilities, value-added services, diverse customer channels, and specialized category offerings, we are creating a platform of independent brands and companies that cater to the needs of our innovative customers.

Over the past 30 years, the relentless consolidation of the foodservice distribution industry has significantly reduced the number of supplier choices available to restaurant operators. Many successful food distributor brands have been absorbed into large, publicly traded broadliners, dominating the industry and diminishing diversity.

Navis Food Partners offers a different approach.

We are committed to preserving and investing in the legacy brands of our companies and leadership teams, while enhancing the competitive advantages that have made these companies successful.

Welcome aboard!

Name: Chácara do Tião
Description:
Como tudo começou
 
Nascido em 26 de janeiro de 1957, na cidade de Desterro do Melo - comarca de Barbacena-MG, Sr Sebastião José Duarte veio para são paulo em busca de trabalho com a intensão de ser tornar um micro empreendedor. Iniciou trabalhando na lavoura e depois de oito anos como funcionário, conseguiu alcançar um dos seus objetivos, recurso para arrendar a chácara onde trabalhava. Deu início a distribuição de verduras e a pedido de muitos clientes fundadores de sacolões, agregou na sua distribuição, frutas e legumes. Hoje, casado e pai de três filhos, é dono da "Distribuidora Chácara do Tião”, que atende vários segmentos como, sacolões, padarias, hotéis, restaurantes, escolas e cozinhas industriais, com produtos de excelente qualidade seja para seu consumo ou comércio.
A Distribuidora Chácara do Tião é uma empresa familiar que hoje é administrada pelos filhos de seu fundador, é uma empresa preocupada com a qualidade dos produtos oferecidos aos clientes, atuamos a mais de 30 anos no mercado de hortifrut, colocando na mesa do consumidor o que há de melhor na agricultura. Dispomos de uma vasta diversidade de mercadorias e atendemos tanto no atacado como no varejo.
 
Missão
 
Atender com excelência e satisfazer as expectativas dos nossos clientes;
Oferecer produtos de qualidade e confiabilidade no nosso atendimento;
Pontualidade e compromisso com nosso cliente.
 
Visão
 
Ser uma empresa familiar de vanguarda reconhecida por acompanhar o mercado/tecnologia, sempre se colocando a frente na busca da perfeição do atendimento, produto e logística.
 
Valores
 
Responsabilidade e compromisso, transparência, agilidade, lealdade, respeito e ética profissional.

Name: Local Roots NYC
Description:
Local Roots was founded on the power of community and good food. We connect fellow New Yorkers and sustainable family farmers aiming to heal our broken food system with a healthier, more delicious future for us all. We’re a minority female-owned small business. 

Since our first market pickup in 2011, we’ve distributed over 60,000 pounds of sustainable produce per year — connecting 1,500+ New York households with freshly harvested and nutrient-dense food sourced from over 15 family farms and 20+ small-batch purveyors. We deliver hand crafted small batch provisions or provide neighborhood pick ups in community oriented markets.

The two Local Roots Cafes can be found serving Farm-To-Table Chinese Comfort food, locally sourced Bubble Tea, wines and beers. In Chelsea, we’re at the Market 57 kiosk at the @BeardFoundation Food Hall. In Carroll Gardens, Brooklyn the cafe caters, hosts parties, and community events. 

Hiring Full Time, Part Time, Freelancers, and Interns for University Credit

Name: Target Agriculture Group
Description:
Founded in the early 1994, Target Agriculture is the brainchild of our founder, Dr. Thomas Gerbracht. Having visited Sri Lanka as a tourist, he saw the immense potential of this island nation, and decided to start an operation to work closely with rural farming communities and export organic produce to foreign markets. This dream, which initially started as a family project, has now expanded to four countries across Asia, exporting the goodness of nature, to Europe, America, Asia, and Australia, and impacting the lives of many.

The company is engaged in value addition to fruits in 3 categories which are dehydrated fruits, fruit juices/pulps/purees and IQF Fruits. Later, Target expanded and included 3 other countries which are Thailand, Vietnam and Indonesia. From its humble origins as a family project in Sri Lanka, Target has grown to provide more than 200 certified organic products, from organic farms all over Sri Lanka, Thailand, Vietnam and Indonesia to customers in Europe, America, Asia, and Australia.

We are committed to supporting the development of the rural agricultural industry and the rural economies of the countries we operate in. Ensuring all our activities are certified by internationally recognized organizations is a key priority for our business.

Name: BCFoods Europe
Description:
With over 180 years of experience BCFoods Europe B.V. is a well known Dutch importer and wholesaler of spices, seeds, herbs and dehydrated vegetables.

BCFoods Today – Multinational with Product Diversity
Today, we have farmland, manufacturing facilities, and sales offices worldwide. We also have strategic partnerships established globally with top ingredient manufacturers who supply exclusively to BCFoods and meet our stringent quality requirements just as our own factories do.

This global sourcing strategy provides counter seasonal crops that limit risk, provide added forecast flexibility and offer competitive prices worldwide. In this way, we ensure that our multinational customers have convenient access to a wide range of ingredients from a single source.

Our Quality Assurance experts travel worldwide to monitor our supply chain through on-site facility inspections, confirming good agricultural practices (GAP), processing and packing of products for BCFoods and to ensure they meet our stringent foods safety standards, HACCP and Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP).

Established in 1986, N&B has grown from a small enterprise into one of the leading foodservice companies in Southern England. We currently employ over 50 staff at our main depot in Swindon, and our warehouse operates 24 hours a day, 6 days a week. Our delivery service covers the majority of central Southern England and South Wales, and runs from our centrally located Swindon depot, serving close to 1000 customers every week. Our collections areas at each of our depots deliver exceptional value to the general public and local businesses week in week out.

Name: SupplyMatch
Description:
Welcome to SupplyMatch, the game-changing platform that's redefining the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) industry. Whether you're a manufacturer, importer, wholesaler, retailer, supermarket, minimart, or grocer, SupplyMatch is designed to help you unlock your business's
true potential.

Imagine a world where your sales, purchases, payments, and logistics are not just managed but automated—all at the touch of a button. SupplyMatch is built to empower your business to run faster, smarter, and more efficiently, giving you the freedom to focus on what truly matters: growth and success.

Why SupplyMatch?

Total Automation: Suppliers, retailers, supermarkets, and minimarts can now automate their entire supply chain—from purchasing to payment collection, inventory restocking to delivery. Save time, reduce costs, and eliminate the hassle of traditional processes, so you can focus on growing your business.

Seamless Sales, Purchase, and Payment Solutions: Imagine a platform where every transaction—whether sales, purchases, or payments—flows effortlessly. With real-time automation, SupplyMatch ensures you’re always one step ahead.

90-Minute Express Wholesale Delivery: In today’s fast-paced world, time is everything. With SupplyMatch, receive wholesale products within 90 minutes—keeping your shelves stocked and your customers happy.

Instant Payments for Suppliers: Cash flow problems? Not anymore. With instant payment processing, suppliers get paid as soon as the transaction is completed—driving better liquidity and financial health for your business.

Flexible Pay-As-You-Go Model for Retailers: Retailers can purchase only what they need, when they need it. Our pay-as-you-go model ensures you never overstock or stretch your budget, giving you greater flexibility and control.

Name: iglo Austria
Description:
Über iglo Austria GmbH

Die iglo Austria GmbH mit Sitz in Wien ist bereits seit über 50 Jahren in Österreich tätig und Marktführer im Bereich Tiefkühlkost. Das Unternehmen ist Teil der Nomad Foods Group, die in derzeit 17 Ländern Tiefkühlprodukte vertreibt und an der New York Stock Exchange notiert. iglo sichert in Österreich – sowohl direkt als auch indirekt über Partner – ca. 1.000 Arbeitsplätze.

iglo verfolgt als Marke das klare Ziel, jeden Tag einen positiven Beitrag zur Ernährung der Österreicher zu leisten. Mit rund 230 Produkten mit Fokus auf Fisch und Gemüse, will iglo diesem Auftrag gerecht werden.

iglo zählt zu den bekanntesten Marken im heimischen Lebensmittelhandel und wird wieder und wieder zur beliebtesten und sympathischsten Marke Österreichs gewählt.

Getreu dem Motto „Iss was Gscheit’s!“ entsprechen alle Produkte höchsten Qualitätsstandard.

Herkunft ist uns wichtig. Unsere Produkte stammen aus den jeweils besten Regionen, unser Gemüse z.B. seit Jahrzehnten aus dem Marchfeld, unsere Fertiggerichte aus dem steirischen Ennstal und unsere Fischstäbchen werden mit Polardorsch aus dem Pazifik hergestellt.

All das, damit unsere Konsumenten unbeschwert genießen können. Iss was Gscheit’s!

Description:
Italian Food Manufacturer and Distributor based in Bangkok, Thailand.

******

Since 2017, Rockfoods Bangkok Ltd has for mission to import, produce and distribute premium Italian food products to the Thai consumers, with a particular expertise on Italian cheeses and dairy products.
Our goal is to offer our customers the best quality products at competitive prices, aiming to spread Italian food culture in the Kingdom of Thailand by supplying the B2C and B2B markets.
Our skilled and International team can deliver to the final customers the best quality products, ensuring the highest safety standards by following the regulations set by the government.
Rockfoods supports these goals with a corporate philosophy of adhering to the highest ethical conduct in all its business dealings, treatment of its employees, and social and environmental policies.


PRODUCTS AND SERVICES
Rockfoods provides Ho.re.ca. and retail markets with a wide range of Italian food products such as:
-Italian cheeses and dairy products (AnticaLuna brand)
-Filled, fresh and dry pasta
-Extra Virgin Olive oil and derivatives products
-Italian vinegars
-Italian gastronomy products (baked products, ready to eat sauces, etc.)

We supply the Ho.Re.Ca. and retail segment all over Thailand with Italian cheeses, either imported from Italy or freshly made in Thailand in our internal Cheese production (AnticaLuna). We manufacture them using both local and Italian imported raw material. We produce and import from Italy a wide range of food products, such as hard, aged and semi-aged cheeses, filled and dry pasta and gastronomy items made in our main kitchen.

Vajra - Dry products :

The Vajra story began in 1982, when a group of people conscious of social and ecological issues decided to offer organic and biodynamic dry products. A pioneering approach at the time, it has since spread far and wide.

Delibio - Fresh products : 

On the fresh produce side, Delibio was founded in 2011, and over the years has become a benchmark in the distribution of fresh and organic food products.

Vajra Delibio : 

The union of Vajra and Delibio came into being in 2023, reflecting the coming together of two benchmark Belgian distributors with strong values. Today, Michaël and Pauline Riga have taken over the reins of Vajra and Delibio alongside Quentin Bruyère.

Name: Emarald Foodstuff Trading LLC
Description:
About Us - Emarald Foodstuff Trading LLC

Emarald Foodstuff Trading LLC, established in 2021 by Mr. George Varghese, is passionate about delivering the finest seafood products to valued customers. Mr. Varghese, a visionary leader with over 30 years of unparalleled experience in the seafood industry, drives the company's success through exceptional financial acumen and innovative market strategies.

Name: Botego | Coffee & Wine shop
Description:
Náš rodinný podnik byl založený již v roce 2002 a má tak za sebou více než dvě dekády historie v poskytování unikátních gastronomických zážitků.

Od počátku jsme byli hnáni hlubokou vášní pro kvalitní italskou kávu Dersut, která patří mezi dominantní na italském trhu. Vybudovali jsme si pevnou reputaci v oblasti kvality a vynikajícího servisu, zejména v segmentu HoReCa (hotelů, restaurací a kaváren).

Vždy jsme se snažili nabízet produkty, které splňují očekávání našich náročných firemních zákazníků, a s rostoucím zájmem ze strany těchto klientů jsme neustále rozšiřovali naši nabídku a upevňovali naši pozici na trhu.

Náš sortiment je pečlivě vybírán a průběžně aktualizován, aby uspokojil i ty nejnáročnější chutě. Kromě kávy DERSUT, jsme se rozšířili o exkluzivní prosecco, italské "šampaňské" franciacorta, šumivá vína z Trenta a tichá vína z oblastí Friuli, Veneto, Valdobbiadene, Piave a Puglia. Nedávno jsme do naší nabídky zařadili i španělská šumivá vína cava, čímž jsme ještě rozšířili naše portfolio o další prvotřídní produkty.

Věříme v důležitost rodinných hodnot, blízkých vztahů a důvěry, které jsou základem našeho podnikání. Jsme zavázáni k poskytování nejvyšší úrovně zákaznického servisu a toho, že naši zákazníci jsou vždy na prvním místě.

Name: Mithila Foods
Description:
Mithila Foods is building the first modern FMCG brand from Bihar, rooted in regional staples like sattu, roasted chana, makhana, and katarni chuda.

 Our Vision-
To turn authentic, high-protein Indian staples into accessible, aspirational products for every home in India.

 Why Now-
Lakhs of migrants outside Bihar struggle to access the food they grew up with, while health-conscious consumers everywhere are searching for clean, local proteins. Mithila Foods bridges both.

 Who We Are-
Founded in Dumka, Jharkhand by Shubham Sunderka, Ankit Kumar, and Anshu Kumar, our team blends FMCG execution, design, and cultural insight to make regional foods both scalable and loved nationwide.

We’re creating a new category of clean, culturally rooted Indian foods that redefine how India sees Bihar - and how Bihar sees itself.

Name: Latteria NÖM
Description:
Crediamo che tutti abbiano diritto a star bene attraverso gli alimenti di cui si nutrono. A sostegno di questo ci impegnamo quotidianamente per fare del buon cibo per tutti e lo facciamo da oltre 120 anni in Austria ed in altri paesi europei. Lo facciamo producendo Yogurt, Kefir, Latticini High Protein, Dessert e Formaggi freschi con solo Latte senza OGM proveniente da 2.500 piccole fattorie a conduzione familiare che sono certificate benessere animale. Li produciamo nei nostri siti produttivi a zero emissione CO2, utilizzando imballi riciclabili ed in gran parte realizzati con materiali riciclati.
Presenti sul mercato italiano da poco più di un decennio , siamo riusciti a distribuire velocemente i nostri prodotti su tutto il territorio nazionale, conquistando la fiducia e l’apprezzamento di oltre 8 Mio. di famiglie italiane, consumatori dei nostri prodotti a marchio Milk. Questo ci ha permesso di diventare leader di mercato in diversi segmenti come lo Yogurt da bere, il Kefir, i latticini High Protein ed i Dessert freschi.  
Website: www.latterianom.it 
Company size: 30 – 50 dipendenti
Fatturato: 200 – 230 Mio Euro
Founded: 2010

„NÖM denkt weiter“, ist Motto und Leitgedanke unseres Unternehmens. Wir übernehmen Verantwortung und garantieren einen sinnvollen Einsatz von Ressourcen. 
Unser Ziel ist es qualitativ hochwertige und nahrhafte Produkte mehr Menschen zugänglich zu machen, unsere Gemeinschaft aufzuwerten und die Welt in der wir leben zu einem besseren Ort zu machen. So waren wir das erste milchverarbeitende Unternehmen in Europa, das ausschließlich gentechnikfreie Milch oder biologische Milch verarbeitet. An unseren Produktionsstandorten produzieren wir seit Jahren CO2 neutral, unsere 2.500 lokalen Milchbauern sind Tierwohl zertifiziert, unsere Verpackungen sind recyclingbar und bereits zu einem hohen Anteil aus recycelten Materialien hergestellt.Dies ist der Grund weshalb unsere Produkte im letzten Jahr von über 11 Mio. italienischen Familien gekauft wurden

Der Einmannbetrieb wuchs zu einem der größten Arbeitgeber der Region an. Und das überschaubare Angebot der ersten Tage ist heute ein mehr als 8.000 Produkte umfassendes Sortiment.

Doch vieles ist auch gleich geblieben. Wir sind ein inhabergeführtes Familienunternehmen. Wir verstehen uns als Partner unserer Kunden, für die wir immer einen Schritt weiter gehen als erwartet. Und wir sind mit der Region, in der wir leben und arbeiten, tief verbunden — eine Verbundenheit, die zum Beispiel in unseren Eigenmarken zum Ausdruck kommt.

Zu unserer Unternehmensgruppe gehören Partner-Unternehmen, die dieselben Eigenschaften haben wie wir — Leidenschaft für die Sache, ausgeprägtes Dienstleistungsverständnis, Entscheidungskraft. Name: BIOVIT
Description:
BIOVIT is on a mission to improve the health of people and the planet through the use of natural vitamins and minerals.

BIOVIT's vitamins and minerals are derived from organically grown plants, fungi and algae, making “clean-label” fortification of any Natural and Organic food and drink products possible. 

Most supplements and fortified foods use artificial vitamins, which are isolated compounds often made using petrochemicals from oil and gas. The majority of consumers would prefer natural to artificial nutrients in their food and drink products, and are willing to pay more for them. 

BIOVIT’s micronutrients are different: they’re in their natural form, within a food matrix. Research shows that the other bioactive compounds and phytonutrients in food matrices can help with absorption and have health benefits.

With support from the UK Research Institute, as part of the UK Government’s Better Food For All initiative, BIOVIT is working with Universities, NHS Trusts, and R&D partners to rigorously test the stability, bioavailability, and efficacy of its natural vitamins and minerals. 

Incorporating BIOVIT natural vitamins and minerals into food and drink products couldn’t be easier, with support from our dedicated team every step of the way.

Die Winkels Logistik ist der führende Getränkelogistiker im südwestdeutschen Raum.

Name: C.W. Shasky & Associates, Ltd.
Description:

Headquartered in Oakville, Ontario, we represents premium, top-quality, and category-leading manufacturers and brands - both provincially and nationally. Our privately-owned and operated company is dedicated to securing and expanding access to the foodservice market for our principal partners and their brands.

Name: G.KARAGOUNIS SA
Description:
Alipasti.
A new brand that goes way back. 
The bustling harbour of Volos is considered to be the capital of Greek meze [appetizers] and its countless, picturesque little restaurants, known as tsipouradika, are certainly a testament to this. 
George Karagounis was born and raised in Volos. From a young age he joined the family business, which had been established by Efstathios Karagounis in 1950, and he very soon took over production and the crucial post of creating recipes for the business’ products. 
With many years of valuable know-how under his belt, in 2022 he decided to start a new venture and invested in a state-of-the-art production plant. He named his company Αlipasti, which is a play on the Greek word alipasta [salted] and the Italian word antipasti [appetizer]. Through the years, he has managed to build long-lasting relationships with fishermen from Greece and abroad, and has fully mastered his trade. Under the brand name Alipasti, he has created a series of clean label products that are free of any preservatives, using only pure, natural ingredients, which is just what one needs for a tasty Greek meze. 
Small and large fish, sliced or whole, smoked or marinated, plain or spicy, Alipasti is the very definition of delicious Greek meze.

Nicht nur hinsichtlich unserer Produkte und Dienstleistungen entwickeln wir uns stets weiter, sondern auch in der Art, wie wir zusammenarbeiten: Teamübergreifend, verantwortungsbewusst und engagiert. Name: deOlijfolieshop
Description:
De Olijfolie Shop zoekt, proeft, keurt, selecteert, importeert en levert top kwaliteiten olijfolie aan groothandel, horeca, retail en consument.

Olijfolie is meer dan een voedingsmiddel. Het was tijdens het Romeinse Rijk al een bron van warmte en licht. Daarnaast is Extra Vierge olijfolie natuurlijk een geweldige smaakmaker. Ontdek onze (h)eerlijke Extra Vierge olijfolies. De Olijfolie Shop is trots leverancier van tientallen Michelinsterren en is SKAL gecertificeerd. Daarmee is onze biologische Extra Vierge olijfolie  gegarandeerd 100% biologisch.

Nico van Donkelaar (Olijfoliefluisteraar) : "Ik ben als kind in een ketel met olijfolie gevallen, anders kan ik mijn fascinatie voor dit vloeibare goud niet verklaren. Ik bezocht de boeren en nam zoveel mogelijk mee naar huis. Eerst voor eigen gebruik, later voor allerlei mensen in mijn omgeving. Eind 2008 ontstond het idee om een kleine webshop te beginnen, bij de start met slechts drie soorten Extra Vierge. Alle drie zitten ze nog altijd in mijn assortiment en behoren ze nog altijd tot de best lopende producten. In 2011 liet ik de horeca kennis maken met mijn verschillende olijfolies en het werd een instant succes"

Inmiddels leveren wij aan minimaal 36 Michelinsterren en in totaal aan ruim 150 restaurants. We zijn importeur voor de groothandel, wij zijn groothandel voor de Horeca & Retail, we zijn leverancier van relatiegeschenken en promotieartikelen voor het bedrijfsleven en nog altijd een webwinkel voor de particulier.

De Olijfolie Shop vertegenwoordigt geen merk. We leveren niet 1 soort olijfolie uit 1 land, uit 1 streek. We gaan simpelweg op zoek naar de lekkerste in het hele Mediterrane gebied. Het liefst moet de olijfolie en/of de maker een mooi verhaal hebben. Dan worden we helemaal happy.

Fundada em 2013, somos uma empresa referência na distribuição de produtos alimentícios. Name: Wheat Products Promotion Society (WPPS)
Description:
The Wheat Products Promotion Society is commonly referred to as WPPS. 

In the year 1987, leaders of the organized wheat based industries joined hands for the purpose of setting up an Apex Body which could stimulate the growth and development of all wheat based industries.  The WPPS represents 
-Roller Flour Millers’ Federation of India
-Society of Indian Bakers
-Federation of Biscuit Manufactures of India
-All India Bread Manufacturers Association
- A number of Regional Flour Mills and Bakery Association

As such various trade and technical organizations got together and formed the WPPS. In short, the WPPS has been engaged to 

-achieve technical up gradation of wheat based industries; 
-improve efficiency, productivity and quality of such foods; 
-obtain higher production levels, 
-develop human resources and infuse expertise both for domestic as well as export markets; 
-stimulate demand and promote consumption both traditional and non traditional wheat based foods; and 
-take effective steps for development of cereal products of better quality and higher nutritive values.
-Promote fortified wheat based products.based industries.
Location: Greater Noida, Gautam Budh Nagar, UP

Description:

We trade a diverse portfolio of fruits, nuts and functional ingredients.

  • Dried fruit & nuts (e.g. cranberries, goldenberries, wild blueberries, 
     almonds),
  • Fruit purees and concentrates (e.g. acerola cherries, goldenberries, 
    passion fruit, prunes and tomatoes), and
  • Frozen fruit and canned fruit
  • Premium functional ingredients such as hydrocolloids, botanical 
     extracts, and (non-)dairy concentrates.

With all our products, we ensure that they come from the best origins, a sustainable supplier relationship and a strong connection to the original product.

We are not traders, we are food specialists - because we trade in ingredients and knowledge, services, advice, personal relationships and complete solutions.
And we do all of that with passion and with our vision of "Developing the Food World - today and tomorrow”. We set ourselves ambitious goals that we can only achieve together. We are a team - strong, dynamic and colorful. The exchange between different generations about skills and backgrounds is exciting every day and gives rise to successful innovations.  

Let's grow together!

#ReliableSourcing #CustomizedService #SustainableImpact

Name: InstockMarket | B Corp
Description:
InstockMarket is dé duurzame groothandel. 
Voor de hoogste kwaliteit reststromen en de beste circulaire producten. 

In Nederland wordt jaarlijks zo'n 1,8 tot 2,5 miljoen ton eten in de gehele voedselketen verspild. Alle landbouwgrond, energie, water en C02-uitstoot voor de productie hiervan, gaan hiermee verloren. Dit heeft een enorme impact op onze aarde. 

Veel voedselverspilling is onnodig: een afwijkende maat, verkeerd gelabelde verpakkingen, gecancelde orders of simpelweg overschotten. InstockMarket vormt hiervoor een mooie oplossing. Wanneer de reguliere handel het niet meer wil of kan aannemen, kunnen wij met InstockMarket de producten overnemen en aanbieden aan chefs. De chefs waar wij mee werken zijn flexibel en creatief en maken culinaire creaties van producten die anders worden weggegooid. Bovendien wordt minimaal 20% of 30% van wat er wordt opgehaald gedoneerd aan goede doelen zoals de Voedselbank en Buurtbuik.

Name: Bahraman
Description:
Bahraman Saffron: Where Tradition Meets Tomorrow!


 Roots of Innovation (1970):

Bahraman Saffron Company was first started in 1970 under the name of Abbas Abbas Zadeh.
Our journey began with a vision for innovation in saffron production and packaging.
We didn't just plant saffron; we cultivated innovation, harmonizing tradition with cutting-edge practices.


 The Bahraman Renaissance:  (1994):

Evolving with time and technology, we rebranded to Bahraman Saffron, symbolizing our commitment to excellence.


 Milestones and Recognition:

1996: Health license from the Food Supervision Department.
1998: Standard mark permit for saffron products.
1999: National standard seal for saffron products.
2009: Inauguration of our saffron production and packaging factory at Toos Industrial Estate.
2017: Expansion of the factory in response to unwavering customer support.
2019: Launch of our online store for customer convenience.
2020: Opening of our third factory, enhancing our market presence and establishing a saffron exchange warehouse.


 Objectives and Strategy:

Utilizing cutting-edge technology for high-quality production.
Meeting national and international standards.
Diverse product weights and attractive design.
Upholding consumer rights as our top priority.


 Quality Control Excellence:

Our lab ensures rigorous testing, from raw materials to market release, guaranteeing quality with confidence.


 Global Impact - Export Department:

Weighing, packaging, and exporting saffron worldwide.
Ambitious goals to dominate international markets:
Persian Gulf: Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, Bahrain, UAE, Saudi Arabia.
Asia: Turkey, Vietnam, Hong Kong, Indonesia, China.
Europe: Germany, Spain, Belgium, Sweden.
Americas: Canada, United States.
Oceania: Australia.


Join us in our saffron journey! Explore our premium products and experience the essence of Bahraman Saffron. Connect with us for a saffron-rich partnership.

Name: Classic Drinks
Description:
It’s been nearly two decades since we began our journey as Classic Drinks – driven by a desire to pair great wine with top-class service for our customers.

And while so much has changed since then, we are still dedicated to supporting our customers in the hospitality sector whose passion for great service is recognised throughout the world.

We do this through our incredible curated range of drinks – one that’s made up of more than 700 wines and 1,200 spirits, beers and ciders, and is growing all the time. 

We do it by building close, personal relationships with our global network of producers, connecting our customers here in Ireland with access to the very best the world has to offer.

We do it through our sales team, who share their unrivalled knowledge through staff training, menu creation, event planning, online ordering and after-sales care – all so our customers can deliver the very best for their guests.

Ultimately, we do it by putting the customer experience first in everything we do.

In 2019, we joined forces with Sysco – leveraging their global network and world-class technologies to provide a next-generation level of customer service. All while retaining our personal touch, our boots-on-the-ground relationships, and the same team who made us who we are today.

At Classic Drinks, we’ve brewed up a storm, distilled what we do to a fine art, and aged like a fine wine along the way. 

That’s because it’s never been a job to us.

It’s quite simply been a joy to serve.
