Name: COBEB - Revenda AMBEV
Description:
A história da Cobeb é marcada por um crescimento contínuo e uma evolução significativa desde sua fundação nos anos 70 em Lagoa da Prata, Minas Gerais. Inaugurada como uma pequena fábrica de refrigerantes, a Mogi, sua trajetória foi transformada quando o fundador Paulo de Castro decidiu distribuir produtos da renomada marca de cerveja Skol.


Ao longo dos anos, a COBEB ampliou sua presença geográfica, solidificou sua posição no mercado e obteve a concessão exclusiva para a distribuição da cerveja Skol. Com o tempo, a marca Skol foi integrada à Brahma e, em 1998, a AMBEV – Companhia de Bebidas das Américas – foi fundada. A COBEB, como parceira de distribuição, acompanhou e participou de todas estas modificações, que consequentemente a transformou em uma revenda de produtos AMBEV.


Em 2007, a Ambev promoveu mudanças no sistema de divisão de territórios, o que levou a COBEB a se adaptar às novas diretrizes e reorganizar sua estrutura. Nesse contexto, a empresa estabeleceu suas sedes nas cidades de Lagoa da Prata/MG e Pará de Minas/MG. Com resultados consistentes e uma gestão habilidosa, a COBEB não apenas se destacou, mas também solidificou sua posição como líder no setor de distribuição de bebidas nessa região.

Name: KGF Organic Farms
Description:
At KGF Organic Farms, we are dedicated to growing the highest quality, certified organic fruits and vegetables. We believe in using sustainable farming practices that respect the earth and its natural resources. Our farm is located in the lush, fertile regions of India, where the rich soil and ideal climate provide the perfect environment for our fruits and vegetables to thrive.

All of our products are certified organic and adhere to strict organic farming practices. We use no synthetic pesticides, fertilizers or genetically modified seeds. Our team of experienced farmers are passionate about growing healthy, delicious and nutritious fruits and vegetables.

We take great pride in our products and take care to ensure that each fruit and vegetable is picked at the peak of ripeness and handled with care to ensure the freshest, highest quality product possible.

We believe that organic farming is not only better for the environment, but also for the health of our customers. We strive to provide our customers with the freshest, most nutritious fruits and vegetables that are free from harmful chemicals and pesticides.

We are committed to providing our customers with the best possible service, and we look forward to sharing our delicious and healthy products with you.

We craft first-of-their-kind, award-winning menu items from mushrooms and whole plants. It’s not alternative protein, it’s superfood nutrition.

Our MushroomMeat is made with real food ingredients, comes lightly seasoned and cooks up like traditional meat. 

It’s the perfect versatile ingredient; standing up to freezing, searing, roasting, stewing and slow cooking. Food service operators use these staples to create a variety of multicultural dishes. 

It’s high in fiber and low in fat + sodium, yet in taste tests chefs and consumers describe it as “the best [they’ve] ever tasted”. Our products are also vegan, keto friendly, gluten-free, soy-free and suit just about any diet.

Let us help you transform your menu in an exciting, accessible and mouthwatering direction!

Historiquement implantés en région Rhône-Alpes, Broc Service Frais et Blanchin ont uni leurs forces pour partager leurs expertises et leurs valeurs donnant naissance à France Frais Rhône-Alpes.  

En 2025, RHD Labo, puis Saprol, ont à leur tour fusionné avec notre filiale, renforçant ainsi notre maillage local et notre capacité à être au plus près de nos clients. Aujourd’hui, ce sont 460 collaborateurs qui œuvrent ensemble sous le nom de France Frais Rhône-Alpes !

Name: Villar Distribuciones
Description:
Desde nuestros inicios, ya en 1988, nos dedicamos a la distribución y representación de varias bodegas de ámbito nacional. Nuestra misión siempre ha sido la de construir un portafolio cuidado, seleccionando marcas de reconocido prestigio tanto de grandes grupos bodegueros como de pequeños vinicultores.

En el año 2005, dimos vida a AV Nadal, nuestro proyecto más personal. Nos centramos en regalos gourmet durante la temporada navideña, ofreciendo lotes de
empresa de calidad. Tras las satisfacciones que nos aporta AV Nadal decidimos abrir el abanico con clientes de otros sectores distintos a alimentación y restauración y con ello, a través de los años, hemos conseguido fidelizar empresas e ir creciendo.

Todos estos años hemos visto la evolución en la distribución, nos alegramos cuando las bodegas que distribuimos logran reconocimiento a nivel nacional e internacional, disfrutamos y aprendemos visitándolas, participando y compartiendo momentos inolvidables porque, detrás de cada etiqueta, hay una historia que merece ser contada.

Cambian los tiempos, los hábitos y todo se transforma, pero la importancia de saber a dónde perteneces nunca se pierde. Con 35 años de experiencia en el sector contamos con los mejores proveedores y con esa misma ilusión. Por eso cuidamos los gestos y los detalles, para que las experiencias cotidianas se conviertan en extraordinarias.

Name: El Polo Helados
Description:
El Polo Helados es una firma emblemática de la ciudad de Corrientes, surgida a mediados del siglo XX bajo la conducción de Corsini Portillo. Gracias a su espíritu pionero y a la fusión de técnicas artesanales con equipamiento moderno, ha logrado trascender como uno de los referentes de la heladería tradicional en la región. Su reciente reconocimiento oficial por parte de las autoridades municipales reafirma su importancia en la historia gastronómica y cultural de Corrientes.

En la actualidad, El Polo Helados es liderada por el Sergio Portillo, hijo del fundador, quien asume la propiedad y gerencia general. Con un enfoque moderno y visión de futuro, su gestión se orienta a fortalecer la presencia de la marca en todo el país, preservando el legado familiar y la calidad que caracteriza a la empresa. Este plan de expansión busca llevar los productos de El Polo Helados a nuevos mercados, manteniendo siempre el compromiso con la innovación y la excelencia en la elaboración de helados.

Name: bon COOK
Description:
bon COOK was born for the love of cooking and business ownership especially for women!

OUR MISSION
At bon COOK  we are passionate about creating opportunities where people gather together to rediscover the true meaning of getting social. To us, the kitchen is the heart of the home and we enjoy living and dining as Europeans do, by savoring fresh ingredients and gathering to connect with people around the table. bon COOK is as much a bakeware company as it is a spirit within us all. We invite and welcome everyone to live the bon LIFE!

MEET bon COOK

It’s that feeling we get when the aroma of tonight’s dinner catches us by surprise, the moment we know something great is about to happen. 

Today, the kitchen reflects a cooking movement, a movement we view as on trend rather than a direction. bon COOK is the essence of the kitchen, born to influence and inspire meaningful cooking experiences at home and within our communities. 
My inspiration stems from living and dining as Europeans do, having a good relationship with the kitchen and cooking, savoring fresh ingredients, the mise en place, and a desire to ignite the connection of people and conversation around the table. How we relate to our kitchen determines whether it’s a place of work or cooking pleasure. 
While we can’t promise you miracles, we can give you the go-ahead to embrace the kitchen where gatherings become a culture, and healthy meals are prepared while a bon life happens on purpose. 
Let us guide you to nurture a great sense of cooking pleasure. Whatever your expertise, we have a chair for you at our table. We encourage you to keep it simple, choose tools that make life easy, and experience how cooking with us will inspire a bon life. From our kitchen to yours, bon COOK!

Cindy Juncaj 
CEO and Founding Partner
boncook.com

Parallèlement, nous sommes les spécialistes des coffrets cadeaux bio gourmands et solidaires à destination des CSE, entreprises, collectivités…pour tous les évènements festifs de l'année.
Nous vous accompagnons de la création à la conception de colis sur mesure pour satisfaire tous vos collaborateurs.
L'assortiment peut se composer de terrines (animales, végétales), tartinables (poissons, viandes, légumes), foies gras, confitures, jus de fruits, vins...selon vos envies
Nous personnalisons ces coffrets en y insérant une fiche descriptive des produits, afin d'apporter une connaissance des artisans présents, et également votre message personnalisé à vos collaborateurs. 1% des ventes des colis est reversé chaque année à une association d’aide à l’enfance et/ou au handicap.

Retrouvez tous nos produits et nos différentes offres sur notre site ou contactez-nous, rien ne remplace le contact humain ! À bientôt.

Our Vision

Name: Sequeira & Sequeira
Description:
A Sequeira & Sequeira é uma sociedade anónima constituída em 1986 que tem como atividade principal o comércio por grosso de produtos alimentares, com sede em Vouzela no distrito de Viseu. 
A Sequeira & Sequeira tem o prazer de ser fornecedor de clientes de diversas áreas de negócio desde retalhistas, grossistas, restaurantes, hotéis, cafés e instituições. Com segurança e rapidez, conseguimos fornecer todos os nossos alimentos a clientes localizados em 3 continentes diferentes por 10 países.
Para isso, contamos com uma equipa experiente, especializada e orientada para os diferentes tipos de clientes.
São mais de 30 anos de experiência a trabalhar e a fornecer produtos alimentares ao mercado internacional.
Somos um fornecedor que procura acrescentar valor ao nosso cliente e entregar os nossos produtos alimentares de uma forma segura e rápida.
Ao longo destes anos conseguimos ser reconhecidos como uma empresa de referência nacional dentro do setor, graças à contínua adaptação às exigências do mercado de forma a entregar produtos da melhor qualidade para os nossos clientes.
Apostamos na formação contínua dos nossos colaboradores para que desempenhem a sua função dentro da empresa da forma mais profissional possível.

Name: Trialia Foods Australia
Description:
Since 1990 we have been marketing and distributing specialised food brands in Australia. We offer the highest quality products from over 70 brands sourced from Australia and around the world. In addition to our distribution of these brands, we are also the manufacturers and distributors of ESKAL – a leading range of quality gourmet and ethnic food products. Plus, an exciting range of free from foods, including gluten free, dairy free and nut free.

Trialia Foods Australia is a family owned business, with the human resources, nationwide distribution facilities and marketing experience, to make our products successful and enjoyed by many customers.

We run an active food safety program and are HACCP certified. Many of our products are certified by Halal, Kosher, Vegan and Organic authorities. And we are a part of the Australian Packaging Covenant – a sustainable packaging initiative.

Besides focusing on quality, and taste, we are very committed to being up to date with the latest advances in food technology. And we strive to offer products that promote the nutritional, wellbeing and dietary needs of our customers.

We are actively involved in the community. We sponsor AJAX – the local football club, Jewish International Film Festival (JIFF) and regularly sample our foods at community events and festivals.

We have a dedicated and experienced team of sales representatives and Customer Service representatives, who are ready to handle your query or comment, or to process your order.

If you are a supplier or customer, please browse through our site, and see what we can do for your business.

If you are a consumer looking for stockiest of our products please contact us at - info@trialifoods.com.au, we’d love to hear from you!

Name: MONTEACO
Description:
Monteaco Forest Friendly Tea

Our concept of "Forest Friendly Tea" is rather simple. All our tea is grown in harmony with nature in Northern Thailand and provides sustainable conditions to preserve forests, protect biodiversity and provide long term source of income for local tea farmers.

By giving farmers a higher value for their tea if they leave nature virtually untouched, natural diversity is created within our tea plantations, resulting in a functioning ecosystem that supplies oxygen, clean water, pollination of plants, pest control and most importantly, a fantastic cup of tea.

Name: Farmer Mike's Foodservice
Description:
Farmer Mikes has been a grower in South Florida for the past 38 years. 

7 years ago Mike Jr. the grandson of the original owner, decided to open a foodservice division to deliver freshly harvested product locally throughout Southwest Florida. 

At that time he focused and specialized on our Heirloom Tomato program, starting off with just 1 variety and today we grow and distribute 18 different color varieties, each a different color, texture, and flavor for all occasions and dishes. 

Over the past several years, we have increased and grown our line items, stocking:
-Fresh Harvested Produce from Our Fields
-Microgreens, edible flowers, and other Garnishes from Our Greenhouse
-basic commodity produce 
-a full line of specialty produce
-a very extensive dairy line
-specialty cheeses
-Aged Meats
-Jams and Jellies
-Locally Sourced Honey
-directly imported Italian items
and much MORE

Our sales team consists of executive chefs, restaurant owners, line cooks more, each passionate about the kitchen and the marrying of the farm and Florida's up and coming cuisine!

We are a chef minded and chef driven foodservice company, offering to custom packed and grown new items to fit the demanding needs of an everchanging industry!

Today we distribute all over South Florida and are just excited to share our passion with our community!

Name: Claus Reformwaren Service Team GmbH
Description:
Langjährige Erfahrung, ein länderübergreifendes Sortiment, nationale Logistik und der persönliche Einsatz unserer Mitarbeiter garantieren Ihnen beste Liefer-Qualität zum bestmöglichen Preis.
Partnerschaft braucht Vertrauen: Setzen Sie deshalb auf über 55 Jahre Erfahrung mit Reformwaren und auf unsere gesund gewachsenen Strukturen in unserem Familienunternehmen. Auf unser hohes persönliches Engagement – vom Firmengründer bis zum Fahrer – können Sie sich verlassen.

Über 450 Mitarbeiter, davon 22 Außendienstmitarbeiter, möchten Sie mit kompetentem Service unterstützen. Die papierlose Bestellmöglichkeit macht Ihre Warenorder einfach und bequem. Dank des eigenen Fuhrparks und zuverlässigen Speditionspartnern treffen Ihre Waren schnellstmöglich und termingenau ein.

Grenzen überschreiten und bodenständig bleiben – mit diesem Leitsatz ist unser Unternehmen gewachsen. Mit unseren Tochterfirmen in Frankreich und der Schweiz beliefern wir heute Reformhäuser und Facheinzelhändler mit einem länderübergreifenden Sortiment an Reform-, Bio- und Naturwaren sowie unseren eigenen Marken PURAL und eubiona. Unser einzigartig vielfältiges, internationales Sortiment umfasst ca. 22.000 Artikel. Und alles natürlich zum bestmöglichen Preis!

Name: Venfri
Description:
Venfri has been a food distribution centre for over 30 years, distributing fresh and ultra-fresh products to the retail and Horeca markets mainly in Friuli Venezia Giulia, eastern Veneto, Slovenia, Austria and Slovakia.

It all started in Varmo in the late 1980s, in the province of Udine, when Carlo Tonizzo began his entrepreneurial adventure supplying fresh food to restaurants and small retail shops in the region. His passion, knowledge of the sector and constant study of the latest market trends were handed down to his son Luca, the current president of Venfri.

A historic company that has been able to renew itself and protect, through a sales network made up of expert agents and constant training, the relationship with the Customer before the entrepreneur. A cosntinuous support that, thanks to a modernly structured and organised logistics, is able to guarantee certain delivery times and sustainable solutions for specific needs. A vast assortment that every day fills the shelves of more than 700 retail outlets and Horeca operators with the best proposals from local producers, as well as the most important national fresh food brands. 

Venfri has always been close to the territory in which it operates and safeguards local excellence, proposing, also through the Casa Venfri and Formaggio Sant'Agnese brands, high quality products at concretely advantageous conditions for the entire supply chain.

Name: eco united GmbH
Description:
Wir sind ein Berliner Handels- und Dienstleistungsunternehmen für Bio-Lebensmittel, das mit nachhaltigen Familienunternehmen und Social Entrepreneuren partnerschaftlich zusammenarbeitet. Seit 2003 vertreiben und vermarkten wir die Produkte unserer Partner-Unternehmen exklusiv in der DACH-Region, insbesondere an Naturkostläden und Reformhäuser, aber auch an den Lebensmitteleinzelhandel und Drogeriemärkte. Wir unterstützen unsere Produzenten bei der Produktentwicklung und engagieren uns für gesunde Rezepturen, nachhaltige Verpackungen und faire Wertschöpfungsketten. 

Durch Vertriebsarbeit auf mehreren Handelsebenen und zielgerichtetes Brand Management fördern wir den Absatz unserer Marken. Außerdem entwickeln wir spezielle Sortimente gemeinsam mit Kunden, die unsere Produkte unter Eigen- und Handelsmarken vertreiben.

Name: Nutrinoix
Description:
At NutriNoix, we bring you the finest selection of premium dry fruits, nuts, seeds, and healthy snacks, sourced from trusted farms around Pakistan. Started in Lyon, France, based in Lahore, Pakistan, we’ve built a direct and sustainable network with producers in the most preserved agricultural regions across northern and western Pakistan, as well near the Afghan and Iranian borders.

Our products — pine nuts, figs, apricots, raisins, pistachios, walnuts, almonds, peanuts and more — are hand-harvested, sun-dried, and carefully sorted to preserve their natural taste and nutritional value.

We’re committed to:
 Producers – ensuring fair and stable incomes
 European professionals – delivering consistent quality and reliable service
 Consumers – offering healthy, traceable, and ethical products that respect the environment

At NutriNoix, we’re not just exporters.
We’re a bridge between Pakistan’s finest farms and Europe’s most demanding markets — bringing nature’s best, straight from the source.

Name: Grupo atlanta. Restauración temática
Description:
atlanta, empresa de distribución integral en productos de alimentación para el suministro a la restauración. Son más de 10.000 puntos en toda la península ibérica, así como archipiélagos donde van dirigidos los productos que atlanta comercializa, también damos cobertura de servicio en muchos puntos de mercado Europeo, donde atlanta dirige sus productos y desarrollos.

Los desarrollos propios y específicos para el canal Horeca, están bajo nuestra marcas de identidad: atlanta y Cactus River

1.992 se implanta en España atlanta, una empresa que lanza al mercado nacional nuevos conceptos a las cocinas de los restaurantes, con nuevas materias primas desconocidas en el momento en España, nació con el objetivo de cubrir las demandas de las primeras cadenas de restauración que se implantaban en España en cocina internacional, así como las de Hoteleros emprendedores que apostaron por un horizonte más amplio.

Comercializamos más de 1.000 productos (en diferentes temperaturas: congelado, ambiente y refrigerado), algunos de dichos productos se desarrollan y comercializan en exclusividad para Grandes Cadenas de Restauración. Nuestras referencias dan cobertura desde el principio de una carta con "petit-four", snack, tapas, entrantes, pasando por salsas, especies, fritos, pescados, carnes, quesos, acompañamientos, cremas, sopas, pastas, platos terminados,… y como no acabar con un excelente postre para el final. Nuestros productos pueden ser de origen nacional ó internacional en más del 90%.

Name: Vandelis
Description:
Als B2B bedrijf zijn wij internationaal actief in de voedingsindustrie in Noord-Afrika, het Midden-Oosten en Centraal Azië. Wij leveren ingrediënten en halffabricaten voor de agro-voedingsindustrie in de volgende segmenten: fijne bakkerijproducten, chocolade-industrie, margarine-industrie, snacks, kaas en ijs.

Vanuit onze missie helpen wij voedingsbedrijven in Noord-Afrika, het Midden-Oosten en Centraal Azië veerkrachtiger en succesvoller te maken, zelfs in uitdagende tijden.

Ons doel is om de verschillende industrieën te helpen bij het verbeteren van hun bestaande productassortiment en bij het uitbreiden ervan met nieuwe producten.

Wij richten onze ondersteuning naar onze klanten op de volgende aspecten: 
-	geschikte en nauwkeurige keuze van ingrediënten 
-	kwaliteit en stabiliteit van de producten 
-	flexibiliteit en snelle afwerking

Van productspecificatie tot tijdige levering, wij nemen de volledige goederenstroom uit handen zodat onze klanten zonder zorgen kunnen werken. Hierbij staan samenwerking en klantgerichtheid centraal: wij zijn échte partners.

Name: Colombian Raw Coffee
Description:
We work Smart to make sure we bring the best sustainably sourced and transparency-certified Colombian Raw Coffee experience to you! 

While simultaneously empowering Colombian farmers with a fair share and recognition for their products.

Our vertically integrated production process allows us to guarantee FOB COBUN delivery directly from Buenaventura, Colombia, ensuring seamless B2B negotiations. 

Beyond just supply, we also provide our trade partners with an inside look into the Colombian raw coffee industry. This educational approach helps to foster a deeper understanding of what makes Colombian coffee some of the best soft coffee in the world.

Name: French Feast
Description:
French Feast is an importer and distributor of French foods based in Oakland, NJ. Founded in 1999, we offer more than 1,200 products from 189 brands. We ship throughout the US via FedEx Ground or pallet from our 25,000 square foot warehouse in Oakand, NJ.

Born of a deep love of France and a fascination with its foods and culinary traditions, French Feast has been importing and distributing French foods for 23 years. We work tirelessly to bring the very best France has to offer. Whether it's a rare ingredient for a Michelin-starred chef or the proverbial Proustian madeleine, we aim to satisfy the abiding need for beloved tastes, flavors, and specialties.

Attentive to the needs of gourmet retailers, French Feast's broad range includes

the basics: mustards, vinegars, cornichons, jams, honeys
 the  classics: snails, fish soups, choucroute, ratatouille, candied chestnuts
 hard-to-find items: buckwheat flour, crozets
regional specialties: calissons from Aix, bergamots from Nancy, red rice from Camargue, fleur de sel de Guerande, nougat from Montelimar, pralines from Lyon, Agen prunes
    must-haves for expatriates: Teisseire syrups, Carambars, BN cookies

Name: HCM | Horto Central Comércio e Serviços
Description:
Há mais de 25 anos, o HCM transforma a alimentação coletiva em uma experiência que vai além do prato. Atuamos em diversos segmentos, fornecendo serviços personalizados e refeições equilibradas, que aliam qualidade, sabor e responsabilidade.

 Sustentabilidade: Acreditamos que cuidar do meio ambiente é parte essencial do nosso trabalho. Priorizamos práticas conscientes em toda a cadeia produtiva.
 Conexões: Nosso compromisso vai além de servir refeições; criamos momentos que fortalecem laços e promovem bem-estar.
 Excelência: Com uma equipe dedicada, entregamos resultados que alimentam não apenas o corpo, mas também a produtividade e a saúde das pessoas.

Somos referência em oferecer soluções completas e inovadoras para empresas, escolas, indústrias e outros setores. Alimentar é nossa especialidade, transformar é nossa missão.

 Vamos juntos construir conexões que fazem a diferença?

Name: La Alondra Seafood
Description:
Somos un grupo líder en el sector de productos del mar con más de 30 años de experiencia en la captura, preparación y distribución de pescado y marisco, respetando siempre la calidad del producto y su origen.

Calidad, artesanía, exclusividad, innovación y sostenibilidad son nuestros valores principales y los que nos han permitido crecer y evolucionar desde un pequeño negocio familiar hasta convertirnos en un grupo especialista en pescado y marisco con presencia internacional. Un objetivo que hemos logrado fusionando tradición e innovación, sin perder nuestra esencia y filosofía: ofrecer un excelente producto del mar en cualquier parte del mundo.

Desde nuestras instalaciones de procesado en Valladolid y Celeiro, hemos construido un sistema completamente integrado que controla todos los ciclos del proceso de producción, desde la pesca hasta la distribución.

Cada día, nos esforzamos por garantizar que todos nuestros productos mantengan su máxima calidad desde el momento en que son capturados hasta que llegan a nuestros clientes siempre en su punto más óptimo.
Desde pulpo cocido artesanal que cocemos con mucho cariño y dedicación siguiendo una receta tradicional familiar que ha pasado de generación en generación desde 1956 hasta una cuidada selección de pescado y marisco fresco o nuestra innovadora gama de marisco criogenizado. En Alondra Seafood ofrecemos una cuidada selección del mejor producto del mar en cualquier parte del mundo.

Creemos en el poder transformador que nos brinda contar con los mejores partners estratégicos. Por eso, trabajamos con una amplia y sólida red de distribución nacional e internacional con la que compartimos valores y un objetivo común: llevar lo mejor del mar a cada uno de nuestros clientes garantizando estabilidad, calidad y rentabilidad.

-	LaMarca Seafood (www.lamarcaseafood.com)
-	Pescaderías La Alondra (www.laalondraseafood.es)

Hoy, somos la red de distribución multicategoría que conecta a los venezolanos con la excelencia, la calidad y el sabor del portafolio global de Grupo Nutresa. Actuamos como asesores de negocio estratégicos, dedicados a potenciar la rentabilidad de nuestros aliados comerciales y a alimentar el futuro de cada hogar en el país a través de marcas líderes en los negocios de Cárnicos, Galletas, Chocolates y Café.

Nuestra gestión se fundamenta en un sentido colectivo de progreso y en una mentalidad sin fronteras que nos permite integrar innovación y eficiencia en cada proceso. Para los empresarios y retailers, representamos el respaldo de una multinacional líder; para el talento, somos un entorno de alto desempeño comprometido con el crecimiento integral y el propósito superior.

En Hermo, seguimos evolucionando con la mirada puesta en el centenario y la convicción de seguir creciendo junto a usted.

Conecte con nosotros: 

¿Desea fortalecer su portafolio comercial o formar parte de nuestro equipo de alto desempeño?

Iniciemos una conversación con propósito. Contáctenos vía mensaje directo o siga nuestro perfil para mantenerse al tanto de nuestras innovaciones y oportunidades laborales.

Name: Elixiir Foods
Description:
Headquartered in NCR, Elixiir foods is building an omnichannel, technology-driven food platform focused on becoming the most trusted source for fresh, wholesome (organic, natural, pesticide- and antibiotic-free, minimally processed) and gourmet food.  The platform spans categories such as Fresh Produce, Dairy, Meat, Poultry, Seafood, and daily essentials, including Flours, Rice, Spices, Ancient Grains, Condiments, Snacks, Beverages, Ready-to-Eat, and Frozen Foods.
  
The format integrates farm-led sourcing, a high-trust private label engine, supported by a centralized wholesale and supply platform that enables efficient sourcing, distribution, and replenishment across multiple demand channels. Positioned as “affordable premium,” Elixiir Foods delivers five-star quality at compelling prices, designed specifically for dense urban micro-markets, through flexible, partner-enabled, and platform-led distribution models.
The launch comes at a structural turning point for Indian consumption. As India’s GDP per capita crosses the $2,500 inflection point, a critical mass of over 150 million urban consumers is shifting away from low-priced, basic staples towards higher-quality, healthier foods. Elixiir Foods is focused on offering clean, healthy, and high-quality products designed for such behaviour change in urban markets.

Arvind Mediratta, Founder and CEO of Elixiir Foods, said, “India is no longer looking only for basics. It wants healthier food choices along with authentic gourmet cuisines:not just from different regions of India, but from around the world. Elixiir Foods is being built as a tech-native destination, positioned as the most trusted platform for fresh, healthy, and gourmet food products. We also recognize that Indian customers across all SECs are highly value-conscious, making pricing the X-factor right at the wholesale and distribution level as part of our customer proposition. This represents a massive opportunity, with the total addressable market easily"

Name: C.A.I. arl - Cooperativa Agricoltori Ionici
Description:
The OP Agricoltori Ionici CAI was born in 1987 as a cooperative, thanks to the experience of its founders who have already carried out an intense activity in the citrus trade since 1954.

The company was recognized as a producer organization in 2003, the year it joined the UIAPOA. Today CAI adheres to Italia Ortofrutta National Union. In 2008 the company inaugurated the new automated plant for citrus fruit processing in the industrial area of Furci Siculo (ME).

The company has been operating in the organic sector since 2001, with a rigorous professionalism of the members and with particular attention to cultivation and processing techniques, which guarantee high quality products. The product is collected in the shareholders' funds and transported by a fleet of trucks to the Furci plant.

Name: MVC Group
Description:
MVC Group is a private agricultural investment fund specialized in the coffee and cocoa value chain in Venezuela, currently expanding into a multi-commodity portfolio that includes açaí, tonka beans, honey, cashew, sesame, and mung beans.

We operate end-to-end: from direct sourcing with small and medium producers to industrial processing and export to international markets. We design reliable supply chains with full traceability and global standards to ensure stable and predictable supply for major industries worldwide.

Our model delivers triple impact:

Economic: sustainable returns for investors and clients.

Social: development of local farming communities.

Reputational: positioning Venezuela as a competitive and trustworthy agricultural origin.

With operations backed by independent validation, escrow services, and letters of credit, we guarantee secure transactions from origin to destination.

Description:
Kingston Fresh is a leading provider of premium-quality fresh produce, specializing in delivering farm-to-table freshness and innovation. Description:
Auoro Trading Company je ekskluzivni zastupnik brendova Caffe D’Italia iz Toskane i Silvio Carta sa Sardinije za Srbiju i Crnu Goru. Specijalizovan za uvoz i distribuciju premium kafe i vrhunskih alkoholnih pića.

Naša misija je da kroz pažljivo odabranu ponudu visokokvalitetnih proizvoda pružimo jedinstvena iskustva ugostiteljima, kancelarijama i specijalizovanim maloprodajama i njihovim klijentima i krajnjim kupcima.

Naši proizvodi donose autentične ukuse i priče direktno od proverenih italijanskih proizvođača, pružajući vašim gostima, klijentima i kupcima priliku da uživaju u vrhunskim aromama i prepoznatljivom kvalitetu. Bilo da je reč o savršenoj šoljici espresa ili ekskluzivnom koktelu, trudimo se da vašim objektima omogućimo da se istaknu na tržištu.

Kao partneri, nudimo fleksibilne uslove saradnje, brzu isporuku i podršku koja olakšava svakodnevno poslovanje. Uvek smo otvoreni za nove prilike i posvećeni izgradnji dugoročnih i uspešnih partnerstava.

Ako želite da obogatite svoju ponudu proizvodima koji garantuju kvalitet i donose dodatnu vrednost vašem poslovanju, tu smo da zajedno kreiramo uspešne priče!

Name: Box Fermier Normand
Description:
Le Box Fermier Normand est un grossiste de produits fermiers, localisé au MIN de Rouen. Le magasin est géré par des producteurs paysans et propose aux professionnels du secteur alimentaire (épicerie, primeurs, restaurants…) la vente en gros de produits de qualité issus des agricultures biologiques et raisonnées de la région normande.

Le Box Fermier Normand est une association créée, en partie, grâce aux financements du fond européen agricole pour le développement rural, le plan de relance économique France Relance et de la Région Normandie.

Name: TAG -The Avo Group
Description: Welcome to The Avo Group (TAG)! We are a premium supplier of sustainably sourced agricultural commodities, specializing in high-quality avocados and committed to uplifting the communities we work with. At TAG, you can trust that every product you receive meets the highest standards of quality and traceability, ensuring excellence in every bite.

Name: Caffe Guglielmo
Description:
Caffè Guglielmo is born looking at the wonderful sea of Calabria, in a factory of over 10,000 square meters overlooking the picturesque Gulf of Squillace, in the exclusive Copanello, a few kilometers from the capital of the Calabria region, Catanzaro.
Guglielmo Caffè is today one of the biggest entrepreneurial companies in the South. Roasting offers an image halfway between avant-garde and tradition. It is not a common company but a large family and represents an extraordinary example of efficiency and production capacity thanks to the daily commitment of about 60 employees between the production department and the administrative area.

To stay close to our customers, we decided to look at both consumer markets and then sell our coffee both in the domestic sector and the Ho.Re.Ca.

In 80 years of history, we have developed a specific know-how of which we are particularly proud. It is made of ancient knowledge but always updated by the new methodologies: the right mix of tradition and innovation turns into a great attention for the end customer, to whom we always want to guarantee the highest quality standards and the maintenance of those costs. organoleptic requirements that make a cup of Guglielmo coffee unique and easily recognizable.

The production offers a choice of six lines of coffee, ground and beans: 5 Stars, Classic Espresso, Gold Espresso, Extra Bar, Coffee Shop and the Silver can, to which are added those related to Decaffeinated, Organic and Coffee Capsules and Pods.

Name: Aaji's
Description:
Aaji's was born out of our desire to do something with meaning and purpose. To us, food has always been an expression of love and in turn, there is tremendous meaning in sharing our family's food with our community more broadly.

Our first product, Aaji’s Tomato Lonsa, is a unique family recipe made by slow-cooking fresh tomatoes (~ a pound per container) with fresh ingredients and a distinct blend of spices to create an irresistible balance of savory, sweet, spicy, tart and umami flavors.  

Depth of flavor allows Aaji's Tomato Lonsa to be the defining ingredient for any dish or meal - whether as a spread on sandwiches or toasts, a topping on eggs or proteins, or a base ingredient for chilis, pastas, and more.  And yes, you can eat it by the spoon or dip into it too!

Name: Cerutti "il Caffè"
Description:
Dalla selezione delle più pregiate qualità di caffè verde, provenienti dai paesi d’origine e coltivate nelle “fazendas” secondo un’antica tradizione, Cerutti “il Caffè” compone le squisite ed aromatiche miscele di caffè, seguendo la migliore tradizione di tostatura italiana.
Lenta e graduale, la stessa permette di estrarre da ogni singola tipologia di caffè crudo le migliori parti aromatiche, al fine di poter offrire al cliente un prodotto di altissima qualità. Il suo gusto è dolce e vellutato e non presenta né acidità, né amarezza.

La Massimo Cerutti SA ha numerosi punti di degustazione in Svizzera ed all’estero e fornisce una vastissima clientela, tra cui ristoranti, bar ed alberghi in tutto il mondo.

E’ inoltre conosciuta a livello internazionale: Italia, Germania, Inghilterra, Slovacchia (Bratislava), Serbia (Belgrado), Lituania, Estonia, Lettonia, Russia, Giordania, Tunisia ed Emirati Arabi (Dubai).

Name: VUTAS
Description:
About "VUTAS"

Welcome to VUTAS, your ultimate destination for premium dry fruits and nutritious delights. At VUTAS, we are dedicated to providing the finest quality dried fruits that not only satisfy your taste buds but also contribute to your health and well-being.

Our Story

VUTAS was born out of a passion for wholesome living and a desire to offer natural, nutrient-rich snacks to health-conscious individuals. Our journey started with the simple idea of making high-quality dry fruits accessible to everyone. Today, we pride ourselves on sourcing only the best products from trusted suppliers around the world.

Our Mission

At VUTAS, our mission is to promote healthy eating habits by offering a diverse range of dried fruits that are delicious, nutritious, and convenient. We believe in the power of nature's bounty and are committed to delivering products that enhance your lifestyle and well-being.

Why Choose VUTAS?

Premium Quality: We ensure that every product meets our stringent quality standards.
Freshness Guaranteed: Our dry fruits are carefully selected and packaged to maintain their natural goodness.
Health Benefits: Packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants, our products support a healthy diet.
Sustainable Sourcing: We are committed to ethical and sustainable sourcing practices.
Join the VUTAS Family

Discover the rich flavors and health benefits of our premium dry fruits. Whether you're looking for a healthy snack, a nutritious addition to your meals, or a thoughtful gift, VUTAS has something for everyone. Join us on our journey to a healthier, more vibrant life.

Thank you for choosing VUTAS.

Contact-Us: vutascorp@gmail.com

Name: Seoul Oasis
Description: Seoul Oasis is a Dubai-based private company established in 2010. Name: FRESHdirect (Singapore)
Description:
FRESHdirect Pte Ltd, a subsidiary of Toho Co., Ltd., was established in 2000 and has since become a leading provider of fresh produce in Singapore. Offering over 400 varieties of fruits and vegetables, we supply premium products to hotels, restaurants, and retailers, with a strong emphasis on sustainability and quality.

Our state-of-the-art facilities and advanced logistics network ensure that our produce retains its freshness and original taste, allowing us to meet the diverse needs of our customers. As a one-stop food solutions partner, we go beyond produce distribution, offering a range of complementary services, including bakery solutions through our dedicated bakery division. This holistic approach allows us to deliver comprehensive, tailored solutions that support the evolving needs of our clientele.

Name: natnat
Description:
Founded in 2018, natnat stands for 'natural from nature'. Our focus is on natural food and beverage primary related to coconut and vegan-friendly products. Natnat's goal is to provide natural, low sugar, no additive food and beverage as well as lifestyle products at an affordable price. 

'Natural by Nature'

With a growing global trend seeing consumers around the world prioritising health and sustainability in a variety of choices including diet, sports, wellness and leisure, work, travel and even clothing, this is in turn driving huge growth in the healthy and vegan products like our signature pink coconut water , vegan friendly coconut milk series and plant-base food.

Our Story 

We strongly believe in the naturopathy lifestyle of living. By supplying series of naturopathy products using natural ingredients free from chemicals. We believe that it is important to rebuild the healthy state of our body from the roots. We are passionate about health and wellness and this translates into high quality products for health conscious consumers today.

Our Goal

With a simple mission to make the best tasting, healthy and all-natural products, we aim to be the perfect answer for health-conscious consumers.

Our Team
Turning their shared passion for health, wellness, sustainability and philanthropy into action, the team has spent the better part of the last decade learning everything there is to know about coconuts and plant based products and how they’re farmed. After years of research and visits to naturally tended farms all over the region, In 2017, the seeds of that hard work came to fruition and natnat was born. Established in Hong Kong, natnat’s products are sourced responsibly and sustainably across Asia.

Check us out at www.natnatcoco.com and our e-commerce site at www.natnatlife.com

Name: Just Bubble Tea

Perles fruitées, kit bubble tea ou encore accessoires : découvrez notre gamme dédiée aux GMS.

Name: Ancient Rock Salt Pvt Ltd

Our premium quality mineral salts (pink salts) are manufactured, supplied, traded, and exported worldwide in bulk, at wholesale prices. We also do private labeling. We are ISO 9001:2015, ISO 22000:2018, HACCP, FDA, Halal, and GMP FOOD certified, ensuring the best practices in food safety and quality management.

At Sal - Ancient Rock Salt, we are committed to establishing meaningful and high-quality connections with our valued customers. We can brand, label, and package as per clients' requirements, providing a personalized experience that meets their needs and exceeds their expectations. If you have any queries or need to place an order, please do not hesitate to let us know. We are more than happy to assist you in any way we can.

Visit our website to learn about the health benefits of Pink Himalayan Salt/mineral salt and discover why it is a popular choice among health-conscious consumers. Join us in our mission to provide the world with a natural and healthy alternative to common table salt.

Name: Chuanglee Limited
Description:
Chuanglee are a family run import and distribution company specialising in the Asian food market. Founded in 1989.

With over 30 years of experience in the asian import and distribution sector, servicing hundreds of businesses across the country, we are renowned for our wide range of Asian products (mainly Thai and Chinese) and product expertise.

Our customers and partners are at the core of what we do, where we work closely with our customers to meet their needs in an ever-changing climate. Our high-quality customer service and core values of loyalty and family have contributed to our long-standing client relations and the overall success of the company. Our customers include independent restaurants, restaurant chains, wholesalers, retailers, hotels and pubs across London and the UK.

As a importer of one of the largest Asian food product ranges in the UK and import and distribution facilities, Chuanglee is a leader in the industry.

Operating out of: Unit 7, Meridian Trading Estate, London SE7 7SJ
For inquiries, please contact: 020 8853 8328 or sales@chuanglee.co.uk

Name: Vitanami
Description:
Vitanami is a premium food supplements brand dedicated to delivering high-quality, natural, and nutrient-rich products. With a focus on wellness and superior nutrition, Vitanami offers a range of premium products, including foxnuts (makhana) and other wholesome superfoods that support a healthy lifestyle.

Our brand stands for purity, quality, and innovation, ensuring that every product meets the highest industry standards. Carefully sourced and processed to retain maximum nutrition, Vitanami products are designed for health-conscious consumers who seek clean-label, chemical-free, and highly nutritious options.

Name: Simus Bebidas
Description: Atendemos 40 cidades da região de Sorocaba e Campinas com uma grande variedade de bebidas para o seu estabelecimento. Whiskies, vodkas, cachaças, gins, conhaques, vermutes, tequilas, saquês, runs, vinhos e uma grande diversidade de bebidas para seu bar, restaurante, supermercado ou comércio.

Name: BSG srl
Description: BSG Srl è una realtà leader nella distribuzione di alimenti specifici per intolleranze e diete particolari. Con un'ampia offerta di prodotti biologici, senza glutine, proteici, aproteici, per l'infanzia, diabetici, vegani, vegetariani e kosher, ci dedichiamo a soddisfare le diverse esigenze nutrizionali dei nostri clienti. Serviamo il settore della ristorazione collettiva con un servizio di approvvigionamento centralizzato e personalizzato, garantendo sempre qualità e sicurezza alimentare. La nostra missione è innovare continuamente per offrire soluzioni alimentari di alto valore.

Name: Bawykov Zalm
Description: Elke zalm van Bawykov wordt met zorg en toewijding handmatig door ons ervaren vakmensen ingelegd in een exclusieve marinade, waarvan het recept nauwgezet wordt bewaard als het goed bewaarde geheim van de chef. Deze marinade draagt bij aan de unieke en kenmerkende smaak die de zalmen van Bawykov zo bijzonder maakt. Vervolgens krijgt elke Bawykov zalm de tijd om zich rustig te ontwikkelen in de droogkast, bij een lage temperatuur. Dit omdat bij Bawykov al meer dan 25 jaar de zalm echt koud roken. Bawykov zalm is volgens de reviews van onze klanten de enige ‘dry smoked salmon’.

Name: Rawabi Alwailiya Trading Co. - شركة روابي الوايلية التجارية
Description: شركة روابي الوايلية هي شركة سعودية تأسست عام 2006 لتكون إحدى الشركات التي تقوم بتوريد مواد الخام الخاصة بتصنيع الحلويات والمخبوزات وتوريد مواد المقاهي

Name: Maguro San
Description:
Da Maguro-San siamo motivati dalla sincera passione per il tonno, naturale e sostenibile della migliore qualità, e dalla missione di condividerlo con tutti i nostri clienti portando a tavola il meglio del tonno super-frozen (congelato a -60°C) al fine di elevare l’esperienza culinaria del consumatore.

La congelazione a -60°C garantisce, che il tonno Maguro San, una volta decongelato sia in grado di offrire la stessa freschezza di quando è stato appena pescato .

Cosi, come funziona sul mercato del tonno Giapponese da decenni, il tonno super-frozen ti garantisce la migliore qualità che tu possa acquistare dandoti la flessibilità di decongelare tonno naturale, sostenibile e di eccezionale freschezza e qualità, solo poche ore prima di servirlo. 

La soluzione distributiva Maguro San, grazie all’utilizzo dei nostri super-congelatori, ridefinisce il concetto di efficienza ed efficacia nell’industria del tonno super-frozen. Maguro San ti permette di ridurre drasticamente l’uso di plastica, le emissioni di CO2 e l’impronta ecologica e molti costi accessori della catena di distribuzione, massimizzando allo stesso tempo la freschezza del tuo prodotto e l’esperienza culinaria del tuo cliente.

I super-congelatori Maguro San permettono ai nostri distributori ed a tutti i loro clienti di mantenere presso le loro installazioni il nostro tonno a -60°C, e decongelarlo solo prima dell’uso preservando sempre a livelli ottimali la ricchezza del gusto e la consistenza del tuo tonno sashimi.

Name: Frutas González Albacete
Description:
Con más de 30 años de experiencia, nos dedicamos a ofrecer productos de la más alta calidad para comedores institucionales, hospitales, restaurantes y minoristas locales. Nuestro compromiso con la frescura y la calidad nos ha convertido en una referencia en el sector hortofrutícola. 

Calidad: Seleccionamos cuidadosamente cada producto para asegurar su frescura y sabor.

Servicio: Nos enfocamos en ofrecer un servicio personalizado y eficiente, adaptado a las necesidades de cada cliente.

Sostenibilidad: Implementamos prácticas sostenibles para minimizar el impacto ambiental, utilizando envases reciclables y reduciendo el desperdicio.

Innovación: Nos mantenemos actualizados con las últimas tendencias del mercado hortofrutícola para ofrecer siempre lo mejor.

Nuestro equipo de profesionales se dedica a seleccionar los mejores productos y asegurar que lleguen a ti en perfectas condiciones. 

Gracias a nuestras modernas instalaciones y flota de vehículos adaptados, garantizamos una distribución eficiente y puntual.

Name: Wother Srl
Description:
Wother nasce con l’idea di fornire ad ogni città una propria acqua personalizzata. Aggregare il commercio attorno ad un prodotto democratico e di largo consumo come l’acqua e farne un segno distintivo per ogni territorio, regalando un ricordo (e non solo) a tutti quelli che la consumano.

L’acqua in cartone è perfetta per questo scopo: altamente personalizzabile e a basso impatto ambientale, il contenitore si presta per essere usato come un veicolo di comunicazione che garantisce una grande esperienza d’uso.

Le confezioni della collezione Wother sono state personalizzate dalla matita esploratrice di Ale Giorgini. Con il suo tratto pop l’artista è andato alla scoperta di nuovi segni per le città, per i territori, per gli eventi. Ale Giorgini è uno dei più stimati illustratori italiani: ogni brick è un pezzo unico di arte, un ricordo da ricordare, un’esperienza vissuta, una fotografia della contemporaneità.

Ogni contenitore è un modo sostenibile di dissetarsi: è composto dal 75% di materia  vegetale. Contiene la qualità trasparente di Acqua Azzurra che proviene da una filiera di produzione del tutto italiana. Concept, design, stampa, tecnologia di imbottigliamento, acqua premium quality sono made in Italy fino all’ultima goccia.

Il nostro progetto si arricchisce di due aree di sviluppo che completano il modello di marketing:

a. #ARTAID: commercializziamo prodotti di merchandising a partire dalle illustrazioni di Ale Giorgini, il ricavato viene donato sotto forma di acqua ad associazioni del territorio.

b. #WONDER-WO: app di realtà aumentata per godere di contenuti esclusivi geolocalizzati, attraverso la scansione dei brick di Wother.

Name: Be-China SA
Description:
Be.China, the bridge facilitating operational and relational links between China and the heart of Europe.
 
Exporting companies in China can approach new markets without concern, because Be.China takes care of finding accredited, secure and reliable distribution networks and of organizing the marketing of products through partnerships with established local enterprises. 

Chinese distributors, for their part have the great advantage of discovering high quality products on their huge market. 

Be.China provides logistical, administrative, legal, Sales and Marketing solutions.
 
Be.China positions itself as an importer of Belgian – High Quality, regional and traditional luxury goods - Foods and Beverage, in China.
 
With the strength of its knowledge and experience of these markets behind it, in the domains of geography, culture and languages, Be.China is able to understand companies in their approaches and import directly their products on the Chinese market. At an operational level, it provides access to proven transport and logistics solutions, supplied by private operator.
 
Our Core Business : Food and Drinks : 

• Beers, Chocolate, Biscuits, Wine and Alcoholic beverages, Snacking and many more

Founders have over 40yrs experience in the Bev/Alc sector having worked for the usual Alc distributors & then private consulting. We are able to do US FDA Food Facility registration and TTB COLA submissions.  We also do consulting for brands looking to enter the Non Alc space.

Name: FLACON SUR MESURE
Description:
Née d’une passion commune autour de la convivialité, du partage et de la générosité, Flacon sur Mesure est avant tout une aventure humaine. 4 passionnés de vins, amateurs de belles quilles qui ont imaginé en 2021 un projet aussi simple que généreux : partager leurs découvertes et leurs pépites avec leurs amis.

De la « bonne franquette » au dîner « les petits plats dans les grands » on la retrouve sur toutes nos tables : la très belle bouteille qu’on aime partager ou celle au très bon rapport qualité prix qui fera son effet. Et c’est là que Flacon sur Mesure intervient !

Name: GrowBiz Foodstuff Trading LLC
Description:
Welcome to the heart of our fruit-filled adventure, where passion, freshness, and the love for nature converge. At GrowBiz, we believe that every bite of a delicious fruit carries with it a story - a journey from orchard to table, cultivated with care and harvested with dedication.

Our story begins with a deep-rooted love for nature and a commitment to bring the finest fruits to your doorstep. Nestled in the lush orchards, our journey is intertwined with the very essence of the earth. From the sun-kissed groves to the abundant fields, we cultivate a diverse array of fruits that not only tantalize your taste buds but also nourish your body.

Quality is at the core of our ethos. We meticulously select the best varieties, ensuring that each fruit is a testament to the richness of its origin. Our farmers, the unsung heroes of our story, employ traditional wisdom alongside modern agricultural practices to ensure the perfect balance between flavour, nutrition, and sustainability.

What sets us apart is our dedication to delivering the freshest produce directly from the source to your table. By eliminating unnecessary intermediaries, we bring you a farm-to-table experience that celebrates the natural goodness of fruits in every bite. From the moment the fruit is plucked, it embarks on a swift journey to reach you at the peak of its freshness.

We believe in empowering you to make mindful choices by providing fruits that not only taste exceptional but also contribute to your overall well-being.

Name: Virdžinija Doo

Trideset godina konstantnog rasta i razvoja svedoči da je taj zadatak uvek bio primaran i da nam kupci i dalje veruju.

Name: Springfield Pepsi-Cola Bottling Co.

Since 1935, Springfield Pepsi has been a local, family-owned beverage distributor focused on customer service and maintaining a great working environment for our team. With a wide variety of beverage options, from your favorite brands like Gatorade, Mountain Dew, Lipton, Tropicana and more, supported by our industry leading sales, distribution, and equipment service staff, we are your premiere beverage provider.

Description:

Name: Aceite Imperial
Description: El aceite de soya “Imperial” se encuentra en las mejores y más grandes tiendas de autoservicio del país, así como en pequeños negocios, sobre todo ubicados en nuestra región; contiene el 85% de grasas buenas, por lo que evita e incluso reduce la formación de depósitos de colesterol en el sistema circulatorio. Además de aportar a nuestro organismo una cantidad importante de omegas 3 y 6 además de vitamina E. Estas propiedades intrínsecas del aceite de soya también lo hacen el más recomendado, tanto por nutriólogos, cardiólogos, y muchísimas instituciones de salud a nivel nacional e internacional. En los Estados Unidos, más del 75% del aceite que se consume es de soya y esta preferencia internacional se debe a sus propiedades nutricionales, además de los beneficios que aporta a la salud de los consumidores a nivel doméstico, y a su alto rendimiento a escala industrial.

Name: ALTAGUA
Description:
Una marca que ofrece productos elaborados a base de coco, 100% naturales, simples y genuinos, con la misión de lograr que todos conecten con la esencia de lo natural.

Los cocos se seleccionan y manejan cuidadosamente a mano, garantizando una calidad inigualable. Sin aditivos, ni conservantes, solo el sabor de la refrescante pureza del coco. Con un equipo comprometido que se preocupa por mantener esa simplicidad y frescura durante todo el proceso hasta las manos del consumidor.

Name: Healthy Brands of Sweden AB

Description:
Iniciamos nossa história em abril de 2023, um sonho de nossos fundadores que se tornou realidade graças a experiência e relacionamento de Milton Amorim, sócio e um dos Diretores da empresa. Daí veio o nome Miroma (Amorim ao contrário).

Após mais de 25 anos de experiência no varejo, atuando em posições de alta direção em empresas como Vivo, Ponto Frio, Le Biscuit, Cencosud, Atakadão Atakarejo e Novo Atacarejo, Milton decidiu voltar de Recife para Salvador e abrir seu próprio negócio. Thassia, sua esposa e sócia foi uma grande incentivadora desse movimento.

O início veio de uma parceria com a Rupper’s, fruto de uma amizade feita com um dos sócios da empresa. Com o passar dos meses outras marcas foram agregadas ao negócio.

A missão da Miroma é levar produtos de qualidade com preços competitivos para os comerciantes baianos e a empresa tem como visão ser um dos maiores distribuidores de produtos alimentícios da Bahia até 2028. Valores como ética, honestidade, sentimento de dono, transparência e responsabilidade com as pessoas fazem parte do Miroma e vão permear sua expansão e crescimento.

Miroma, o seu distribuidor de produtos alimentícios!

Name: PT. DINUS CIPTA MANDIRI
Description:
PT. Dinus Cipta Mandiri (DCM) adalah sebuah perusahaan distribusi makanan ringan dan mainan terkemuka di Indonesia. Distributor Nusantara atau yang biasa disingkat menjadi  "Dinus" berkomitmen dalam menghadirkan beragam produk kepada masyarakat di seluruh nusantara.

Berdiri di Caringin, Bandung, Jawa Barat pada Januari 2000, DCM awalnya mengkhususkan diri dalam mendistribusikan produk selai dengan merk dagang Budy Jam. Dalam melihat peluang pasar yang menjanjikan, DCM menjalin kerja sama dengan importir PT. Catur Global Sukses untuk memperkenalkan produk baru berupa marshmallow dengan merk dagang Chompchomp. 

Bisnis DCM yang awalnya hanya memiliki satu merk dagang terus berkembang. Merk dagang Chompchomp yang dimulai dengan produk marshmallow berkembang dengan penambahan jenis produk seperti Choco Coin, Choco Bunny, Choco Lollipop, dan Choco Love.

Selain itu, DCM juga memperkenalkan beberapa brand lain seperti Happy Toy dan My Buddy, yang merupakan mainan yang dilengkapi dengan permen rasa buah. Kami juga memperkaya produk kami dengan merk marshmallow yang baru, Pikakuki, yang semakin melengkapi beragam produk di bawah naungan DCM.

Dalam perkembangannya, DCM yang awalnya hanya memiliki kantor di Bandung kemudian membuka kantor pemasaran di Pantai Indah Kapuk hingga tahun 2022. Pada tahun 2023, DCM telah berhasil memiliki gedung sendiri yang terletak di wilayah Joglo, Jakarta Barat. Perusahaan kami juga telah mendirikan kantor cabang di Semarang dan Surabaya, serta menjalankan distribusi hingga luar Pulau Jawa, mencakup Medan, Makassar, dan Pekanbaru.

Dengan komitmen kami untuk menjaga konsistensi bisnis dan memastikan kualitas produk yang selalu optimal, DCM akan terus berupaya untuk mendistribusikan produk secara nasional guna memenuhi kebutuhan konsumen kami.

What we do:

Our services include:

 • Sales analytics & performance dashboards, building interactive tools that break down performance by region, channel, and SKU so you can see what’s working, spot trends, and make data-driven decisions.

Name: Beef Guys
Description:
“BEEF GUYS” è un Azienda nata con lo scopo di fornire ai propri clienti un prodotto di altissima qualità.
La filosofia di “BEEF GUYS” si basa sulla trasparenza riguardo alle origini della carne e sull'etica aziendale, creando così una connessione fiduciaria con i clienti.
Il macinato scelto proviene da scottone di razza prussiana: una carne molto magra e giovane, caratterizzata da tessuti maturi ma ancora non sottoposti a sforzi, fattore che contribuisce alla sua tipica tenerezza. La sua qualità proviene dalla selezione accurata degli animali, che vengono allevati seguendo rigide norme di benessere animale e alimentazione naturale. Ogni boccone di questa carne è una vera esplosione di gusto, grazie alla sua naturale dolcezza e al sapore succoso che rimane intatto durante la cottura.

Che si tratti di un burger gourmet o uno smash burger, questa carne si distingue per la sua tenerezza e consistenza delicata. Per gli amanti delle carni di qualità, non c'è dubbio che questa sia una delle migliori scelte disponibili. Lasciati conquistare dal sapore autentico e dagli aromi intensi di questa carne pregiata, che saprà soddisfare anche i palati più esigenti.

Name: Food Planet Trading Co. LTD.
Description:
Founded in 2019, Food Planet Co. for Trading LTD – Saudi Arabia is poised to become a leading importer and distributor of consumer foodstuffs in the Kingdom. Despite its young age, many of products of Food Planet have their roots in the Kingdom for over 60 years, while the Company’s staff have a combined integrated market experience of over 100 years among its founders and staff members.

In the past couple of decades, the Saudi foodstuff market has been saturated and filled with products that were either high in quality, brand names, with unrealistically high prices OR lower in quality, unknown brands, with cheaper prices. This trend has been a source of concern for consumers who had to choose between spending a lot of money for quality brands or sacrificing their health with lower quality food products.

The founders of Food Planet Company realized this as consumers first and determined to rectify matters in the market. Food Planet was born on the idea that high-quality, natural, healthy foodstuff food items need to be made available in the market but at affordable prices that won’t break the bank for consumers.

To do so, Food Planet has been partnering with brands from all over the globe with the objective of offering value for the money for the Saudi consumers. Such strong partnerships and brand-building efforts are transforming the products in the portfolio of Food Planet into household names in the expanding Saudi market.

Headquartered in the coastal city of Jeddah, Food Planet Saudi Arabia currently operates its main well-equipped refrigerated Cold Stores from Jeddah and conducts distribution activities through the various distribution channels: Key Retail, Wholesales, HORECA, and Direct Retail. Such channels are being served through the logistical capabilities of the company that aim at establishing trust through timely and accurate delivery of orders while adhering to the strictest standards of hygiene and service.

Name: YFRESH
Description:
YFRESH is focused on sustainable and responsible food production, farm business resilience, and the role of family farms in building vibrant regional communities. 

We are producers and suppliers of premium fresh jujubes for Australian and international markets.

Name: Gumi Vitamins
Description:
Gumi Vitamins: Where unicorns high-five rainbows and vitamins do the cha-cha in your taste buds! Our chewy gummies are like a party in your mouth, with confetti made of essential nutrients. Whether you’re pirouetting through your day or breakdancing through life, Gumi Vitamins has your back (and your sweet tooth)! So go ahead, pop a gummy, and let your inner vitamin-disco superstar shine! 
Remember, life’s too short for bland vitamins. Let’s twist, twirl, and tango our way to wellness, one chew at a time!

Name: April Traders (ATL)
Description:
Welcome to April Traders Limited, a premier trading company located in the heart of London, UK. We specialize in the import and export of high-quality food products, offering exceptional wholesale and distribution services to meet the diverse needs of our clients.

At April Traders, we recognize the critical importance of quality food in every market. Through our extensive network of trusted suppliers and partners worldwide, we source a wide variety of premium food products, ranging from fresh produce to packaged goods, ensuring that we consistently deliver the best.

Our experienced team is dedicated to facilitating seamless transactions and ensuring timely deliveries, making us a dependable partner for businesses seeking to enhance their product offerings. We take pride in our customer-centric approach, tailoring our services to meet the specific requirements of our clients—whether they are local retailers, restaurants, or large-scale distributors.

Rooted in integrity and excellence, April Traders Limited is committed to leading the food import and export industry. We invite you to join us as we build strong relationships and create lasting value for our partners across the globe.

Name: DrinkEat
Description:
We are the European company Drinkeat an exporter of food products from Ukraine. We offer high quality food products to meet your requirements:
- socially significant products (wheat flour, sunflower oil, sugar)
- nuts, IQF and dried berries and fruits, seeds, 
- soy lecithin
- сereals and beans
- honey, herbs

Name: Extra Cash&Carry
Description:
Extra Cash & Carry is simply the best in the wholesale sector. We offer a broad range of catering products and services to the demands of professional customers, such as café shops and fish bars, kebab shops, restaurants and Chinese takeaways, sandwich bars, catering firms, as well as corner shops, supermarkets and Poundland shops and other wholesalers.

Extra Cash & Carry has a simple and efficient business concept: Cash and Carry wholesale, which is defined through its customer base and unique business model. All professional customers are allowed to purchase at Extra Cash & Carry. Our customers will be registered and provided with a customer card soon.

We are a one-stop shop for our customers supplying all their food items and non-food items. We have a wide range of best-selling branded products from manufacturers with a reputation for great quality. We stock more than 10,000 catering and retail products consisting of frozen and chilled foods, fresh groceries, meat, beers, wines and spirits, soft drinks, confectionery, crisps and snacks, household and non-foods such as packaging, cleaning products, and work ware.

Our customers can interact with Extra Cash & Carry in many ways. It can be made by placing and paying for their orders over the phone and collecting from our local branch. We also offer next day delivery service for our valuable customers. We are currently in the process of reviewing and improving our IT structure to facilitate faster and more efficient trading. This will be a big advantage for the customers.

Browse our website for more information about our products with unbeatable prices. We firmly believe we provide the highest standard of service through incomparable customer experience and knowledge of the local business community’s needs. If you would like to take advantage of the best services that we have to offer you are more than welcome to Extra Cash & Carry 7/24 a week.

Name: Degusta Food Service
Description:
Degusta is a food wholesale company based in Bristol. We wanted to bring the exquisite, fresh and seasonal Mediterranean produce that we grew up with, and make it available to chefs in and around Bristol and Cardiff. With a focus on optimal quality produce, we initially specialized in fruit and vegetable imports from Spain.

Now, three years on, we have grown rapidly and our flexible and passionate team has expanded thanks to the expérience we have gained. Our customer's excitement, and passion for the food we supply is what maintains our motivation. Working with them to explore and source new ingredients is how we have developed. We now supply a wide range of food from local producers as well as imports.

We care about where our produce comes from and have direct contact with every grower who supplies us. This working relationship enables us to ensure the consistent quality of the food from the seed to the table.

Name: Distra Alimentos
Description: A Distra Alimentos é uma distribuidora especializada em alimentos saudáveis e de alta qualidade, com um vasto portfólio de produtos. Acreditamos que cada cliente é único e, por isso, buscamos ser uma distribuidora que se adapta a essas diferenças, oferecendo um atendimento personalizado e pensado para encantar em cada etapa. Nosso objetivo é ser reconhecidos como a melhor opção de distribuição no sul do Brasil. Para nós, o ciclo de venda só se completa quando o cliente recebe seu pedido e fica totalmente satisfeito, do início ao fim. Trabalhamos com agilidade, dedicação e foco, valorizando a parceria e a confiança de cada cliente.
Location: Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul

Name: VINISTER
Description:
Nous sommes distributeurs et agents de vignerons sur Lyon et proche banlieue.

La gamme Vinister regroupe tous nos coups de cœur, avec un large choix d'appellations françaises surtout mais aussi étrangères !
Nous aimons le vin, mais aussi les gens et la nature : 80% de notre gamme de vins, bières et spiritueux est labellisée bio ou biodynamie, ou en cours de labellisation, en mettant un accent sur les vignobles locaux tels que le Beaujolais, la Savoie, le Bugey, la vallée du Rhône...

Composée d'une dizaine de collaborateurs, notre équipe se donne pour objectif de créer des moments d'échanges avec nos clients et les vignerons de notre gamme (et de créer la rencontre !)

Pour les entreprises situées à Lyon et ses alentours, nous sommes à l'écoute de vos besoins en vins pour vos évènements, prestations traiteur, cadeaux d'entreprise...

#grossiste #vins #vinsbio #cavistes #restaurants #cadeauxdentreprise #vignerons #lyon #rhône

Name: Sesqium
Description:
Sesqium est une société qui développe et commercialise des extraits végétaux novateurs pour répondre aux besoins d’innovation des industries nutraceutique, agroalimentaire et cosmétique. Elle se spécialise dans la recherche de matières premières originales, la
valorisation de leur composition et mécanisme d’action afin de proposer les ingrédients adaptés.

Name: SHUBHAM UK LTD
Description: SHUBHAM UK LTD is a company based out of 425 UXBRIDGE ROAD, SOUTHALL, United Kingdom.

Name: Everlite Nutraceuticals
Description:
Everlite Nutraceuticals is a global ingredients supplier with extensive knowledge and experience in the natural products industry. We have developed a vast network of partners globally including China, India, South America, and Europe. We offer a wide array of the highest quality ingredients including Botanicals, Herbal Extracts, Amino Acids, Fruit & Vegetable extracts, and Flavors.

Our company focuses on providing nature's best to increase the quality of life in relation to health. Constant research, quality control, product and stock forecasts keep our customers confident and their businesses growing. Our products have 100% traceability for quality control and peace of mind.

Our mission is to supply indisputable products and value-added service to our clients. Our commitment to quality is of the utmost importance. All of our products are in compliance with regulatory mandates such as GMP, FDA, and certifications such as ISO, Halal, Kosher, etc.

Name: GUICHET BOISSONS
Description:
Implantée dans le 44, nous sommes une entreprise familiale, spécialisée dans la fourniture et la livraison de boissons pour les professionnels. À taille humaine, nous mettons un point d'honneur à offrir un service personnalisé et de qualité à nos clients. Notre équipe, composée d’une quarantaine de collaborateurs, s'engage chaque jour pour répondre aux besoins de nos clients avec professionnalisme et réactivité.
 Certifié Bio
 Labelisé selon le référenciel RSE "Grossiste en boissons engagé" 
 Adhérent C10

Name: Raimondo Giovanni e Figli s.r.l.
Description:
L'Azienda Raimondo Giovanni & Figli, fondata nel 1927 dal Sig. Vincenzo Raimondo, è diretta dalla quarta generazione dalla Famiglia Raimondo. 
Raimondo Giovanni & Figli s.r.l. importa e distribuisce a GDO, Grossisti ed Ho.re.ca. frutta ed orticole origine Italia, Spagna, Francia, Grecia, Belgio, Olanda, Israele, Sud Africa, Brasile, Argentina e Chile.
Una speciale attenzione ai prodotti della piana di Albenga, orticole ed aromatiche. Gli ordini, preparati nel nostro stabilimento di Villanova d'Albenga, sono resi fco destino Clienti.

Name: Basmat Sama Food Trading
Description:
Basmat Sama Food Trading has proudly served a wide range of clients including cafes, restaurants, hotels, and catering companies.

Recognized for excellence, we have received prestigious awards in the F&B industry for our commitment to quality and service.

Name: Shree Sai Trading Ltd
Description:
Over the past decade, Shree Sai Trading has been at the forefront of exporting, distributing, and promoting world-leading FMCG brands from companies such as Nestlé, Mondelēz, Mars Wrigley, Unilever, Heinz, and Kellogg’s, reaching partners and customers in over 30 countries worldwide.

In the UK, we proudly supply our portfolio to importers, wholesalers, and retailers, ensuring strong brand presence and reliable service. Building on this success, our team is now focused on developing house and own-brand products under our subsidiary company, BRITANNICA Ltd.

Our commitment to excellence has been recognised with the prestigious Lloyds Bank National Business Award (2019) – the UK’s largest cross-sector business awards ceremony.

With a strong global network of partners and distributors, Shree Sai Trading has consistently earned trust and loyalty through mutual growth, value-driven partnerships, and dependable service.

Our diverse product portfolio spans confectionery, convenience foods, nutritional beverages, personal care, and household essentials – making us a trusted one-stop partner for FMCG solutions.

 Shree Sai Trading – Services Delivered On Time. Always.

Name: Jonic Group of Companies
Description:
Excellence in Importation,Sales,  Distribution & production of Organic foods 

Jonic Group of Companies is a dynamic and diversified conglomerate dedicated to excellence across multiple industries. With our headquarters in Onitsha at 84 Venn Road South, and various distribution outlets across the city, we have expanded our presence with branch offices in Lagos, Abuja, Calabar, Port Harcourt, Aba, and Uyo, Asaba.

Our Core Business Areas 
Importation, sales & Distribution – We specialize in importing and distributing beverages and foodstuffs, ensuring quality products reach consumers efficiently.  

Agro Essential TFZE – Our subsidiary, with a production plant in Asaba, focuses on cultivating, processing, and trading organic agricultural products while promoting sustainable farming practices.  

 Retail & Wholesale– We are committed to establishing and operating retail and wholesale outlets for organic food and beverages, catering to both local and international markets.  

Manufacturing & Packaging– We manufacture, package, and distribute organic products, ensuring high standards for both domestic and global consumers.  

Sustainability & Innovation – Through modern farming techniques, eco-friendly practices, and import/export of agricultural goods, farm inputs, and equipment, we contribute to a healthier, more sustainable food industry. 
 
La Jonic Mall – A Retail & Recreational Hub in Asaba 
La Jonic Mall, located at the heart of Asaba, Delta State, was established to revolutionize the shopping experience by bringing multiple stores under one roof. This phenomenal retail and recreational center enhances convenience, supports local businesses, generates employment, and fosters economic growth. It offers visitors a seamless blend of shopping, dining, and entertainment in a vibrant, modern space.  
Why Jonic Group?  
 Strong distribution network across Nigeria  
 Commitment to quality, sustainability, and innovation  
 A trusted partner in food, beverage

Name: Alimentos Naturales MDP S.R.L.
Description:
Somos una empresa dedicada a la distribución de alimentos saludables, libres de gluten, veganos, sin azúcar y productos importados. Proveemos a la industria alimenticia con materias primas certificadas.

     El compromiso con el cliente y el respeto por ellos, nos convirtió en líderes en Mar del Plata, Costa Atlantica y sus zonas de influencia.

     Teniendo como valores principales el asesoramiento personalizado y el profesionalismo, nos permite ser representantes exclusivos en estas zonas de marcas como Padoan, Víavita , Cerró Azul, Natual Gums, Femag entre otras.
