     Cientos de clientes nos avalan y nos confían la provisión diaria de mercadería, siendo su plena satisfacción nuestro principal capital.
Location: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires Province

Name: Fratelli Freschi Seafood Company
Description:
Fratelli Freschi Seafood Company is a small specialty retail fish market providing kitchens in Northern NJ with high quality, sustainable fresh & frozen seafood products. Our mission is to get the most sustainably harvested, 100% traceable seafood onto tables here in North Jersey because we truly care about our customers AND our Oceans. In order for there to be a future where fishermen & coastal communities can continue to exist global exploitation of the Ocean's resources and destruction of marine habitats must end, and changing that starts with how we purchase & consume seafood in our lives.

At Fratelli Freschi Seafood Company, our team is highly knowledgeable, friendly, and professional. All products are sustainably harvested & ethically sourced.

Name: Sam Grossist AB
Description:
Varmt välkommen till Sam Grossist AB, ett familjeägt grossist-och distributionsföretag. 


Vi är stolta över att vara ett familjeägt grossist-och distributionsföretag som har försett våra kunder med högkvalitativa produkter sedan våra första steg på marknaden 1999. Hos oss finner du ett brett utbud av konfektyr, drycker, snacks och tobaksprodukter, skapat för att tillfredsställa alla smaker och preferenser.

Vår passion för kvalitet och service genomsyrar allt vi gör. Vi strävar efter att skapa långsiktiga relationer med både kunder och leverantörer, och det är vårt engagemang för att överträffa förväntningar som har gjort oss till en pålitlig partner inom branschen.

Det som skiljer oss från mängden är vår dedikation till att handplocka de bästa produkterna och erbjuda dem till konkurrenskraftiga priser. Varje produkt i vårt sortiment är noggrant utvald för att säkerställa överlägsen kvalitet och försäljning till våra kunder. 

Vårt företags framgång bygger på våra starka familjevärderingar, och vi strävar efter att skapa en företagskultur som präglas av öppenhet, ärlighet och ömsesidig respekt. Varje medlem i vårt team spelar en viktig roll i att leverera enastående service och uppfylla behoven hos våra kunder.

Name: Ecolery
Description: Ecolery revolutionizes dining with edible cutlery—an eco-friendly alternative to plastic. Customizable in shape, color, and flavor, these 100% natural, renewable, and compostable utensils are a tasty solution to plastic pollution. With a focus on health, wildlife preservation, and environmental impact, Ecolery aligns with global sustainability goals and contributes to creating a zero-plastic world. Join the movement for a greener, cleaner future with Ecolery.

Name: FOODWEALTH LTD
Description:
Foodwealth Ltd was established in 2012 with a mission to share the wealth of Mediterranean diet with consumers from around the world by connecting them through the diverse flavors. Along the way we have developed a multicultural blending of products selectively chosen from various corners of the globe. 
We produce, import, package and distribute authentic, premium food products and innovative packaging solutions on an international level. 

Η Foodwealth Ltd ιδρύθηκε το 2012 με σκοπό να μοιραστεί τον πλούτο της Μεσογειακής διατροφής με καταναλωτές απ’ όλο τον κόσμο συνδέοντας τους μέσα από την ποικιλία των γεύσεων. Στην πορεία έχουμε αναπτύξει μια πολυπολιτισμική προσέγγιση με προσεκτικά επιλεγμένα προϊόντα από διάφορες χώρες.   
Παράγουμε, συσκευάζουμε, εισάγουμε και διακινούμε αυθεντικά, ιδιαίτερα προϊόντα  και καινοτόμες λύσεις συσκευασίας σε διεθνές επίπεδο.

Name: HOLA NUTS
Description:
Welcome to HOLA NUTS - Redefining Healthy Indulgence

At HOLA NUTS, we're passionate about delivering premium quality dry fruits that redefine the art of healthy indulgence. As a leading brand in the dry fruits industry, we specialize in curating a delectable range of nuts, seeds, and dried fruits, ensuring every bite is packed with both flavor and nutritional goodness.

Our Commitment: Quality, Freshness, and Taste

We take immense pride in sourcing the finest nuts and dried fruits from trusted suppliers worldwide. Our commitment to quality extends from meticulous selection processes to stringent quality control measures, ensuring that every product meets the highest standards. With an unwavering focus on freshness, each batch is carefully stored and packaged to preserve its natural taste and nutritional value.

Innovation and Variety

At HOLA NUTS, we thrive on innovation and continuously strive to introduce new, exciting flavors and combinations to tantalize your taste buds. From classic favorites to unique blends, we offer a diverse range of products designed to cater to various preferences and dietary needs.

Our Mission: Nutritious Delights for Every Lifestyle

We believe that a healthy lifestyle should never compromise on taste. Our mission is to provide nutritious delights that seamlessly fit into any lifestyle, whether you're a health-conscious snacker, a culinary enthusiast, or someone looking for convenient, wholesome options.

Join Us in Our Journey

Follow us to stay updated on our latest offerings, nutritional insights, and exciting updates. Together, let's celebrate the joy of savoring delicious, nutrient-packed treats that HOLA NUTS proudly delivers straight to your doorstep.

#HealthyIndulgence #PremiumQuality #NutritionRedefined

Name: Salinerito
Description:
Desde 1970, Salinas apostó al Cooperativismo como la forma efectiva y democrática de enfrentar la pobreza y marginación, con el apoyo de voluntarios extranjeros y la Misión Salesiana y especialmente al impulso que dio la iglesia en la persona de Mons. Cándido Rada.

Poco a poco se pasó de un pueblo sin cultura organizativa y productor de sal, a un pueblo organizado y agroindustrial, convirtiéndose en referente para la provincia y el país. El resultado ha sido el mantenimiento de su población, evitando la migración a los núcleos urbanos, así como la mejora sustancial de las condiciones de vida de sus habitantes.

Hoy en día, Salinas y sus comunidades son la demostración de que en Ecuador es posible el desarrollo rural integral con equidad y sostenibilidad. Es por eso que el proceso Salinero es considerado una experiencia modelo dentro de la Economía Social y Solidaria que actualmente se trata de impulsar desde varios sectores.

En esta cuenta les invitamos a descubrir los encantos del Salinerito, su tierra y su gente.

Name: ATACAREJO AG
Description:
O Atacarejo AG é uma empresa totalmente on-line, que atua no seguimento de distribuição de bens de consumo não duráveis, com foco em atender às necessidades daqueles que buscam condições comerciais competitivas para alavancar as vendas de seus respectivos negócios.

Localizado em um ponto estratégico de São Paulo, SP, o Atacarejo AG busca atender as necessidades de todos os clientes, oferecendo grande variedade de produtos com os melhores preços do mercado. 

Na plataforma on-line é possível comprar em qualquer quantidade, pequenos ou grandes volumes, e escolher a melhor forma de pagamento. Aceitamos cartões de crédito, débito e vale-alimentação das principais bandeiras. Tudo isso sem burocracia!

Name: Culivier
Description:
Culivier is de partner in premium voedingsproducten voor elke chef. Van Brasserie tot eventcatering, wij bezorgen de juiste producten bij elke klant aan de beste prijzen.

Culivier levert kwalitatieve voeding in elk segment aan Horeca in Vlaanderen en Zeeland. Hiervoor hebben wij over de laatste decennia sterke samenwerkingen opgebouwd met lokale en internationale partners om onze klanten van de beste service en kwaliteit te kunnen voorzien.
 
Naast een corebusiness van vlees, wild & gevogelte hebben wij onze service uitgebreid naar vis, schaal- en schelpdieren, groeten, fruit, charcuterie, droogvoeding en zuivel om elke keuken volledig te kunnen voorzien in één enkele levering.

Name: QUESOS BOLAÑOS
Description:
Quesos Bolaños es una empresa cuyos orígenes se sitúan en la zona norte de Gran Canaria, en los altos de Guía y Gáldar, desde hace más de 70 años, dedicada a la elaboración y maduración del queso artesanal o tradicional canario.

Somos un grupo competente y eficaz, con muchos años de experiencia que nos aportan amplios conocimientos técnicos, y caracterizado por un trato cordial, amable y muy personalizado. Le ofrecemos una gran variedad de productos a unos precios muy competitivos y de máxima calidad.

La meta principal de Quesos Canarios Artesanales Bolaños es, sin lugar a dudas, poder satisfacer a todas las necesidades de nuestros clientes. Nuestros puntos fuertes son: la calidad del producto, una dilatada experiencia y un extraordinario concepto de atención al cliente.

Name: Meatloaf Foods Nigeria Limited
Description:
At Meatloaf Foods, we are transforming the meat industry in Nigeria by providing households with hygienic, high-quality meat and meat products through our online platform. 

Founded in 2023, we are an agritech startup on a mission to tackle the challenges of meat contamination caused by the deplorable conditions of abattoirs across the country. 

Our innovative approach ensures animals are slaughtered in clean environments that follow standard procedures, making safe and wholesome meat accessible to all.

Why We Exist

Food contamination is a critical health issue. According to the World Health Organization, 420,000 people die globally each year from consuming contaminated food. In Nigeria, the National Agency for Food and Drug Administration and Control (NAFDAC) estimates that 200,000 deaths annually are linked to unsafe food, with raw meat being a significant contributor. Contaminated meat has been associated with illnesses such as food poisoning, diarrhea, infertility, reactive arthritis, and even cancer.

At Meatloaf Foods, we are dedicated to solving this problem by ensuring safe animal handling and hygienic meat processing. Our goal is simple: to help you eat and stay healthy by providing contamination-free meat products.

Our Solution

We are leading the way in revolutionizing meat processing in Nigeria. By employing advanced technology, environmentally friendly procedures, and rigorous quality standards, we ensure:

 Safe and contamination-free meat.

 Elevated hygiene and efficiency in the livestock value chain.
 Exceptional customer satisfaction.

At Meatloaf Foods, we’re not just providing meat; we’re reshaping the future of meat consumption in Nigeria.

Name: Ayllu Foods
Description:
Our mission is to connect native communities and food producers from Peru and Latin America with the MENA (Middle East and North Africa) market.
We are a high-quality food and superfoods importer and distributor in the UAE, Middle East, and North Africa region. We focus on native and innovative food, with a commitment to offer quality and trust to maintain a long-term relationship with our customers, suppliers & business partners. 

OUR VALUES

Trust: The trust and openness between our employees, suppliers, customers, and stakeholders are basic principles for our business.

Excellence: We aim to offer superior quality products and services.

Teamwork: Working aligned with our suppliers and customers to achieve the best results.

Creativity: We foster the creativity in our team to have innovative solutions, increase productivity, and have the adaptability to approach challenges with a solving problem mindset.

Customer focus: We do our best effort for our customers. 

OUR VISION

To be the leader distributor of native food from Peru and Latin America in the MENA region.

Name: A&E Hospitality Solutions
Description:
At A&E Hospitality Solutions, we're more than just a distributor – we're your trusted partner in sourcing high-quality ingredients and products for your food and beverage needs. With over 40 years of experience in the hospitality industry, we understand the importance of reliability, consistency, and staying ahead of the curve.

Founded by Earl, a seasoned sales manager with a passion for great service, and Angela, a culinary expert with a knack for understanding customer needs, A&E Hospitality Solutions was born out of a desire to fill the gaps left by larger companies. We pride ourselves on building lasting relationships with our customers and vendors, ensuring that we always deliver on our promises.

Name: Able Dairies de México
Description: We are a leading company in the production of condensed milk and evaporated milk, a strategic partner of Able Dairies Sdn Bhd, a proudly Malaysian corporation with a global reach.

Name: Prime Wholesale
Description:
Prime Wholesale offer Soft drinks, Confectionery, Snacks & more to the trade at unbeatable prices. We import direct from manufacturers from around the world to give you the best possible prices.

Our most popular brands include, but are not limited to, Coca Cola, Pepsi, Nestle, Hersheys, Kelloggs, Heinz, Mars, Unilever, Red Bull and many more.

We were founded by 3 entrepreneurs who are successful in their fields of sourcing, import, export, logistics and supply chain management.

We understand our customers needs and in these harsh uncertain economies its very important our customers get the best possible price and a constant supply of goods. 

Our network around the globe ensures we have what you need at the right price.

Name: Bezour
Description:
Agricultural Exports (Fresh & Frozen Fruits & Vegetables)
At Bezour, we believe that nature’s bounty should be shared with the world̶ fresh, flavorful, and responsibly grown. Based in the heart of Egypt, we specialize in exporting premium-quality Fresh and Frozen fruits and vegetables to global markets, with a commitment to freshness, safety, and sustainability.

Name: Da Vinci Tartufi
Description: Siamo un'azienda italiana con base in Toscana, specializzati nella raccolta e nella vendità di Tartufo fresco e prodotti al Tartufo.

Name: Brocker Möhren GmbH & Co. KG
Description:
Seit mehr als 60 Jahren beschäftigt sich die Firma Brocker mit dem Anbau, der Lagerung und der Vermarktung von Möhren. Die Brocker Gruppe bündelt die Kräfte von Landwirten die auf Möhrenanbau spezialisiert sind und zielt auf eine zentrale Vermarktung ab. Dazu betreiben sie ein straffes Produktions-und Auslieferungsnetz.

Name: Reina Apícola Levantina
Description:
Referentes en importación y exportación de miel de gran calidad desde hace más de 80 años.

Gracias a nuestras instalaciones innovadoras de más de 8.000 m2 totalmente automatizadas, garantizamos la capacidad para fabricar una gran variedad de formatos en calidad superior.

Año tras año, seleccionamos las mejores mieles del Mediterráneo y más allá, garantizando un producto que cumple con los más altos estándares internacionales.

Desde nuestros orígenes humildes hasta nuestra expansión global, seguimos guiados por la misma pasión que nos vio nacer: la de ofrecer miel auténtica y deliciosa al mundo entero.

Name: Bolinhos Serra do Mar
Description: Com a criação da Bolinhos Serra do Mar,  que é uma empresa de alimentos e frutos do mar, buscamos integrar os pescadores, marisqueiros agricultura familiar e as suas cadeias produtivas no litoral do Paraná, com a produção de bolinhos tradicionais caiçaras feitos à base de mandioca, com camarão, peixe, barreado e frutos do mar, para manter viva a tradição desses produtos alimentícios regionais.

Name: UFICO (United Fisheries Co. Sal)
Description:
At Ufico we are passionate about delivering high-quality, sustainable, and innovative food solutions. With decades of expertise, we are the proud mother company of three leading brands: Ocean Garden, Captain Fisher, and the soon-to-be-launched Croq.

Based in Dekweneh, Lebanon, Ufico combines a deep understanding of local markets with a global perspective to source and deliver the finest food products to households and businesses. From fresh and frozen seafood to pantry essentials and gourmet delights, our brands bring together convenience, taste, and trust for every table.

Name: Natural Vanilla Pty Ltd
Description:
Established in 2008, Natural Vanilla is a 100% Australian family-owned and operated creator of premium quality, vanilla products which we distribute around the world.

The success of our business is built on repeat customers from home bakers, to small, medium and large businesses with our core value that their success is our success.

Unlike other vanilla companies that include artificial colours, ‘natural’ flavour enhancers, preservatives, fillers, allergens, chemical compounds and sweeteners, we were fuelled with the desire to develop a line of premium natural vanilla products created purely from fresh vanilla pods – the way nature intended. 

Our range of premium quality vanilla products include traditional and alcohol free vanilla extract and paste, ground vanilla powder in A and B grades, vanilla caviar seeds, vanilla caviar paste, vanilla extract powder and vanilla pods in Bourbon (Planifolia) and Tahitian varieties.

We offer our vanilla products internationally through the following webstores: Canada – www.naturalvanilla.ca, Chile – www.naturalvanilla.cl, Europe - www.naturalvanilla.eu, Hong Kong - www.naturalvanilla.hk, Ireland - www.naturalvanilla.ie, Middle East - www.naturalvanilla.ae, South America – www.naturalvanilla.lat, Singapore - www.naturalvanilla.sg. Name: Arcadia Green Coffee
Description:
Our focus is to offer the best value to our customers while paying prices to our supply partners that support a better life for their families, development in their communities, and sustainable improvement in the quality of their produce. We are set to be the first fully traceable farm-to-cup Colombian green coffee wholesale stockist in Ireland.

We ship green coffee from Colombia using 20 ft containers dedicated exclusively to our company Arcadia.

Once custom cleared the coffee is stored in dedicated green coffee warehouses in Dublin and Belfast. Our stock is ready and available for delivery to our customers in multiples of 70 kg natural fibre sacks. We can schedule the delivery of either a full 20 ft container of our green coffee or a single 70 kg sack directly to any location in Ireland.

We can arrange the export of any bespoke specialty coffee out of Colombia based on specific customer requirements.

We control the entire logistics chain - from sourcing the beans; selecting which varieties will be hulled, sorted and graded prior to being bagged; through shipping up until the final destination here in Ireland. We are an SCA (Specialty Coffee Association) company member, Irish registered business with a sister company in Colombia which has all the required licences and permits in place to export coffee.

Description:

At Exotic Freeze Dry, we’re proud to transform the richness of Colombia’s diverse tropical fruits into premium solutions, preserving both flavour and nutrients. But beyond our products, we’re deeply committed to social and environmental sustainability.
Our journey is built on the dedication of rural women and farmers, the heart of our operations. Through our partnerships with local communities, we promote organic farming, improve livelihoods, and create opportunities for economic development in rural areas.
We believe that sustainable business goes hand in hand creating a positive impact on people’s lives. By sourcing and processing with care, we are not only providing healthier fruit options to consumers in the world but also contributing to the empowerment of the rural workforce in Colombia.
Join us in bringing high-quality, responsibly sourced fruit solutions to the global market while making a meaningful difference!
#Sustainability #RuralDevelopment #FreezeDriedFruit #SocialImpact #OrganicFarming #ExoticFreezeDry#Colombia

Aura King Coconut Water is sweeter but 35% less sugar compared to all leading coconut water brands and also it has got double the electrolytes as compared to the the green coconut water and Aura is the only 100% natural drink which contains Iron. 

Aura King Coconut Water was conceptualized to address the lack of a naturally sweet, healthy and refreshing drink down under. It is now available in an array of 100% natural flavors to suit every taste bud.

King Coconut water has been the longest kept secret of island Sri Lankans; to quench the tropical heat emanating from the surrounding ocean. Drinks to feel good about! With low calories, antioxidants and full of electrolytes and minerals such as Iron, Magnesium, Phosphorus and Potassium, it is mother nature's miracle concoction. 

The coconuts are grown on non-GMO forest farms that support biodiversity and adhere to ethical and sustainable practices.

We pledge to make the world a healthier place, One King Coconut Water bottle at a time!

Description:
Born from a long-standing legacy, ALIMPEX is committed to distributing high-quality foodstuff and produce around the world. From the generous shores of Lebanon, a dream was born with Muhieddine Alaeddine in 1965. His legacy was then upheld by his sons and grand-sons. The long journey started with a BOT contract for the Beirut Slaughterhouse, then the dream grew to encompass the exclusive agency of a wide range of meats, food-stuff and produce brands. 
ALIMPEX is today the agent of top European brands, namely Bulgarian brands, distributing meats, groceries, dairy and non-dairy products, as well as juices and beverages. Thanks to its network of partners and suppliers; in addition to the trust and the stellar reputation it has built within the industry; ALIMPEX has signed exclusivity contracts with different producers on the basis of representing, promoting and distributing in Lebanon and Arab countries.
With a lot already achieved, ALIMPEX management still looks forward to more success and broader business horizons. The company is currently expanding towards the Gulf Cooperation Council in the aim of making the brands it represents readily available to some of the Gulf markets.

Name: Local Style Chips
Description:
Local Style is a love letter to Chicago — celebrating our legendary local flavors is celebrating Chicago itself. For Chicagoans, food isn’t just food — it’s culture, memories, personality, and pride.

It all started with a simple question: What if a line of chips could capture the soul of a city? Today, we’re bringing the idea to life — one bag at a time — found on shelves at your favorite neighborhood delis, markets, and corner stores.

We’re a woman-owned, family-run small business based right here in the Windy City. Our founder, Laura Gardner, spent her career building food and beverage brands for big companies — but when she was unexpectedly laid off, she decided it was time to bet on herself... and Chicago.

So to the locals, former locals, and Chicago fans everywhere, this is our promise to you: 100% hustle and heart. No Small Plans. And a whole lot of love for the greatest food city in the world.

Every day, we handle over 40,000 kilograms of fresh produce, ensuring that businesses and families across India enjoy the highest quality and freshest flavors available.

Our Journey

Founded on the principles of integrity, quality, and reliability, Khilji Brothers has grown from a local fruit trader to a major player in the international fruit market. Our rich history in Mumbai's APMC has enabled us to develop unparalleled expertise and robust networks that benefit our clients and suppliers alike.

What We Do

At Khilji Brothers, we are committed to enriching lives with the natural goodness of fresh fruits. Our extensive range includes exotic and seasonal varieties, meticulously selected to meet the diverse tastes and needs of our customers. We leverage advanced logistics and custom solutions to maintain fruit freshness from farm to table, making us the preferred partner for leading retailers, wholesalers, and hospitality businesses across India.

Join Our Network

Connect with Khilji Brothers to stay updated on our latest offerings and market insights. Whether you're a supplier seeking a reliable distributor or a business in need of premium fresh fruits, we are here to serve you with excellence. Let’s cultivate success together!

Description:

Aliados a parceiros internacionais de países como Nova Zelândia, Espanha, Portugal, Itália, França, EUA, Peru, Colômbia, Chile, Argentina, Uruguai, entre outros, o grupo traz para o mercado produtos de qualidade em constante parceria com fornecedores, proporcionando aos seus clientes soluções e resultados alinhados a qualidade, ética e responsabilidade.

Excelência na entrega:

Localizado entre o CEAGESP na Grande São Paulo e o CEASA MINAS em Belo Horizonte, o Grupo Othil oferece uma grande diversidade e variedade de frutas, verduras e legumes, nacionais e importados, atendendo de norte a sul do país.

Primando pela excelência em logística, armazenamento e estrutura de atendimento, as empresas do Grupo Othil são interdependentes e mantém constante intercâmbio, contando com centro de armazenagem próprio e diversos departamentos focados em elaborar um trabalho eficiente e diferenciado para cada demanda específica.

Beneficiamento Othil:

Nossa experiência de mais de 60 anos nos permitiu desenvolver, entre diversos serviços complementares, o Beneficiamento Othil, que já está presente no dia-a-dia de diversos hipermercados e hortifrútis de todo o Brasil.

Trata-se de uma seleção criteriosa dentro de cada lote de frutas, verduras e legumes que sua empresa adquire. Controlamos a qualidade e integridade do conteúdo que chega à sua gôndola, um serviço prestado por especialistas que auxiliam o seu negócio a agregar valor e simplificar processos que, muitas vezes, são inviáveis ou onerosos para serem realizados internamente. Grupo Othil oferece uma estrutura ideal para um futuro mais saudável que promova à população saúde e bem estar.

Polar Drink è una piattaforma distributiva che opera su tutto il territorio nazionale, progettata per ottimizzare la logistica, ridurre i costi e migliorare l’efficienza operativa. Presente su tutto il territorio nazionale tramire 4 sedi operative e 5 piattaforme, offre un servizio strategico per il settore Ho.Re.Ca., garantendo assortimento, convenienza e flessibilità.

Perché scegliere Polar Drink?
 Flessibilità operativa e gestione ottimizzata delle risorse
 Riduzione dei costi di stoccaggio con acquisti mirati
 Gestione del cash flow più efficiente, evitando immobilizzazioni di capitale
 Servizio rapido e personalizzato, anche con ritiro diretto presso le piattaforme
 Maggior potere contrattuale ed economie di scala, per condizioni di acquisto vantaggiose
 Assortimento di oltre 5.000 prodotti tra vini, spirits, birre e soft drink, inclusi prodotti esclusivi

Polar Drink è il punto di riferimento per i distributori che vogliono innovare, risparmiare e offrire ai propri clienti un assortimento sempre aggiornato e competitivo.

Name: Korai Beer Company Ltd.
Description:
Tiếng Việt bên dưới!

KORAÏ craft beer was born in Vietnam, brewed with the ocean in mind, salt in the air and purpose in every pour.

Our heart and souls lie in protecting the very oceans of Vietnam that we all love so dearly. That's why sustainability isn't a marketing tactic for us. It's our blueprint. 

For every bottle we sell, we donate 5,000 VND to local marine conservation projects. That's over 10% of our revenue, and +20% of our profits. 

And, we're not here to flood the market. Korai crafts beer for venues that care and that's why you'll find Korai in fine dining restaurants, high-end resorts and ocean-facing escapes. 

KORAÏ is proud to be Vietnamese. Proud to be ocean-first.

Want to partner with us? +84 798 852 399

------

KORAÏ craft beer được sinh ra tại Việt Nam – nơi từng giọt bia mang theo vị mặn của biển, làn gió đại dương và một sứ mệnh rõ ràng.

Chúng tôi đặt cả trái tim và tâm huyết vào việc bảo vệ đại dương Việt Nam – nơi mà ai trong chúng ta cũng yêu quý và gắn bó.
Với Korai, bền vững không phải là chiêu trò quảng cáo. Đó là cốt lõi trong mọi việc chúng tôi làm.

Mỗi chai bia được bán ra, chúng tôi đóng góp 5.000 VNĐ cho các dự án bảo tồn biển tại địa phương — tương đương hơn 10% doanh thu và hơn 20% lợi nhuận của chúng tôi.

Korai không sản xuất đại trà. Bia của chúng tôi được tạo ra dành cho những nơi thật sự quan tâm — vì vậy bạn sẽ thấy Korai trong các nhà hàng cao cấp, resort sang trọng và những không gian gần biển.

KORAÏ tự hào là thương hiệu Việt, và luôn đặt đại dương lên hàng đầu.

Bạn muốn đồng hành cùng Korai? +84 798 852 399

Name: Cetra Alimentari SA
Description:
Una bella storia imprenditoriale che parte più di 45 anni fa.

Un giovane casaro bernese intraprendente, appassionato e anche visionario, decide di prendere le redini di una piccola impresa in Ticino attiva nel commercio del gorgonzola e ampliarne l’attività fino a diventare leader in Svizzera per le importazioni di formaggi italiani.

Oggi sul territorio siamo un punto di riferimento nel ramo lattiero-caseario per le aziende che cercano prodotti italiani genuini e di qualità. 

Grazie ad una consolidata rete di collaborazioni e all’esperienza acquisita siamo in grado di superare anche le situazioni difficili causate dalle incertezze del mercato, garantire forniture e standard qualitativi di alto livello.

Dal nostro legame con il territorio nasce l’idea di partecipare attivamene al progetto “Eccellenze Alpestri”, in collaborazione con STEA e sostenere gli Alpigiani Ticinesi con know-how e promozione del loro prezioso lavoro.
Nelle nostre celle di stagionatura maturano formaggi d’Alpe Ticino AOP selezionati; la nostra missione è quella di permettere al formaggio di sviluppare appieno gli aromi dati dal nostro latte d’alpe per regalare un’esperienza gustativa unica.

Somos RUNEA: movemos calidad, distribuimos pasión y construimos progreso.

Name: Rimbawan Kuliner Nusantara
Description:
About Us
Rimbawan Kuliner Nusantara is where gastronomy meets nature. We collaborate with local communities to ethically source Indonesia’s finest forest ingredients and craft unique culinary experiences. Our creations take discerning food lovers and hospitality guests on a flavorful journey through the archipelago’s wildest landscapes.

Our flagship brand, Rimbawan Gelato, reimagines kenari—a wild, nutrient-dense nut from the Moluccas—as the base for vegan ice creams and pastries that are as delicious as they are meaningful.

 Our Mission
Turn forest stewardship into an economically rewarding, culturally celebrated, and gastronomically exciting experience—one spoon at a time.

 Our Role
RKN is envisioned as the engine of the Rimbawan ecosystem—a central node where unique agroforestry products are transformed into exceptional food delicacies, connecting forests to plates and palates. By creating demand for forest-positive ingredients, we help build the market infrastructure needed to scale regenerative landscape management.

 What We Do
 Source responsibly from social forestry landscapes
 Co-create products with chefs and food artisans
 Supply premium HORECA partners with unique, plant-based offerings
 Bridge ecosystems—connecting producers and buyers in a transparent, impact-driven supply chain

 Why It Matters
Indonesia is home to some of the richest biodiversity on Earth—yet its forest stewards are often disconnected from markets that value quality, impact, and sustainability. RKN helps unlock that value by combining ethical sourcing, culinary excellence, and market insight.

 Flagship Products
• Vegan kenari gelato & pastries
• Gluten-free dessert lines
• Forest-based ingredients: kenari, vanilla, mace, arenga sugar
• Custom culinary product development for HORECA

 Let’s Collaborate
Are you a chef, food innovator, hospitality buyer, or social forestry partner? Connect with us to co-create a regenerative, forest-to-table economy.

Name: Arcobalenofood
Description:
Da più di 40 anni, siamo l’autentico riferimento in Italia per le specialità alimentari e dolciarie.

Ricerchiamo e selezioniamo con cura le eccellenze della gastronomia italiana. 
Di qualità artigianale.
Legate alla tradizione. 


Da un’intuizione brillante di due venditori e futuri soci, Arcobaleno Food nasce nel 1979 con la volontà di diffondere le specialità artigianali regionali e locali, in tutto il territorio. 

Da sempre, con passione e dedizione, sosteniamo le piccole realtà artigianali di produttori e negozianti, a mantenere vivo il prezioso patrimonio gastronomico italiano, custodito e tramandato sapientemente di generazione in generazione.

Da una piccola realtà aziendale a conduzione familiare, Arcobaleno nel corso degli anni è diventata un’importante realtà imprenditoriale nel settore food artigianale, con uno sguardo rivolto verso l’estero.

Professionalità e competenza, ci accompagnano dal 1979 nella profonda conoscenza del produttore e della materia prima, ma soprattutto nella tutela dell’alta qualità delle nostre specialità, garantendo un ampio assortimento. 

Affidarsi a noi significa amore per il cliente, estrema attenzione per la qualità e tutela dei nostri artigiani.

Perchè dal 1979 la tua soddisfazione è anche la nostra!

Name: Weihe Berlin GmbH
Description:
Wir sind stolz darauf, sagen zu können, dass wir ein gewachsenes Familienunternehmen sind.

1925 wurde unser Unternehmen vom Namensgeber Otto Weihe als Frucht-Einzelhändler auf einem Hinterhof im Berliner Wedding mit einer Hand voll Angestellten gegründet. Heutzutage befindet sich die Weihe GmbH in vierter Generation mit über 300 Angestellten auf dem Berliner Großmarkt. Von einem kleinen Einzelhandel haben wir uns zu einem der führenden Frischegroßhändler in Berlin und Brandenburg entwickelt und liefern täglich aus einer Hand neben Obst, Gemüse und Salaten auch Getränke, Molkereierzeugnisse, Fisch, Feinkost und viele frische Convenience-Produkte. Wir sind stolz darauf, der Zulieferer und Berater erstklassiger Hotels und Restaurants, bekannter Kaufhäuser, Caterer, Lebensmitteleinzelhändler, Kindergärten und Krankenhäuser zu sein. Die Wünsche unserer Kunden stehen für uns immer an erster Stelle.

Name: Owl and Monkey Tea
Description:
Owl & Monkey was born in the heart of the Sri Lankan jungle with the intention of bringing to you, our beloved customers, a little peace of our jungle life with every wakeful moment of your tea experience. 

Our famous Pink tea is perhaps the most rare and most unique tea in the world, and its capturing the hearts of beloved tea drinkers from all around the world.

Pink Tea is as subtle and as delicate as its beautiful pink color hints at. With a mild bouquet and a slight huskiness that hits the back of the palette, it sets the mood for an insightful and nurturing taste experience. 

It's modest spirit, allowing the delicate taste and mild bouquet to play gently on the taste buds, and its heart awakening pink color ensures all the senses are bathed in it's graceful and harmonious energy

Description: Vičiunai Baltic OÜ on Vičiūnai Groupi tütarettevõte aastast 2000, mille põhitegevuseks  erinevate toidukaupade müük. Vičiunai Group on ülemaailmne erinevate toiduainete tootja ja tarnija, mille peakorter asub Leedus, tehased aga Leedus, Hispaanias ja Eestis. Oma põhitegevuse raames laiendab Grupp pidevalt oma äriportfelli logistika, müügi, distributsiooni ja ehitustöödega. Name: King Dattes Company
Description:
Anis Khaldi is the manager of King Dattes, an export-only agribusiness company in Tozeur specializing in processing and packaging organic dates.
King Dattes was established by Mr. Khaldi in 2018 and began its operations in 2020. The company owns palm trees in both the Gafsa and Tozeur regions, which meet 40% of their needs. The company sources the remaining 60% from local small-scale producers in the governorate of Kebili.
Initially, King Dattes mainly exported its products to Morocco and Qatar. However, Mr. Khaldi had greater aspirations and sought to also enter high-value European and American markets. To achieve this, the company needed to meet several international certifications and expand its production capacity.
In late 2021, JOBS helped the company implement international halal, kosher, and quality-management certifications (ISO 22000) in order to fulfill orders from prospective buyers in the US, Azerbaijan, Turkey, and Malaysia. The company is presently in the process of implementing additional quality certifications (IFS/BRC) and good agricultural practices (Global GAP). The company has also expanded its production facilities to meet the increasing demands of its clients.
As a result of JOBS’ assistance, King Dattes created 94 new jobs, increased its production by 30%, and began exporting to the US, Italy, and Azerbaijan.
“We aspire to be among the world leaders in the export of dates and its derivatives. To do so, we will keep on advancing by focusing on innovation and eco-friendly practices.”
Anis Khaldi
Manager – King Dattes
#Tunisia_JOBS Article

Name: TM DUCHE NUT CO INC
Description:
T.M. Duche Nut Co Inc: A Legacy of Quality and Craftsmanship

Since 1857, T.M. Duche Nut Co Inc has been a trusted partner in the nut industry, connecting growers to consumers with precision and excellence. Founded by T.M. Duché, an experienced International Goods Trader, the company quickly gained a reputation for exceptional quality and outstanding customer service. Our journey began in London and expanded with the acquisition of a nut processing plant in Orland, California, which remains central to our operations today.

For over 150 years, T.M. Duche Nut Co Inc has been a leader in hulling, shelling, and processing almonds and walnuts, delivering superior products to both U.S. and global markets. We take pride in our rigorous quality standards, our commitment to craftsmanship, and our long-standing relationships with growers. By fostering these relationships, we ensure that our growers receive competitive pricing and the highest returns, while maintaining fair pricing for consumers worldwide.

Our dedication to quality, reliability, and innovation continues to define our operations as we combine traditional values with modern practices. Whether you are looking for a trusted processing partner or premium nut products, T.M. Duche Nut Co Inc is here to provide the excellence you deserve.

Partner with T.M. Duche Nut Co Inc for quality, reliability, and a legacy of excellence.

Name: Raga Australia
Description:
Bringing the best of nature from Sri Lanka to the world, Agrideshiya utilises ethical methods in technological agriculture to enhance the industry within the agro-based economy. We use new technologies whilst maintaining care for people and the earth. Our company aims to enhance the country’s economy and develop an agriculturally sustainable future, through the unique raw materials found in the rich soil of the island.

Our flagship product, Raga Sparkling Kithul Raa of Ceylon brings to the world for the first time, the traditional, natural taste and goodness of a beverage gifted from the kithul palms of Sri Lanka’s rainforests.

Kithul Raa has a long history as a royal beverage of ancient kings, formulated from a fermented phloem sap collected from majestic kithul palms. Even in the present day, only a few communities living in the forest areas have a chance to taste it.

Beyond the regular characteristics of Raa, Raga from Agrideshiya brings a sparkle of sophistication, to give you an exquisitely crafted and carbonated drink in a can, while ensuring its traditional goodness and natural taste.

Das Pfersich Trendforum, bietet fachkundigen Entscheidungsträgern und ihren Mitarbeitenden mit seinem Seminarprogramm neue Inspirationen und moderne Techniken für die Konditorei und Pâtisserie. Das gesamte Pfersich-Team arbeitet täglich dafür, mit einem zuverlässigen Service und professionellen Lösungsansätzen die individuellen Konzepte seiner Kunden optimal zu unterstützen.

Name: Fruits at Home

Name: Pure Caffe Ltd
Description:
A Great cup of coffee is mandatory in morning for most people. It is inspirational for many. Timeless moments are often shared over a steaming cup of coffee. That’s why we at Caffe Carraro take our coffee very seriously. Since its inception in 1927, we have been roasting the finest coffee for our Italian community and international coffee lovers worldwide.

The family run coffee roasting company takes great care in the quality of their product and has a commitment to supply “real coffee from real coffee people”. Every morning the Master Taster along with his team sources out top quality coffee beans and roasts them in small batches. The coffee is then blended into a smooth and sweet espresso which is crafted with their unique Carraro aroma that is unique as well as consistent throughout the year.

Caffe Carraro is also very active in the Barista community featuring coffee and espresso classes for baristas and their customers at its roasterie and training facility. In addition to this, they offer sales, services, and consultation on equipment and other machinery related to the coffee house.

Pure Caffe is delighted to announce its partnership with Caffe Carraro in anticipation to introduce new quality coffee and a brand to the UK market.

Name: CALIFA BEVERAGES LTD
Description:
Una empresa 100% peruana, importadora y comercializadora de bebidas gaseosas en lata de la marca C&C BEVERAGES INC.
Garantizamos a nuestros distribuidores la más alta calidad en nuestros productos y un servicio de abastecimiento eficiente. Seguimos ampliando nuestros canales de distribución abriendo instalaciones cerca de nuestros clientes. Esté atento a C&C en nuestras tres regiones!! 
Nuestro objetivo es ampliar nuestra red de distribuidores a nivel nacional y expandirnos en nuestro mercado objetivo.
Para lo cual, ponemos a su disposición nuestro catálogo online con la información de los productos que importamos de Estados Unidos. Estamos interesados en establecer alianzas estratégicas con todas las empresas dedicadas al rubro de comercialización en cada región de nuestro país, y poder brindarles así la más alta calidad y al mejor precio en bebidas gaseosas en lata.
Nos encontramos a su disposición para negociar los términos comerciales, tanto desde el punto de vista económico como empresarial.

Name: GLOBAL TRADING BV
Description:
Welcome to Global Trading where we specialize in providing high-quality frozen protein products such as pork, chicken, beef, and lamb, as well as a wide variety of Belgian fries and vegetables. We are based in Belgium and have a reputation for fulfilling the needs of our customers, which has led to a strong, respectful repeat business.

Our company was founded with the goal of providing our customers with the best products and services. We understand the importance of fulfilling our customers’ needs, that’s why we take great care in sourcing our products from only the best premium producers based in Europe, Canada, the United States, Mexico and Brazil, ensuring that our products meet the highest standards of quality and taste.
We are committed to providing our customers with a wide variety of products that meet their needs and exceed their expectations. Our team of dedicated professionals works hard to ensure that our customers receive the best products and services, and we are always happy to help with any questions or concerns.

Name: Holzmann Feines vom Land GmbH
Description:
Holzmann Feines vom Land GmbH mit Sitz in Schwanenstadt im Hausruckviertel (Oberösterreich) ist ein Lebensmittelhandelsbetrieb von hochwertigen frischen Convenience-Produkten (vorwiegend gekühlt) für Lebensmittel-Großhandel, Großverbraucher, Gastronomie & Industrie in Österreich und dem umliegenden Ausland – ausschließlich B2B.

Unseren Sortimentsschwerpunkt bilden frische Garkartoffeln & pasteurisiertes Flüssigei. Erweitert wird unser Angebot durch innovative, hochwertige Convenience-Produkte von ausgewählten Produzenten.
Als zuverlässiger & kompetenter Partner für Kunden, Mitarbeiter und Lieferanten agieren wir mit hoher Kompetenz und Motivation zum gegenseitigen Nutzen. Dabei legen wir neben der erstklassigen Produktqualität großen Wert auf kundenorientierte Dienstleistungen. Wir zeichnen uns aus durch kundennahen Service und flexible, pünktliche Warenverfügbarkeit.

Nur dank unseren hervorragenden Mitarbeitern konnten wir erfolgreich unser Wachstum stemmen und sind weiterhin höchst erfolgreich.

Name: GLOBO BROKER NESTLÉ
Description: Com mais de três décadas de história, a Globo Broker Nestlé tem se destacado por entregar soluções de excelência, conectando a Nestlé com consumidores na Bahia e Pernambuco. Com um foco constante em qualidade, inovação e parceria, trabalhamos para promover uma alimentação mais saudável e acessível, sempre atendendo às necessidades do mercado e superando as expectativas de nossos clientes. Nosso compromisso com a ética, transparência e trabalho em equipe cria oportunidades de crescimento sustentável para todos os envolvidos. Acreditamos no poder das boas práticas e na transformação positiva que um negócio bem conduzido pode gerar para a sociedade.

Name: Dhanalakshmi Trading Co.
Description:
About Dhanalakshmi Trading Co.
Dhanalakshmi Trading Co. is a well-established distributor, proudly delivering high-quality products from leading brands such as Cargill Oil, Nirma Detergent, and Nirma Salt. With years of expertise in the Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) sector, we have earned a reputation as a trusted partner for retailers, wholesalers, and businesses across the region.

Our company is founded on principles of quality, reliability, and customer satisfaction, ensuring that every product we deliver meets the expectations of our diverse clientele. We serve as a crucial link between manufacturers and end-users, bridging the gap to make everyday essential products accessible to households and businesses.

Our Mission
At Dhanalakshmi Trading Co., our mission is to empower communities by providing access to high-quality, essential goods. We are committed to building strong, long-lasting partnerships with our clients by ensuring seamless distribution, excellent service, and mutual growth.

Our Product Portfolio
We take pride in being authorized distributors for some of the most trusted household names:

1. Cargill Oil
A leader in the edible oils market, Cargill Oil is renowned for its purity, taste, and nutritional value.
We distribute a wide range of Cargill oil products, catering to the needs of households, restaurants, and food businesses.
2. Nirma Detergent
Nirma Detergent has been a household staple for decades, known for its affordability and effective cleaning power.
As distributors, we ensure consistent availability of this trusted product across markets.
3. Nirma Salt
Offering pure and high-quality salt, Nirma Salt is an essential product in every home.
We take pride in ensuring its availability and accessibility to retailers and wholesalers.
Our Values
Quality First: We prioritize the quality of the products we distribute, ensuring that every product meets the highest standards.
Reliability: Timely delivery and efficient distribution are the corne

Name: DOLOMITA
Description:
Le Dolomiti, Patrimonio dell’Unesco, hanno ispirato l’idea di DOLOM-ITA.
Un nome che è il connubio ideale tra le Dolomiti e il Made in Italy.

DOLOMITA è il punto di incontro tra i produttori di eccellenze territoriali.
È qualcosa che unisce. Un luogo in cui promozione, comunicazione e commercializzazione si fondono per esaltare i prodotti dolomitici nel mondo.

L’obbiettivo è di rendere sempre più noti i marchi dolomitici, tutelati da una regia comune.

Name: Sicilia Tentazioni
Description:
La storia di Sicilia Tentazioni Srl inizia ben 23 anni fa con la visione di riportare in tavola i gusti genuini della nostra terra.
Sin dall’inizio, l'obiettivo è stato quello di mantenere vive le tradizioni gastronomiche del passato, rivisitando le ricette di famiglia e collaborando strettamente con artigiani che condividessero lo stesso rispetto per i metodi di lavorazione tradizionali. 

Ci impegniamo costantemente a preservare le tradizioni culinarie della Sicilia, mantenendo vivo il ricordo dei sapori autentici che hanno reso la nostra terra celebre in tutto il mondo. Ogni prodotto che offriamo è un'ode alla ricchezza dei nostri ingredienti e al savoir-faire artigianale che contraddistingue la nostra produzione.

Siamo un ponte tra passato e presente, tra tradizione e innovazione. Con una costante attenzione alle esigenze dei nostri clienti, ci adattiamo ai cambiamenti del mercato senza mai perdere di vista le nostre radici.

Name: Adriatic (UK) LTD
Description:
We are exclusive suppliers of market leading brands like Argeta, Bambi, Brajlovic, Grand, Natura, Stark, Sharri, Medela, Jaffa, Poljorad, Cockta, Illyria Group, Gecchele, Sunday, Katuni, Dukat, Chillo, Cedevita, Mezza, Doncafe, Mirusha, Delamaris, Brasko, Mare, Waltz, Sofka, Fresh Alb, Indomie. 

By having distribution at our core and only business, we are assured no one else offers these brands at better overall conditions. 
With Adriatic UK we opened a new successful chapter of our story and we are very happy to be able to offer our top selling products to British wholesalers. 

Our assortment includes products from almost all categories like ambient, chilled and deep frozen. Let us offer you Mediterranean products at a higher level! 

Transform occasional visitors to loyal and frequent customers! We would be happy to get in touch with you!'

Name: The Vitam
Description:
Vitam is a T H C-infused seltzer designed to elevate shared experiences—uniting real fruit and functional ingredients to create a modern, wellness-forward take on happy hour.

Vitam offers a new chapter for grabbing drinks. Not just a buzz—but a better feeling, built around people. It’s the drink that turns strangers into friends and nights into stories, without any regrets. 

Thoughtfully dosed. Beautifully designed. Made for people who care about what they consume and how it brings them together. It’s not just a drink. It’s the start of something social.

Description: Bluebird Enterprises, based in India, is one of the largest suppliers international brands of alcohol and cigarettes with a proud history of over 30 years in business. Our portfolio covers all major brand across global network - Europe, UK, Asia, USA & Australia. Bluebird Enterprises has always maintained strong relationship with clients by offering best possible pricing to our global networks.

Name: CASIMEX SAS
Description:
Bienvenue chez CASIMEX : Votre porte d'entrée vers l'excellence de l'épicerie fine en import/export ! 

Chez CASIMEX, notre passion pour l'art culinaire nous pousse à vous faire voyager à travers les saveurs du monde. En tant qu'entreprise spécialisée dans l'import/export d'épicerie fine, nous collaborons avec des producteurs et des fournisseurs renommés à travers le globe pour vous offrir une sélection exquise de produits gastronomiques.

 Notre engagement envers la qualité est notre priorité absolue. Chaque produit que nous importons ou exportons est rigoureusement sélectionné, en veillant à ce qu'il réponde aux normes les plus strictes en termes de fraîcheur, d'authenticité et de goût. Des huiles d'olive parfumées de la Méditerranée aux condiments exotiques en passant par des tartinades exquises, nous vous offrons une expérience culinaire unique.

 Nous sommes fiers de collaborer étroitement avec les professionnels de la restauration et de la distribution, en leur fournissant des produits de haute qualité pour satisfaire les palais les plus exigeants. Notre mission est de contribuer à la création d'expériences gastronomiques exceptionnelles dans les établissements les plus prestigieux.

 En tant qu'entreprise d'import/export, nous facilitons les échanges internationaux en connectant les producteurs et les fournisseurs du monde entier avec nos clients. Notre expertise logistique nous permet d'assurer des opérations fluides et efficaces, en veillant à ce que les produits arrivent à destination dans les délais impartis et dans des conditions optimales.

 Chez CASIMEX, nous valorisons l'innovation et la découverte. Nous restons constamment à l'affût des tendances émergentes et des nouvelles saveurs, afin de vous offrir une sélection toujours renouvelée et captivante. Notre équipe dynamique et passionnée travaille avec dévouement pour vous offrir une expérience client exceptionnelle.

 Découvrez notre site web www.casimex.fr pour en savoir plus sur nos

Name: Cooperative of Italian Producers (COIP)
Description:
CO.I.P. was founded in April 2019, arising from the desire from some Italian producers to have a stable commercial office in the UK. COIP's motivation is to support UK importers and distributors of Italian produce in overcoming the Covid-19 pandemic and Brexit.

Our trusted, genuine relationships with quality Italian suppliers enable us to source the best food and beverage products, with our UK-based warehouses allowing for rapid deliveries of the finest Italian produce in days, not weeks.

Our cooperative comprises of over 40 Food Farms & Wine Estates throughout 16 Regions in Italy. We are proud to only work with companies that are established and respected on the Italian market and known for their commitment to quality without compromise.

We're always looking to help more businesses in the UK to access the finest Italian produce at wholesale prices, without the headache of sorting paperwork and deliveries. To see what we have in stock, visit https://coiporder.co.uk/ or to register your company on our B2B pricing portal, visit https://coiporder.co.uk/pages/register

Name: Hudson Harvest
Description:
Hudson Harvest partners with over 70 small to medium-sized farms and food producers in the Hudson Valley and Northeast. We’ve built relationships with growers, butchers, millers, and cheesemakers based on a shared commitment to environmental sustainability. Together, we’re helping create a thriving food system and stronger local food community. 

Our mission is to be a collaborative partner to our farms, helping them ensure a sustainable future for their land and their business. Additionally we aim to be a trusted source of high quality local ingredients, and to connect chefs, retailers and institutions directly to the small farms of the Hudson Valley and the Northeast.

Name: Santo Vino Importadora
Description:
A Santo Vino Importadora é uma empresa pioneira no mercado de vinhos do Brasil, fundada em 2022 por Fernando Ribeiro Moreira, sommelier com vasta experiência no setor. A empresa se especializa em vinhos exclusivos para restaurantes, oferecendo uma seleção de rótulos de produtores renomados mundialmente, com foco em proporcionar experiências gastronômicas únicas.

Desde sua fundação, a Santo Vino se destacou como a primeira importadora voltada exclusivamente para o setor de restaurantes, estabelecendo parcerias duradouras com vinícolas de destaque, como da Itália, Espanha, Argentina, Chile e Portugal. A missão da empresa é ser referência em vinhos para restaurantes, com um portfólio selecionado e um serviço de alta qualidade.

Além de fornecer vinhos, a Santo Vino oferece serviços como consultoria personalizada para cartas de vinhos e treinamento de equipes, visando aprimorar o atendimento e a experiência do cliente. Sua filosofia é baseada na busca por vinhos com identidade e história.

A Santo Vino se orgulha de seus valores: qualidade, autenticidade, sustentabilidade, inovação, transparência e paixão pela cultura do vinho.

Name: Grupo Alimenticio S.A.
Description: Grupo Alimenticio S.A. es una distribuidora de productos de consumo masivo, fundada en 2014, con el compromiso de ofrecer un portafolio de alimentos de alta calidad y un servicio al cliente ágil y confiable. Nuestro enfoque está en la innovación, nuestros consumidores y la mejora continua para mantener relaciones comerciales de largo plazo.

Name: Unie van Pluimvee Producenten
Description:
Samen sterk voor ketenkracht een een duurzaam verdienmodel.
De UPP wil de marktpositie van de leden pluimveehouders in de voedselketen versterken, zodat er meer ruimte in de keten ontstaat voor een toekomstbestendige pluimveehouderij die in staat is te investeren in verdere verduurzaming op basis van hetgeen de maatschappij en/of markt vraagt, door te zorgen voor een winstgevende prijs met eerlijke marges in de keten, waarbij goede samenwerking met ketenpartners essentieel is.

Name: Edenesque
Description:
Edenesque creates delicious chef-crafted, plant-based dairy products that provide superior nutrition so our customers can Be the Love – for themselves, their communities, the environment, and their local economy. 

We believe that love is actionable – in all the acts of compassion and joy that we show ourselves and our communities every day. What began as a one-woman offering across New York farmers markets more than ten years ago, has grown into a mission-driven company with the love and support of the communities that welcomed us from the beginning, as well as all the new communities we are creating now. 

Edenesque was founded by Leslie Woodward, a chef with more than two decades of culinary experience. As a Black woman, chef, and business owner, Leslie’s lived experience is deeply affected by the intersecting challenges of climate change, health, food insecurity, and justice, and she integrates her values into every aspect of the business. It is Leslie’s profound hope and calling to deliver delicious, nourishing, and indulgent products that foster whole health, with great ingredients that support environmental sustainability, and have a positive impact on the community.

We are a BIPOC, LGBTQ, woman-owned & led company on a mission to advance social justice through nourishment. 

As part of that mission, it is our privilege to lead the Edenesque Food Insecurity Initiative, a multi-faceted program dedicated to addressing food insecurity in our communities in partnership with local programs, agencies, kitchens, and farms.

In 2024, we are thrilled to expand our reach and continue establishing incredible relationships with exceptional gourmet markets, coffee shops, institutions, and communities.

Name: Abastecedora Alimenticia S.A.C
Description: Abastecedora Alimenticia SAC es una empresa del sector alimenticio que se especializa en la comercialización y distribución de productos alimenticios, brindando soluciones logísticas y de abastecimiento a restaurantes.

Name: Maison AUMAND
Description:
Depuis 120 ans, la Maison AUMAND accompagne les métiers de bouche en Vendée, Deux-Sèvres et Charente-Maritime.

Filiale du réseau national France Frais, nous servons plus de 700 clients avec une offre complète en épicerie, produits frais et surgelés, portée par un service de proximité reconnu.

Sous notre marque régionale « Le Bocain », nous affinons à la main des fromages pur chèvre, expression de notre savoir-faire artisanal et de notre ancrage local.

La proximité au service de votre réussite !

Name: Baltic Berry Gardens LPKS
Description: Baltic Berry Gardens is a farmers Cooperative growing Sea Buckthorn, Quince and Cranberries in over 175 ha, located in different regions of Latvia.

Name: Martori Family Farms
Description: The vegetable brand of Martori Farms. A fourth generation company committed to quality, sustainable growing practices, and year-round supply of premium vegetables.

Name: F.lli Tondini srl
Description:
TONDINI è un grossista di prodotti alimentari, il partner ideale per forniture alimentari per ristoranti, bar, hotel e catering. Forniture alimentari per Mantova, Cremona, Brescia, Verona e Trento.

Siamo grossisti flessibili, dinamici, attenti alla qualità, abbiamo spirito di iniziativa: facciamo accadere le cose, non aspettiamo che accadano.
E per questo che noi di TONDINI abbiamo conquistato la fiducia per la forniture alimentari di bar, ristoranti, pizzerie, caffetterie, hotel, nelle province di Mantova, Cremona, Brescia, Verona e Trento, non solo come grossisti di prodotti alimentari, ma perché mettiamo al primo posto il cliente offrendogli sempre il meglio.

In particolar modo, in veste di grossisti di prodotti alimentari ci occupiamo di: forniture alimentari per ristoranti, pizzerie, hotel, bar, catering, mense e collettive.
Siamo diventati grossisti perché abbiamo una passione per il buon cibo, per i vini di qualità superiore e per i prodotti che migliorano il nostro stile di vita.
Questo ci ha spinti ad andare alla scoperta della storia che c’è dietro ogni nostra referenza, dei luoghi, dei metodi di produzione, della scelta delle materie prime e delle consuetudini della tradizione, selezionando solo quelli provenienti da realtà produttive di qualità, per difendere con forza l’eccellenza e la genuinità degli ingredienti e dei sapori autentici.

Interpretiamo le dinamiche della moderna distribuzione anticipando le esigenze dei clienti senza tralasciare il gusto della tradizione, intenso e naturale.
Abbiamo raggiunto un’altissima qualità e un’ampia selezione di eccellenti prodotti presenti nel mercato assicurando sempre il miglior servizio possibile grazie al nostro team di qualificati e appassionati collaboratori.

TONDINI è un’azienda fatta di persone che vogliono conseguire insieme ambiziosi traguardi.

Name: müslify
Description: Stylische Müsli-Station gefüllt mit besten Bio-Snacks und Müslis, verpackungsfrei & emissionsfrei geliefert - auch für dein Büro!

Name: Orgánica y Saludable
Description: En by Orgánica y Saludable nos enorgullecemos de importar y producir los mejores productos saludables. Conoce más acerca de cada uno de ellos en nuestra página y síguenos en nuestras redes sociales.

Name: Nature Farm
Description: Being one of the best fruit and vegetable suppliers in Malaysia, we supply Corporate F&B, Hotels, Restaurants, Cafes and Supermarkets with the highest quality produce and ingredients. We source products from farmers and growers locally and internationally. We guarantee that you will receive premium fresh products to create a truly gourmet cuisine.

Name: Perfect Delights Foods
Description: We aim to be the leading global provider of premium dried fruits and nuts, celebrating the exceptional flavors refined by our ancestors. Since 1970, our family has been cultivating figs in Aydan, Turkey, an area celebrated for its superior fig production. We take pride in our ownership of expansive farms and a processing facility that covers over 600,000 square feet. Our products undergo a stringent quality assurance process, utilizing modern lean manufacturing practices, state-of-the-art machinery, and a skilled workforce. We are fully certified in BRC, Organic, ISO, Kosher, and Halal standards. Since the early 1990s, we have dominated the domestic market for figs, apricots, hazelnuts, and prunes, while also expanding our global export reach. Our active participation in major food exhibitions like SIAL, ANUGA, and GULFOOD reflects our ambition to become the foremost supplier of premium Turkish dried fruits and nuts, sharing the rich heritage of flavors perfected over generations.

Name: Dondero
Description:
Dondero – Distribución profesional de pasta artesanal italiana y especialidades gourmet en España

Dondero es una empresa especializada en la distribución profesional de productos italianos artesanales para el canal Ho.Re.Ca. y Food Service, con sede operativa en España.

Nuestro compromiso es ofrecer a los profesionales de la gastronomía lo mejor de la tradición culinaria italiana, con un enfoque especial en la pasta fresca y rellena artesanal, elaborada en Italia por productores que respetan recetas tradicionales y utilizan ingredientes de primera calidad. Ravioloni gourmet, triangoli, scialatielli, trofie y otras especialidades regionales forman parte de un catálogo diseñado para cocinas que buscan excelencia y diferenciación.

Junto a la pasta, distribuimos también focaccias típicas de Liguria, farinata genovesa y salsas italianas emblemáticas como el pesto genovés DOP y la salsa de nueces. Todos nuestros productos son ultracongelados para garantizar máxima frescura, sabor auténtico y practicidad en la preparación, adaptándose a las exigencias de restaurantes, hoteles, caterings y operadores gastronómicos.

Más allá de la calidad del producto, en Dondero ofrecemos un servicio completo que incluye:

Asesoramiento personalizado y atención comercial directa.

Soluciones logísticas eficientes y entregas rápidas en toda España.

Distribución nacional fiable para restaurantes, hoteles y distribuidores regionales.

Creemos en el valor del origen, la artesanía y la confianza. Por eso, cada día trabajamos para ser más que un proveedor: un socio estratégico para quienes comparten nuestra pasión por la auténtica cocina italiana.

Dondero: pasta artesanal italiana, calidad premium y servicio profesional en España.

 Para marcas
Acompañamos a productores y brand owners que quieren entrar o crecer en Argentina con una solución 360°: registro, importación, distribución omnicanal y presencia en nuestra plataforma online, potenciados con datos de venta y feedback real del mercado.

 Para retailers y horeca
Simplificamos la compra de productos saludables: un solo partner, un catálogo curado y logística integrada. Ayudamos a construir góndolas y cartas más coherentes con lo que el consumidor actual está buscando.

 Para consumidores
Rara Hub es el lugar donde pueden encontrar todas sus marcas naturales y reales en un solo checkout, con información clara, historias de origen y la tranquilidad de que alguien ya filtró lo que no suma.

Nuestro propósito es simple: hacer que consumir mejor sea fácil, rentable y escalable para todos los que forman parte de la cadena. Si compartís esta mirada, hablemos.

Name: CATA Export
Description:
At CATA Export, we don’t just source coffee—we discover, develop, and reveal exceptional specialty coffees with unique stories. Our mission is to create social connections, where the Colombian specialty coffees selected by CATA Export serve as a bridge between knowledge, sustainable processes, and global trends. We aim to enrich lifestyles that find high experiential and intellectual value in coffee.

Our journey began in 2012, when Cat, a passionate Colombian barista, envisioned a deeper connection between coffee lovers and the origins of their favorite brews. This vision led to the birth of CATA Export in 2019, driven by the desire to close the gap between producers and consumers, ensuring full traceability and celebrating the artistry behind every cup.

Our expertise in barista and roasting competitions allows us to develop outstanding coffees, like those of Néstor Lasso and Diviso, which we discovered and nurtured. Each farm we work with is unique, with its own "DNA" and specialized processes, ensuring that what we offer at CATA Reserva cannot be found anywhere else.

In 2020, we were awarded as the Best Colombian Green Coffee Exporter, a recognition that reaffirms our commitment to excellence and quality.

We believe in the power of "Café en las venas", the deep emotional and cultural connection that coffee growers have with their craft. This philosophy guides us as we unveil the richness and complexity of Colombian coffee to the world.

 Let’s connect! If you share our passion for specialty coffee, we’d love to hear from you. Contact us: marketing@catacafeexport.com

Name: Golden Triangle Coffee Inc.
Description:
Throughout history, South East Asian countries have gone through turmoil whether it be for wars, controversies or other acts of violence towards their general populations, which have left them to fend for themselves. 

We’re here to help by establishing a suitable and reoccurring inflow that aids such countries and their local impoverished population. We do this by importing and acquiring Green Beans directly from a supplier that supports specific organizations such as:

- ITDF (Integrated Tribal Development Foundation) - That provide healthy drinking water and education to the hill tribes, as well as a large initiative to ensure the longevity of work is given to the tribe members who want to work through cooperatives, and also to empower Women within the tribal communities to prosper as well. (Please check out https://itdfinternational.org/ to help donate and learn more)

And roasting them within our a local roasting partner in Montreal, so as to keep the freshness of these countries intact until our customers can pour it in their daily cup of coffee. This allows for the most optimum flavour profile and a unique taste that is incomparable, and allows for you to appreciate all the work put in by those individuals that much more.

We strictly manage to sell products directly to consumers using our online platform, and future potential South East Asian establishments to help break any of these future stigmas and to create a togetherness between all cultures and communities.

Name: Farine Varvello & Co. S.r.l.
Description:
Varvello è il cognome di una famiglia che da 5 generazioni opera nel settore mugnaio, e il nome di un’azienda votata alla ricerca e all’innovazione. 

Da noi artigianale e industriale assumono un nuovo significato e si incontrano in un’originale fusione, che è il nostro lavoro: speciale come le farine che vogliamo offrirvi.

Antico mulino o modernissima azienda?
Fra le due possibilità, abbiamo deciso di non scegliere. Perchè crediamo che sia possibile conciliare la nostra anima artigiana più tradizionale con un approccio al passo con i tempi e orientato al mercato, tecnologie proiettate nel futuro, la Ricerca&Sviluppo di un reparto tra i più avanzati d’Europa.

Varvello è una realtà con una doppia anima: la tradizione che guarda al futuro, il gusto di una volta che risponde ai bisogni di oggi.

Name: eatmwah
Description:

However, laboring too much on the logic of why people should reduce their dairy consumption will only go so far when it comes to driving real behavior change. 

We believe there’s a different way: to create the desire to switch instead. And when it comes to food, there are few things people desire more than to treat themselves. 

At MWAH, we commit to pushing the boundaries and create deliciously indulgent dairy-inspired experiences that will drive real behavior  change. 

Join our quest to take the indulgence to the next level, helping to improve the planet, one luscious creamy mouthful at a time.

From the lush rainforests of South America to the fertile fields of Asia, we forge long-term partnerships with growers and producers worldwide, guaranteeing the authenticity, purity, and nutritional value of our products. Through transparent and ethical sourcing, we provide full traceability and support fair trade practices.

As a company deeply rooted in the principles of quality and integrity, we continuously strive to drive innovation in the superfoods market. Our goal is to expand our reach to new regions, champion sustainable practices, and become the go-to partner for those seeking superior superfoods.

Join us on this exciting journey as we make a positive impact on the world, one superfood at a time. Together, let’s cultivate a healthier future with DBR Foods.

Name: Brothers Nuts
Description:
Our life changed in a way we never wanted to believe. In 2010, our father was diagnosed with stage IV brain cancer, given only weeks to live. There were two ways our family could respond: Give up…or Fight Hard and Pray. Since our father was a chiropractor, we were already eating healthy to most peoples standards, but now he had to take his diet to the next clean level. Our whole family joined in! Our mother, an incredible master in the kitchen, was always making organic meals that tasted great. Now, we needed to go ‘all-out organic’ in everything we ate…including our snacks.

Our Mom went to work in the kitchen and her first effort was a mouth-watering snack… what later would be known as the Crackled Cheezy Almonds. We were amazed that there was no dairy, sugar or gluten to be found. Now, our Dad had a snack that was not only healthy, but bursting with flavor. Once our friends tasted the nuts, they were astonished on how great they tasted and couldn’t believe they were healthy for their bodies.

We immediately knew the world needed a healthy snack that would burst with flavor on every crunch! Brothers Nuts was launched with a mission to help people ‘evolve the way they snack’. 

Our fight went on and prayers were answered as our Dad made a full recovery. Unfortunately, our father was attacked by cancer a second-time. This time it came harder and faster than before, and ultimately he went to Heaven. Our family made the choice to turn this setback into a setup for the future of Brothers Nuts.
Today, Brothers Nuts only sells 100% USDA Certified Organic snacks and have added seasonal flavor releases (yes…those are USDA Certified Organic, too!). Our products are now shipped around the world and are fueling the revolution to ‘kick the fake food to the curb!!!’

Name: Out Of The Dark Mushrooms
Description:
Out of the Dark Mushrooms

From humble beginnings in Hunua in 2009, Out of the Dark Mushrooms has been a family endeavour, inspired by founder Phil Matheson’s world travels where he first saw Oyster mushrooms being grown on coffee grounds.

Although Phil started by growing the Oyster mushrooms he had seen in the States, Portobellos also proved to be an important staple in the first few years while kiwis cottoned on to the more ‘gourmet’ mushroom varieties.

Persevering with growing not only the long stemmed, delicate and versatile Oyster mushrooms but also the rich, textured, smoky Shiitake and the mild, sweet Enoki varieties, Out of the Dark Mushrooms outgrew their Hunua facilities and began farming at two sites in 2013 – one in Mt Roskill and the other in Kumeu.

The next move in 2018 saw the entire farming side move to glasshouses in Otahuhu with the office remaining in Takanini. Plans are now underway to develop a purpose-built mushroom farming facility.

Today Out of the Dark Mushrooms is producing about a tonne of mushrooms per week and supplies about 60% of that to top restaurants such as Cocoro, Sid@the French Cafe and Amano. They also supply to My Food Bag and have most recently launched into supermarkets.

“It’s not too many years since kiwis viewed mushrooms with a bit of suspicion,” says Phil.  “But today, with global travel commonplace, people are experiencing – and enjoying – new tastes, textures and flavours abroad.  This is impacting on the food scene here. We’re more experimental and open to new foods as is evidenced on supermarket shelves.”

Name: M FOOD SA
Description:
M FOOD SA jest jednym z głównych graczy na rynku obrotu miodem i produktami pszczelimi w Europie. Grupa jest największą w Europie Środkowo-Wschodniej polską spółką holdingową działającą w szeroko pojętej branży pszczelarskiej, szczególnie w sektorze surowców i produktów spożywczych. Głównym przedmiotem działalności M FOOD SA jest produkcja miodu, jego pozyskiwanie od producentów krajowych i zagranicznych oraz sprzedaż zarówno samego surowca (miodu), jak i produktów pochodzenia pszczelego, takich jak miody, w tym miody pitne, oraz produkty apikultury. Miód stanowi największy procent sprzedaży Grupy, który w 2021 r. wyniósł 97%.

M FOOD SA ma unikalny model biznesowy. Grupa prowadzi działalność w trzech segmentach: downstream, sprzedaż detaliczna oraz własna produkcja surowca. Spółka jest obecna na 4 kontynentach, efektywnie zarządzając procesami logistyki i globalnej kontraktacji zakupów oraz dostaw produktów apikultury – głównie miodu. Historycznie największą sprzedaż Grupa realizowała na rynkach międzynarodowych, obecnie Polska jest jednym z głównych odbiorców produktów pszczelich.

M FOOD SA jest notowana na rynku NewConnect od 2011 roku.

Największymi udziałowcami M FOOD SA są: APJ Trust Sp. z o. o. Sp. j. (57,13%), Artur Błasik (6,94%), JR Holding ASI SA (6,29%), Imperio ASI SA (5,74%).

Name: COOCENTRAL - Cooperativa Central de Caficultores de Huila
Description:
At Coocentral, we focus on the production and export of green and roasted specialty coffee that reflects the dedication and passion of over 3,400 coffee-growing families in Huila, Colombia. As a cooperative, 100% of our income is reinvested to benefit farmers and their communities, supporting social impact programs, sustainable practices, and economic growth.

Vertically Integrated for Quality and Traceability
Our vertically integrated process ensures complete control over quality and traceability—from cultivation and harvesting to processing, roasting, and export. This allows us to deliver flexible solutions tailored to client needs, whether for green coffee or private-label roasted coffee. Our coffees are backed by certifications like Fairtrade, Rainforest Alliance, and UTZ (applicable to green coffee).

Scalability with Uncompromising Quality
With the capacity to handle large volumes while maintaining exceptional quality, Coocentral is your trusted partner for specialty coffee. Our commitment to sustainability, ethics, and the rich heritage of Huila ensures that every cup is a reflection of excellence and purpose.

Name: Ithacus Brasil
Description:
A Ithacus Brasil é uma empresa especializada em operações de importação e exportação de produtos diversos, com ênfase na representação e distribuição exclusiva de marcas internacionais de alta qualidade.

Atualmente, temos como uma de nossas principais frentes comerciais a importação de azeites de oliva extra virgem premium diretamente da Grécia, com destaque para as marcas THE MASTER MILLER e MONOGRAM, das quais somos representantes oficiais e exclusivos no Brasil.

A marca THE MASTER MILLER ocupa atualmente a segunda posição no ranking mundial de azeites de oliva, segundo a plataforma internacional Olive Oil Ranking (oliveoilranking.org), sendo amplamente reconhecida por sua excelência, pureza e qualidade sensorial. A marca MONOGRAM, por sua vez, é igualmente renomada, oferecendo azeites sofisticados e inovadores, com embalagens que remetem à alta perfumaria voltada ao público mais exigente e ao segmento gourmet.

Ampliando nosso compromisso com a excelência e com a curadoria de produtos de origem consagrada, temos o orgulho de anunciar a chegada do Azeite de Oliva Extra virgem DOM FONTOURA, diretamente de Portugal, ao portfólio da Ithacus Brasil.

Produzido em uma região tradicionalmente reconhecida pela qualidade de seus azeites, o DOM FONTOURA combina pureza, sabor e elegância e com envase na origem. Sua embalagem de 500 ml, refinada e simbólica, reflete a atenção aos detalhes desde o cultivo até a mesa do consumidor.

Mais do que um azeite, DOM FONTOURA carrega uma herança:
Tradição que brota da terra e honra seu nome.
Nobreza engarrafada. Sabor com história.

Com sede e escritório comercial em Goiânia (GO) e filial em Santa Catarina, atuamos em todo o território nacional no modelo B2B, fornecendo azeites premiados a empórios, restaurantes, distribuidores e revendedores especializados. 

Incorpore ao seu negócio o que há de mais refinado no universo dos azeites: produtos de excelência, com origem garantida, reconhecimento internacional e tradição autêntica.
