Name: Muskoka Springs Companies
Description:
As Muskoka’s oldest continuously operating company, we have been at the heart of Cottage Country culture since the beginning.

We like to think that over the last 150 years, we have crafted not only Muskoka’s most iconic beverages, but a piece of Muskoka culture itself. Whether you are relaxing on the dock, cruising the lakes, or playing lawn games, we’re there with you. With a roster of century-old recipes, modern creations, and pure Natural Spring Water itself, we have every occasion covered. From the drink in your hand to the clothes you wear, the food you eat, and the games you play, Muskoka Springs is proud to be a part.

To us, Muskoka is more than a place. It’s a state of mind. We’re here to help you live that life every day of the year – wherever you go. 

Welcome to Muskoka.

Name: Gala Foods
Description:
Gala Foods holds a prominent position in the grocery packaging market in Ukraine. 

Established in 2015, the company has exhibited remarkable growth and expanded its operations from a local packaging firm to an international exporter. It supplies goods to America as well as Eastern, Central, and Southern Europe.

Gala Foods is part of a group of companies with over 25 years of expertise in grains. The company's own brands include Pere, ARTFOODS, and Takі Spravy. Our manufacturing capabilities also allow  to assemble food kits and package private label products in various weights.

Gala Foods is owned by Mr. Ram Dange, an Indian native who has been living in Ukraine for the most of his life. He has developed the cereal sector in Ukraine and is known for supplying quality products. 

The company holds approximately 10% of the market among grain packers in Ukraine. Gala Foods occupies a leading position in the rice category, with nearly 15% market share.

It is the only company in Ukraine in the bulk products category that has implemented and successfully passed certification of the safety, quality, legality, and authenticity management system according to the requirements of the BRC standard.  

Upholding traditions and experience, the company offers consumers and partners a new level of quality and comfort. This is achieved through the use of innovative technologies in production processes and active implementation of new manufacturing systems.

Our mission is to promote a culture of wholesome and healthy food. We provide consumers with the opportunity to create their own balanced and nutritious diet, incorporating high-quality products from both national and international producers.

Seiring berjalanya waktu, maka usaha Bakery ini semakin maju dan besar. Tak hanya itu, pada tanggal 18 Desember 1997, merek dagang PERANCIS MODERN BAKERY diubah menjadi SAIMEN BAKERY dengan logo angsa. Saat ini, selain di Jambi, SAIMEN  juga membuka cabang - cabang baru ditempat lain, dimulai pada bulan juli 1997 cabang Tanjung Pinang dibuka, disusul cabang Bengkulu dibuka pada November 1999, Kemudian pada September 2001 cabang Palembang ikut dibuka dibarengi dengan dibukanya outlet kedua di Jambi, pada bulan Oktober 2005 cabang Bungo dibuka diikuti dengan dibukanya Outlet Kedua di Bengkulu dan pada tahun 2010 dibuka kembali Outlet untuk cabang Bangko pada bulan Juni.

Name: New Food Company GmbH
Description:
Die New Food Company ist ein aufstrebendes Unternehmen im Bereich der Lebensmittelindustrie. Es wurde mit dem Ziel gegründet, innovative und nachhaltige Lebensmittelprodukte zu finden und auf den Markt zu bringen.

Das Unternehmen legt großen Wert auf die Qualität seiner Produkte und strebt danach, gesunde und umweltfreundliche Alternativen zu traditionellen Lebensmitteln anzubieten. Die New Food Company arbeitet eng mit Ernährungswissenschaftlern, Köchen und Lebensmitteltechnologen zusammen, um innovative Rezepturen zu entwickeln und den Geschmack und die Nährstoffprofile ihrer Produkte zu optimieren.

Ein Schwerpunkt des Unternehmens liegt auf pflanzlichen Alternativen zu tierischen Produkten. Sie bieten eine breite Palette an vegetarischen und veganen Optionen an, die den Geschmack und die Textur von Fleisch, Milchprodukten und Eiern nachahmen, jedoch ohne den Einsatz von tierischen Inhaltsstoffen. Diese Produkte sollen nicht nur Menschen ansprechen, die sich bewusst für eine pflanzliche Ernährung entscheiden, sondern auch Flexitariern und allgemein gesundheitsbewussten Verbrauchern.

Die New Food Company legt großen Wert auf Nachhaltigkeit. Sie verwenden hochwertige Zutaten aus natürlichem Anbau und setzen auf umweltfreundliche Produktionsverfahren. 

Durch ihre innovativen Produkte und ihren Fokus auf Nachhaltigkeit hat die New Food Company schnell an Beliebtheit gewonnen. Das Unternehmen plant auch, seine Präsenz DACH Region auszubauen und in neue Märkte einzutreten.

Insgesamt steht die New Food Company für hochwertige, innovative und nachhaltige vegane Lebensmittelprodukte, die eine gesunde Ernährung unterstützen und dabei den Genuss nicht vernachlässigen.

Name: Wayanad's Indian Fine Robusta
Description:
As coffee drinkers get increasingly sophisticated in their search for the ideal cup of brew, Wayanad's Indian Fine Robusta aims to satisfy these tastebuds through our finest coffee products. An initiative of the Kerala Coffee Limited, a public sector company under the Government of Kerala, we strive to bring the highest quality coffee, grown sustainably and with uncompromised product safety to the world's table. With a focus on Wayanad, which has long been a focal point for coffee cultivation in Kerala, our efforts aim to enhance the region's rich coffee heritage by integrating innovative and sustainable agricultural practices with traditional wisdom.

Working closely with our farmers from all across Wayanad — small or big, men or women, and farmers from the tribal community (many of them 4th generation coffee farmers), we aim to integrate innovative and good agricultural practices to grow quality and speciality coffee. We focus primarily on Robusta Coffee, traditionally grown in Wayanad for generations. With superior resilience and higher caffeine content, the variety is quickly becoming popular worldwide for its ability to resist the effects of climate change.

Sustainability and biodiversity are ingrained in our brand identity as the Malabar Giant Squirrel in our logo affirms. Coffee farms of Wayanad resemble a forest in its biodiversity with shade trees of various varieties and different species of animals, birds, reptiles and plants making these farms their home. Traditionally grown in the shade in forested areas, our coffee has a more nuanced and delicate flavour profile, typical of shade-grown coffee varieties.

For a long time, Wayanad coffee has been considered a cheaper alternative to other coffee. But, with focused efforts, we strive to bring the highest quality coffee from Wayanad to the world. Take a sip of Wayanad's Indian Fine Robusta and immerse yourself in the flavours of a rich coffee with a deep tradition and culture behind it.

Trabajamos estrechamente con marcas líderes en la industria para garantizar que cada producto en nuestro catálogo cumpla con los más altos estándares de rendimiento, durabilidad y diseño innovador. Desde parrillas de última generación, accesorios especializados e instrucción de primer nivel, cada elemento de nuestra operación está diseñado para satisfacer las necesidades de los aficionados y profesionales del asado más exigentes.

En Parrilla Store, no solo ofrecemos productos, sino también una experiencia de compra única. Nuestro equipo está comprometido a brindar un servicio personalizado, asesorando a nuestros clientes para que encuentren la parrilla perfecta y los accesorios ideales que se adapten a sus preferencias y estilo de vida. Creemos que cada asado es una celebración, y queremos asegurarnos de que nuestros clientes tengan las herramientas adecuadas para crear momentos inolvidables alrededor de la parrilla.

Ya sea que sea un entusiasta del asado experimentado o un principiante ansioso por explorar este emocionante mundo, en Parrilla Store encontrará todo lo que necesita para elevar sus habilidades culinarias y llevar sus reuniones al aire libre al siguiente nivel.

Descubra la diferencia de Parrilla Store: calidad, innovación y pasión por el asado, todo en un solo lugar. Bienvenido/a a la revolución gourmet de las parrillas en Centroamérica.

Its smooth texture makes it perfect for garlic bread, pizza, meat, chicken, seafood, pork, or as a simple dip for chips and veggies.   Melt it down in a pan for delicious sautéed shrimp or vegetables and mix in with pasta or even mashed potatoes.  Your options are truly endless!

Our product is currently available in 12oz (TRENDING!) retail and 5lb commercial containers.  It holds a best by 90 days and is recommended to keep refrigerated.  (We find most customers consume the entire 12 oz in less than one week, IT’S THAT GOOD!)

- pour clients professionnels & horeca en tant que grossiste alimentaire sur notre site à Sourbrodt

La Boucherie-Charcuterie, est située à Robertville, à l’est de la Belgique, dans les ardennes belges.  Elle est entièrement dédiée au secteur privé. On vous y propose une large gamme de viandes, de volailles,  de charcuteries artisanales fabriquées par nos charcutiers spécialistes en la matière. Sur demande, toute une série de viandes spéciales sont également disponibles (Espagne, Argentine, Uruguay, ...).

Vous y trouverez également en saison une gamme complète de gibier régional, nos ateliers sont agréés aux normes européennes en vigueur.  

 

Dans notre magasin, nous avons sélectionné une série de produits d'épicerie fine, des produits locaux et un rayon frais (fromagerie, crémerie, fruits et légumes).

 

Le hall de préparation des viandes et de la charcuterie est également situé à Robertville, à proximité.  C’est là que sont effectuées toutes les découpes de viande, de charcuterie et de gibier, destinées à notre magasin, ainsi qu'aux professionnels de l'HORECA.

Le hall de produits de négoce, situé à Sourbrodt, est notre espace de stockage de produits secs, frais et surgelés.

C'est de cet endroit que partent les 7 camions en livraison du lundi au vendredi. Le service administratif est également situé à  Sourbrodt.

Notez que ces produits alimentaires sont également accessibles aux particuliers qui les commandent au préalable mais la livraison n’est pas assurée à domicile.

Description:
נועה שיווק היא חברת ההפצה המובילה בישראל במתן פתרונות לשוק המוסדי בענף המזון ומוצרי האריזה. החברה, שנוסדה לפני מעל ל-3 עשורים, צברה לעצמה שם ומוניטין שהולכים לפניה. נועה שיווק מציעה קטלוג רחב היקף עם למעלה מ-3,000 פריטים ומתגאה במניפת מוצרים איכותיים מכל המותגים המובילים בעולם אשר מתעדכנת בקביעות. במקביל להפצת מוצרי מזון, נועה שיווק מספקת שירותים משלימים כמו ייעוץ קולינארי, ליווי צמוד, הצעות מחיר מסודרות לקניינים, שינוע לאזורים שונים בצפון ובמרכז ועוד. נועה שיווק מציעה ללקוחותיה שירותי אספקה איכותיים כתוצאה מגב כלכלי איתן, דיגיטציה מלאה של כל מערכות הלוגיסטיקה וגמישות תפעולית המבוססת על ניסיון, יחס אישי וכוח אדם איכותי.

הקטלוג של נועה שיווק כולל מוצרי מזון קפואים ומצוננים, פירות יבשים, מוצרי מזון אתניים, שימורים, חטיפים, חומרי גלם, חומרי קונדיטוריה, מוצרי פלסטיק, כלים חד פעמיים, אריזות טייק-אווי (TA), שקיות, תבלינים ועוד. החברה מעניקה שירות למגוון גדול של לקוחות – החל מארגונים גדולים ועד ללקוחות קטנים ומספקת לכולם כאחד שירות מעולה ומקצועי בכל רגע נתון.

Vi ved, at smag betyder alt – uanset om du driver café, restaurant, hotel, cateringvirksomhed eller eventbureau. Derfor leverer vi altid:

- Friske varer med lang holdbarhed
- Fleksible leveringsaftaler (dag-til-dag i Storkøbenhavn + hele DK)
- Konkurrencedygtige priser uden at gå på kompromis med kvaliteten

Kon Import er mere end en leverandør – vi er din garanti for, at gæsterne altid får en smagsoplevelse ud over det sædvanlige.

Vil du have et uforpligtende tilbud eller se hele kataloget?

Name: Royal Nyborg Smokehouse
Description:
Dry aged cold smoked salmon 
Handcrafted Sophisticated Simplicity 
humbly presented to you by Chef John Taylor

 Taking the plunge with dry aging land-based salmon for over 2 and a half years now has been quite the journey. Initially, it might seem like an unconventional choice, especially with the lengthy 10-day process it takes to produce just one side of salmon. But let me tell you, every moment spent diving into this method has been worth it.

I stumbled upon dry aging out of sheer chance and necessity. With the erratic harvesting schedule during the expansion phase of the Danish salmon farm, uncertainty was the norm. Starting a business amidst such turbulent times felt like navigating through a storm, with each wave threatening disaster. But amidst the chaos, innovation emerged.

Dry aging became our beacon of hope, a method born out of necessity and molded by innovation. It offered stability in an unpredictable environment, transforming challenges into opportunities. The process, though time-consuming, yields results that speak for themselves—enhanced flavor, improved texture, and extended shelf life.

Sure, it's been a journey filled with ups and downs, but isn't that what makes success all the sweeter? The dedication and perseverance invested in perfecting this craft have paid off in ways beyond measure. It's not just about producing salmon; it's about pushing boundaries, exploring new horizons, and redefining what's possible in the world of seafood.

So, why go to such lengths? Because in the depths of uncertainty, we found a path illuminated by innovation. And with each perfectly aged side of salmon, we're reminded that sometimes, the most rewarding journeys are the ones that require us to dive a little deeper.

Name: Zen Ridge Farm — Vegan Friendly Cannabis
Description:
Did you know cannabis isn’t automatically vegan? Because animal products like bone, blood, and fish meal are so often used as fertilizers. In fact, if it’s sold as organic, cannabis is almost certainly NOT vegan. 

We choose to be 100% vegan and pesticide-free. The only thing we spray on our plants is electrolyzed salt water. That’s it. Our cannabis is grown with love and sunshine in Humboldt, California.

- Pionir u proizvodnji i lider u kategoriji, kao i na tržištu
- Vrhunski kvaliteti
- Geografsko poreklo - tradicija proizvodnje
- Inovativnost i održivost proizvodnje

Naš lični izbor su prirodni i ekološki proizvodi, jer su bogati vitaminima i mineralima, doprinose visokom kvalitetu života, zdravlju, a osim toga odlikuje ih izvrsnost i bogatstvo ukusa. Povrh toga, proizvođači prirodnih i ekoloških proizvoda aktivno brinu o zaštiti prirode i razvoju zajednice i poštuju i podstiču raznolikosti (kako bi se održala prirodna ravnoteža). Name: Staga bevande
Description: Staga è un'azienda di distribuzione bevande a conduzione famigliare nata a Milano nel 1966 per opera di Silvio Tominetti già collaboratore dal 1942 e poi dirigente della società Saga detentrice dei marchi Levissima, Oransoda, Lemonsoda. Dopo l'ingresso dei figli, l'azienda consolida il rapporto con il gruppo Nestlè attraverso San pellegrino, Pejo, San Bernardo e Levissima e diventa un punto di riferimento per la crescente cucina orientale fornendo a centinaia di ristoratori giapponesi e cinesi marchi come Asahi, Kirin e Sapporo. Nel 2006 Staga si espande con l'acquisizione di un’azienda del settore ed il trasferimento a San Giuliano Milanese in un'area di circa 2500 mq. Negli ultimi anni, la sensibilizzazione verso rispetto ambientale, alimentazione biologica e commercio equo solidale porta la terza generazione a stringere collaborazioni con aziende impegnate in queste missioni come Charitea-Lemonaid, Wami, Molecola

Name: Teja Food Group
Description:
At Teja Food Group, we’re more than a supplier. We’re a trusted partner in food innovation, reliability, and growth. What began in 1992 as a small commissary kitchen supporting regional multi-unit accounts has evolved into a diverse and fast-growing Canadian food company with a portfolio of leading brands and a passion for pushing the industry forward.

We strive every day to deliver real value through quality products, consistent service, and peace of mind. Our partners count on us for excellence at every step, from sourcing to logistics, because we show up with integrity, precision, and care.

Through strategic growth and smart acquisitions, we’ve expanded far beyond our original kitchen. Today, Teja Food Group includes brands like Cedar Bay Grilling (seasoned salmon planks), Echelon Foods (the iconic Turducken), The Backyard Boil (all in one seafood kits), and Canadian Trade House (convenience store). Each brand reflects our commitment to culinary creativity and operational execution at the store level. 

Whether we’re supporting a national retailer, convenience chain, or launching a new innovative product for food service, we act as true partners. We listen, solve problems, and go the extra mile. We don’t just follow trends. We help set them.

Backed by decades of experience, our team brings deep industry knowledge without the ego. We communicate clearly, move quickly, and share honest insights that make a difference. No jargon. No fluff. Just thoughtful, straightforward support.

Above all, we care. About our food. About our partners. About our people and the communities, we serve. That commitment runs through everything we do and always will.

Name: Solymontes
Description: Solymontes is a brand that brings fresh produce directly from harvest/production to the table of the end consumer. We source local healthy products and through a preorder system give producers and farmers orders before they harvest or produce. Solymontes respects all stakeholders and is changing how business is done. We are an intentional, holistic heart centered company. Our mission is to bring more health and happiness into the world. Our flagship product is an extra virgin, early harvest, unfiltered olive oil that is grown and produced in the mountains of Ardales.

Name: Proper Syrup
Description:
With decades in the coffee industry, we hated the bad rap syrups got. Why spend so much time, effort and care sourcing incredible varietals, articulating profiles, and dialing in the perfect extraction to pour mediocre syrup in it? It doesn’t make sense.  

 

As an industry, we figured it out for alternative milks and now they’re genuinely delicious and actually complement our coffee. So why not syrups?

 

That’s why we created Proper—a truly natural syrup that doesn’t sacrifice taste, texture, or integrity. We proudly make Proper from real, organic ingredients and have specifically tailored our recipe to support the unique flavor profile of specialty coffee. Whether it’s espresso, cappuccino, a latte, pour over, or some out there varietal from who knows where, we’re here to do our part in making sure your syrup never sucks.

Name: GULF ORGANIC FOOD

Our production and packing hub in Dubai manufactures and customizes organic nuts, seeds, pulses, snacks, beverages, and daily essentials, including plant-based and gluten-free ranges. We offer private label solutions, flexible formats, fast time-to-market, and strict quality control.

International Brand Market Entry & Distribution

We support international organic and clean-label brands entering and scaling in the GCC through exclusive representation, listing and go-to-market strategy, regulatory and logistics support, and access to key retail, HORECA, airline, and institutional networks.

Brand Building & Commercial Acceleration

Driven by a strong clean-label commitment—organic, fair trade, sustainable, and free from unnecessary additives—we build brands that deliver trustworthy, high-quality food to consumers across the Gulf.

Description:
Le groupe TERROIRS FROMAGERS : nous sommes spécialistes du fromage, distributeur des marques XAVIER et FROMAGES DE COCAGNE. Nous sommes implantés au cœur du ventre de l’Occitanie, au grand marché de TOULOUSE.
 
XAVIER : #B2B #B2C
Nous sommes des passionnés du monde fromager qui ont à cœur de vous faire découvrir le vrai goût des fromages, exclusivement fabriqués à base de lait cru de vache, de brebis ou de chèvre.
Notre entreprise familiale est engagée aux côtés de ses fabricants, artisans du goût, qui mieux que personne expriment l’authenticité de leurs terroirs au travers de leurs fromages.
Nous sommes des professionnels, motivés par la qualité et la convivialité, quêtes "affinées" au cours de nos 46 ans d’histoire.
Site web https://xavier.fr/ 
Nos boutiques : https://xavier.fr/fr/La-Fromagerie/article/Contacts-Horaires 
 
FROMAGES DE COCAGNE : #B2B
Premier grossiste à valoriser la diversité du SUD-OUEST. 
L’équipe fondatrice de Fromages de Cocagne, soutenue et conseillée par François Bourgon, Meilleur Ouvrier de France, aspire à élever le métier de grossiste au rang de militant. 
Fromages de Cocagne c’est un engagement. Celui de défendre la diversité des productions paysannes du Sud-Ouest face à la standardisation.
En pérennisant l’activité de producteurs installés et en dénichant les créateurs audacieux, Fromages de Cocagne prend à cœur son rôle dans l’écosystème rural. Nous ne faisons pas non plus l’impasse sur la saisonnalité ! Il est important de respecter le rythme naturel des animaux pour obtenir des fromages de qualité.
Nos engagements passent par l’achat à prix équitable et par une transparence totale sur la provenance, la composition et la méthode de fabrication de nos produits.
Fromages de Cocagne c’est une large gamme de produits authentiques et originaux :  Nos fromages ont tous une histoire.

Nuestro enfoque es simple: del campo al almacén del cliente, sin intermediarios y con absoluta transparencia.

 Lo que hacemos en Delicious Land

Importación directa de fruta fresca premium (México y Latam → Europa).
Coordinación logística completa (aéreo y marítimo).
Control de calidad en finca y en destino.
Gestión de proveedores certificados GlobalG.A.P. y con estándares europeos.
Desarrollo de relaciones comerciales con mayoristas, distribuidores y Horeca.
Planificación de programas de suministro estables y de temporada.

 Productos destacados
Mango (Ataulfo, Kent, Tommy, Haden)
Lima Persa (aérea premium)
Aguacate Hass (convencional y bio)
Piña Miel
Yaca / Jackfruit
Lychee, rambután, mangostán
Frutas berries: fresa, frambuesa, zarzamora
Otros tropicales según temporada

 Nuestra misión
Posicionar la fruta mexicana y latinoamericana en Europa como una alternativa premium, segura, sostenible y competitiva, conectando fincas responsables con compradores profesionales que buscan fiabilidad y calidad real.

 Si eres mayorista, importador o distribuidor, conectemos.
Delicious Land: frescura, seriedad y suministro continuo.

Conéctanos para conocer más sobre nuestras soluciones para el sector HORECA y cadenas de suministro: a.alcalde@deliciousland.eu

Name: KATOLIK GROUP
Description:
Zajmujemy się bezpośrednim importem oraz dystrybucją dodatków dla piekarnictwa i cukiernictwa. Naszymi głównymi odbiorcami są firmy zajmujące się handlem detalicznym, przetwórstwem oraz konfekcjonowaniem, które znajdą u nas ofertę idealnie dostosowaną do swoich potrzeb.

Odbiorcami naszych produktów i surowców są duże sieci handlowe, hurtownie, zakłady przemysłu spożywczego oraz specjalistyczne hurtownie branży piekarniczej, cukierniczej i gastronomicznej.

Jesteśmy młodym zespołem, ludźmi z pasją, wiedzą i ambicjami. Śledzimy bieżące trendy rynkowe, a także poszukujemy nowych rozwiązań oraz produktów. Duże doświadczenie, pozytywna energia oraz wysoka jakość surowców są podstawą zaufania naszych Klientów.

Największą satysfakcję daje nam zadowolenie Klienta, które uzyskujemy dzięki dobrej organizacji naszej pracy, elastyczności, terminowości oraz najwyższej jakości świadczonych usług oraz dostarczanych produktów.

Dzięki intensywnej rozbudowie powierzchni składowania, wysokim standardom przechowywania, przestrzeganiu surowych norm jakościowych, wyborze tylko sprawdzonych dostawców oraz wykwalifikowanej załodze możemy zapewnić, że właściwości spożywcze naszych produktów stoją na najwyższym poziomie. Posiadamy wdrożony system zarządzania jakością zgodny z normą ISO 22000:2005.

Nasze doświadczenie oparte na wieloletniej praktyce w handlu pozwala nam na utrzymywanie się w czołówce polskich przedsiębiorstw tego sektora. W 2016 roku zajęliśmy I miejsce w konkursie Diamentów Forbesa w kategorii średnich przedsiębiorstw.

Naszą misją jest dostarczanie żywności najwyższej jakości mającej korzystny wpływ na zdrowie i samopoczucie, a także rozwijanie długoterminowych, uczciwych relacji z naszymi partnerami poprzez indywidualne i profesjonalne podejście do każdego z nich.

Wszystkich zainteresowanych naszymi produktami prosimy o kontakt telefoniczny lub e-mailowy. Zachęcamy również do odwiedzenia naszej siedziby w Kietrzu oraz do oddziału w Obornikach Śląskich.

Description:
Cardo è una startup specializzata nella formulazione e commercializzazione di prodotti alimentari funzionali e adatti a stili alimentari chetogenici, low carb, senza zucchero, senza lattosio grazie alla dott.ssa Anastasia Fermo nutrizionista. Veicoliamo i nostri prodotti nello store di Bologna, nei negozi Naturasì e sullo shop online.

Rendiamo felici anche: diabetici, intolleranti al lattosio e intolleranti al glutine. 

Nel nostro Ristobar di Bologna troveri un vero e proprio ristorante chetogenico nel quale proponiamo piatti keto, vegan,  dolci senza zucchero, high protein, senza glutine, senza lattosio per vivere in salute e più a lungo attraverso lo stile di vita.

Tutti gli ingredienti sono attentamente selezionati, di stagione e perfettamente bilanciati. Il nostro progetto nasce dal sogno di promuovere e divulgare i principi alla base della sana alimentazione, rivolgendoci a grandi e piccini.

Il messaggio che vogliamo diffondere è come attraverso scelte consapevoli possiamo godere del cibo senza rinunciare al gusto per vivere meglio e più a lungo.

Description:
Andafish S.L. es una empresa especializada en la importación, procesado y distribución de productos del mar. Trabajamos con una red global de proveedores, garantizando una cadena de suministro eficiente y trazable desde el origen hasta el cliente final.

Nuestro compromiso con la calidad, la seguridad alimentaria y la logística de frío nos permite ofrecer soluciones adaptadas a empresas del canal HORECA, mayoristas y distribuidores nacionales e internacionales.

Con base en España, gestionamos cada fase del proceso: desde la entrada del contenedor en puerto, el paso por frigoríficos especializados, el procesamiento en fábrica, hasta la entrega puntual en todo el país y Europa.

 Productos del mar

 Seguridad y trazabilidad

Name: Ceasa Mais
Description:
O Ceasa Mais é o marketplace oficial do Ceasa Pernambuco, criado para transformar a forma como o setor alimentício negocia.  Conectamos fornecedores e compradores em um ambiente digital seguro, ágil e transparente, com cotações diárias que garantem preços justos e fortalecem toda a cadeia produtiva.

Nossa operação inclui logística própria, assegurando que produtos cheguem com qualidade e frescor até o destino final com muito mais agilidade, eficiência, economia e educação de custos operacionais. 

Mais do que uma plataforma, o Ceasa Mais é um ecossistema de inovação que aproxima o campo do mercado, impulsionando negócios e fortalecendo a economia do setor em Pernambuco.

 Conheça essa nova forma de comprar e vender hortifruti.

Name: Gaia International S.A.S.
Description:
We wish to provide fruit and vegetable growers and everyone else involved in the process with an enhanced livelihood as a result of fair and ethical farming and trade in fresh produce. 
Our European nucleus is based in the South of France, where our sales, procurement, and finance teams are based. Our warehouses are based in The Netherlands, the home of our independent logistics hub which has the ability to load mixed trucks of produce throughout Europe on a daily basis, including our core range of sweet potatoes, Persian limes, avocados, brown coconuts,  passion fruit, ginger and mangoes.

Name: L'ARÔME Coffee Trading Company
Description:
Welcome to L'ARÔME ! We are a leading distributor of exceptional aromatized coffee, offering an exquisite range of aromatic blends from Ethiopia, that will tantalize your taste buds and elevate your coffee experience to new heights. With a passion for quality and a commitment to innovation, we have been delighting coffee lovers around the world. 

At L'ARÔME, we believe that coffee is more than just a beverage; it is an art form. We meticulously select the finest 100% Arabica coffee beans from single origin coffee-growing region in Ethiopia. Our beans are carefully mid-roasted to perfection, ensuring that each cup of L'ARÔME coffee delivers a rich, full-bodied flavor with a delightful aroma. 

We take pride in using only the highest quality natural oils to infuse our coffees with captivating flavors. Our European flavorists carefully source and blend natural extracts from fruits, spices, and other botanicals, ensuring that every sip of our flavored coffee is a harmonious symphony of taste and aroma. By relying on natural oils, we create an authentic and satisfying coffee experience that will transport you to a world of delightful flavors with each sip. Enjoy the pure essence of nature in every cup of L'ARÔME aromatized coffee.

Name: CARLA ÉPICES ET ASSAISONNEMENTS
Description:
Depuis plus de 60 ans, la société CARLA, spécialisée dans la fabrication d'épices simples et composées, sert les professionnels des métiers de la bouche. 
Installée en Alsace à La Claquette, notre équipe élabore, mélange, conditionne et distribue nos produits dans toute la France et en Europe.

Notre activité est d'offrir à notre clientèle de professionnels, une gamme complète de mélanges d'épices et d'additifs simples ou complets, adaptée à leurs demande. Nous pouvons, grâce a notre service recherche et développement les accompagner dans l'élaboration de nouveaux produits.
Depuis 2017 nous proposons également à nos clients professionnels et particuliers une large gamme de produits BIO.

La toque de grand-mère est la marque de nos produits de qualité professionnelle que nous mettons au service de tous les ménages depuis 2004.

Fini ! Vous ne vous retrouverez plus jamais seul face à un rayon impersonnel d’épices au supermarché, nous vous faisons sentir, goûter et vous donnons pleins d’idées recettes.

Mais comment ? Plus d’une centaine de conseillères et de conseillers sont là, pour vous, chez vous pour un moment plus que convivial ! Dégustations, partage, et conseils !

Description:
Ualà è cura e passione nella scelta di ingredienti freschi, capaci di garantire un gusto intenso e autentico e di esaltare le caratteristiche naturali di ciascun alimento.

Carni tenere e pesce freschissimi esaltano i piatti e contribuiscono a una cucina sana e sostenibile, promuovendo il consumo di prodotti locali e riducendo l’impatto ambientale.

Le erbe aromatiche locali connotano di profumi inconfondibili ogni pietanza e i formaggi di alta qualità assicurano un equilibrio di sapori e una consistenza unica e cremosa.

Name: Davipan Distribuidora

Name: Bioinagro Società agricola srl
Description:
Bioinagro is a startup foundend in 2017 as a limited liability agricultural company.
The company operates in agriculture through innovation in the Bioeconomy and Green Chemistry fields to give value to the high-valued agricultural biomass and production in Sicily in technical applications with a high content of technology and innovation in the food, pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, cosmetic fields.

Bioinagro was born as part of a multi-year financing project, Promimprese's 'Slow-Farm' call, aimed at establishing - with its own funds - a portfolio of entrepreneurial activities in emerging sectors with a high innovation content, with a strong impact on the civil society, and high economic potential.

Through Bioinagro, the over ten-year activity of Promimprese continues, aimed at the enhancement of Sicilian agricultural biomass in technical applications with a high content of technology and innovation with high added value in the food, pharmaceutical, nutraceutical, and cosmetic fields.

Name: Niram Group LLC
Description:
"Niram Group" şirkəti 2019-cu ildə fəaliyyətə başlayıb. Qida sənayesi üçün yüksək keyfiyyətli xammalın idxalçısı və topdançısı kimi fəaliyyət göstərir. Şirkət rəhbərliyinin təchizat, qida və topdansatış sahəsində 30 ildən artıq təcrübəsi və peşəkar komandamız əsasında, biz tez bir zamanda müştərilərimizin etimadını qazandıq və bizə olan etimada görə minnətdarlığımızı bildiririk.

“Niram Group” idxal etdiyi xammal məhsullar: limon duzu, kakao tozu, çay sodası, ammonium duzu və digər müxtəlif qida əlavələri daxildir. Bizim qida xammalı seçimimiz daxili bazarın tələblərini ödəmək üçün davamlı olaraq inkişaf edir.

Niyə “Niram Group”? Cavabı çox sadə: idxalcı oldugumuzdan ən sərfəli qiymətlər, yüksək keyfiyyətli məhsullar, geniş təcrübə və peşəkar müştəri xidməti təklif edirik. 

Diqqətiniz üçün təşəkkür edirik!

Our expertise spans the complete digital ecosystem, including advanced SEO and SEM, targeted social media campaigns, high-impact content creation, and innovative web development. We don't just execute campaigns; we architect comprehensive digital journeys that transform fleeting impressions into loyal customer relationships.

Partner with Quantum Reach to unlock your brand's true potential. We bring clarity to complexity and ensure your digital footprint is not only vast but also deeply resonant—guaranteeing your message reaches the right audience at the perfect moment, driving sustainable growth and market leadership.

Description:
GREYYS is a fast-growing distribution company specialising in importing premium food and beverage products to fulfil the high expectations of HORECA (hotel, restaurant, café) customers in Singapore. 

We are proud to offer our clients the widest line of specially curated high-quality beverage ingredients from leading international brands in the market including Ronnefeldt Tea, Chocolaterie Monbana and Cafés Richard.

GREYYS does not only sell products. We are also a one-stop solution provider which offers quality and sustainable end-to-end solutions to help our F&B clients drive growth through product innovation and new drinks implementation. 

Our beverage experience is strengthened by our collaborative efforts with internationally-experienced baristas and bartenders to continually offer trendy and innovative beverage solutions. 

By using our own logistics capabilities and resources, we are able to optimise our supply chain and offer a fast and reliable delivery service (within 24 hours) to consistently meet our customers' expectations. 

The GREYYS team is dedicated to and focused on building customer satisfaction and striving to maintain the highest standards of excellence. Because here at GREYYS, we believe that "distribution shall always come with service." 

For any queries or for more information, please do not hesitate to contact us at admin@greyys.com.sg / +65 6450 3164

Our specific experience is mobiling, and we are continually researching the market to ensure that we stay at the forefront of this sector of our industry.

Name: Delizie di Matilde S.r.l.
Description:
Delizie di Matilde è sinonimo di passione infinita per i prodotti tipici della zona di Reggio Emilia con importante focus sulle specialità delle Terre Matildiche, territorio dell’Appennino Reggiano in cui visse e regnò la Duchessa Matilde di Canossa a cavallo del XI-XII secolo.
Il nostro Modello di Business pone particolare attenzione al benessere dei nostri animali allevati senza l’utilizzo di antibiotici, all'alimentazione totalmente naturale ed alla costruzione di una filiera pregiata che dia risalto alle produzioni locali di elevata qualità e storicità.
L’Azienda trova le sue origini nell’allevamento del maiale nero allo stato brado e nella lavorazione della carne, fatta ancora esclusivamente in modo artigianale.
Le ricette utilizzate sono espressione di una tradizione culinaria che si tramanda da secoli nella zona Emiliana.

Name: Rack Shack BBQ Sauces
Description:
We are determined to delight every backyard pitmaster with our sauces and rubs. Get that Rack Shack fresh barbecue excellence in your own home. Find the sauces online or at your favorite grocery.

Rack Shack BBQ is award winning Southern Style Barbeque. Featured on Man vs. Food, Ranked in the Top 50 on Travel Channel's "101 Best Places to Chow-Down in America", Voted Best BBQ by KARE 11 Fans, and more!

Our focus is always on the food using our very own secret family recipes, our own special rub mix of 17 herbs and spices, and serving our own 8 hand crafted signature sauces. 

Get your BBQ fix today at the Rack Shack BBQ or let us make your event special with Rack Shack BBQ Catering!

Stop in and pull up a chair. We would love to get to know you. Or drop us a note on facebook. Either way, we look forward to seeing you here at Rack Shack BBQ face deep in a Nice Rack of fresh, meaty, St. Louis style pork ribs. We are working hard on being your favorite Twin Cities BBQ!

Name: Eetgemak

Bij Eetgemak maken we elke dag het verschil met verse gerechten op maat voor zorginstellingen. Voor ons is een maaltijd meer dan voeding: het is een moment van aandacht, herkenning en verbinding.

Met ruim 12.000 recepten en een ervaren team van koks, adviseurs en chauffeurs leveren we dagelijks gerechten die aansluiten bij de wensen, diëten en culturen van bewoners en cliënten. Van complete menucycli tot individuele maaltijdcomponenten: alles wordt met zorg samengesteld en dagvers bereid.

We werken nauw samen met zorgteams en facilitaire afdelingen om menu’s en processen te ontwikkelen die écht passen bij de locatie en de mensen die er wonen of verblijven. Betrouwbaarheid, maatwerk en een foutloos logistiek proces zijn daarbij onze basis.

Zo zorgen we ervoor dat iedereen mee kan eten – elke dag opnieuw.

İnterga Europa olarak ;
Hamburg / ALMANYA merkezli olup, FMCG sektöründe faaliyet gösteren satış pazarlama ve dağıtım şirketiyiz.

FMCG sektöründe kalite standardı yüksek, lider, Türk ve Global markaların ana tedarikçisi olarak satış , pazarlama ve dağıtımını yapmaktayız.

Faaliyet göstermiş olduğumuz 6 Avrupa ülkesindeki bölge bayisi iş ortaklarımız ile birlikte etnik marketler, global frenchıse marketler , global zincir marketler , global gıda dışı zincir mağazalar , gastronomi noktaları , toptancı , cash & cary ve perakende noktalarından oluşan 3.000’i dolaylı olmak üzere 5.000’e yakın müşterimize 2.000’in üzerinde ürün çeşidi ile hizmet vermekteyiz.

Avrupa Ana Distribütörlüğünü yapmış olduğumuz Türkiye'nin en büyük Gıda ve Gıda dışı üretici iş ortaklarımız arasındadır.

Tüm bunlarla beraber gıda ve gıda dışı portföyümüzü de hızla büyütmekteyiz.
Gerek pazardaki büyüklüğü gerekse sahip olduğu bilgi ve tecrübesiyle bize ve sahadaki iş ortaklarımıza değer katacak yeni üretici iş ortaklıklarıyla da portföyümüzü büyütmeye devam edeceğiz.

İş ortaklarımızın güven duyduğu, tüm paydaşlarımızın kazandığı, ekibimizin mutlu olduğu, bir şirket olmayı hedefliyoruz.

İnterga Europa ; alt yapısına yatırım yaparak , sürekli yenilikçi kalarak , değişime ayak uydurarak , gelişen ve büyüyen pazarlarda yatırım yapmaya devam edecek.

Amacımız ; gerek üretici gerek sahadaki iş ortaklarımızın ve müşterilerimizin işlerini büyüterek onlarla daha büyük iş sonucu ve başarıların altına birlikte imza atmak.

Ana felsefemiz ;

Name: Fedele Import & Export AB
Description:
Fedele Import & Export är en specialiserad importör av premium italienska livsmedel och viner. Vi är dedikerade till att leverera de mest autentiska smakerna – direkt från Italiens mest respekterade hantverksproducenter till Sveriges hotell- och restaurangbransch.

Vårt uppdrag är enkelt:

Att vara er pålitliga italienska partner och föra samman ert kök med generationer av tradition och hantverk.
"Styrkan sitter i kärleken till råvaran" – det är vår filosofi och grunden för allt vi gör.

Vi har jobbat i ledande exekutiva positioner inom hotelldrift, krogar samt kulinariska event runt världens hörn.

Vi har varit  bosatta och verkat i olika världsdelar, men det är just i Italien som vi känner oss hemma. Råvarorna är enkla, men ärliga. Människorna är stolta, passionerade och drivande i generationer, där familjen och gamla värderingar samt respekten för naturen och landskapet ligger i fokus.

Här sätter vi en adress på produkterna samt personifierar familjerna bakom. Allt för att kunna berätta varje unik historia bakom varje produkt. För att berika och ge en annan dimension i smakerna.

Name: Agromediterranea Group
Description:
L'Agro Mediterranea Distribuzione S.r.l. “A.M.D. S.r.l.” è stata costituita dai soci Filippo Frongia e Andrea Manca con lo scopo di creare una società specializzata nella fornitura alla G.D.O. di prodotti ortofrutticoli, nella fattispecie carciofi, pomodori, asparagi, angurie e meloni referenze principali della produzione ortofrutticola sarda. La nostra missione è quella di soddisfare al meglio le aspettative dei nostri clienti e dei consumatori finali.

Per questo motivo adottiamo un sistema di controllo continuo e costante di tutte le principali attività della nostra filiera, garantendo la qualità dei nostri prodotti dai campi al passaggio in piattaforma e fino alla tavola. Offriamo ai nostri clienti un servizio che comprende uno studio e un aggiornamento continuo delle tecniche di coltivazione/produzione e un sistema di gestione dei reparti ortofrutta all'avanguardia.

La nostra azienda è munita di tutta la documentazione che attesta la tracciabilità del prodotto dal seme al consumatore finale (dalla produzione alla consegna):

1. Seme (casa sementiera)
2. Vivaio (certificato global gap – grasp) “Vivaio Peterle GGN 4052852910354”
3. Azianda agricola (certificata global gap – grasp) “Sapore Sardo società semplice agricola GGN 4063061589866”
4. Flussi di magazzino (certificati ifs food)
5. Logistica (certificato ifs logistics)

Name: EUROFOOD LUXEMBOURG
Description:
Depuis 1976, EUROFOOD a su conquérir une place dominante dans le commerce de gros et la distribution de produits alimentaires pour l’HORECA en sec, frais et surgelé, avec une spécialisation en produits italiens.
Disposant de plus de 4000m2 de surface de stockage, nous desservons à travers tout le pays et la grande région, une clientèle diversifiée d’hôteliers, de restaurateurs, de cafetiers, de revendeurs, grandes surfaces et diverses collectivités.

La majeure partie des secrets d’une « belle table italienne » s’étale dans les rayons de nos entrepôts, avec une dominante : le café. Eurofood détient en effet l’exclusivité du café LAVAZZA pour le Grand-Duché. D’autres fameux labels ont également été sélectionnés témoignant du haut de gamme des produits commercialisés : DE CECCO et DIVELLA pour les pâtes, CAPUTO pour la farine , ROSSO GARGANO pour les tomates pelées, sans oublier les pâtes SURGITAL et les glaces artisanales CALLIPO et les légumes OROGEL pour les produits surgelés…

Eurofood, c’est aussi les produits frais, charcuteries et fromages notamment, toujours avec l’Italie comme principal fournisseur. Vous trouverez ainsi de délicieux jambons (Parme, San Daniele, mec…), des pâtes fraîches, des antipasti, du saumon, des articles crémiers avec une belle gamme de mozzarella, ingrédient indispensable à la réussite d’une bonne pizza...
Vous retrouverez les marques incontournables : ROVAGNATI et LA FELINESE pour la charcuterie et les jambons italiens, LATTERIA  SORRENTINA  et ZANETTI pour les fromages et la crèmerie, ainsi que FONTANETO pour les pâtes fraîches...

En résumé, Eurofood, c’est :
     LES PRODUITS :  frais, secs et surgelés sûrs et innovants,
     LES SERVICES : proximité, rapidité, simplicité, efficacité
     L’ ÉCOUTE ET LE SUIVI DE VOS BESOINS
     L’ ENGAGEMENT FORT DE SERVICE

*La société EUROVIN spécialisée dans les vins italiens fait partie du groupe Eurofood et dispose de plus de 1000 réf. ...contactez-nous!

Name: Morozoff
Description:
Компания Morozoff – крупнейший разработчик и поставщик новогодних подарков, бизнес сувениров, корпоративных подарков и подарочной упаковки. С 2011 года мы дарим праздничное настроение более 5000 корпоративным клиентам на территории Беларуси.

Чем мы занимаемся? 

За 11 лет успешной работы мы стали не только лидерами белорусского рынка, но и первой коммерческой компанией из Беларуси, которая 6 лет назад вышла на российский рынок и развивается на нем. Это напрямую говорит о том, что наша команда растет, не только количественно, а так же повышает качество продукции и сервис, чтобы каждый клиент остался доволен. Нам очень важно мнение людей, с которыми мы работаем . Ведь в праздник должно происходить хоть маленькое, но чудо. И мы хотим, чтобы наши подарки и сувениры справлялись с задачей создавать то самое волшебное настроение. Именно поэтому нам доверяют крупные предприятия Беларуси: Белоруснефть, Белтелеком, Белпочта, БелМедПрепараты, Аптека Групп, БЧ, МИНГАЗ, Александрийское, БелАлко, Грант, Виталюр, Гиппо, APS, Jenti, Belavia, Conte, Белагропромбанк, Альфа-Банк, БелВеб, БПС-сбербанк, Gefest и др.
"Бизнес- подарки" - это 11 лет успешной работы территории Беларуси, России и Казахстана, более 5000 клиентов, более 3.500.000 проданных подарков.

Name: Grupo Venier
Description:
Distribuidora Venier SRL nace en el año 1994, con la distribución de Cerveza Quilmes para la ciudad de Casilda, atendiendo
alrededor de 250 puntos de venta y un volumen de 3000 hectolitros anuales. Para ese servicio se empleaban un total de 9 empleados y dos camiones de reparto.

Paulatinamente se fueron incorporando localidades hasta llegar el año 2003, se incorporan localidades de la ruta 9 y la Distribuidora llega a atender más de 35 con un total de más de 200.000 habitantes. También se agregan las categorías de gaseosas, aguas e isotónicas de la mano de Pepsi y las marcas seven up, mirinda, paso de los toros y gatorade. Esto va acompañado con la adquisición de un nuevo depósito con más de 3000 m de nave cubierta y 400 metros de oficinas administrativas y comerciales, una flota de ocho camiones de reparto y dos auto elevadores 0 km. La dotación acompaña este proceso y se ocupan en forma directa e indirecta más de sesenta personas.

En el año 2022 podemos decir, con gran orgullo, que somos la primera distribuidora de la región litoral de Cervecería y Malteria Quilmes, que incluye las provincias de Santa Fe, Entre Ríos y norte de la provincia de Buenos Aires.
Que hemos sido reconocidos por la compañía a través del programa de calidad comercial Galaxia Q en diversas oportunidades, llegando a ser designado embajador de la compañía desde el año 2016 hasta la actualidad.
Que prestamos un servicio de calidad, para lo cual contamos con depósitos de óptimas condiciones, una flota de camiones de menos de cinco años de antigüedad, equipos para movimiento de mercadería con las últimas tecnologías y cuidado del medio ambiente, pero sobre todo con el mejor equipo de gente, capacitado permanentemente para lograr un continuo crecimiento.

Name: Salvador Coffee Roasters
Description:
From humble beginnings, we explored the world to find the best coffee. We brought our coffee cultivation and roasting knowledge to Australia to pursue our passion. Salvador Coffee now roasts some of the finest coffee on our continent.

From The Beginning
Pioneered by a confessed perfectionist, Marcio Brito has travelled the world to exotic places in search of fantastic coffee. Following years of roasting, blending, cupping and tasting, Salvador Coffee was born, bringing the finest single origin and blends around the world to Australia. The craft of making extraordinary coffee lives throughout Salvador Coffee’s roasting and blending process. This has led to coffee beans finding themselves in some of the best café, coffee shops and restaurants around Australia.

Name: EU Cluster for Food Traceability and Trust
Description:
In February 2024, we launched a bold initiative to reshape the European Union’s food supply chains—driven by innovation, sustainability, and trust.

Our journey began with three flagship projects—THEROS, ALLIANCE, and WATSON—focused on addressing critical issues in food safety, traceability, and fraud prevention.

As momentum grew, the cluster expanded to include ten additional pioneering projects:
FishEUtrust, SEA2SEE, CUES, TEALHELIX, TITAN, FOODGUARD, ROSETTA, INFOODMATION, DRG4FOOD, and EFF-CoP.

Together, this dynamic ecosystem harnesses cutting-edge technologies, cross-sector collaboration, and policy alignment to build food systems that are resilient, transparent, and trustworthy—ensuring a healthier, safer future for all EU citizens.

 Join us in driving the future of food in Europe.

Name: BEV CEYLON (Pvt) Ltd.
Description:
about us

We believe the first step to health and wellness lies in the raw goodness of fresh produce. With documented historical evidence and a wealth of home-remedies handed down over 2000 years, we found that plants endemic to the tropics of Sri Lanka have the potential to curb and reverse the rise of non-communicable diseases, such as diabetes and hypertension, which are on the rise due to the consumption of artificial and sugar added beverages. Thus, BEV Ceylon was born. Teaming up with a several Sri Lankan Universities, the Sri Lanka National Medical Research Institute and the Coconut
Research Institute, we are constantly working towards unlocking the truth, science and potential behind these endemic plants. To extract and protect the maximum the fruit has to offer, we use
processes certified by global institutions all the way through from the plucking to
the glass bottle.  Being a 100% Sri Lankan company, we are committed to providing employment
opportunities among local cultivators to ensure the enhancement of their quality of life
in Sri Lanka. Given that our trust lies in 100% natural remedies free of any artificial substances, we are committed to using a green approach by minimising our carbon footprint and using organic cultivation methods.

Name: Avante Distribuidora Alimentos e Utilidades LTDA
Description:
A Avante Distribuição traz uma proposta ousada e promissora de crescimento acelerado no setor de distribuição. Com mais de 20 anos de experiência acumulada por seus líderes, a empresa nasce com um DNA de excelência, inovação e profundo conhecimento de mercado.

Nosso compromisso é com a transparência, a valorização do cliente e a busca constante por resultados. Acreditamos que grandes conquistas são feitas por grandes pessoas, e por isso investimos na formação de uma equipe de alto desempenho, composta por profissionais de ponta com perfil vanguardista, especializados em supply chain, vendas consultivas e atendimento B2B. A empresa visa criar um ecossistema de distribuição eficiente, integrado e altamente responsivo às demandas do mercado, combinando expertise com uma abordagem orientada por dados, processos e performance. Nossas estratégias são baseadas em indicadores de resultado (KPIs), inteligência comercial e políticas de relacionamento que priorizam geração de valor as indústrias parceiras e aos nossos clientes.

A Avante foi criada para ser referência em qualidade de atendimento, eficiência nas entregas e solidez nas parcerias com as indústrias. Estamos prontos para desafiar padrões e entregar soluções que ampliam capilaridade e fortalecem a presença nos pontos de venda, com foco em cumprimento de SLAs e maximização do sell-out. Temos como propósito, nos tornarmos referência em Minas Gerais de qualidade operacional, inteligência comercial e gestão de vendas no setor de distribuição.

Metro Hypermarket is a top cash and carry, wholesaler & retailer with
10 branches in Zimbabwe. We offer our customers an affordably priced
selection of groceries, liquor, hardware and other basic commodities.
Our company prides itself on providing fast, professional and friendly
service across all our branches nationwide.

Name: Eco Farmer
Description:
The Eco Farmer project helps to make a difference in the sustainable market by offering the best deals on organic food and produce from all supermarkets and public markets in Denmark.

Besides helping the environment by using fewer paper advertisements, we focus on helping farmers and supporting NGOs that help to recover and protect ecosystems that are already in danger of being destroyed by human activity. 

Eco Farmer-projektet hjælper med at gøre en forskel på det bæredygtige marked ved at tilbyde de bedste tilbud på økologisk mad og produkter fra alle supermarkeder og offentlige markeder i Danmark.

Udover at hjælpe miljøet ved at bruge færre papirannoncer, fokuserer vi på at hjælpe landmænd og støtte NGO'er, der hjælper med at genoprette og beskytte økosystemer, der allerede er i fare for at blive ødelagt af menneskelig aktivitet.

Name: Orgado
Description:
The Orgado Difference
At the core of our identity lies a steadfast commitment to sourced ingredients. We meticulously select and source only the finest organic components to ensure that every product that bears the Orgado name is a testament to quality. Our extensive product range encompasses a variety of superfoods, snacks, and plant-based supplements, catering to diverse tastes and dietary preferences.

By choosing Orgado, you’re not just prioritizing your health but also making a positive impact on the planet. Join us in experiencing the Orgado difference, where quality, purity, and passion come together to enhance your well-being.

Name: AF Produce
Description:
AF Produce excels in delivering exceptional customer service and top-quality produce at unbeatable value to wholesale and retail customers, supermarkets, and fellow distributors. This family-owned business, which originated over two decades ago, embarked on its journey by selling produce door-to-door from the rear of a truck. Today, our operations have evolved, and we proudly operate out of two warehouses, totaling over 55,000 sq. ft. Spanning from the West to the Mid-West Regions of the United States,

With a commitment to excellence and a rich history, AF Produce remains dedicated to serving fresh and quality produce.

Name: Tōtika Health Limited
Description:
We specialise in developing and distributing various health-related products, from premium Manuka honey to wound and burn dressings and natural luxury skincare solutions for different skin conditions.

Tōtika Health Skincare: The Golden Standard of Hive-to-Skin Luxury.
In a saturated luxury market, Tōtika does not just compete—we define a category of one. Our unique structure, quality control, and ingredient potency create a standard that no other premium Manuka or Propolis brand in the world can match.

Our honey facility, certified by the Ministry of Primary Industries (MPI), is equipped to meet the stringent packing requirements of diverse destinations, including Europe, Japan, China, and the US. Whether you require packing for a small batch of 100 kg or a large-scale operation, our expertise is ready to serve you.

Our MPI accreditation is a testament to our unwavering commitment to the highest international standards. This ensures that your honey, packed and exported by us, will captivate buyers worldwide with its quality and adherence to global standards.

We uphold meticulous documentation for each batch of honey processed, guaranteeing absolute traceability and unwavering quality control from start to finish.

Global Manuka Honey Export Services
Discover seamless Manuka honey export solutions with us! Our comprehensive services cater to all aspects of NZ Manuka honey distribution. We handle everything from sourcing to packaging your honey in various sizes and jar options. Our commitment extends beyond borders, ensuring your honey reaches any corner of the globe.

Contact us now for a detailed insight into our export services!

Name: Adam Theis GmbH
Description:
Die Adam Theis GmbH ist einer der größten Obst- und Gemüsevermarkter der Pfalz mit mehr als 300 Mitarbeitern. Unser familiengeführtes Unternehmen beliefert seit 1875 Großhändler in Süddeutschland und die regionale Gastronomie, auch mit selbstproduzierter, küchenfertiger Schnittware. Außerdem sind wir der wichtigste Lieferant im rheinland-pfälzischen Schulobstprogramm. Unser großes, regionales Sortiment ist über unseren eigenen Web-Shop und unseren Vitamin-Drive-In auch für Endverbraucher zugänglich.

Jährlich vermarkten wir 30.000 Tonnen Obst und Gemüse oder 5 Millionen Kisten - das entspricht 7.000 Sattelschlepper-LKW  pro Jahr.
Dafür steht 12.000 m² gekühlte Lagerfläche in Hochstadt zur Verfügung

Wir sind nach dem internationalen Qualitätsmanagement Standard  für Lebensmittel „IFS“ zertifiziert und gemäß der EU-Öko-Verordnung für den Handel von Bio-Produkten zugelassen.
2020 hat die Adam Theis GmbH die IHK Auszeichnung für einen entscheidenden Beitrag für die Entwicklung der pfälzischen Wirtschaft erhalten.

Frische-Logistik "just-in-time" ist unsere tägliche Herausforderung und Kundenzufriedenheit ist unser Ziel.

Name: Terra Mano Café
Description: Desde 2020, TERRA MANO se ha comprometido a ofrecer la excelencia del café en México. En asociación con productores locales, buscamos trazabilidad y educamos a los consumidores sobre la calidad del café a través de nuestra casa tostadora. Inspirada en el italiano "terra" (tierra) y "mano" (mano), representa el cuidado en cada paso, desde el cultivo hasta la taza. Valoramos cada detalle y agradecemos a todos los involucrados, desde las familias caficultoras hasta nuestros fieles clientes. Síguenos en LinkedIn e Instagram

Name: Exotisch baby corn
Description:
Exotisch (Another name for baby corn)

At Ariant Veg Private Limited, we take pride in building a bridge from Indian farms to global tables through our premium brand — Exotisch. 

Rooted in the fertile soils of Karnataka, we cultivate and export nutrient-rich baby corn with an unwavering commitment to quality, hygiene, and farmer inclusiveness.

Every Exotisch baby corn embodies nature’s goodness — rich in fibre, folate, and vitamins A & C that support digestion, immunity, and vitality. From soil health to sustainable cultivation, we ensure that the nutrition born in our fields remains intact all the way to the consumer’s shelf.

Our farmer-inclusive model forms the heart of our ecosystem. We empower rural growers through fair procurement, training, and transparent practices — ensuring every farmer becomes an equal partner in the Exotisch journey.

Quality is our promise and precision is our practice. Our state-of-the-art packhouse is certified under APEDA, BRCGS, GLOBALG.A.P, and Sedex, meeting stringent global food-safety standards. 

Automated grading, rapid chilling, and temperature-controlled cold storage preserve freshness and extend shelf life — guaranteeing that every export meets international expectations.

Through standardized export methodologies, each batch is traceable — from harvest to packaging — supported by a robust cold-chain logistics network. Our “Soil-to-Shelf” supply chain ensures transparency, hygiene, and consistency at every step.

Every pack of Exotisch baby corn is packaged with precision, ensuring freshness, crispness, and natural flavor — ready for retail shelves, restaurant kitchens, and international buyers alike.

With a vision to redefine agri-exports, we combine modern technology, traditional values, and farmer empowerment — crafting a brand that stands for purity, quality, and sustainability.

Exotisch — From Soil to Shelf. 

www.exotisch.co
Location: 983, Koppa-Madduru Road, Near Madduru Railway Station, Chamanahalli, Madduru Taluk, Maddur Koppa Road

Name: Frutas Andrés S.A.
Description:
Frutas Andrés somos una empresa de distribución de frutas y verduras frescas, productos de IV y V gama y economato que lleva más de 40 años al servicio de profesionales y empresas. Desde nuestros inicios en 1975, nos hemos dedicado a la comercialización y distribución de alimentos frescos de calidad, y gracias a nuestro amplio catálogo de más de 1000 referencias, somos capaces de satisfacer las necesidades de todos nuestros clientes.

Contamos con una plataforma logística de más de 1200 m2 en Sant Andreu de la Barca y más de 10 rutas en Barcelona y su área metropolitana. Además, trabajamos con productos de proximidad y Km0, para ofrecer la máxima frescura y calidad en nuestros productos.

Nuestro equipo de atención al cliente te atiende de forma personalizada, cercana, directa y profesional gracias a un servicio de atención telefónica de 6 h AM a 1h AM. Te aconsejamos según tus necesidades, resolvemos cualquier incidencia de forma inmediata y te informamos constantemente sobre promociones, ofertas y tarifas vigentes.

Te asignamos una persona de confianza que se ocupa de llevar tus pedidos directamente a tu negocio. Repartimos de lunes a sábado, de 6 a 13 h, y te hacemos llegar tu pedido al día siguiente siempre que lo hagas antes de las 12 de la noche.

Ofrecemos productos de primera calidad y nos ajustamos a tu presupuesto gracias a nuestras promociones y ofertas semanales. Además, próximamente lanzaremos nuestra plataforma propia de pedidos online para que puedas hacer tus pedidos de forma aún más cómoda y rápida.

En Frutas Andrés estamos comprometidos con la calidad, la frescura y la satisfacción de nuestros clientes. Déjanos ser tu proveedor de confianza!
Location: Sant Andreu de la Barca, Catalonia

Name: BIOTAMRA
Description:
BIOTAMRA is a Belgian family business located in Brussels. We produce, distribute and export Sahara flavours. We serve our customers (retailers, traders, processors and department stores) in Belgium, but also in all other countries of the European Union and beyond.

Passionate about Saharan agriculture, we grow and produce healthy, natural, traditional and tasty organic products. Made from the best dates and olives from southern Algeria. Combining recipes and Belgian food processing know-how.

Our raw materials (dates and olives) are sourced from the best soils of the Algerian Sahara to guarantee the rich taste and flavours in our products.

Name: The Village Company

Name: Kiwi Kitchen Singapore
Description:
Welcome to Kiwi Kitchen! We take pride in being a leading provider of New Zealand products to the residents of Singapore and Kiwis living here. As a family-run business founded in 2014, we are passionate about bringing the finest selection of authentic New Zealand groceries right to your doorstep.

At Kiwi Kitchen, we understand the importance of quality and authenticity. That's why we curate a wide range of products sourced directly from New Zealand's renowned producers and brands. From mouthwatering dairy products, gluten-free products, and premium meats to flavorful sauces, condiments, and more, our online store offers a taste of New Zealand that you can enjoy in the comfort of your own home.

We strive to create a seamless and convenient shopping experience for our customers. Our user-friendly website allows you to browse through our extensive product category, make secure online payments, and have your groceries delivered promptly to your doorstep. With our commitment to exceptional customer service, we aim to exceed your expectations every step of the way.

Whether you're a Kiwi missing the flavors of home or a Singapore resident with a taste for the finest New Zealand products, Kiwi Kitchen is here to serve you. Join our community of satisfied customers and experience the convenience and joy of discovering authentic New Zealand cuisine without leaving Singapore.

Connect with us on LinkedIn to stay updated on our latest product offerings, promotions, and news. We look forward to serving you and becoming your go-to online grocery store for all things New Zealand.

Name: Morinaga Le May Viet Nam JSC
Description:
Công Ty Cổ phần Morinaga Lê Mây Việt Nam (Morinaga Lê Mây) chuyên nhập khẩu và phân phối sản phẩm sữa bột công thức Morinaga dành cho Mẹ & Bé tại thị trường Việt Nam. Morinaga Lê Mây là công ty liên doanh được thành lập bởi Công ty TNHH SX TM DV Lê Mây (Lotus Group) và Tập đoàn công nghiệp sữa Morinaga Nhật bản (Morinaga Milk Industry).

           Trải qua chặng đường dài phát triển, Morinaga đã trở thành một trong hai thương hiệu sữa lớn nhất Nhật Bản và là một trong mười thương hiệu sữa hàng đầu thế giới. Với sứ mệnh của Morinaga Lê Mây là đưa phong cách sống khỏe mạnh của Nhật Bản đến với người Việt bằng những sản phẩm an toàn với đạt tiêu chuẩn Nhật Bản.

Sứ mệnh của Morinaga: "For Ever Brighter Smiles"

Triết lý doanh nghiệp: “Đóng góp cho lối sống lành mạnh và thú vị thông qua việc cung cấp các sản phẩm độc đáo có nguồn gốc từ công nghệ sữa tiên tiến”.

Chứng nhận và giải thưởng:

+ Đạt tiêu chuẩn FSSC22000;

+ Tiêu chuẩn Codex Quốc tế và Bộ Y tế Việt Nam;

+ Đạt được GRAS của FDA;

+ Hiệp hội Nhật Bản về thực phẩm miễn dịch

Giải thưởng: KILALA AWARDS 2018 - Giải thưởng Bình chọn sản phẩm, dịch vụ, điểm đến Nhật Bản được yêu thích nhất năm 2018.

Trải qua hơn 100 năm, Morinaga đã vươn mình trở thành thương hiệu sữa nổi tiếng được tin dùng tại Nhật Bản.

Morinaga Le May Vietnam JSC (Lotus Group) is a company specializing in importing and distributing Morinaga formula milk products in Vietnam. Morinaga Le May is a joint venture established by Le May Co., Ltd and Morinaga Milk Industry, a leading dairy corporation in Japan.

Through a long journey of development, Morinaga has become one of the two largest milk brands in Japan and one of the top ten milk brands in the world. The mission of Morinaga Le May is to bring the healthy Japanese lifestyle to Vietnamese people through safe products that meet Japanese standards.

Name: Gelcentro Lda
Description:
A Empresa
Fundada em 1989 a Gelcentro tem vindo a desenvolver a sua atividade como grossista, especializada na distribuição de produtos alimentares congelados para o setor da hotelaria, restauração e catering. Desde o início que procurou diferenciar-se pela qualidade do serviço prestado e pela gama alargada de produtos.Para corresponder às expetativas dos nossos clientes contamos com um total de 125 colaboradores e com uma frota de cerca de 100 viaturas adaptadas para conservação, garantindo a rápida distribuição dos nossos produtos. 

Fazer melhor, melhor, com melhor qualidade

Missão
Aspiramos ser o mais competitivo e eficiente distribuidor de produtos congelados, refrigerados, hortofrutícolas e outros, gerando riqueza, satisfação dos nossos clientes e colaboradores, cumprindo as nossas funções sociais dentro dos nossos princípios éticos de atuação.

Produtos
Comercializamos e distribuímos produtos alimentares congelados, ultracongelados e refrigerados de origem animal e vegetal, crus ou pré-preparados. 
Temos uma política de qualidade e segurança alimentar sólida como instrumento estratégico e de sucesso. Possuímos um Sistema de Qualidade e de Segurança Alimentar (IFS – Logistic, versão 2.2) e promovemos a melhoria contínua do Sistema de Análise dos Perigos e Controlo dos Pontos Críticos (HACCP).

Name: Terra Wholefoods - Organic Turmeric Root
Description:
We are a leading export business specializing in high-quality fresh turmeric root from Fiji, available in both organic and conventional grades. Deeply connected to our local communities, we collaborate with responsible collectors to source the finest turmeric, reflecting Fiji’s natural abundance and purity.

Our facility in Fiji is accredited with Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP), HACCP, and SMETA (Sedex Members Ethical Trade Audit), ensuring the highest standards of quality, safety, and ethical business practices. SMETA accreditation further emphasizes our commitment to social compliance, sustainability, and responsible business ethics, covering labor standards, health and safety, environmental sustainability, and ethical trade.

In addition, we are dedicated to sourcing, processing, packaging, and exporting premium products such as fresh turmeric, fresh ginger and tropical fruits. Our operations are supported by USDA/NOP, EU 834/2007, and EU 889/2008 organic certifications, as well as HACCP food safety standards, ensuring we deliver exceptional products to discerning markets.

We supply international premium markets, including the USA, Europe, and the Middle East. Our commitment to sustainability and ethical sourcing strengthens our relationships with clients and enhances transparency in the supply chain. By consistently delivering high-quality products, we meet the expectations of our valued customers worldwide.

With a focus on responsible farming, we help foster the well-being of local communities, while minimizing environmental impact through sustainable practices. Our certifications validate our dedication to upholding the highest ethical standards, ensuring that we continue to provide premium products grown with care and respect for nature.

Name: Garper Fresh
Description:
Acerca de Garper | Desde La Rioja al corazón de tu cocina

En Garper llevamos más de 40 años cultivando champiñones, setas y verduras en La Rioja. Lo que comenzó como un proyecto familiar es hoy una empresa agroalimentaria en plena transformación gracias a una de las plantas más modernas e innovadoras de Europa.  Así podemos seguir manteniendo a una escala mayor, nuestro compromiso firme con la calidad, la sostenibilidad y la trazabilidad.

Nuestro propósito es simple: hacerte el día más fácil. Nos enfocamos en que distribuidores, cocinas profesionales y puntos de venta trabajen con productos saludables, estables y listos para usar. Sin sorpresas. Sin complicaciones. Con la confianza de un socio que cumple.

Somos tradición con visión. Innovamos sin perder nuestras raíces. Y acompañamos cada bandeja con el cuidado de quienes valoran la calidad desde el campo hasta el plato.

 ¿Qué nos hace diferentes?

El saber hacer de más de 40 años cultivando nuestros productos 

Apostar por la innovación para mejorar el producto, el servicio y la confianza.

Formatos prácticos que ahorran tiempo y reducen merma

Cultura de mejora continua y equipo comprometido

Sostenibilidad real, no de escaparate

 Si tu cocina no se detiene, tu proveedor tampoco debería hacerlo.
En Garper, cumplimos para que tú puedas destacar.

 Trabajamos desde La Rioja con clientes en España, Portugal, Francia e Italia.
 ¿Distribuyes, cocinas, vendes? Hablemos.

Name: Caffè del Ruscello
Description:
Welkom bij Caffè del Ruscello, waar we geloven dat het leven te kort is voor slechte koffie.

Onze passie voor koffie drijft ons om de beste kwaliteit koffiebonen te selecteren, te branden en te leveren. We beginnen met het zorgvuldig uitzoeken van de hoogste kwaliteit Arabica en Robusta bonen uit de beste koffieproducerende landen.

Van boer tot kopje, we controleren elk aspect van het koffieproces om een onberispelijke smaak te garanderen.

Selectie: We werken samen met experts die gepassioneerd zijn over hun vak.
Branding: In onze familiebranderij in Sicilië worden de bonen langzaam en delicaat geroosterd tot perfectie.
Blending: Elke koffieboon soort wordt met precisie gebrand en daarna gemengd om unieke smaken te creëren.
Versheid: We verpakken onze koffiebonen onmiddellijk na het branden om de optimale smaak te behouden.
Caffè del Ruscello is meer dan alleen koffie. Het is een beleving.

Proef de passie in elke kopje.

Onze missie:

De beste kwaliteit koffie leveren aan onze klanten.
Koffieliefhebbers kennis laten maken met de ware smaak van koffie.
Een duurzame en eerlijke koffieketen creëren.

Onze waarden:
Passie: We zijn gepassioneerd over koffie en alles wat erbij komt kijken.
Kwaliteit: We streven naar de beste kwaliteit in alles wat we doen.
Duurzaamheid: We zetten ons in voor een duurzame koffieketen.
Eerlijkheid: We geloven in eerlijke handel en transparantie.

Caffè del Ruscello: De perfecte koffie voor elke gelegenheid.

Of u nu geniet van een kopje koffie in de ochtend, een espresso na de lunch of een cappuccino met vrienden, Caffè del Ruscello heeft de perfecte koffie voor u.

Name: Balalac Distribuidora
Description:
A Balalac Distribuidora nasceu em 2005, a partir de uma empresa familiar movida pelo desejo de atender com excelência os clientes da região. Aproveitando a rota logística da transportadora da família, que trazia laticínios do Mato Grosso para o Rio de Janeiro e cruzava Salto Grande-SP, iniciou-se a distribuição local com apenas uma câmara fria, um caminhão e três colaboradores.

Ao longo de 20 anos, crescemos de forma sólida e sustentável, conquistando a confiança de clientes e parceiros pela qualidade dos produtos e pelo compromisso com um atendimento diferenciado. A linha de produtos, inicialmente focada em laticínios, expandiu-se para atender diversos segmentos do setor alimentício, auto-serviços e food service.

Hoje, contamos com mais de 100 colaboradores, frota própria e uma moderna estrutura de aproximadamente 8.000 m², equipada com áreas de armazenamento seco, câmaras frias e congelados, além de um setor administrativo completo. Atuamos em grande parte do Estado de São Paulo e no Norte do Paraná, oferecendo soluções que unem qualidade, agilidade e confiabilidade.

Na Balalac, nosso propósito é distribuir mais do que alimentos — entregamos confiança, parceria e resultados.

Our primary focus is on high-grade Manuka honey in the 18-25+ UMF range, but we also offer a comprehensive selection of UMF certified honeys to suit various tastes and preferences.

Founded by a team of experienced beekeepers, Rare New Zealand Limited is driven by a commitment to sustainability, quality, and innovation. Our beekeepers utilize helicopters to access hard-to-reach Manuka groves, ensuring that our honey is derived from the purest and most untouched sources available. The result is a high-quality, authentic Manuka honey that embodies the unique characteristics of the New Zealand landscape.

Our services extend beyond honey production, as we take pride in offering a seamless experience from the hive to the end consumer. We specialize in selling our branded honey wholesale to international clients who have established distribution channels in their respective countries. Our current markets include Singapore, Japan, Hong Kong, and South Korea, with ongoing efforts to expand our presence in the USA, Philippines, and Malaysia.

In addition to our wholesale offerings, Rare New Zealand Limited provides private label solutions for other brands. We supply premium honey, package it under our clients' branding, and ensure that our partners receive exceptional products that meet their unique specifications. For clients requiring honey for further processing, we also offer bulk drums to cater to their needs.

The company aims to market products that contribute to sustainable development and reduce, to the extent possible, the environmental footprint of the industry.

The aromatic, nutritional, nutraceutical and pharmaceutical value of a variety of Greek natural products is widely known and undisputed. We aim to exploit these products to supply our customers with products of high value. Using the state-of-the-art method of lyophilization (freeze-drying), we offer quality products to the food, feed, cosmetics and pharmaceutical industries.

We invest in Research and Development, in cooperation with external partners (University institutions in Greece and other European countries), for the development of innovative products and the necessary enabling technologies. In addition, we apply the most modern production methods to provide high quality products with cost-effective processes. The company's production facilities meet the most stringent hygiene, safety and quality assurance standards.
Location: Patra/ Agios Stefanos/ Industrial Area , Western Greece

Name: SARL HBMC DISTRIBUTION
Aceite de oliva Virgen Extra PICAIN C:18:1
Description:
Nuestro Aceite de Oliva Virgen Extra Ecológico, PICAÍN C:18:1Ⓡ, es un producto que no solo representa la excelencia en calidad, sino que también encarna la rica tradición de agricultura, olivares y ganadería que ha sido parte de nuestra familia en Extremadura a lo largo de generaciones. 

Creemos fervientemente en la sostenibilidad y la producción responsable. Por ello, nuestros olivos cuentan con una certificación ecológica, garantizando un producto local que respeta el medio ambiente y promueve prácticas agrícolas sostenibles. Además, la extracción del aceite se realiza de forma mecánica y en frío, preservando todas las cualidades del aceite.

Las variedades de aceitunas son Manzanilla Cacereña principalmente y un toque de variedad Cordovil. Estas variedades aportan matices específicos al aceite. La Manzanilla Cacereña contribuye con un sabor afrutado y equilibrado, mientras que la Cordovil aporta intensidad y complejidad. 

Nuestra marca no solo busca ofrecer un producto de calidad, sino que también aspira a contribuir al desarrollo del sector del aceite de oliva en Extremadura. Con un enfoque en la producción y comercialización local, buscamos valorar adecuadamente nuestros productos en el mercado nacional e internacional, mejorando a largo plazo el sector industrial en nuestra región.

Por último, nos parece necesario subrayar la importancia crucial de las grasas vegetales de alta calidad en una dieta saludable. Nuestro aceite de oliva virgen extra no solo es una delicia para el paladar, sino que también ofrece beneficios para la salud. 

Estamos convencidas de que Picaín C:18:1 se convertirá en una opción preferida para aquellos que valoran la salud, la sostenibilidad y la calidad en cada gota de aceite de oliva virgen extra que consumen.

Agradecemos tu atención y estamos abiertas a cualquier colaboración o consulta que puedas tener. Esperamos poder compartir contigo la experiencia única de nuestro aceite.
