Name: Meego Global Ventures OPC
Description:
In the bustling world of global trade, Meego Global Ventures OPC ("Meego") was born from years of experience navigating the complexities of logistics—both international and domestic. Long before its official founding on November 20, 2024, its vision was already taking shape in the roads, ports, and warehouses where goods connected people and places.

The team behind Meego witnessed firsthand the intricate journeys products took and the challenges they faced. From origin to destination, every step mattered—not just in moving goods, but in creating meaningful experiences.

This deep understanding inspired not just operational excellence but innovation. Meego saw an opportunity to offer more than just products—delivering high-quality essentials that enrich lives, whether by enhancing flavors through food or providing solutions that bring value to homes and businesses.

Built on expertise and guided by a clear vision, Meego bridges borders and builds trust. More than logistics and trade, we’re about partnerships, purpose, and improving everyday experiences—one product at a time.

As we officially open our doors on November 20, 2024, Meego begins its journey—rooted in experience, driven by innovation, and dedicated to delivering value that brings people closer together.

Name: Usawa Coffee
Description:
Our mission: equality missing throughout the coffee industry. Fairness to the core.

At Usawa, specialty coffee is not only about taste, but also about fairness, sustainability and inclusiveness. Our process, from the coffee plantation to the cup, is designed to not only deliver an exceptional product, but also to make a positive impact on people and the planet.

Visit the Usawa Roasting Shop:
Our specialty coffee is available for purchase through our webshop as well as in our own roastery store in a characteristic monumental building in Gemert. In the shop you can experience the craft of coffee roasting and learn about our assortment. Each type of specialty coffee in our webshop contains information about the origin of the beans, so you know exactly where your cup of coffee comes from. In addition, we offer cups, cans and other coffee gifts perfect for sharing with others.

Contamos com um setor de transportes que se destaca no mercado nacional por seus serviços. Possuímos um sistema de logística eficiente, o que nos permite atender clientes de todo o Brasil, garantindo pontualidade e agilidade em nossas entregas. Além disso, possuímos uma equipe de profissionais altamente capacitados que garante a qualidade do serviço ofertado. Temos uma oficina própria que executa a manutenção preventiva e corretiva de nossos veículos, e também, contamos com um sistema de rastreamento via satélite que garante controle e segurança de sua carga. 

Nosso setor de comércio possui mais de 30 anos de atuação no mercado de hortigranjeiros, com sede estrategicamente localizada dentro da CEASA – Centrais de Abastecimento do Espírito Santo, facilitando a entrega de nossos produtos. Oferecemos produtos de qualidade, a um preço justo e competitivo. Cooperação, ética, profissionalismo e sustentabilidade são os valores que nos movem.

Ulihort, sua melhor opção em comércio de hortigranjeiros e transporte de cargas secas.

Name: Mina Holdings LLC
Description:
Mina Holdings, LLC | Non-Perishable Food Supply to Government Entities

Based in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, we are a company with a strong commitment to social responsibility. Since our founding in 2011 and the launch of our flagship project in 2021, we have established ourselves as a trusted provider in the non-perishable food industry, specializing in supplies for government entities such as federal, state, and local  correctional facilities across the United States.

Our Mission:

To drive sustainable growth by expanding our product portfolio and opening new markets and channels, both in the B2B and B2C sectors.

What Sets Us Apart:

• Nationwide Coverage: We currently supply more than 75 federal institutions, 30 state institutions, and 5 local institutions, ensuring efficient product distribution across our network.

• Strong Infrastructure: Our logistics hub in Harrisburg, with over 20,000 square feet of capacity, supports our distribution and administrative operations.

• Integrated Supply Chain: As direct importers, we control the entire supply chain, from cultivation to final product. We work closely with our producers and strategic partners to ensure the highest quality of our products.

• Sales Success: With annual sales exceeding $10 million, we have demonstrated our ability to meet market expectations and maintain strong relationships with major manufacturers and customers across the U.S.

Products and Services:

At Mina Holdings, we offer a wide range of non-perishable food products, including:
• Rice, cereals, pasta (noodles)
• Canned fruits and vegetables
• Tuna, tomato products (paste, diced, ketchup, sauce, puree), and more

Commitment to Quality:

We take pride in delivering products that meet the highest quality standards, supported by our long-term relationships with leading manufacturers and our dedication to operational excellence.
If you're looking for a reliable partner for large-scale non-perishable food supply, we are here to meet your needs

We’re the exclusive global operator of HybridICE - a globally patented, biotech-post-freezing system that transforms the future of food. Frozen food that’s smarter, cleaner, and sustainable - for conscious consumers and visionary food brands.

Frozen. Reimagined.
Smart. Simple. Sustainable.

110x heat transfer
30x faster freezing
90% less energy

"Thaws back to FRESH" texture and taste

Whether you're building a brand or scaling a concept, our white label solutions offer unmatched quality, speed, and environmental efficiency.

Name: Trevisani Pietro srl
Description:
Questa è la storia di due biciclette che arrivavano fino ad Ascoli Piceno per vendere il pesce al mercato del centro.

Ma è anche la storia di una macchina, una Ford Capri, che frequentava i grandi mercati del nord e che per entrare in autostrada doveva arrivare fino a Bologna.

È la storia di un’intuizione, che riuscì a portare il pesce di un piccolo molo dalle enormi potenzialità, in giro per il mondo.

È la storia di alcuni uomini e di alcune donne che hanno passato la vita ad andare oltre quello che agli altri sembrava il massimo raggiungibile.

È la storia di chi trasformò le reti di una barca in un’industria.

Questa è la storia della Trevisani Pietro srl….dal 1964 industria e commercio di prodotti ittici.
In un contesto in continua e rapida evoluzione, obbiettivo principale dell’Azienda è stato da sempre saper intercettare le richieste del mercato e trasformarle in nuovi prodotti. In un contesto in continua e rapida evoluzione, obbiettivo principale dell’Azienda è stato da sempre saper intercettare le richieste del mercato e trasformarle in nuovi prodotti.

Tale filosofia ha orientato l’Azienda nel corso degli anni a porre particolare attenzione alla ricerca e sviluppo, investendo in strumentazioni all’avanguardia e in tecniche di lavorazione sempre più complesse.

Name: Foodmill for trading & distribution
Description:
FoodMill is a leading foodstuff distributor in the Alexandria market, specializing in the distribution of frozen and chilled food items to both retail and HoReCa markets. Our commitment to quality and customer service has made us a trusted partner for businesses of all sizes.

We offer a wide range of frozen and chilled food products, including meats, poultry, vegetables, dairy products, and more. Our products are carefully sourced from reliable suppliers and stored in our state-of-the-art facilities to ensure maximum freshness and quality.

In addition to our strong presence in local markets, Foodmill is also targeting international markets to expand our reach and share our high-quality food products with customers around the world.

We have a team of experienced professionals who are dedicated to identifying new markets and developing customized solutions to meet the unique needs of each market. We work closely with our suppliers and partners to ensure that our products meet the highest standards of quality and safety, and are compliant with all local regulations and requirements.

Our range of frozen and chilled food products is designed to appeal to a global audience, with a focus on healthy and convenient meal options that are both delicious and nutritious. From ready-to-eat meals to frozen meats, fruits, and vegetables, our products are perfect for busy consumers who want to eat well without sacrificing taste or convenience.

At Foodmill, we are committed to using sustainable and environmentally friendly practices in all aspects of our business, from sourcing ingredients to transportation and distribution. We believe that our commitment to quality and sustainability will help us succeed in international markets and build strong relationships with customers around the world.

Join us on our mission to bring healthy and delicious food products to people around the world, and to make a positive impact on the global food industry.

Name: Nu-Tea Company
Description:
Nu-Tea Company is a Fair Trade, woman-owned and led BC company in the Fraser Valley that distributes ethical sustainable teas that are good for you and good for the planet.

We distribute our own award-winning line of teas called Tega Organic Teas as well as ecofriendly luxury teas that are small batch blended, here in Canada.
Our customers are retailers that sell good for you products and unique eco-friendly and luxury products.
 
Our signature Tega Teas showcase endangered wild animals that we want to bring attention to. 
Nu-Tea Company donates 10% of their annual net profit to support adopted wildlife orphans in Kenya and we support endangered orcas on the Pacific West Coast.

Name: Mumcu Kuruyemisleri Ltd. Sti.
Description:
Mumcu Kuruyemişleri, from harvest to packaging, offers fresh and delicious products to its consumers via retail shops, supermarkets, food wholesalers, and online in Turkey. Mumcu Kuruyemisleri has operated in Europe since 2019 with the same principles and, through efficient supply chain operations, delivers the same quality abroad, mainly in Germany, the UK, and Denmark. 

Mumcu Kuruyemişleri bietet seinen Verbrauchern von der Ernte bis zur Verpackung frische und köstliche Produkte über Einzelhandelsgeschäfte, Supermärkte, Lebensmittelgroßhändler und online in der Türkei an. Name: The Scoop Ice Cream Company Ltd
Description:
After successfully running The Scoop Ice Cream Parlour at Milford Waterfront since 2016, in 2021 our family business took the the ambitious step to start producing our own homemade small batch ice cream just across the road in a custom designed Ice Creamery. 

We use the best ingredients including fresh milk from Steynton Farm, local cream and high quality flavourings, ripples and toppings to produce luxuriously creamy ice cream.

Initially supplying The Scoop Ice Cream Parlour, which can display up to 25 different flavours at any one time, the range of flavours produced by The Scoop Ice Cream Co. now exceeds 50, and the menu is constantly evolving.

Our homemade ice cream is available at a growing number of local outlets across Pembrokeshire and we're sustainably evolving to work with high quality local businesses, whilst focussing on small batch production.

If you are a Pembrokeshire hospitality businesses and serve ice cream by the scoop, to complement the desserts on your menu, or sell direct to customers in tubs, we'd love to work with you. 

Please get in touch if you'd like any more details on our product range and service.

Description:
Grande Food Service started in 2002 by entrepreneurs Philip and Erica Till.

As a small startup business they focused on wholesaling specialty foods that were not readily available in Albany at the time.

With a keen sense of developing relationships Philip and Erica have established many long-term customer relationships within the Great Southern Region.

 

Today they are still involved in the business that employs 16 people and have won numerous industry awards which recognizes the hard work and reputation they have built. Name: Mikuni Wild Harvest Inc
Description:
Mikuni started exporting mushrooms to Japan and Europe in the early eighties. In 2001, Mikuni changed focus to the development of a boutique line of sustainable wild foods for restaurants and gourmet retail outlets. 

Since then, our company has grown from a few committed individuals slugging it out in a basement office, to a team of like-minded individuals with distribution centers throughout Canada and the United States. 

Although the size and direction of our company has changed dramatically over the years, our concept and commitment has not. 

It has always been Mikuni’s goal to provide our customers with the highest quality of unique and sustainable wild foods. 

Inasmuch as the organic food movement has garnered attention in the last decade, at Mikuni we believe that we are at the beginning of another movement, one that explores the abundance of richly flavored foods found exclusively in the wild.

wspierać naszych klientów produktami premium, którym mogą zaufać - zarówno pod względem jakości, jak i pochodzenia oraz historii.

Name: Mydibel México
Description:
Mydibel es una empresa familiar especializada desde 1988 en el desarrollo, producción y comercialización de productos de papa: frescos (fritas), congelados (fritas y purés) y deshidratados (copos y gránulos).

Procesa diariamente aproximadamente 3,000 toneladas de papas y vende 267,000 toneladas de productos terminados al año.

Mydibel ofrece productos de calidad con servicios de calidad, abasteciendo a empresas de diversos segmentos de clientes: food service, retail e industria. La empresa, 100% familiar, emplea a más de 500 personas y exporta su amplia gama de productos de papas a más de 110 países de todo el mundo.

La historia de un sueño!

Desde muy joven, Roger Mylle sintió pasión por el tubérculo más popular del mundo: la papa. Esa pasión fue alimentada por sus padres, agricultores de corazón y alma.

Roger se especializó más tarde en el comercio de papas. Era su sueño lanzar algún día un producto terminado de papa. Roger combinó sus 30 años de experiencia y su deseo de aventura y fundó Mydibel en 1988. Paso a paso, transmitió su pasión a sus hijos, Bruno y Carlo Mylle, y, cuando se jubiló en 2009, entregó la empresa a sobre sus hijos, bajo cuya dirección Mydibel se convirtió en una empresa familiar dinámica, activa en más de 110 países.

Fábrica verde

Una de las prioridades de Mydibel es cuidar el medio ambiente, por eso la empresa instaló el primer motor de biogás en 2006 para producir energía verde. El biogás y el digestato se generan a través de la fermentación de desechos de papa ricos en almidón (por ejemplo, cáscaras y hojuelas). El biogás se convierte en energía verde, el digestato se centrifuga y se le agrega cal, creando un valioso fertilizante agrícola llamado Myfert.

Gracias a estas inversiones en la Fábrica Verde, Mydibel es ahora autosuficiente en electricidad en un 80%. Pero sigue invirtiendo y pronto instalará nuevos motores de biogás para ser 100% autónomos.

Name: BioPlatform.cz
Description:
Co děláme? 

Pečlivě vybíráme, dovážíme a distribuujeme kvalitní zahraniční značky ze světa zdraví, Bio a udržitelnosti. 
Vybudovali jsme velmi efektivní dodavatelský řetězec, kdy se staráme kompletně o import, skladování, etiketaci a distribuci produktů k velkoobchodním zákazníkům. 
Baví nás produkty vybírat a být tak prvními spokojenými zákazníky v ČR a SR. Tuto zkušenost rádi předáváme dál široké základně konečných spotřebitelů. 

Naše produkty najdete jak u vybraných obchodních řetězců, tak i v nezávislých bio obchůdcích se zdravím, tak i v online obchodech.

Proč to děláme? 
Na začátku (2018) jsme se snažili uspokojit vlastní potřebu po zdravějších alternativách potravin, které konzumujeme. Bio bereme jako standart. 

Naší misí je "Přinášet našim zákazníkům nejlepší řešení pro zdraví." 

Exkluzivně jsme začali dovážet produkty pro obchody, se kterými jsme sdíleli tuto misi. Postupně naše zákaznická základna rostla a nyní můžete naše značky nalézt ve většině moderních i tradičních prodejních místech v ČR a částečně v SR.

Name: Kekala México
Description:
Fundada en Brasil en el 2018, tras tres años de investigación, Kekala revolucionó el mundo de las paletas heladas con un concepto innovador: picolés personalizables que combinan arte, sabor y calidad artesanal. Con más de 120 puntos de venta en Brasil y un éxito viral en redes sociales, Kekala ha llevado su magia a Colombia, Ecuador, Perú, Paraguay y ahora está llegando a México.

En Kekala México, ofrecemos “la mejor paleta del mundo” a través de una experiencia única: en tres simples pasos, nuestros clientes eligen una base, una cobertura y un relleno, creando más de 300 combinaciones únicas. Utilizamos exclusivamente ingredientes premium, con un enfoque en la sostenibilidad y la excelencia en cada detalle. Nuestros sabores innovadores y presentaciones visuales cautivadoras son perfectos para compartir en redes y sorprender a todos.

Tras un exitoso pre-lanzamiento en agosto de 2025, hemos vendido 74 sucursales en México, incluyendo kioscos y tiendas, con la meta de alcanzar 250 sucursales en los próximos dos años. Nuestra moderna planta en Puebla, respaldada por una inversión de 5 millones de dólares, asegura una producción eficiente y cumple con los más altos estándares de calidad internacional. 

En Kekala México, somos un equipo apasionado por la creatividad, la innovación y la creación de experiencias únicas que deleitan a miles con nuestros picolés personalizables. Buscamos talentos entusiastas que compartan nuestra pasión por el servicio excepcional y quieran ser parte de una marca en crecimiento que combina arte, sabor y sostenibilidad.

Visítanos en kekalaoficial.com.mx. #KekalaMéxico #PaletasPersonalizadas #SaborConCreatividad

Chez ALOUA, nous sommes fiers d'apporter à votre table la douceur pure et naturelle des dattes les plus raffinées.

À propos de nous:Chez ALOUA, nous croyons que chaque bouchée devrait être une expérience. Nos dattes Deglet Nour sont cultivées avec soin dans les riches terres de la vallée de Biskra, où le climat idéal et la tradition séculaire se marient pour créer des dattes d'une qualité exceptionnelle. Nous sommes plus qu'une marque de dattes; nous sommes les gardiens d'une tradition, les artisans d'une expérience gustative unique.

Engagement envers la Qualité:Chez ALOUA, la qualité est notre engagement ultime. Nos dattes sont sélectionnées avec précision, récoltées au moment optimal de la maturité, et emballées pour préserver leur fraîcheur et leurs bienfaits nutritifs. Chaque paquet que vous ouvrez est une promesse de qualité et de satisfaction.

Connectons-nous:Joignez-vous à notre communauté passionnée de connaisseurs de dattes. Suivez-nous pour des mises à jour sur nos produits, des anecdotes sur la culture des dattes, et des recettes gourmandes pour tirer le meilleur parti de chaque datte ALOUA.

Découvrez ALOUA - Où Tradition et Modernité se Rencontrent:Explorez notre gamme de dattes Deglet Nour sur notre site web www.aloua.fr et découvrez par vous-même pourquoi ALOUA est bien plus qu'une marque; c'est une invitation à une expérience gustative exceptionnelle.

Merci de faire partie du voyage ALOUA.

Name: Sausages Of Freedom/Korndogg Cartel

Sausages of Freedom is America's only Veteran-owned, Veteran-operated, and Veteran-themed sausage maker. Our executive chef is a combat-wounded amputee with formal culinary training and decades of experience in the kitchen. Between multiple deployments, business trips, and vacations, we have travelled the world and discovered amazing flavor profiles that we wanted to bring home and share with our family and friends. Our goal is to provide quality meat to people who love America - and, perhaps, make a few meat jokes along the way. 

We develop our explosive protein profiles with the same vibes we discovered as military members serving this great country and are committed to supporting veterans, law enforcement, and first responders. With every purchase you make, we give back to charities that serve those who have spent their lives serving others.

Unser stetig wachsendes Sortiment bietet unseren Kunden möglichst viele auserwählte Artikel aus einer Hand zu beziehen.

Die komplette Lieferkette, von der Produktion bis zur Auslieferung bei Ihnen, ist in unserer Hand. Durch die langjährigen Partnerschaften sind wir bestens vernetzt, um Ihre Anfragen und Wünsche zu bearbeiten.

Our Free-Range Eggs are laid by hens from our own hand-picked network of producers. Collected and packed fresh by hand, they reflect our commitment to care at every step. For those seeking something a little different, our Speciality Eggs – laid by rare and traditional breed birds – bring rich flavour, vibrant colour, and a story worth sharing.

And then there’s The Birds and The Bees – our standout, sustainability-led range that’s creating a real buzz in the egg world. Developed to support biodiversity and promote nature-friendly farming, this range is loved by customers, birds, and bees alike.

As a family-run business with deep roots in British farming, we do things the right way — with care, consistency, and a passion for doing better every day.

Country Lane Foods — food with integrity, the West Country way.

Our highly qualified and passionate staff is available to answer your questions and provide you with all the support you need.

We are an Italian company that cares about its customers and its region. We use only high-quality ingredients, carefully selected from local suppliers. In this way, we guarantee the freshness and authenticity of our products, which represent the typicality of our culinary tradition.

Auf über 6’000 m² Verkaufsfläche treffen täglich mehr als 60 Anbieter auf Gastronomie, Detailhandel, Produzenten und Fachhändler.

Unsere Stärken:
 Vielfalt & Qualität - regionale und internationale Produkte, täglich frisch.
 Logistik-Power - moderne Infrastruktur mit Kühlflächen, Laderampen und Platz für 600 Fahrzeuge.
 Begegnung & Gemeinschaft - Produzenten, Händler und Abnehmer im direkten Austausch.
 Einzigartige Atmosphäre - der Markt lebt, wenn Zürich noch schläft.

Seit 1937 verbinden wir Menschen, Produkte und Märkte und sorgen dafür, dass Frische in Zürich und darüber hinaus erlebbar bleibt.

 Den Markt erleben Jetzt für eine Führung anmelden und die besondere Atmosphäre des Zürcher Engrosmarkts entdecken. 

 Mehr entdecken Auf der Website warten weitere Informationen, Hintergründe und aktuelle News.

We take pride in our ability to procure ethically sourced, quality-assured products, and deliver them timely to our customers with integrity and reliability. 

Vision, Mission & Values

Our Vision is to serve our customers’ needs whilst providing long-term value by effective and efficient distribution of Food Products. To support our vision, we aim to ethically operate across the entire supply chain and provide a competitive and comprehensive range of products and services with an innovation and continuous improvement mindset striving towards growth. We value honesty and truthfulness with a commitment to our customers and our employees to conduct our business fairly and with integrity and being accountable.

Our business is established on the back of humble beginnings going back over 30 years as traders of rice, pulses and other related commodities bringing them into the state of Kerala from several agricultural heartlands of India being Gujarat, Madhya Pradesh, Andhra Pradesh, Karnataka, Tamil Nadu, and others. This has given us a great footing in understanding food products and matching with our customer needs. With years of experience and relationships built with farmers, manufacturers, and suppliers we have now built a strong and unmatched ability to consistently deliver high quality products and deliver to our customers in a timely manner.

Name: Valbella Gelati
Description:
La Valbella Gelati nasce nel 1987 in un piccolo laboratorio artigianale di Bibione, in provincia di Venezia, dove il maestro Dorino, con la sua Carpigiani L40 a bastone e le sue preziose e segretissime ricette, comincia a produrre un gelato buono, genuino e fresco. Nasce così l’idea di creare un laboratorio artigianale di gelato per le Gelaterie, i Bar, gli Alberghi e i Ristoranti di Bibione e Lignano. E il lavoro quotidiano di Dorino, pieno d’amore, passione e attenzione per i dettagli, dà vita ad un prodotto di una tale qualità che il passaparola nella località di mare corre in fretta facendo aumentare giorno dopo giorno il numero dei clienti.
In pochi anni, sempre più attività richiedono i prodotti del mastro gelataio e oggi, trent’anni dopo, la Valbella Gelati è un’azienda consolidata, un riferimento, durante la stagione estiva e oltre, per le spiagge di Bibione, Lignano, Grado e il loro entroterra.
….non più solo gelati, ma anche dolci, in tutte le forme e dimensioni, in grado di soddisfare i palati più esigenti.

Name: Südhang Weine
Description:
Wir stehen für neu gelebte Weinkultur. Wir hinterfragen, überdenken und sind ständig auf der Suche. Unser Antrieb ist die Neugier, das Interesse an aufrichtigem Engagement. Getrieben werden wir immer wieder von neuem, auf der Suche nach echtem Genuss. Das schnelle Geschäft interessiert uns nicht.

Weine abseits des Mainstreams, die nicht für Etikettentrinker designed sind, finden den Weg in unser Sortiment. Austauschbare, gesichtslose Weine aus industrieller Fertigung sind uns ein Gräuel. Unsere Genussmittel zeichnen sich in erster Linie durch natürliche Ausdruckskraft und ein überzeugendes Preis-Genuss-Verhältnis aus. Unsere Produkte soll sich jeder leisten können.

Die kleinen, individuell und handwerklich arbeitenden Winzer und Weingüter sind es, die wir lieben und verkaufen. Das Label «Bio» hätten die meisten unserer Produzenten verdient, die wenigsten legen aber Wert darauf sich ihr Selbstverständnis im Umgang mit der Natur zertifizieren zu lassen.

südhang hat es sich zur Aufgabe gemacht, Winzer in aufstrebenden Weingebieten abseits des Prestigerummels zu entdecken. Aber auch Weine aus altehrwürdigen, in Vergessenheit geratene Appellationen wecken unser Interesse und warten darauf, wiederentdeckt zu werden.

Wir spüren Strömungen auf, finden innovative, eigenwillige Weingüter, denen wir die Möglichkeit geben, die Nische für ihre Weine bei unseren anspruchsvollen Kunden zu finden.

Wir laden euch dazu ein, mit uns zu geniessen, denn wir teilen gerne. Wir sind stolz auf das, was wir vertreten. Weil wir sind was wir machen, was wir essen und was wir denken. Oder dies zumindest glauben.

Name: Zubral
Description:
Bienvenidos a Zubral LLC, el único licenciatario oficial de Disney para distribuir y comercializar la cerveza Duff en Las Américas y el Caribe. Duff no es solo una cerveza; es un ícono de la cultura pop, un símbolo de Los Simpson, y, por primera vez, llega a ustedes con la autenticidad de una licencia oficial de Disney.

Nuestra misión es llevar la Duff a cada rincón del continente, posicionándola como una cerveza premium en supermercados, tiendas de conveniencia, licorerías, bares y clubes nocturnos. Actualmente, ofrecemos Duff en una práctica lata de 330 ml, y próximamente ampliamos nuestras opciones con botellas de 330 ml, barriles de 5L para disfrutar en casa, y barriles de 30L para bares. Duff no es solo una cerveza, es una experiencia que convierte cada ocasión en un momento inolvidable.

Con más de 35 años de experiencia combinada en ABInBev, Rappi, otras empresas de bebidas, y companias de importacion, nuestro equipo tiene una visión clara: asociarnos con distribuidores confiables, apasionados y expertos en el mercado. Trabajamos con distribuidores master en cada país, que cuentan con equipos robustos de ventas y mercadeo, solidez financiera y, sobre todo, un espíritu innovador y pasion por la cerveza!

Duff  no se trata solo de una bebida; se trata de conectar. En un mundo donde la rapidez y la impersonalidad dominan, Duff ofrece un refugio de nostalgia y diversión, donde cada botella evoca recuerdos compartidos y crea nuevos momentos entre amigos y desconocidos. Al conectar la diversión de Los Simpson con el presente, Duff trae algo único al mercado: una marca que, más allá de ser una cerveza, representa una experiencia cultural, accesible y llena de alegría.

Si estás listo para llevar una marca globalmente reconocida a tu mercado, te invitamos a unirte a esta oportunidad única. La cerveza Duff es la conexión perfecta entre la nostalgia y el presente, lista para conquistar a los consumidores. Contáctanos hoy y sé parte de este emocionante viaje!

Genesis of Strive: Strive Soda was born from a desire to revolutionize the functional beverage industry. Upholding our founder's core values, our Ottawa hub located at 2455 Kaladar Street, boasts over 20,000 ft² of warehouse space, a fleet of 20+ climate-controlled trucks, and a team of 50+ staff experts dedicated to exceptional service.

Our operations run around the clock with tractor trailers daily transporting fresh and frozen products from Montreal and Toronto. To support our customers at any hour, we offer 24/7 online support.

At Aenos Food Services, we believe in the quality of our products and the level of our service, and to assure our customers of this commitment, we offer a 100% money-back guarantee for any dissatisfied customers.

Volem ser una empresa líder en la distribució d’alimentació seca, refrigerada, neteja i vins i licors, amb un equip de treballadors que es sentin part important de l’empresa.

VALORS
Qualitat
Confiança

Adaptació al canvi

COMPROMESOS AMB EL NOSTRE ENTORN

Name: Giriraj Agro & Natural Honey Products
Description:
As a passionate and dedicated honey company, we take great pride in delivering the finest quality honey to customers both nationally and internationally. Our mission is to provide natural, pure, and sustainably sourced honey that not only delights taste buds but also supports the well-being of our environment.

At Giriraj Agro & Natural Honey Products, we are committed to preserving the age-old traditions of beekeeping while embracing modern techniques to ensure the highest standards of quality and purity. 

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility. We strongly believe in the importance of protecting our fragile ecosystems and are actively involved in conservation efforts. Through our sustainable beekeeping practices, we strive to maintain a harmonious balance between honey production and the well-being of the bees and their habitats.

Our range of honey products is diverse and reflects the unique flavors and characteristics of the regions in which our bees collect nectar. From golden wildflower honey to rich and robust forest honey, each jar is a testament to the distinctive floral sources and terroir of its origin.

We are proud to serve a wide customer base, catering to both individuals and businesses seeking exceptional honey for personal enjoyment, culinary creations, or product development. Our national and international distribution channels ensure that our honey reaches homes, restaurants, and retailers around the world, spreading the joy of pure and authentic sweetness.

Whether you're a honey enthusiast, a food lover, or an eco-conscious consumer, we invite you to join us on our journey to explore and appreciate the wonders of nature's golden treasure. Connect with us to discover the magic of our honey and be a part of our commitment to sustainability and excellence.

O Ιωάννης Νάνος, έχοντας εμπιστοσύνη στις δυνάμεις του έστησε το παραδοσιακό του εργαστήρι και ξεκίνησε να πουλά χειροποίητα προϊόντα κρέατος.

Η αγάπη του, για το καλό κρέας, οι συνταγές του και η εξαιρετική πρώτη ύλη, συστατικά τα οποία τον ακολουθούν μέχρι και σήμερα επέφεραν την αναμενόμενη αύξηση των καταναλωτών που απολάμβαναν τα χειροποίητα παρασκευάσματα του.

Η οικογενειακή επιχείρηση, µε σταθερά «βήματα» μετατράπηκε σε μία μεγάλη βιομηχανία επεξεργασίας και παραγωγής κρέατος.

Είκοσι χρόνια μετά, το 1997, η βιομηχανία Νάνος ΑΕΒΕ, αποκτά τις νέες της εργοστασιακές εγκαταστάσεις στον Ασπρόπυργο, εξασφαλίζοντας υπερσύγχρονες γραμμές παραγωγής µε διεθνείς προδιαγραφές, επεξεργασίας και κοπής των προϊόντων.

Η ιστορία συνεχίζεται… µε συστατικό την αγάπη για το άριστο κρέας και την υπογραφή πάντα της ΝΑΝΟΣ ΑΕΒΕ.

Name: HICARSA
Description:
De la dehesa al paladar: 

HICARSA lleva a cabo un proceso integral de producción de sus productos de cerdo ibérico, desde la crianza de los propios animales hasta la venta de sus productos tradicionales, es decir de la dehesa al paladar.

Crianza propia de los animales:

La empresa realiza una cría propia de animales de raza ibérica en sus fincas y dehesas ubicadas en la provincia de Cáceres para poder elaborar y ofrecer al consumidor los mejores productos de cerdo ibérico.

Salazón y curación de los productos:

HICARSA lleva a cabo tanto la salazón como la curación en tierras de Salamanca. El proceso de salazón se realiza en las modernas instalaciones de Guijuelo con unas condiciones óptimas. Por su parte, el proceso de curación se realiza en Béjar, viéndose favorecido este por el clima y altitud particular de la localidad.

Distribución y comercialización:

La empresa pone a disposición de su cliente final una variada oferta de productos ibéricos de Salamanca con la mejor calidad y frescura gracias a una amplia red de distribución y venta por todo el territorio nacional.

Dive into the refreshing revolution with our THC-infused seltzers – the ultimate buzz without the booze! Swap your usual go-to drinks for a new adventure with our tantalizing range of THC seltzers. Looking for the perfect alternative to alcoholic drinks? You just hit the jackpot!

Why settle for the ordinary when you can elevate your vibe with our social tonics? Hempzer THC Seltzers aren’t just beverages; they’re experiences waiting to be shared. Picture this: a cool can of Delta 9 THC seltzer in hand, good company, and zero regrets. Now that’s what we call a party!

Description:
Welcome to KW10 Foods, your trusted partner in sourcing and delivering high-quality essential ingredients to shops and restaurants in Malta and beyond. Our mission is to be the cornerstone of your culinary success, ensuring that you have access to the finest oils, flour, sugar, and other key ingredients that make your dishes exceptional.

Our Commitment:
At KW10 Foods, we take immense pride in our role as a dependable supplier for businesses in the food and hospitality industry. Our commitment to excellence is reflected in every product we source and deliver. With a focus on oils, flour, sugar, and other vital ingredients, we understand the significance of these building blocks in your culinary creations.

Why Choose Us?
1. Quality Assurance: We meticulously select and source only the best ingredients, ensuring that your kitchen is equipped with the finest products available.

2. Reliability: KW10 Foods is your partner in consistency. You can rely on us to deliver on time, every time, ensuring your business operates smoothly.

3. Extensive Range: Our product range encompasses a wide variety of oils, flour, sugar, and more. We aim to be your one-stop destination for all your ingredient needs.

4. Beyond Borders: While we call Malta home, our commitment knows no bounds. We serve businesses not only in Malta but also extend our services to cater to clients in various parts of the world.

Connect with us to discover how KW10 Foods can be your culinary ally, providing you with the highest-quality ingredients, exceptional service, and unwavering support to fuel your success. Join us in the pursuit of culinary excellence.

Name: The Gourmet Shelf
Description: Our all-Australian range of gourmet products are handpicked from specialist providers around the country. The Gourmet Shelf’s signature selection is full of eclectic flavours that are uniquely Australian, sourced with passion and delivered with pride.

Name: Misty Cliffs Premium Non-Alc Wines
Description: Misty Cliffs offers premium non-alcoholic wines crafted for wine lovers who want to cut back on their alcohol intake without compromising on flavor or experience. Made with pure ingredients—free from additives, concentrates, and flavorants—our wines are carefully de-alcoholized to preserve their vibrant coastal flavors. Whether you're sober-curious or simply seeking balance, unwind elegantly and stay connected with Misty Cliffs.

Name: Barberton Cold Storage
Description:
Welcome to Barberton Cold Storage, your trusted supplier of premium wholesale frozen products. Established in 2003 by the BJ Group, our journey began in meat processing with a focus on beef, lamb, and pork. Over the years, we have evolved into a top distributor of frozen foods, offering a diverse range of products including poultry, fish, dairy, and other essentials.

Our Commitment to Quality

At Barberton Cold Storage, quality is at the heart of everything we do. We adhere to stringent quality control standards to ensure that every product leaving our facility meets the highest standards. Our goal is to provide frozen goods that not only meet but exceed expectations, ensuring that our clients can trust the reliability and safety of our products.

Wide Range of Products

From frozen chicken and fish to premium beef, lamb, and pork, we offer a comprehensive selection of frozen goods for wholesale customers. Representing top brands such as Goldi, Rainbow, Supreme, Mikon, I&J, and Pescanova Fish, we are proud to be a one-stop destination for all your frozen food needs. Whether you’re looking for poultry, seafood, or pantry essentials, we have it all.

Customer-Centric Approach

Our success is built on our customer-first philosophy. By continuously adapting to the needs of our clients, we strive to provide not just high-quality products but also excellent service. We are committed to maintaining strong relationships with our customers by offering convenience, reliability, and consistent quality.

Our Values

Integrity, sustainability, and ethical practices form the foundation of our operations. At Barberton Cold Storage, we believe in fostering long-term relationships with our customers, suppliers, and community. We take pride in supporting local businesses and contributing to economic growth.

Looking Forward

As part of the BJ Group, we are dedicated to expanding our presence and enhancing our services. Discover Barberton Cold Storage for all your wholesale needs.

Name: Vino Zero LTD

At Vino Zero, we specialise in premium dealcoholized wines that set a new benchmark for quality in the no & low alcohol space. Curated across a diverse range of styles, our portfolio is handpicked for wine lovers who want all the complexity, ritual, and joy of wine—without the alcohol.

We proudly partner with leading hospitality venues and specialist retailers across the UK, while also offering direct-to-consumer access through our online store—making it easier than ever to enjoy outstanding alcohol-free wine at home.

Our mission is simple: to build genuine, lasting relationships with our trade partners and our customers, and to make exceptional alcohol-free wine more accessible, more visible, and more celebrated.

We believe in the power of great wine to bring people together—at every table, for every moment. And we believe everyone deserves a seat.
Cheers to inclusive choices.

Name: Fruites del Baix Llobregat S.L.

En Fruites del Baix Llobregat S.L. encontrará la más amplia gama de productos agrícolas.

Our mission is to provide high-quality, competitively priced food products tailored to the specific needs of hypermarkets and retail groups across the French overseas territories and francophone Africa.

We work with a broad network of certified producers and manufacturers around the world to source the best products — national brands, private labels, or custom-made — while optimizing costs, lead times, and quantities. Our approach reduces transport costs and strengthens supply chain reliability.

Our strengths:
In-depth market knowledge of overseas and African regions
Global supplier network with strong quality standards
Regulatory compliance and quality control
Customized support for purchasing departments and retail distributors

At SOLEYNIS, we go beyond trading — we build bridges between cultures, markets, and industrial know-how.

Description:
We, Qu essentials, based in India, are one of the leading organic food producer, processor and supplier to all over the globe. By the mean of backward integration and contract farming, Qu essentials is associated with group of farmers in different areas for different products and known for its expertise in producing, processing and preserving organic food at large scale.

India has built up unparalleled competence in organic agriculture. Organic farming is deep rooted into our tradition running through ages. Organic farming is not just business but way of life for our farmers. The new and revived organic movement is worldwide accepted. India has become destination for fairly traded organic produce.

Qu essentials has pioneered organic quinoa, chia and millets farming by joining hands with thousands of dedicated farmers across the country. We built capabilities in seed selection to crop introduction to farmer training and adopting world class processing technologies to Indian landscape.

As the official distributor for many prestigious brands in America, Anka Foods plays a pivotal role in bringing authentic and high-quality products to the market.

With a strong commitment to excellence, Anka Foods is dedicated to becoming the foremost food distributor in the USA, delivering unparalleled taste and culinary experiences.

Join Anka Foods on a journey into the future, where reliability and quality are the foundation of everything we do.

Name: Agroson's LLC
Description:
Welcome to Agrosons LLC, where our passion for quality, commitment to excellence, and a rich family legacy converge to redefine the produce industry.

Our Story:
Founded in January 2010 by siblings María José Suárez and Andrés, Agrosons is more than a business – it's a journey woven into the fabric of generational wisdom and entrepreneurial spirit. From the pioneering force of María José's grandmother to her mother's thriving venture, Agrosons emerged as a testament to strength, resilience, and commitment.

Our Mission:
At Agrosons, we go beyond delivering premium Mexican papaya to NYC. We are storytellers, sharing the narrative of generations past with every box. Our mission is to build a bridge between our family's history and the tables of those who choose Agrosons.

Our Vision:
Agrosons envisions itself as a beacon of innovation and tradition in the marketing of premium Mexican papaya. We aim to create an emotional connection with our customers, bringing the essence of our family's story to life through our produce.

Values:
Family Commitment: Agrosons is a familial commitment passed down through generations, evident in every box we deliver.

Passion for Quality: Each papaya represents our dedication to excellence, paying tribute to the hands that plant, cultivate, and harvest.

Caring with Love: Our customers are part of our extended family. We provide care with love, delivering experiences and traditions beyond papaya.

Innovation with Respect: We embrace innovation while respecting our roots, creating a harmonious blend of tradition and modernity.

Join Us:
As we grow and innovate, Agrosons invites you to be part of our journey. Follow us for updates, insights, and a taste of the premium experience we bring to the produce industry. Together, let's build a legacy of freshness, quality, and tradition.

Name: MechaMena
Description:
MechaMena – The Heart and Future of Ethiopian Green Coffee

We are a family-owned company that produces and supplies premium Ethiopian green coffee. With a rich history and passion, our farmers provide some of the best coffee in the world.
 
Ethiopia, known as the birthplace of coffee, inspires us to honor its history and empower the farmers who make it possible.

MechaMena earns seven-figure revenue each year, but for us, it’s more than business. It’s about preserving coffee’s heritage and sharing the world’s favorite drink with care and respect.

We currently supply green coffee to the GCC region and have plans to grow into the European and global markets. We are building strong B2B relationships and connecting directly with companies online to offer authentic coffee right from the source, with trust and full transparency.

Our vision is clear and bold:

•	Warehouses in the GCC and Europe for faster delivery and great service.
•	A digital platform that gives clients full visibility, less paperwork, more clarity, and trusted connections.

We believe in true sustainability—environmentally, socially, and economically—not just profit. To us, this is about honoring Ethiopia’s coffee legacy, helping farmers live better, and delivering genuine coffee to the world.

We are eager to connect and work with businesses that share our values: quality, trust, and respect for heritage. 

Together, we can write a new chapter in coffee history.

Name: Torrefazione Caffè New York
Description:
Caffè New York: 90 anni di passione per l’eccellenza del caffè

Ogni giorno, milioni di persone celebrano un piccolo rito quotidiano: una tazzina di caffè. Che sia ristretto, forte o dolce, per noi il caffè è più di una bevanda, è un’esperienza, un momento di connessione e relax. E in ogni sorso, la qualità è essenziale.

Da oltre 90 anni, Caffè New York è sinonimo di eccellenza. La nostra storia inizia nel 1930, quando Ugo Incerpi fondò il suo bar in Corso Roma a Montecatini e decise di tostare personalmente il caffè per i suoi clienti. La qualità del suo caffè era così straordinaria che ben presto le persone viaggiavano persino da Firenze per gustarlo.

Oggi, con la stessa dedizione, ci impegniamo a offrire un caffè che racchiude tradizione, innovazione e passione. Ogni chicco racconta una storia di cura e qualità.

Name: Baobab Exports Ltd
Description:
Baobab Exports Ltd is the sales and marketing arm of the world's major Baobab bulk producer. Producing high quality Baobab Fruit Powder is all about experience, and our team has decades of combined knowledge and expertise to support your business in your efforts. 

We are Africa's only Baobab operation that combines FairWild, Organic and FSSC 22000 certifications. Our production facility is in South Africa and we export all over the world. We work directly with over 4,500 registered rural African harvesters. Our supply chains are fully traceable and sustainable, with environmental and training programs in place to protect the Baobab tree populations. As a result, we are a member of the Union for Ethical Biotrade. We are also founders of the African Baobab Alliance, a non-profit organisation dedicated to growing the positive social and environmental impact of the Baobab industry. 

Warehouse locations:
· California warehouse - servicing North and South American customers
· Netherlands warehouse - servicing European and Middle Eastern customers
· South Africa warehouse - servicing Asian and Australasian customers

Name: Kondrauer
Description:
Schon viele Hundert Jahre wird die Marke Kondrauer wegen ihrer Qualität und dem Geschmack geschätzt. Es war das Trinkwasser der Mönche des Klosters Waldsassen und wurde seit dem 17. Jahrhundert an den Hof der Wittelsbacher nach München geliefert. Seit 120 Jahren ist der Brunnen ein Familienbetrieb. Seit Jahrhunderten steht die Marke Kondrauer für bestes Mineralwasser aus Bayern.

Das Unternehmen produziert heute ein umfangreiches Sortiment aus Mineralwasser, Schorlen, Limonaden und kalorienarmen Getränken der Marke DEIT.

Mit dem Unternehmen fest verbunden ist auch die Frankenwald Mineralbrunnen-Getränke GmbH & Co. KG in Naila-Hölle. Als einer der ersten Brunnenbetriebe baut Kondrauer hier bereits im Jahr 1998 eine Abfüllanlage für die verbraucherfreundlichen PET-Mehrwegflaschen. Im Jahr 2019 wurde dieser Standort um weitere Hallen und einer neu installierten Produktionsanlage erweitert.

Die Produktion in Waldsassen wurde Ende 2019 sukzessiv ins 90 km entfernte Naila bei Bad Steben verlagert. Seit Mai 2020 werden dort alle Kondrauer Produkte aus der neu erschlossenen Kondrauer Quelle abgefüllt. Diese zeichnet sich durch Ihre außerordentlich reinen Beschaffenheit und extremen Ergiebigkeit aus. Das Mineralwasser ist natriumarm und zudem für die Zubereitung von Säuglingsnahrung geeignet.

Der Kondrauer Mineral- und Heilbrunnen ist ein innovatives Unternehmen, das sich der Gesundheit der Konsumenten, der bayerischen Tradition und einer ökologisch sinnvollen Produktion verpflichtet fühlt.

Als einer von wenigen Mineralbrunnen setzt die Marke Kondrauer zu 100% auf umweltfreundliche und nachhaltige Mehrweggebinde. Seit Oktober 2019 ist das Kondrauer Mineralwasser in der neuen 0,75 l N2 Brunnenflasche im formschönen Individualkasten erhältlich

Helm Coffee is an LGBTQ+, women-owned coffee roaster in Indianapolis, IN.

The way we choose and roast coffees reflects how we want to show up in life: constantly curious, and with purpose and passion for what we do. 

At Helm, we want to help you show up that way too - to be at the *helm* of your own life, full of authenticity and courage, ready for adventure and pursuing your dreams. We believe a good cup of coffee - and a connected community - can help you to do just that.

C'est là où le fondateur de Vanousy est né, dans la SAVA, au moment où les lianes de vanille fleurissent, généralement autour du mois de Septembre, que la pollinisation de la vanille commence.

Dans cette région particulièrement reconnue pour la production de vanille.

C'est un long processus qui commence de plus de 6 mois pour pouvoir retrouver dans vos assiettes et vos plats de l'authentique vanille de Madagascar Vanousy.

Nos gousses de vanille bourbon sublimeront vos créations grâce à son fort taux en vanilline, du riz au lait, aux infusions en passant par les plus belles pâtisseries de votre carnet de recette avec ses notes de cacao et touches de caramel.

Name: SETFOOD GIDA
Description:
Setfood, İstanbul’un her bölgesinde restoran ve işletmelere profesyonel gıda tedariği sağlayan güvenilir bir çözüm ortağıdır. Kuru gıdadan donuk ürünlere, hijyen grubundan baharatlara, konserve ürünlerden ithal ürünlere, kuruyemiş grubundan pastacılık ürünlerine, şarküteri ve süt ürünlerine kadar sektörün önde gelen markalarıyla iş birliği içinde çalışıyor; mutfakların tüm temel ihtiyaçlarını karşılayacak çok geniş ve güçlü bir ürün yelpazesiyle hizmet vermekteyiz. 4.000’den fazla ürün depolama ve lojistik süreçlerimizi kalite standartlarına göre yöneterek, saf, seçilmiş ve kontrol edilmiş malzemeleri özenle hazırlayarak işletmelere en doğru şekilde ulaştırıyoruz.

Bugün 300’ü aşkın, Türkiye’nin önde gelen fine dining zincir restoran grupları ve otelleri başta olmak üzere - restoran, bar ve cafe işletmeleriyle aktif olarak çalışıyoruz. Haftanın 6 günü (Pazar hariç) güçlü operasyon ekibimiz ile siparişleri hızlı, düzenli ve sürdürülebilir şekilde teslim ediyoruz.

Sektördeki 30 yıllık tecrübesiyle, doğrudan çözüm ve sonuç odaklı çalışmayı benimseyen Setfood, mutfakların ihtiyaç duyduğu kaliteyi doğru zamanda ve doğru koşullarda ulaştırmayı prensip edinmiş, güven odaklı bir gıda tedarik markasıdır.

Name: 2-Serve
Description:
Founded in 2006 by greengrocer David Watkins, 2-Serve draws on over two decades of David's experience in London's New Covent Garden Market. Beginning as a warehouse packer and working his way up to a respected buyer, David used his expertise to create a business dedicated to supplying hand-picked, high-quality seasonal fruit and vegetables to London's hospitality and catering. 

A true family business, we are run by David, his wife Pamela, and their sons Archie and Josh, each with their own expertise. While David and Archie ensure that only the finest produce leaves the warehouse, Josh provides essential communications to customers, ensuring they have what they need. Pamela holds down the fort, ensuring every customer request is handled with care and efficiency. This personal touch at every level sets us apart from our competitors.


Based in  New Covent Garden Market, we are uniquely positioned to offer swift, tailored service to Central London and surrounding areas. Our  core values of quality, communication, service, and price are rooted in David’s core beliefs and hands-on market experience and continue to guide the business today. We  remain committed to responsible practices and continues to expand its offerings while maintaining its passion for exceptional fresh produce.

Door de jaren heen werden echter meer en meer drankhandelaars lid van Districo en zo ontstonden twee duidelijk gescheiden divisies; een divisie supermarkten en een divisie drankhandelaars.

De divisie van drankhandelaars groeide zo sterk dat in 2012 een vergaande herstructurering werd doorgevoerd waarbij de divisie supermarkten en buurtwinkels stopgezet werd. Sinds 2012 ligt de focus van cvba Districo dus helemaal op de drankhandelaars en drinkcenters. 

Deze beslissing maakte een grotere servicegraad mogelijk voor onze leden / drankenspeciaalzaken.

Description:
الإخوة جروب هي شركة متخصصة في تجارة وتوزيع المواد الغذائية، تأسست في عام 1930م، ونمت لتصبح واحدة من الشركات الرائدة في قطاعها في مصر. تتسم الشركة بشبكة توزيع واسعة تمتد عبد المحافظات المصرية، حيث تدير أكثر من 500 نقطة بيع في الوقت الحالي.

Description:
Food Material is more than just an importer of food and wine from Spain. It stands for a way of life. We represent the purest natural products, without industrial processes. Each of the products continues a long tradition, in some cases even centuries old, and each evokes emotions. Some you haven’t felt before. We want your human side to experience something: laughter, feelings of joy, love. We want to redefine the limits and leave everything mainstream behind and also inspire those who want such an experience.

Our fascination with gastronomy and culture leads us to believe that a healthier, more sustainable, and better life is possible. A life in which like-minded people meet to enjoy togetherness over a meal, because we are what we eat at the end of the day. This is the basis of our motivation and passion for exceptional products.

Name: HFC
Description:
Serving the needs of others is a privilege. We find our true selves as we journey together serving others as they, in their own way, serve us. This is the essence of community.

From the genesis of Hallehluya Food Company, Debbie and Jim Pesce have been intentional in creating opportunity and connection. Early on, they recognized that as Hallehluya grew, so could their efforts to serve others.

With boots on the ground, financial investment, strategic partnership and mentorship, Hallehluya continues to actively engage with both local and global communities.

With a simple goal to put food on the family table, Jim and Debbie Pesce incorporated Hallehluya in 1994. The business began with the delivery of poultry products to local Ontario Schools and Independent Grocers. The company grew quickly through a fortuitous strand of unique opportunities, and resulted in the opening of a retail store, the expansion of product offerings, and establishing a trading centre with product development services.

This growth strengthened Hallehluya’s key relationships, as well as its capacity within the food industry. Such opportunities opened the door for Debbie and Jim to begin creating alternative ways to do business; ways which reflected their deep-rooted and genuine desire to help others. Debbie and Jim became creative in the development of employment opportunities, fundraising, community support and mentorship. Bringing people together and creating a synergistic support system to help others with a hand up.
With over 25 years of experience in processing, packaging, distribution, trade and strategic collaboration, Hallehluya has created a momentum of sustainable and profitable business with tremendous philanthropic impact. Today, Hallehluya continues to grow embracing new partnerships, empowering staff, customers, and suppliers to be the best they can be in business and in service to others.

Description:
Kim Guan Hap Kee Sdn Bhd (KGHK), also known as Kim Guan, is a well-established and experienced food and consumer products distributor in Sabah, Malaysia. Founded as a sole proprietorship in 1976 and incorporated as a private limited company in 1988, KGHK has since expanded to become a successful distributor in East Malaysia, serving over 700 distribution points.

Our company, a leading importer and distributor of high-quality canned food products. We pride ourselves on providing our customers with a wide range of delicious and nutritious canned foods from around the world.

Our company has years of experience in the industry and has built a strong reputation for excellence in quality, service, and affordability. We work closely with our network of trusted suppliers to source only the best canned foods available, ensuring that our customers receive products that meet the highest standards of quality and taste.

Our product line includes a diverse selection of canned fruits, vegetables, meats, seafood, and more. 

As a distributor, we are committed to providing our customers with unparalleled service and support. We work closely with our clients to ensure that their orders are processed quickly and efficiently, and we offer flexible delivery options to meet their unique needs.

Whether you are a grocery store, restaurant, or food service provider, we have the canned food products you need to satisfy your customers' appetites. Contact us today to learn more about our product line and how we can help you grow your business with high-quality canned food products.

Name: VTL Invest Corp
Description:
VTL Corp – Mission Statement
At VTL Corp, our mission is to provide high-quality, affordable food products from around the world to the Vietnamese market, while promoting sustainability and supporting local communities. We are dedicated to enhancing food security by sourcing seafood and meats responsibly, helping to reduce pressure on local ecosystems.

Through the export of premium Vietnamese agricultural products, we empower farmers and contribute to the global appreciation of Vietnam’s rich natural resources. Guided by our core values of quality, integrity, and innovation, we aim to nourish lives, build lasting partnerships, and create shared value for our customers, partners, and the environment.

Our Product Portfolio
Frozen Seafood:
We offer a wide selection of frozen seafood including Yellowtails, Striped Bonito, and Pacific Mackerel Whole Round, sourced from Japan, Korea, China, and other countries. Our products are available in various carton weights and sizes to meet diverse customer needs.

Atlantic Salmon Products:
Our range includes frozen by-products such as heads, fins, and bellies from Norway and other European countries. We also supply fresh Atlantic Salmon Whole Round, available gutted, headless, or in customized cuts—always a customer favorite.

Vietnamese Agricultural Exports:
We specialize in exporting fresh and frozen coconuts from the Mekong Delta, meeting the stringent quality standards of the EU, US, and China.

Specialty Items:
Our offerings include frozen red hot chili peppers that meet the high standards of Korea and China. Additionally, we provide frozen Pangasius and shrimp upon request.

Name: GDA - Groupement Distribution Alimentaire
Description:
C’est plus de 47 ans au service de la boulangerie pâtisserie qui ne demande que des produits tracés et de qualité. Avec plus de 7 000 références en stock, GDA (Groupement et Distribution Alimentaire), partenaire de 3 groupements nationaux, est l’une des références incontournables à Paris et région parisienne. 

Artisan boulanger, pâtissier ou traiteur, vous tenez de manière indiscutable à votre indépendance qui fait la diversité et la richesse de votre profession? Comme vous, GDA défend ses valeurs de grossiste différent par sa proximité auprès de ses clients franciliens mais aussi par sa réactivité. Les clients trouveront toujours une équipe de commerciaux disponibles pour répondre favorablement à leur demande. Le service ne s’arrête pas là ; des assistantes commerciales conseillent tous les jours au téléphone et veillent à ce que, sous 48 heures, le produit soit dans votre fournil. L’artisan reste la personne la plus importante pour que l’entreprise demeure leader sur son marché. Mieux que cela, en cas de dépannage, pour chaque appel avant 5H du matin, GDA peut garantir la livraison de votre dépannage de dernière minute dans la journée.

GDA, partenaire de 3 groupements de grossistes indépendants

Les hommes sont toujours plus forts lorsqu’ils sont unis. Cette force provient notamment des 3 groupements auxquels GDA appartient : Eudipat, pour les matières premières et le petit matériel, France Confiserie, pour la confiserie et les boissons pour le snacking, et L’Echo du goût pour tous les produits surgelés, crus, cuits ou pré-cuits. Le choix pour GDA d’appartenir à ces trois groupements (et d’en être acteur en appartenant au conseil) témoigne de la volonté d’apporter une réponse à chacune de vos questions, avec une véritable sélection de produits de qualité. Le fait d’être un grossiste indépendant permet de faire évoluer la gamme en fonction de l’évolution des besoins des clients.

Name: HOA DUNG TEA & COFFEE
Description:
Hoa Dung Tea & Coffee: A Legacy of Vietnamese Tea Excellence

Founded on the passion for Vietnamese tea and the rich traditions of Thái Nguyên's tea-making culture, Hoa Dung Tea & Coffee is a specialty tea and coffee supplier dedicated to offering high-quality products to tea lovers worldwide. Our journey is rooted in deep expertise, generations of tea production knowledge, and a commitment to preserving and promoting Vietnam's finest teas.

Commitment to Quality
At Hoa Dung Tea & Coffee, quality is our utmost priority. Every batch of tea is selected carefully, ensuring that only the best leaves are used in our products. Our teas are meticulously processed to preserve their flavor and health benefits. We uphold strict quality control standards across every step of the production process, from the tea fields to the packaging line.

Our premium teas, including Thái Nguyên Green Tea, Oolong Tea, and Black Tea, are highly regarded for their exquisite flavor profiles and exceptional quality. Each of our tea varieties is sourced directly from the lush, green fields of Thái Nguyên, where the perfect combination of soil, climate, and traditional farming methods results in unparalleled taste.

- Our Values
At the heart of our business are values that have been passed down through generations:

- Quality: We are dedicated to delivering only the best, ensuring that every product reflects our commitment to excellence.

- Tradition: Our tea-making process is steeped in centuries-old traditions, ensuring that our products retain their authentic flavor and character.

- Sustainability: We work hand-in-hand with local farmers to support sustainable farming methods.

- Our Vision for the Future:

Hoa Dung Tea & Coffee is committed to expanding our reach and introducing Vietnamese tea and coffee to a global audience. Our goal is to become a leading exporter of specialty teas and coffees while staying true to our roots and the values that have defined us since the beginning.

Name: Rene The Lovebrand
Description:
Rene is the world’s first love brand. Our mission is simple yet profound: to spread love everywhere. We do this in every possible and impossible way, in every possible and impossible place.

For us, love knows no limits—no borders, no language barriers and no eras. It is a universal force that connects people across cultures and continents. That’s why we transcend physical space—to be a constant, quiet presence in your most meaningful moments, reminding the world that love is what truly moves it forward.

It is a living concept that flows seamlessly from the pages of a book to the packaging of a fine chocolate, and from a poetic line on a ceramic mug to the label of a hand-selected wine. We operate within four categories that may seem distinct at first glance, yet they are harmoniously woven together.

All these realms breathe from the same core: the power of words and the profound resonance of emotion. At RENE, we don’t just offer objects; we curate the vessels of connection. We prove that whether it is through a verse or a vintage, the goal remains the same: to refine the way we give, receive, and coexist.

Name: Margaret River Roasting Co
Description:
Margaret River Roasting Co., established in Western Australia, has rapidly evolved into a distinguished name in the coffee industry over the last seven years. Our company has been recognised for its dedication to quality and sustainability, earning accolades such as the 2023 Telstra State Finalist for Promoting Sustainability and the 2023 Business of the Year at the South West Excellence Business Awards.

Our Foundation:
Our operations are built on four fundamental values: Community, Unity, Sustainability, and Accountability. These principles are not just theoretical; they are practical and impact every aspect of our business, from the selection of beans to the delivery of the final product. We pride ourselves on being more than a coffee roasting company; we are a collective of individuals committed to making a significant impact. Our team, located across the South West and Perth, works together to produce coffee that tastes good and carries a story of environmental stewardship and community engagement.

Working with Us:
Margaret River Roasting Co. offers not just a job; we're providing participation in a culture of innovation, community, and growth. Our employees enjoy a dynamic work environment where professional development is encouraged and individual contributions are valued. We are looking for individuals who share our passion for coffee, sustainability, and making a positive difference in the communities we serve.

Our Mission:
We are dedicated to delivering exceptional coffee while paving the way for a sustainable future. Margaret River Roasting Co. stands for quality, from our ethical sourcing practices to our commitment to minimising our environmental footprint. Join us in our mission to serve excellent coffee and make a positive impact on our planet and its people.

Name: IPARLAB DISTRIBUTION
Description:
Iparlab Distribution est une plateforme de produits fermiers basques sous signe de qualité destinée à la restauration et appartenant à un collectif d’une quarantaine de paysans dont plus de 80% engagés en agriculture biologique.
Notre association est née d’un projet collectif paysan porté par la fédération Arrapitz et ses partenaires, avec le soutien de la communauté d’agglo du Pays Basque et de la RNA

Nous proposons une large gamme de produits labellisés (une trentaine de légumes, des produits laitiers de vache, brebis et chèvre, des produits d’épicerie, des œufs et de la viande) avec près de 200 références et des conditionnements adaptés à la restauration professionnelle.

Nos clients sont des crèches et des établissements scolaires engagés dans la démarche Manger Bio & Local du département ainsi que des Restaurants gastronomiques locaux.

Notre charte qualité assure la traçabilité des produits qui sont issus exclusivement des fermes adhérentes.

Name: Pro Gustum GmbH
Description:

Gute Lebensmittel mit wertigen Inhaltsstoffen, möglichst kurz und effizient transportiert, sowie recyclebar verpackt:
Das ist unsere Expertise!

Außergewöhnlich hochwertige Lebensmittel, natürlich und aufwendig hergestellt, die ganz besondere Freuden wecken und den Gourmet in uns ansprechen:
Das ist unsere Leidenschaft!

Siamo un team appassionato e dedicato che si impegna a fornire una vasta gamma di prodotti alimentari di alta qualità ai nostri clienti nel settore della distribuzione.
Da noi troverete un assortimento completo di prodotti provenienti dai migliori fornitori nazionali e internazionali. La nostra missione è offrire soluzioni alimentari convenienti, deliziose e di alta qualità che rispondano alle esigenze dei nostri clienti.
Ci distinguiamo per la nostra logistica efficiente, garantendo consegne tempestive e affidabili per mantenere gli scaffali dei vostri negozi sempre ben forniti. Collaboriamo con le migliori marche del settore alimentare, garantendo ai nostri clienti una selezione eclettica di prodotti che rispecchiano le tendenze di consumo e soddisfano i gusti variopinti dei consumatori.

Name: TortiFruttasrl
Description: Welcome to the world of TortiFrutta srl , where efficiency and quality come together in one experience. We are one of the largest stalls in the Milan fruit and vegetable market and are proud to offer a wide range of items that will not only meet your needs, but save you valuable time. Our commitment to fast service is what sets us apart. Here, customers walk in, make their purchase, and in an incredibly short amount of time-between half an hour and an hour-they are ready to return to their businesses with merchandise ready to sell at their counter. We understand that time is money, and our goal is to maximize both for you. Our team is the beating heart of the company. We are a cohesive team that loves teamwork, with a growing number of members who help expedite every aspect of our service, thus ensuring total customer satisfaction. Having grown up in this environment from a young age, we know how important it is to maintain a complete and consistent product range to build solid loyalty. Through continuous research, we ensure continuity of supply. Our supply chain is completed with trusted partners, allowing us to supply the same items for 12 months of the year, changing production areas but always maintaining high Italian quality. We are proud to be part of this community and to serve the fruit and vegetable community with dedication and passion. Join us on this journey to quality, efficiency and impeccable service. Contact us today to find out how we can help you improve your business.

Name: Faro Luxury Gourmet
Description:
Somos importadores y distribuidores exclusivos en Perú de marcas italianas gourmet con historia, tradición y excelencia reconocida internacionalmente.

Nuestro propósito es acercar la autenticidad, el sabor y el arte culinario de Italia a los paladares peruanos más exigentes. Trabajamos junto a hoteles, restaurantes, chefs y amantes de la buena mesa que valoran la calidad, el diseño y la herencia gastronómica.

Representamos marcas italianas con estándares de excelencia en cada categoría:

 Aceite de oliva Coppini – De cultivo y prensado tradicional, con Denominación de Origen y premios internacionales.
 Delicatessen de trufa negra y blanca – Aceites infusionados, carpaccios, mantequillas, mieles y cremas con el inconfundible sabor del lujo.
 Cafeteras Espresso Due y SpumaLatte – La experiencia del espresso italiano en casa o en el negocio.
 Hornos de leña Tranquilli Forni – Tecnología y diseño italiano para pizzas y asados perfectos.
 Vinos italianos seleccionados – Propuestas únicas que realzan la gastronomía.
 Textiles Sauro Bacchi – Elegancia italiana en cada mesa.

Más que importadores, somos embajadores del estilo de vida italiano en el Perú: una fusión entre sabor, diseño y tradición.

Participamos activamente en ferias gastronómicas, degustaciones y colaboraciones con chefs y marcas de prestigio.

 Con sede en Lima – envíos a todo el país.
 www.faroluxurygourmet.com
 Escríbenos para alianzas, compras o distribución.

Name: Pacific Coast Importadora de Pescados
Description:
Somos uma importadora/distribuidora de pescados comprometida em fornecer os melhores produtos aos nossos clientes. Estabelecidos no mercado desde 2022, adentramos um setor competitivo, repleto de grandes players. No entanto, construímos nossa empresa com um propósito claro: ser o parceiro ideal para nossos clientes.

Nosso foco está na qualidade, transparência e eficiência em todos os aspectos de nosso trabalho. Trabalhamos com uma ampla variedade de pescados e frutos do mar, como salmão, camarão, tilápia, pescada branca, lula e outras iguarias. Importamos diretamente dos maiores polos produtores, como Argentina, Chile, Santa Catarina, Uruguai, Equador, entre outros.

Com escritórios estrategicamente localizados em São Paulo (capital) e São José do Rio Preto, cuidamos de todo o processo, desde as vendas até a distribuição. Hoje, atendemos clientes em todo o território brasileiro, com destaque para restaurantes de diversos portes e segmentos, hotéis, distribuidores e muito mais.

Nossa abordagem é pautada em um atendimento personalizado, onde buscamos compreender as necessidades específicas de cada cliente. Reconhecemos os desafios que nossos clientes enfrentam diariamente para se destacar e agradar seus próprios clientes, e estamos aqui para ajudá-los.

Somos uma equipe de profissionais inquietos e entusiasmados, sempre prontos para oferecer soluções eficientes e auxiliar nossos clientes a alcançarem seus objetivos. Se você está em busca de um fornecedor confiável e comprometido no ramo de pescados e frutos do mar, não hesite em entrar em contato conosco. Juntos, podemos trilhar o caminho do sucesso.

Name: Australian By Nature Pty Ltd
Description:
Australian by Nature is a wholly Australian owned and operated company supplying beehive products, natural health supplements and complementary medicines to Australia and the world. Established in 1995, it has become one of the market leaders in Australian and New Zealand natural health products.

Due to its geography, Australia’s pristine pastures, clear waters and lush forests are isolated from environmental threats and pollutants that exist in other parts of the world. This means our extensive range of royal jelly and propolis products, our Manuka honey (from New Zealand) and Australian floral honeys, as well as our other herbal, marine and land-based products are second to none, providing our customers with ‘the best that nature can supply’.

Our philosophy at Australian by Nature is based on a long term holistic approach to health and wellbeing. Utilising substances found in nature, our products provide a natural solution to promote prevention, recovery and relief from symptoms, as well as supporting your general health and wellbeing. Being exposed to factors which are detrimental to our health, such as poor nutrition, stress, lack of exercise and environmental pollution, we may be lacking in essential nutrients which our bodies require. Our range of natural health supplements support our customers towards optimum health and vitality.

At Australian by Nature, we pride ourselves in supplying premium quality natural health supplements and complementary medicines for your personal health and wellbeing.

Con el tiempo - y mucha pasión, constancia y cercanía - Safaya se transformó en un referente en España en té, superalimentos, mezclas funcionales, especias y productos botánicos de calidad.
 Hoy seguimos creciendo gracias al trabajo de un equipo pequeño, unido y muy vocacional, donde cada persona aporta su talento para construir relaciones duraderas con nuestros clientes.

Name: Zagorin, Agricultural Cooperative of Zagora Pelion
Description:
O Aγροτικός Συνεταιρισμός Ζαγοράς παράγει μήλα ελεγμένα, υψηλής ποιότητας, εγγυημένα και με προστατευμένη ονομασία προέλευσης. Η διάκριση αυτή πιστοποιεί ότι το μήλο Ζαγορίν είναι προϊόν υψηλών προδιαγραφών. Με τη μέθοδο της “Ολοκληρωμένης Παραγωγής” το μήλο Ζαγορίν είναι πεντακάθαρο, υγιεινό, για αυτό το εμπιστεύονται στην Ελλάδα αλλά και σε όλον τον κόσμο. 
Ο Αγροτικός Συνεταιρισμός Ζαγοράς είναι από τους αρχαιότερους συνεταιρισμούς, αφού ιδρύθηκε το 1916 από 199 Ζαγοριανούς. Το 1985 ο Συνεταιρισμός μπαίνει σε νεα φάση δράσης οργανωμένης εμπορικής επιχείρησης. Το εμπορικό σήμα κατοχυρώνεται και κάθε αυθεντικό μήλο Ζαγορίν φέρει το αυτοκόλλητο που το κάνει ξεχωριστό. Το 1996 έρχεται η αναγνώριση με την ετικέτα “Προστατευόμενη Ονομασία Προέλευσης” από την Ευρωπαϊκή Ένωση και τα μήλα Ζαγορίν ταξιδεύουν σε όλον τον κόσμο και κατακτούν τις διεθνείς αγορές 100 χρόνια συνεχούς παραγωγής και παρουσίας στον αγροτικό τομέα!

Name: Cuquerella & Pla S.L.
Description:
Cuquerella & Pla es una empresa española fundada en 2014 que ha logrado establecerse como una de las principales referencias en el sector hortofrutícola. Su enfoque principal se centra en dar un valor añadido a sus productos estrella, como son las batatas, los boniatos y las calabazas tradicionales valencianas.

La empresa destaca por su compromiso con la calidad y la excelencia en todas las etapas de producción. Desde la selección de las semillas hasta el envasado final, Cuquerella & Pla sigue rigurosos estándares para asegurar que sus productos sean frescos, saludables y de la más alta calidad.

La producción de batatas, boniatos y calabazas tradicionales valencianas es el corazón del negocio de Cuquerella & Pla. Estos productos son cultivados en terrenos fértiles y se benefician del clima mediterráneo, lo que les confiere un sabor y una textura únicos. La empresa se enorgullece de preservar las variedades autóctonas y tradicionales de la región, respetando así su herencia cultural y promoviendo la diversidad agrícola.

Además de su enfoque en la producción de batatas, boniatos y calabazas, Cuquerella & Pla también se preocupa por desarrollar prácticas agrícolas sostenibles. La empresa se esfuerza por minimizar el impacto ambiental y utiliza métodos de cultivo respetuosos con el medio ambiente, como la gestión eficiente del agua y el uso responsable de fertilizantes.

La calidad de los productos de Cuquerella & Pla ha sido reconocida en el mercado nacional e internacional. Sus batatas, boniatos y calabazas tradicionales valencianas se caracterizan por su sabor excepcional, su frescura y su apariencia atractiva. La empresa ha establecido relaciones sólidas con distribuidores y minoristas, lo que les ha permitido llegar a una amplia base de consumidores.

Los productos de Cuquerella & Pla son sinónimo de frescura, sabor excepcional y excelencia en cada etapa de producción.
