Name: Los Vinos & Cafe Gdynia - hiszpańskie delikatesy i hurtownia.
Description:
Hiszpańskie wino, kawa, oliwa, herbata. 

Іспанське вино, кава, оливкова олія, чай.

Los Vinos & Cafe – jesteśmy firmą z Gdyni i swoją działalność związaną z importem wina i kawy z Hiszpanii rozpoczęliśmy w 2019 roku. Pomysł na ten biznes powstał w wyniku wieloletniej przyjaźni między Polakiem a Hiszpanem opartej na zaufaniu i dobrych wzajemnych relacjach. 

Dzięki tej relacji Los Vinos & Cafe ma nieograniczony dostęp do najlepszych, wyselekcjonowanych i polecanych win przez sommelierów hiszpańskich.

Kawa Los Vinos & Cafe jest także sprowadzana z Hiszpanii z palarni kawy prowadzonej przez lokalną rodzinną firmę już od 1950 roku. Kawa palona jest z zachowaniem najwyższych standardów i procedur z przeznaczeniem na rynek kataloński, głównie do restauracji i hoteli.

Od marca 2021 roku firma importuje z Hiszpanii także wyśmienite najwyższej jakości oliwy, herbaty oraz czekoladę z oliwą.

Misją Los Vinos & Cafe jest dostarczenie naszym Klientom najwyższej jakości oryginalnych produktów prosto z rynku hiszpańskiego, w przestępnych cenach.

Nasza oferta na wina, kawy, oliwy i herbaty jest skierowana przede wszystkim do:

klientów indywidualnych,
firm cateringowych,
restauracji,
hoteli,
biur,
oraz sklepów ze zdrową żywnością.
Zapraszamy do zapoznania się z naszą ofertą oraz do współpracy.

Los Vinos & Cafe

Name: DISTRIBUIDORA PAGANI
Description:
20 AÑOS DE EXPERIENCIA

La historia nace en Cañada Seca, Provincia de Buenos Aires, con 22 puntos de ventas los cuales se atendían bajo el mando de Rubén Osvaldo Pagani, quien se transformaba en preventista por las mañanas, para luego repartir por las tardes y terminar en la administración por las noches. Esta pasión y ganas de salir adelante fueron valorados por la compañía, la cual ofreció la distribución en la localidad de Pehuajó con 400 PDV. Y allí empezó el sueño, dejando familia, amigos y todo atrás, para comenzar con el desafío de ser una distribuidora modelo de la firma. Fueron años de mucho sacrificio, trabajo e inversiones hasta poder establecernos y hacernos fuerte en la localidad. La compañía, por su parte, siguió premiando este esfuerzo y pasión, a partir del cual en los últimos años se logró llegar a más de 1.600 PDV. Sumando las localidades de Henderson, Mones Cazón, Salliquelo, Tres Lomas, Treinta de Agosto, Casbas, Trenque Lauquen, Pellegrini, Carlos Casares, entre otras. Cada día estamos mas cerca del sueño de ser una distribuidora modelo de la firma. Es lo que nos quita el sueño por las noches, y nos despierta por las mañanas.

Familia Pagani.

Name: Triloknath Traders
Description:
We are a passionate team of nature-lovers, food enthusiasts, and change-makers on a mission to bring pure, organic goodness to your everyday meals.
Born out of a simple idea — that food should be as real as the soil it grows in — our startup is committed to delivering food that is clean, chemical-free, and bursting with natural nutrition.

At our core, we believe that what you eat should nourish your body and respect the earth. That’s why every product we offer is ethically sourced, thoughtfully made, and proudly organic — free from pesticides, preservatives, and empty promises.

We work hand-in-hand with local farmers, support sustainable agriculture, and ensure transparency at every step — from farm to fork.

As a young, driven brand, we’re not just here to sell products. We’re here to inspire a movement — where choosing organic becomes a way of life, and conscious living becomes second nature.

Join us on this journey toward cleaner plates, healthier lives, and a greener planet.

Name: EGRETTA FOODSERVICE
Description:
Egretta Foodservice es una empresa dedicada a proveer soluciones en alimentos para la industria restaurantera, hotelera, autoservicios y cualquier negocio dedicado a la venta y/o preparación de alimentos. Nuestro portafolio de productos abarca desde un abarrote hasta equipo para cocina industrial.

Somos conscientes y respetuosos de los recursos naturales, fuente primordial de nuestra alimentación, por lo que promovemos el consumo de productos frescos provenientes de fuentes sustentables.

Egretta Foodservice nace a partir de un convenio de comercialización con una de las importadoras de pescado fresco de especialidad más importantes del país.

A partir de nuestra fundación, hemos realizado alianzas con pescadores y cooperativas locales así como productores de pescados y mariscos alineados a nuestra visión de un producción y consumo responsable.

Incorporamos otros tipos de proteína animal a nuestro catálogo como Res, Cordero, Pato, Cerdo, así como Jamones y Embutidos Ibéricos. Hoy en día, contamos también con líneas de quesos finos, abarrotes y complementos de barra.

Contamos con soluciones integrales para cada uno de nuestros clientes, pudiendo ofrecer desde un abarrote hasta soluciones logísticas, asesoría, capacitación, equipos industriales o cualquier servicio personalizado que se requiera.

Vijaya sélectionne les variétés et les calibres les plus généreux en goût, et privilégie les régions productrices reconnues pour leur savoir-faire, la qualité et l'originalité de leurs produits.

Ainsi depuis toujours, Vijaya inscrit son développement dans une démarche durable et permet ainsi à de petits producteurs de vivre du fruit de leur travail.

The company was first established in 1961 from an old traditional family business, passed down over several generations and involved in the commercialization of essential oils of citrus fruits. Its founder, Domenico Nava, foreseeing the evolution that soon the market of citrus derivatives would have undergone, went from the commercialization to the direct production of citrus juices and essential oils, creating the first factory for citrus processing.

Thanks to the continuous modernization occurred during the following decades, the company, now in its third generation, is always at the forefront of new production and packaging technologies and it also continues to offer the food & beverage industry high-quality raw materials, which are the natural result of the uninterrupted combination between tradition and innovation.

Name: O.M.S Tamarind Merchants (P) Ltd
Description:
OMS Tamarind Merchants Pvt. Ltd. is a family owned business successfully running for the past 76 years with its head office in Madurai. We are the pioneers of Tamarind trading since 1944. With the sincere commitment and unified leadership, our business has been flourishing in trade from large bulk orders to retail sales.

Tamarind is purchased from all over North and South India. They are first stored in our company cold storage, which is a magnificent, four stored building situated in the Theni district with a storage capacity of 2500 Metric tons. It’s then transported to our tamarind processing centres in the villages around Dindigul district where they are de-seeded, de-fibered, packed and distributed in the market.
Our company was established in the year 1944 by our forefather Mr. O.M.S.S. Sangaralinga Nadar, the founder of OMS Tamarind Merchants. We're a family owned business with Tamarind as its main product. 
With over 5 generations of our family working tirelessly together. Through sheer hard work and commitment, our company grew into a national status as one of the most respected firms in Tamarind production and distribution. 
With over a 100 employees today, We are committed to providing the highest quality products and best customer satisfaction. Our customers are always treated with utmost respect and delivering quality goods, on time at affordable pricing, is our biggest selling point. Our prompt services have earned us a huge reputation in the global market for tamarind and spices. Our strength and support comes from our family, where every member of our family business has a purpose and vision to make the business successful.

Name: SALA CAFFE CO
Description:
Picture this: my grandparents, full of hope & determination, embarked on a journey to Australia, carrying with them the rich tapestry of Italian tradition. My mother, a spirited teenager at the time, faced the challenge of mastering English, while my grandfather, a skilled mechanical engineer, & my grandmother, a passionate opera singer, brought their unique talents and heritage to our family's new Australian home.

I can still vividly recall the aroma of freshly made pasta wafting through the kitchen, the joy of churning gelato by hand, and the warmth of gathering around the table to share a meal lovingly prepared with homegrown herbs, spices, & vegetables from our backyard. Those moments, steeped in tradition and connection, are etched into memory.

During our visits to Italy, we soaked in the essence of our extended family, immersing ourselves in timeless traditions that transcended borders. The values instilled by my mother & nonna resonating – the importance of family, the celebration of good food, & the simple joy of coming together over a coffee.

Now, as a doctor, I often find myself reflecting on these cherished values in a world that seems to spin faster each day. Amidst the hustle and bustle, there's an undeniable allure to the Italian way of life – where meals are not just nourishment but moments of connection, where every sip of coffee is savoured amidst laughter & conversation.

Today, I am blessed with a family of my own, & my incredible wife, Larah, shares my passion for preserving these timeless traditions. Together, we've embarked on a journey with SALA CAFFE CO, curating premium Italian produce that serves as the cornerstone of our commitment to fostering community & connection.

Through SALA CAFFE CO, Larah breathes life into our shared values, inviting others to experience the magic of Italian hospitality & the joy of bringing people together. Because in a world that's constantly changing, there's something special about the enduring traditions.

Description: Emrahoglu, dünyanın müxtəlif yerlərindən xüsusi qida, içki və şirniyyatların idxalını həyata keçirir. Etibarlı təchizat zənciri ilə tərəfdaşlarımıza (pərakəndə satışlar və distribyutorlar) keyfiyyətli məhsul təqdim etmək əsas hədəfimizdir.

Name: Galand Vanille
Description: Quand la passion rencontre l'exception...

Name: Grupo Fortes Alimentos
Description:
O GRUPO FORTES é uma empresa fornecedora de Cestas Básicas e é especializado na prestação de serviços na área de alimentos para os mais diversos ramos de atuação, como comércio, indústria, prestação de serviços, etc.

Temos como foco garantir a qualidade e excelência em alimentos amparada por uma equipe especializada e ampla estrutura organizacional.

Abrange toda área de atuação, de cestas básicas a cozinha industrial, garantindo sempre a satisfação dos clientes e consumidores.

Nosso trabalho também visa agregar valores com relação ao custo/benefício, resultado de colaboradores treinados e capacitados.

Nossa estrutura física atende aos padrões Inmetro, Ministério da Agricultura (MAPA), CRN, SESAU, garantindo que os produtos sejam armazenados e manipulados com toda a segurança e higiene, ou seja, somos a melhor empresa fornecedora de cestas básicas em Campo Grande MS e Região.
Location: Campo Grande, Mato Grosso do Sul

Name: Mirood Caviar
Description:
The first Iranian caviar brand that has made Iranian caviar a global brand.
Expertise in Iranian caviar, selection of caviar grains, regulation of caviar salt, supervision of packaging and special labeling is our mission and our goal is to provide the world with the most luxurious packaging of Iranian caviar.

Name: Prätorius GmbH
Description:
Als Familienunternehmen legen wir großen Wert auf langfristige, persönliche Geschäftsbeziehungen mit Kunden und Lieferanten. Handel ist für uns Vertrauenssache. Jeden Tag.

Wir kennen die individuellen Anforderungen aus dem persönlichen Gespräch mit unseren Kunden, vom regionalen Retailer bis zum internationalen Regierungspartner. Wir wissen um die Stärken unserer Lieferanten und ihrer Sortimente. Wir bringen beides zuverlässig und wirtschaftlich zusammen.

Wir sind seit über 130 Jahren Händler mit Leidenschaft. Ein kompetentes Team, effiziente Logistik, zuverlässiger Transport und die sichere Abwicklung aller Zoll- und Steuerformalitäten – das ist Prätorius.

Name: Danti Giampiero & C srl
Description:
L’azienda Danti opera dal 1965 nella trasformazione e commercializzazione di prodotti spontanei del sottobosco. Oltre a funghi porcini e frutti di bosco congelati, prodotti selezionati con la massima attenzione alla qualità e alle esigenze del cliente, spiccano tra gli articoli trattati dall'azienda Danti i mirtilli spontanei freschi e la Confettura Extra di Mirtillo italiano dell'Appennino tosco emiliano.

Il mirtillo nero proveniente dai boschi dell’Appennino tosco-emiliano, unico prodotto locale trattato dall'azienda, viene conferito dai raccoglitori esperti del luogo per garantire gli usi e le tradizioni nella raccolta e nella lavorazione di questa prelibata perla nera.

L’azienda ha acquisito sempre maggiore importanza, ed è in grado, per mezzo della propria struttura, di avere una pluralità di partner commerciali e di operatori ai quali può fornire un prodotto su misura nello stato e nella tipologia di cui necessitano, anche a marchio cliente. Il tutto mantenendo il massimo riguardo alla cura del prodotto, del consumatore e del territorio in cui operiamo.

Name: De Reyes Alimentos SPA
Description:
De Reyes Alimentos SPA es una empresa chilena dedicada a la venta al por mayor de abarrotes, especializada en abastecer almacenes, minimarkets, negocios familiares, restaurantes y distribuidores en todo el país.

Con un enfoque basado en la tradición, la confianza y la nobleza en el servicio, ofrecemos una amplia variedad de productos esenciales para el rubro alimentario, garantizando calidad, precios competitivos y entregas eficientes.

Nos comprometemos a ser un aliado estratégico para nuestros clientes, entregando un abastecimiento confiable que impulsa el crecimiento de sus negocios y fortalece sus operaciones diarias.

De Reyes Alimentos SPA — Tradición & Nobleza al servicio de Chile.

Name: Adco F&B
Description: Our company aims for selling imported products.

Name: GARIBALDI GmbH
Description:
Italien fängt bei GARIBALDI an

Gemäß unserem Motto “Italien fängt bei GARIBALDI an” erbringen wir wichtige Leistungen zur Versorgung deutscher Endverbraucher, Gastronomiebetriebe und Wiederverkäufer mit hochwertigen Weinen, Spirituosen und Lebensmitteln aus Italien. 

In unserem Programm NONSOLOITALIA bieten wir unseren Kunden rund 150 Weine aus aller Welt an. Dazu leisten wir einen Beitrag zur Förderung der Eß- und Weinkultur nach italienischem Vorbild und organisieren Weinveranstaltungen in Deutschland.

Wir distribuieren unsere Produkte im Großhandel deutschlandweit im qualifizierten Fachhandel und in der Gastronomie. Im Einzelhandel verkaufen wir an Endverbraucher über unsere eigenen Läden, unseren Versandhandel und den Onlineshop.

Zufriedene Kunden sind uns besonders wichtig. Wir bedienen und beraten sie freundlich und zuvorkommend in entspannter Einkaufsatmosphäre. Service und zuverlässige Lieferung sind uns Selbstverständlichkeit. Reklamationen unserer Kunden verstehen wir als konstruktive Kritik und praktische Anregung, die wir dankbar aufnehmen und kulant bearbeiten.

Qualität heißt für uns Respekt vor unseren Mitmenschen. Deshalb ist Qualität das wichtigste Kriterium bei der Auswahl unserer Produkte. Wir achten darauf, daß unsere Weine eine besondere geschmackliche Eigenart aufweisen. Durch enge Zusammenarbeit mit unseren Herstellern und regelmäßige Kontrollen achten wir auch auf die Einhaltung wein- und lebensmittelrechtlicher Vorschriften. Eine sachgemäße Behandlung der Waren in unserem Haus ist Teil unserer Professionalität.

Wein ist mehr! Im Mittelpunkt unserer Arbeit steht der Mensch. Bei der sorgfältigen Auswahl unserer Lieferanten und Produkte achten wir auf ein ausgeglichenes Verhältnis von Respekt vor der Natur, gutem Handwerk und sinnvollem Einsatz von Technik. Gewachsenen Kulturen und Traditionen, die sich im Wein ausdrücken, schenken wir unsere gezielte Aufmerksamkeit. Die Verbindung zu den schönen Künsten macht uns besondere Freude.

Name: Guaxupé Alimentos LTDA
Description:
O Doce de Leite Guaxupé, surgiu em março de 1965 pela Produtos Alimentícios Guaxupé. A primeira lata de doce, trazia o símbolo/brasão da cidade de Guaxupé. Infelizmente não existe mais esta imagem. Em 1966, foi lançado o rótulo com o trevo de 4 folhas e a vaquinha, relembrado até hoje. No período de existência da indústria, até março de 1996, nova linha de produtos foram lançados com muito sucesso; Extrato de Tomate, Compotas, Ervilha e Milho; todos grande sucesso comercial.

No ano de 2021, decidimos relançar o Doce de Leite Guaxupé, utilizando a mesma fórmula de sucesso, com o rejuvenescimento da embalagem, mas utilizando ainda, o trevo de quatro folhas e a vaquinha, agora na embalagem de vidro.

Name: Cherish Ingredients
Description: At Cherish Ingredients, we aim to sell only the best quality products. Sourced from some of the best manufacturers around the globe and stored in our SMETA audited warehouse, your products are safe from any contamination or hazard. Our mission is to promote a healthy lifestyle by supplying high-quality ingredients to our customers.

Name: Le pain des Hautes Chaumes
Description:
Le Pain des Hautes Chaumes, un véritable bijou de la boulangerie créé il y a 15 ans dans le coeur du Parc Naturel Livradois Forez en Auvergne, est le parfait exemple d'un pain artisanal de caractère. Avec ses notes de carvi, il offre une saveur unique qui vous séduira à coup sûr. 

Cette année, nous avons décidé de faire un pas de plus pour améliorer notre produit en le conditionnant sous atmosphère protectrice, avec un DLC de 6 mois, pour une conservation exceptionnelle.

Notre objectif est de partager notre passion pour le "Bon et Bio" avec un public plus large en établissant un premier réseau de distribution solide. 

Rejoignez-nous dans notre quête pour le pain parfait et découvrez la vraie signification de la boulangerie artisanale avec Le Pain des Hautes Chaumes.

Name: Giotto Extra Fine Food
Description:
Giotto Investments Sp. z o.o.  to dynamicznie rozwijające się przedsiębiorstwo z wieloletnim doświadczeniem w branży spożywczej. Działamy na rynku włoskim oraz w innych krajach europejskich, specjalizując się w hurtowej sprzedaży wysokiej jakości produktów spożywczych. W naszym asortymencie znajdują się takie produkty jak mięsa, wędliny, sery, makarony, mąki oraz wina.

Od lat dostarczamy naszym klientom najlepsze włoskie specjały, łącząc tradycję z nowoczesnymi standardami. Nasza działalność opiera się na silnych relacjach z dostawcami i partnerami, co pozwala nam na oferowanie produktów o najwyższej jakości i konkurencyjnych cenach. Dążymy do stałego rozwoju, poszerzania oferty oraz doskonalenia obsługi klienta, aby sprostać oczekiwaniom nawet najbardziej wymagających odbiorców.

Name: Goods Fiesta Enterprises Inc.
Description: Hi. We are the main office of Joyice Ice cream here in the Philippines.

Name: BIOLIVE
Description:
Discover the Essence of Mediterranean Excellence with BIOLIVE - Premium Olive Oil from Albania!

 Immerse Yourself in Mediterranean Richness: We bring you the finest olive oil from the heart of Albania, where centuries-old olive groves flourish under the Mediterranean sun. Our olive oil encapsulates the essence of this beautiful region, boasting distinctive flavors and aromas that will transport you to the Mediterranean coast with every taste.

 Crafted with Passion and Expertise: At BIOLIVE, we are dedicated to producing olive oil of the highest quality. Our olives are carefully selected, ensuring optimal ripeness and flavor. Through a meticulous process, we extract the purest essence of the olives, resulting in an extraordinary olive oil that embodies the true taste of Albania.

 Sustainable Practices: We believe in sustainable agriculture and preserving the natural beauty of our land. We use only eco-friendly practices, respecting the balance of nature. By choosing our olive oil, you support our commitment to sustainability and contribute to the preservation of Albania's pristine landscapes.

 Elevate Your Culinary Journey: Elevate your culinary creations with our premium olive oil, which adds sophistication to every dish. 

 Proudly Albanian, Globally Celebrated: Our premium olive oil has garnered recognition beyond Albanian borders. Renowned chefs, discerning gourmands, and food enthusiasts around the world have embraced the exceptional quality and unique flavors of our olive oil. Join the global community that appreciates the excellence of Albanian olive oil.

 An Enriching Experience: BIOLIVE goes beyond olive oil. We invite you to explore the rich culture, history, and gastronomy of Albania through engaging content, recipes, and captivating stories. 

 Reach out to us for partnerships or to savor the essence of our premium olive oil. Let's embark on a journey of exceptional flavors and sustainability together.

Name: Dabouq FoodStuff Trading L.L.C
Description: Dabouq Foodstuff Trading (L.L.C) is a leading company been established in a fast growing and developing country United Arab Emirates – Dubai , expert in importing and exporting dry, frozen and chilled products from many countries around the world to serve client needs.

Name: Coastal Cashew
Description: Coastal Cashew is well known for it's cashew nuts produced in Palasa, A major cashew producing hub in Andhra Pradesh.

Name: Wonder Berry North America Inc.
Description: Wonder Berry North America Inc. imports premium food products from around the world, specializing in European favorites. We proudly serve Canada’s top retailers like Sobeys, Loblaws, and Metro, as well as independent family-run businesses. With unmatched quality and competitive pricing, we deliver excellence to every corner of the Canadian food industry.

Name: FREDDI 1926 Srl
Description: La Famiglia Freddi sin dal 1926 opera nel settore agricolo prima come produttore e poi come confezionatore/trasformatore specialista di settore cipolle e patate. Fin dalla metà degli anni 60 abbiamo camminato assieme alla GDO/DO italiana offrendo loro il meglio delle produzioni italiane ed estere, siamo fortemente impegnati per offrire soluzioni che portino un REALE VALORE AGGIUNTO ai nostri clienti, ascoltando quanto viene da loro richiesto, senza piaggeria o ipocrisia, insieme si vince !

Name: Evans Meats & Seafood Inc.
Description: Since 1998, Evans Meats & Seafood has distributed high-quality meat, seafood, and specialty provisions across six states in the southeast. We’re a family-owned and operated business that works with small operations, like ours, where the people are as important as the products. Our name is our guarantee that what’s provided was crafted with care and integrity from the farms to your kitchens.

Name: CAFÉS BO TOSTADERO
Description:
Nuestra empresa se fundó en 1961, cuando Eduardo Ribes y Fina Lluch, decidieron ampliar sus perspectivas de futuro. Fina y Eduardo, jóvenes, trabajadores y audaces, comenzaron tostando café en un viejo almacén de frutas y verduras propiedad del ‘tío BO’, el padre de Fina.

Encontrar nombre para la marca de nuestro café, no fue difícil, pues había nacido en el seno de una familia conocida en la ciudad de Benicarló, como familia ‘BO’ (en valenciano, bueno). Cafés BO, es un nombre muy apropiado para las características de nuestro café, seleccionado y tostado con mimo, artesanalmente.

Con el tiempo, de la Mobylette con la que Eduardo hacía sus primeros repartos, se pasó al SEAT furgoneta, a la construcción de un tostadero nuevo en 1964, a la inauguración de la primera tienda de degustación y al posterior traslado del tostadero a la dirección actual en el polígono industrial Mercado de Abastos.

En 1993, siendo el nuevo director de la empresa Martin Ribes, hijo de Eduardo y Fina, Cafés BO entra a formar parte de los primeros socios del Club de Tostadores Artesanos de Café Gourmet.

El equipo formado por las 3 generaciones de la familia BO, vinculadas al tostadero y todos nuestros trabajadores, nos esmeramos cada día con la misma ilusión que Fina y Eduardo, para poder ofrecer a nuestros clientes, la calidad, el servicio y la atención que estos se merecen.

Name: Emirates Catering & Trading
Description: Emirates Catering and Trading, established in 2005, is a premier importer of top-quality food products from global partners. With a commitment to excellence and a passion for quality, we supply an extensive range of premium foods to the UAE and neighboring regions. Our strong network and partnerships ensure the freshest and finest ingredients, meeting the highest standards. We pride ourselves on exceptional service and reliability, catering to the diverse culinary needs of our clients. Emirates Catering and Trading stands as a trusted leader in the food import and distribution industry, dedicated to enhancing the gastronomic experience across the region.

Name: JAIZA FOODS INTERNATIONAL
Description:
At Jaiza Foods International , we pride ourselves on our deep-rooted expertise in the food industry. Our team of professionals combines years of experience with a commitment to innovation and quality. We work closely with trusted suppliers and producers to ensure that every product we export meets the highest standards of freshness, taste, and safety.

We specialize in exporting a wide range of food products, including Vegetables ,Fruits, Grocery, Spices . Our extensive network and robust logistics capabilities allow us to efficiently navigate the complexities of international trade, ensuring timely and reliable delivery to our customers.

Choosing Jaiza Foods International  means choosing a partner who understands the intricacies of global food trade. Our competitive pricing, personalized service, and unwavering commitment to quality make us the preferred choice for discerning buyers worldwide. We leverage advanced technology and industry insights to stay ahead of market trends and continuously enhance our offerings.

Name: Horecanoten.nl
Description: Onze missie is gericht op het bieden van de beste kwaliteit noten, pitten en zaden tegen een scherpere prijs. Als notengroothandel richten wij ons voornamelijk op de horeca, maar ook grootverbruikers zijn van harte welkom in onze online webshop.

Name: Tisacoop d.o.o
Description:
Tisacoop has been importing and distributing food products and commodities into Serbia since 1990. Our firm is located in the northern part of Serbia in Kanjiza, near to the Hungarian border, and given our geographic location we are mainly specialised in importing products from Hungary. In addition to that, we work with suppliers from other EU countries as well like Poland, The Netherlands, Belgium and Germany. In addition, we also export agricultural and food products to the EU.

Thanks to our well-built logistical infrastructure and business connections we are supplying our products to all the major retail chains in Serbia. We also deliver commodities to the food industry, predominantly to the confectionary producers. All this represents a yearly turnover of 3.000 metric tons.

Among the wide range of our products, one can find breaded and filled turkey products, frozen turkey leg, breast, wings, cold cuts, sausages, frankfurters, liver pates, smoked turkey leg, Trappist and Karavan cheeses, processed and round-packed cheeses, luncheon-meat, frozen maroon puree, French fries and many more.

Building on our existing activities, in 2011 we launched our first retail shop in Belgrade under the name Hungarikum Centar which was followed by an opening of 4 other shops in Novi Sad, Subotica and Kanjiza. In these nicely decorated shops, we aim to present to our customers the products of well-known Hungarian and local producers but we also offer special products like the world-famous porcelains of Zsolnay and other handmade textiles and ceramics decorated with Hungarian motives.

In 2017 we started a new project that aims to integrate the beekeepers in Vojvodina (Northern Serbia), collecting their honey and processing it in a professional way. To meet these requirements, we constructed a brand-new processing plant with a yearly capacity of 1.000 tons. Since 2018, our distinguished honey products can be found on the market under the brand name Tisamed.

Name: EmRajeh
Description:
من قلب لبناني
From a Lebanese Heart

High-quality Lebanese food products, made from local sources according to the latest food safety and quality measures, comes with handmade pieces empowering women in our community.

منتجات غذائية لبنانية عالية الجودة، مصنوعة من مصادر محلية وفق شروط سلامة وجودة الأغذية، توزع مع قطع مصنوعة يدويًا من النساء المحتاجات

Name: NxtDib
Description:
NxtDib is the next-generation online wholesale distribution platform unlocking compliant, cost-effective market access for non-alcoholic (NA), CBD, and hemp-derived THC beverages.

As the sister platform to LibDib - the industry’s first digital alcohol distributor -NxtDib extends modernized distribution services into the rapidly growing wellness and functional beverage categories.

NxtDib empowers beverage makers to reach licensed buyers—including retailers, hospitality groups, bars, and wellness shops—through an intuitive e-commerce platform. Non-alcoholic products are available nationwide, while CBD and hemp-derived THC beverages are distributed in compliance with state regulations.
With streamlined onboarding, low-cost marketplace access, and strategic channel alignment, NxtDib is your trusted partner for scalable growth in the evolving beverage landscape.

Join us at www.NxtDib.com to connect with high-value buyers and launch your products faster.

Name: Almira Trade
Description:
Bine ați venit pe pagina companiei Almira Trade! Fondată în anul 2000, suntem o companie cu o vastă experiență în domeniul comerțului cu ridicata al produselor alimentare, atât în România, cât și în Uniunea Europeană. 

Ne-am consolidat poziția pe piață datorită unei creșteri constante și am extins gama de servicii, incluzând activități de logistică și distribuție, facilitată de inaugurarea centrului logistic în 2020, cu o suprafață de 13.000 de metri pătrați.

Cu peste 3 000 de clienți lunari, care includ atât persoane fizice, cât și firme și companii, și cu o echipă de peste 150 de angajați dedicați, suntem mândri să fim un pilon esențial în peisajul comerțului alimentar din partea de vest a României.

Portofoliul nostru diversificat cuprinde peste 10 000 de produse, pentru a satisface cele mai variate gusturi și cerințe.

Dacă sunteți curios să aflați mai multe, vă invităm să ne vizitați magazinul de pe Antenei 1A, Timișoara, si să explorați mai multe informații pe site-ul nostru oficial: www.almira.ro.

Name: PA-THOS Paschalis GmbH
Description: PA-THOS Paschalis GmbH bieten qualitativ hochwertige Lebensmittel und Konsumgüter für den Groß- und Einzelhandel an. Die Qualität und Innovation der Produkte hat bei uns höchste Priorität. Wir sind exklusiver Hersteller von mustimo Fruchtmus. Der erste Sirup der kein Sirup ist. Mit mustimo Fruchtmus machen Sie aus Ihrem Sprudelwasser ein Geschmackserlebnis und das ganz natürlich ohne Konservierungsstoffe, Glutenfrei, Vegan und frei von künstlichen Aromen! Mische Dir Frische!

Name: SOS ATACADISTA
Description:
Desde sua fundação, em 1991, a SOS ATACADISTA se dedica a oferecer e entregar as melhores soluções em produtos para seus clientes do ramo Food Service. Fornece produtos para Pizzarias, Padarias, Pastelarias, Mercados, Restaurantes, Hotéis, dentre outros do ramo alimentício.

*Estrutura de atendimento a Clientes:*
Sabendo da importância de um bom atendimento, a SOS conta com equipe de vendas especializada, com vendedores,  representantes externos e um time interno, dedicado a dar todo suporte que os clientes precisam desde seu pedido, a entrega e o pós vendas. Sempre priorizando a satisfação dos clientes.

*Pessoas*
A SOS preza pelo bem estar de seus colaboradores. Trabalhar na SOS é aprender e se desafiar buscando melhorar a cada dia para construir uma trajetória de sucesso. Tudo isso num ambiente leve, familiar e de muito respeito as diferenças. 

Fique atento as publicações de nossas vagas e venha fazer parte de nossa equipe!!!

Name: Masaledani Spices
Description: Your one-stop source for all spices available in India, both in bulk and retail, is Masaledani. We are very proud to offer such a wide selection of wonderful spices.

Name: De Giorgi Cosimo & Figli
Description:
Dal 1968, portiamo qualità sulla vostra tavola e nelle vostre attività.

La nostra storia inizia con un viaggio: quello di Cosimo e Teresa, una giovane coppia che, dopo aver mosso i primi passi nel commercio a Milano, decide di tornare a casa, nel Salento, per costruire il proprio futuro.

Da quella prima bottega, alimentata dalla forza di volontà e dall'energia delle nuove generazioni, la De Giorgi Cosimo & Figli non ha mai smesso di crescere.

Oggi, quell'eredità familiare vive in un'azienda moderna con oltre 10.000 mq di magazzini e uno staff di 30 persone. Non siamo solo distributori: siamo partner dei nostri clienti. Abbiamo vissuto in prima persona l'evoluzione del settore alimentare e mettiamo questa esperienza al servizio delle attività di tutta la provincia di Lecce.

Tradizione nelle radici, innovazione nel servizio.

Name: Remo Fiordelli SA
Description:
Somos una empresa familiar fundada en 1965, distribuimos los productos de Cervecería y Malteria Quilmes para la zona de Villa Regina, Gral. E. Godoy, Ing. Huergo y Chichinales,.
Buscamos brindar a nuestros clientes un servicio de excelencia, buscando la mejora continua.

Name: SAIGON CINNAMON CO., LTD
Description:
Saigon Cinnamon Co.,Ltd (SGC) is a Vietnamese manufacturer and exporter specializing in cinnamon (cassia) and star anise, mainly powder. We are dedicated to carefully sourcing and processing to meet the rigorous standards of the global markets. With a focus on authenticity and quality, our products are trusted by food professionals and businesses worldwide. 


We pride ourselves on our transparent practices and commitment to supporting our partners with consistent, high-grade spices. Our products embody the rich aroma, vibrant flavor and the natural purity that define the best of Vietnamese spices.

Name: Falesca Importing Ltd
Description: Falesca Importing Ltd. is a food importing business and coffee micro-roaster which is located in North Vancouver, BC. We bring gourmet European foods to West Coast Canada. At Falesca, we offer quality oils, vinegars, pasta, vegetables, fresh coffee beans and more!

Name: Frischdienst Berlin
Description:
For professionals in the hotel industry, gastronomy and communal catering
we are the fresh produce partner for the Berlin and Brandenburg region.

From our warehouse at the Berlin wholesale market, we supply milk and egg products as well as meat, fish, fruit and vegetables, salads, canned foods, frozen and dry products with a high level of freshness expertise.

Name: Casa Román
Description:
Bienvenidos a Casa Román, donde el orgullo paraguayo se comparte con el mundo entero! 

En nuestro hogar, celebramos la riqueza de nuestras tradiciones y la magia que reside en cada rincón de Paraguay. Nuestro propósito es claro: "Expandir el Orgullo Paraguayo por el Mundo". Cada producto que creamos es un viaje a través de la historia, la pasión y el sabor auténtico de nuestra amada tierra.

Acompáñanos en esta travesía llena de aromas y sabores únicos. En Casa Román, no solo hacemos licores y productos artesanales; destilamos la esencia misma de Paraguay para compartirla contigo.

Estamos emocionados de tenerte a bordo.

Name: JW Lopes
Description:
Farm-to-table is the foundation of J.W. Lopes fresh approach to supplying produce to customers. That theme carries through to every best practice in use throughout our organization. We take extraordinary steps to ensure that the produce delivered to your location is the height of quality.

We buy from reputable and trusted growers. We transport our product via temperature controlled trucks to maintain that farm-to-table freshness. And we insist that our growers and warehouse handlers adhere to rigorous safety measures at all times so that the produce you receive is quality.

We’ve been in this business for nearly 100 years. We have invested nearly a century in establishing relationships with exceptional growers worldwide in order to be the front running resource for the best produce of every kind in any season. That longevity alone sets J.W. Lopes apart. Sourcing outstanding and nutritious farm-to-table varietals is our business. Restaurateurs, institutions, grocers count on us every day. Responsive customer service is what fuels our operations. We’re available 24/7 so that our customers are never without the produce they need, even on the spur of the moment. Reliable deliveries, twice a day, mean we’re there for our customers where they need us when they need us. Count on J.W. Lopes every day of the week, and every season for superior, safe farm-to-table produce.

Name: Multmed Distribuidora - Bad Boy Energy Drink
Description:
A Multimed Distribuidora é a parceira oficial da Bad Boy Energy Drink na região Norte, levando energia, sabor e inovação para o seu negócio. Com uma linha completa de energéticos premium, oferecemos:

 Bad Boy Manga – Um toque tropical e refrescante para quem busca energia com sabor marcante.
 Bad Boy Melancia – Sabor vibrante e irresistível, ideal para momentos intensos.
 Bad Boy Zero Açúcar – A mesma potência, sem açúcar. Para quem quer performance sem abrir mão da saúde.
 Bad Boy Original – O clássico poderoso que conquistou o Brasil e o mundo.

Name: Miski Miel de Campo
Description:
Miski Miel de Campo S.A.S es una empresa ecuatoriana dedicada a transformar la industria apícola a través de un modelo integral que une apicultura regenerativa, innovación, comercio justo y triple impacto real. Nace con una misión clara: proteger a las abejas, dignificar el trabajo del apicultor y ofrecer productos de la colmena 100% puros, trazables y éticos, en un mercado global donde más del 70% de la miel está adulterada.

Desde Ecuador, uno de los países con mayor biodiversidad del planeta, Miski desarrolla productos premium de la colmena —miel pura, polen, propóleo, hidromiel, chocolates con miel, bebidas y una línea wellness— bajo estándares internacionales como FDA e ISO 22000. A esto se suman experiencias sensoriales y educativas como The Honey Experience, que buscan reconectar a las personas con la naturaleza a través de la cultura de la abeja.

Trabajamos con una red de apicultores locales a quienes acompañamos en prácticas sostenibles, precios justos, acceso a mercados y desarrollo técnico, impulsando seguridad alimentaria, resiliencia climática y fortalecimiento territorial. Nuestro compromiso incluye también proyectos de impacto, la formación de consumidores informados y la restauración de ecosistemas mediante especies nativas melíferas.

Miski Miel de Campo no solo produce miel: crea confianza en un mercado roto, promueve prosperidad compartida y demuestra que un negocio puede cuidar la vida mientras crece. Nuestra visión es expandir un modelo que haga del Ecuador un referente mundial en apicultura regenerativa y que inspire a otras industrias a evolucionar hacia un futuro más consciente, justo y sostenible.

Name: Wissahickon Jerky Company
Description:
Our story began almost 10 years ago when two guys, Ben and Gib decided to try their hand at making beef jerky. It was meant as a delicious, hearty snack that their friends and fellow golfers could pack with them during a round of golf.

Not knowing anything about what was the “right” or “wrong” way to make jerky, Ben and Gib simply started based on their shared love of BBQ brisket. They followed their own taste and ultimately produced a product that they enjoyed, were proud of and that was uniquely theirs.

Over the years their pure brisket beef jerky became such a hit with golfers in the Philadelphia area that the two decided to start a business producing it in small batches for others to enjoy in partnership with Chris Genuardi of The Philadelphia Cricket Club and the family behind Genuardi's Grocery. As Gib states, “we already had the perfect business model, a couple of guys with no experience making a product we loved and that we either ate ourselves or gave away for free to our friends. Still, we thought we could improve on it”.

Thus was born the Wissahickon Jerky Company and the result is the product you hold in your hands; small-batch, uncured brisket beef jerky with a bold flavor and satisfying chew. We hope you enjoy it as much as we do!

Description:

Alice Srl opera su tutto il territorio regionale grazie al lavoro di oltre 100 collaboratori, 10 punti vendita e una rete di agenti che assicurano copertura capillare e rifornimenti costanti. Per il canale ingrosso, disponiamo di una flotta di 25 camion frigo che garantiscono efficienza logistica e il rispetto assoluto della catena del freddo.

Nel 2007 abbiamo avviato una nuova fase di crescita con l’apertura del grande stabilimento di Carbonia, un investimento importante che ha previsto l’installazione di pannelli fotovoltaici e l’avvio del percorso di certificazione ambientale. All’interno della struttura è attivo un laboratorio di trasformazione dove nascono prodotti a marchio “MARINOSTRU”, espressione autentica del territorio. Alla linea si affiancano le paste fresche e i dolci tipici sardi a marchio “LOGUNOSTRU”, realizzati esclusivamente in Sardegna.

Il marchio “ALICE” identifica inoltre una selezione di prodotti internazionali che si distinguono per qualità e tracciabilità, consolidando l’immagine dell’azienda come partner affidabile per ristoratori, piccole attività e grandi catene di distribuzione.

Name: La Sobrerie
Description:
La Sobrerie (www.lasobrerie.com) 

La Sobrerie est le 1er réseau de distribution et cave de boissons sans alcool premium en Suisse.

L'objectif est de combler toutes les personnes en quête d’alternatives à l’alcool et de nouveautés gustatives. 

Oui à la convivialité, la fête et le goût.
Non aux boissons trop sucrées, insipides et aux gueules de bois. 

Pour cela, notre sélection repose sur le principe des 5S : Sain, Savoureux, Singulier, Sophistiqué et Surprenant.

Nous dénichons des pépites pointues, sophistiquées et exclusives à la fois bonnes au goût et meilleures pour la santé.

La Sobrerie, c’est donc la promesse de trouver de délicieuses boissons sans alcool pour le plaisir et se faire du bien, de l’apéritif au digestif.

Vous pourrez profiter des soirées sans culpabiliser et sans avoir à craindre le lendemain. 

Chaque boisson est soigneusement sélectionnée pour ses qualités gustatives en gardant toujours en tête : le plaisir, le goût et l’association potentielle avec un plat. 

Nous sommes fiers de pouvoir dire que la majorité des boissons que nous représentons sont importées et distribuées par La Sobrerie. 

Alors si vous :

- Recherchez des alternatives à l’alcool ; 
- Voulez tout simplement déguster de nouvelles saveurs (oui, le monde des Boissons Sans Alcool (BSA) est extrêmement innovant et épatant. Nous avons eu la chance de faire des découvertes incroyables) ;
- Connaissez des personnes qui pourraient être intéressées par le sujet et ces BSA nouvelle génération (personnellement ou professionnellement) ;
- Organisez un événement (professionnel ou personnel ) et souhaitez proposer une offre sans alcool de qualité et tout aussi intéressante que votre offre avec alcool.

Ecrivez-moi sur Linkedin ou sur le mail de La Sobrerie (lasobrerie@gmail.com). Je vous répondrai avec une immense joie.

Mais surtout parlez de La Sobrerie autour de vous. 

C'est comme ça que les Boissons Sans Alcool de qualité s'ancreront en Suisse.

Description:
Chez Shake'it Prot, nous révolutionnons la nutrition sportive avec notre distributeur 2-en-1 unique au monde, protégé par un brevet. Notre innovation propose une solution intégrée pour les salles de sport, offrant un accès pratique et abordable à des boissons sportives et des compléments alimentaires de qualité.

Notre distributeur combine ingénieusement la distribution de compléments alimentaires et d'eau, simplifiant l'expérience pour les utilisateurs. Grâce à notre technologie brevetée, nous assurons une distribution précise des doses, offrant aux sportifs une nutrition optimale après leur séance d'entraînement.

L'unicité de notre distributeur réside dans sa capacité à proposer une gamme complète de produits, convertissant ainsi davantage de clients à la prise de compléments alimentaires de manière simple et efficace. Notre technologie garantit une machine sans tracas, avec un nettoyage rapide (moins de 2/3 min par jour) et un remplissage simplifié des bacs (moins de 2 min).

De plus, notre application connectée offre aux membres un suivi personnalisé, des objectifs à atteindre, et simplifie les paiements grâce à nos partenariats avec les principaux logiciels de salles de sport. Ainsi, nous facilitons l'utilisation de notre distributeur, permettant même le paiement direct avec la carte de membre.

Chez Shake'it Prot, nous croyons en la démocratisation de la nutrition sportive. Nos machines sont implantées dans diverses salles, des grandes franchises aux clubs uniques, contribuant ainsi à créer une communauté engagée autour de notre vision d'une nutrition sportive simple, efficace et à la portée de tous.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure où l'innovation rencontre la passion pour le bien-être et la performance sportive. Shake'it Prot, pour une nutrition sportive réinventée.

Especializado en productos de excelencia, Mercadito Pastelero atiende a profesionales gastronómicos, heladeros, pasteleros y a personas que buscan insumos de calidad para elaborar alimentos en sus hogares. Su modelo de negocio combina una distribución eficiente desde su depósito con un local comercial diseñado para brindar atención personalizada, donde los clientes pueden explorar y elegir entre una amplia variedad de productos.

Para quienes prefieren las compras digitales, ofrece una experiencia ágil y confiable a través de su tienda online, mercaditopastelero.com.ar, y su presencia en Mercado Libre. También comparte novedades, promociones y consejos a través de sus redes sociales como Instagram.

Grandes marcas del rubro confían en Mercadito Pastelero como su distribuidor oficial. Entre ellas se destacan: Vacalin, el principal productor de dulce de leche y exportador a más de 15 países; Molino Río de la Plata, con marcas icónicas como Lucchetti, Terrabusi y Matarazzo; Dánica, líder en margarinas desde 1940; Chango, referente en la producción de azúcar; Especialidades Ballina, líder en decoración de tortas; y Lodiser, el principal importador de cacao del país.

Además, Mercadito trabaja con otras marcas reconocidas como Milkaut, Taxonera, PastelAR, Rich’s, Molino Cañuelas, Codeland, Chacabuco, Zummy, Top Class, Bahía, Chocolart, Chocolate Colonial, Integra, y más, garantizando una oferta amplia y de alta calidad para sus clientes.

Bringing people together to enjoy a heart-warming delicious evolved classic of the French-Canadian Tourtíere, sharing moments of gratitude with every bite. 

Each pie is handmade with a flakey olive oil crust and a delicious filling of green lentil, Bramley apple, onion, celery, mushroom and potato. All seasoned with a secret blend of aromatic spices. Our ingredients list is simply made up of fresh wholefoods and contains absolutely no inflammatory seed oils or preservatives. 


Our pie is an alternative to the traditional meat dishes that have historically featured as the centerpiece of the table. The pie is the perfect communal food – convenient, healthy, tasty, and can be enjoyed by everyone – children, vegans, vegetarians, meat-eaters, people of all ages and from all different culinary backgrounds. THE ORIGIN OF THIS CLASSIC SNACK
Dolcezze was born out of my wife Anna Elisabettini’s country kitchen in the picturesque town of GREYTON. The little town of GREYTON rests in a basin surrounded by mountains in the Overberg wheatlands in the Cape, South Africa. Anna has painstakingly perfected this recipe using sun-ripened South African wheat and only natural ingredients – a real taste sensation! Dolcezze Cheese Straws are all cut and twisted by hand, so don’t be surprised if not all the straws are the same. Originally, and for a number of years, Dolcezze Cheese Straws were distributed to a few selected deli stores and farm stalls in and around Cape Town. This mainly due to the limited production facility at our home. Dolcezze Cheese straws were well received by shop ownwers and consumers. We realised that Dolcezze Cheese Straws could be turned into a South African national brand. This idea was shared by our family friend, well known personality in the snack industry, Bernard Immelman. Although it took a few years for this idea to mature, with Bernard enthusiasm and considerable input a small, dedicated baking factory, large enough to cope with anticipated demand was set up. We still serve my wife’s original customers directly, however, now we also supply distributors in the Western Cape, Eastern Cape, Gauteng and KwaZulu Natal who in turn supply some of the chain stores and the general trade. If you find it difficult to locate an outlet for our Dolcezze Cheese Straws in your area, contact us directly for your nearest distributor/retailer.

Rejoignez cette communauté et découvrez notre univers: quelle que soit votre demande ou votre niveau de connaissance du vin, nous prenons le temps de vous écouter, de comprendre votre besoin pour trouver l’offre qui y répondra avec justesse.
Pour rendre l’expérience encore plus agréable, nous avons développé des espaces et des événements tout spécialement dédiés à la découverte et à la dégustation:
- Un lieu de rencontre festif et chaleureux dédié tant au public qu’aux professionnels.
- Des «master class», des dégustations et le concept @Thesolarontheroad pour toujours plus de partage et de rayonnement de nos produits et de leurs créateurs. Nous programmons directement ces rencontres, mais nous mettons également notre savoir-faire au service de vos propres évènements et moments de rencontre avec votre clientèle.

At the pinnacle of our journey, we took another leap to develop our own brands and venture into major product categories competing with market leaders. The transformation of a distribution company to an innovative product development company is a testament of our commitment to consumer-centric approach and ability to create an efficient supply chain to develop value-added products for growing consumer demand in New Zealand.

Our philosophy of building inspired and resolute teams to strive for superior service is complementary to our vision and fundamentally driven by a collaborative approach.  A combination of thriving culture and strength of our staff has always been a major part of our success and resonates in our maxim.

Delivering value through affordable consumer goods is in our DNA.

We aim to lead the way in innovation, setting new standards and pioneering groundbreaking products that redefine the industry. We constantly strive to exceed expectations, ensuring our customers are always excited about what’s next. With a focus on cutting-edge technology and a dedication to customer satisfaction, Torch is not just keeping up with the future – we are shaping it.

PRODUCT QUALITY AND INNOVATION

CUSTOMER-CENTRIC APPROACH
Understanding and responding to consumer needs has been at the heart of our strategy, helping us to tailor products that meet and exceed customer expectations

MARKET EXPANSION

Being a top player isn’t just about sales; it’s about setting standards and helping shape the industry’s future. Torch has actively participated in community and industry discussions, advocating for responsible use and innovation.

Hand-blended tea for the intrepid explorers of this world.  Explorers who stay in rather splendid, individualist establishments.   Establishments that share one common factor – they’re all likely to have stylish freestanding tubs in rooms…

We are not just another tea supplier. We are the UK’s largest independent tea blender and supplier to many of this land’s most grand & storied hostelries and retail establishments. 

20 years’ experience and expertise sourcing, tasting, hand-blending & packing the finest tea.  All honed and crafted into the creation of Tuhb.

Designed specifically for the boutique hotel market, Tuhb is available in 23 blends as loose-leaf tea. 10 blends in loose biodegradable pyramid tea bags. And 8 blends in compostable envelopes.

(All packaging used is either compostable, biodegradable or fully recyclable – just as it should be). 

We will work with you to elevate your tea offer to your guests. Think product range. Think in-room display. Think staff training. And more, much more.

So that’s Tuhb. Independent tea specialists, focused solely on helping rather splendid establishments become just that extra little bit… well, splendid.

Description: Fishheadz is committed to quality control and consistency, thoroughly making sure each product goes above the standards required by our consumers and expected by us. Our processing plant provides fresh-frozen vacuum packed crabmeat along with three sizes of crab clusters picked from live trap-caught crabs. The prevalent specie of crab is Portunus Segnis, blue swimmer, also called a long-arm crab. We also offer several other seafood items for whole-sale purchase.

Name: Chouette sas
Description:
Nous sommes distributeurs d'aliments sans gluten certifiés. Nous proposons des farines, des snacks, des céréales, des biscuits, des pains et des plats préparés, disponibles en portions individuelles pratiques. Nous sensibilisons les commerçants de détail et les opérateurs de la filière CHR à intégrer à leur offre des options pratiques pour eux, mais sûres pour les clients souffrant d'intolérance au gluten. Nous proposons également des formations à nos clients pour les aider à mieux comprendre les risques de contamination croisée et la nécessité d'assurer la sécurité alimentaire de leurs clients souffrant de la maladie cœliaque, d'intolérance ou d'allergie.
Siamo Distributori di alimenti senza glutine certificati. A partire da farine, snacks, cereali, biscotti, pane, fino ai pasti pronti, tutto in monoporzioni pratiche all'utilizzo. Sensibilizziamo i rivenditori alimentari e gli operatori della catena HoReCa affinché includano nella loro offerta delle opzioni pratiche per loro, ma sicure per i clienti che soffrono d'intolleranza al glutine. Offriamo formazione ai nostri clienti per aiutarli a comprendere meglio i rischi di contaminazione crociate e la necessità di sicurezza alimentare dei propri clienti affetti da celiachia, intolleranza o allergia.

En Virgen, nuestra misión es proporcionar productos de alta calidad que mejoren la salud y el bienestar de nuestros consumidores, al tiempo que ofrecemos soluciones prácticas para el hogar y la cocina. Nos especializamos en:

- Alimentos Saludables: Distribuimos una variedad de productos alimenticios orientados a un estilo de vida saludable, incluyendo snacks, bebidas y suplementos nutricionales.
- Productos de Almacenamiento: Comercializamos pilas y otros productos que garantizan funcionalidad y duración en el uso diario.
- Ropa para Niños: Ofrecemos una línea de ropa infantil que combina comodidad y estilo, adaptándose a las necesidades de los más pequeños.
- Manufactura de Sales Gourmet: Producimos sales gourmet que aportan un toque distintivo a la gastronomía, diseñadas para satisfacer a chefs y amantes de la cocina.
- Harinas Alternativas: Desarrollamos harinas alternativas ideales para consumidores que buscan opciones variadas y saludables, adaptándose a diferentes dietas y preferencias.

Nuestra visión es convertirnos en líderes en la distribución y manufactura de productos saludables y sostenibles, siendo reconocidos por nuestra innovación y compromiso con el consumidor. Promovemos prácticas responsables en nuestra cadena de suministro y buscamos constantemente nuevas formas de mejorar y diversificar nuestra oferta.

En Virgen, nos esforzamos por ser un referente en la industria, creando un impacto positivo en la comunidad y el mercado con cada producto que ofrecemos. A través de nuestra amplia gama de soluciones y nuestro firme compromiso con la calidad, buscamos transformar la experiencia de nuestros consumidores, promoviendo un estilo de vida saludable y funcional.

Nuestro portafolio abarca desde bocados salados hasta postres, además de opciones listas para hornear o servir, creadas para hoteles, restaurantes, caterings y cafeterías que requieren practicidad sin renunciar al sabor ni a la calidad.

Nos distinguimos por ser un socio estratégico para cada cliente, garantizando un abastecimiento constante con productos que conservan su frescura, textura y excelencia en cada servicio.

La innovación impulsa nuestro trabajo: contamos con un equipo de desarrollo que crea nuevas propuestas y formatos alineados con las tendencias gastronómicas y las necesidades específicas de cada negocio.

Incorporamos tecnología avanzada en procesos de congelación y producción, junto con prácticas responsables en toda la cadena de valor, lo que nos permite ofrecer la más alta calidad con un enfoque sostenible.

Más que un proveedor, somos el aliado gastronómico que impulsa el crecimiento con soluciones dulces y saladas diseñadas para sorprender a los consumidores.

The company was established to introduce three select brands of espresso, namely Del Cafes, Bellissimo cafes and Kamo, produced by two coffee roasters with a long successful history:

Delta Cafes is a Portuguese company established in 1961 by Manuel Rui Azinhais Nabeiro, a coffee aficionado and charismatic entrepreneur who managed to transform a 50 sqm warehouse into one of the major industrial groups in the Iberian Peninsula, with over 3000 employees, presence in over 35 countries and a daily production of above 160 Tons of coffee.

Kamo: Kamo is a Neapolitan coffee brand belonging to the company Projeko which was founded in 2012 by the Rubino brother and sister team, Michele and Marizia. The activity is the result of a decades-long expertise developed by the founders. In June 2015 Projeko launched Kamo, the new brand in the distribution line to coffee bars, which constitutes the backbone of the company’s industrial project. Thanks to the experience of this family, Kamo coffee is recognised as a natural expression of the tradition of coffee in Naples.

Jako Fructikon, zawsze dbamy o jakość naszych produktów oraz o środowisko. 
Dla klientów indywidualnych mamy w ofercie paczki od rolnika, które są idealnym rozwiązaniem dla osób, które cenią sobie zdrowe, ekologiczne i lokalne produkty spożywcze. W ramach tej usługi dostarczamy różnorodne owoce i warzywa, w zależności od sezonu i dostępności.

Oferujemy kompleksowe rozwiązania dla gastronomii, które obejmują zaopatrzenie w produkty spożywcze, logistykę i magazynowanie produktów, a także różnego rodzaju rozwiązania pakowania żywności. Zapewniamy, że nasze produkty są zawsze najwyższej jakości i pochodzą tylko od sprawdzonych producentów.

W Fructikon, naszą misją jest zapewnienie najwyższej jakości produktów spożywczych, które spełniają oczekiwania naszych klientów. Jesteśmy zawsze otwarci na współpracę z przedsiębiorcami, którzy cenią sobie jakość oraz ekologiczne rozwiązania w swojej branży.

Jeśli szukacie kompleksowego rozwiązania dla Waszej gastronomii lub po prostu cenicie sobie ekologiczne rozwiązania, zapraszamy do współpracy z nami. Nasza ekipa z pasją zajmie się procesem logistyki i magazynowania produktów, a także zaproponuje najlepsze rozwiązania pakowania żywności, aby zaspokoić Wasze potrzeby.

Description:
As a team of passionate foodies, we believe that the best way to experience the richness and diversity of French cuisine is through the simple pleasure of a perfectly crafted croissant, or the sweetness of a ripe, juicy strawberry all year round.

We are committed to sourcing only the highest quality products from the best suppliers in France. From artisanal bakeries in Paris to small-scale fruit farmers in the countryside, we work closely with our partners to ensure that every product we import is fresh, delicious, and true to its French heritage.

We believe that food is not just a source of nourishment, but also a source of joy, indulgence, and community. We take pride in our role as ambassadors of French cuisine and we are dedicated to sharing the beauty and richness of our culture with everyone we do business with. 

We aim to provide exceptional quality freezer-to-oven goods to our B2B clients while building long-lasting relationships based on trust, reliability, services, and customer satisfaction.

Name: Infinity Foods Wholesale
Description:
Wholesaler of vegetarian and vegan Wholefoods across the UK and beyond.

Revolution rarely happens overnight

We’ve been chipping away at change since 1971. 
The hairstyles (and trousers) were different back then, but we still see the world the same way.

We wanted to sell healthy, well-grown food in a caring business. 
Offering our customers a better way to eat, shop and live.
People got it, and we grew.
Our success is a sign that the world is changing.

We’ve been selling organic food for over 50 years.
And we became a workers co-operative in 1979.

Because we’re owned and democratically run by our employees, we can follow our own path.
Healthy pulses, grains, nuts and seeds. 
Fair prices and a friendly voice. 
We don’t think these things should ever go out of style. 
Playing the long game, and working hard to keep the right traditions going forever…

For Infinity

Name: Pastarom Gıda
Description:
Pastarom Gıda, pasta ve dondurma üretimi alanında, dünyanın farklı ülkelerinden yüksek kaliteli markaları Türkiye pazarına sunan bir gıda distribütörüdür. Kurulduğu günden bu yana sektöre yenilik ve kalite kazandırma vizyonuyla hareket eden Pastarom, 1998 yılında Türkiye’ye ilk pasta yazıcısını getirerek önemli bir ilke imza atmıştır.

Geniş ürün portföyüyle pastaneler, dondurmacılar ve restoranlar başta olmak üzere, Türkiye’nin dört bir yanındaki profesyonel işletmelere hizmet vermekteyiz. Yüksek kalite standartlarımız ve müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımızla, sektörde güvenilir bir çözüm ortağı olarak konumlanıyoruz.

2015 yılında şirket yapısında gerçekleşen değişim süreci sonrası bir süre faaliyetlerine ara veren Pastarom Gıda, 2019 yılında yeniden yapılandırılarak sektördeki güçlü konumuna geri dönmüştür.

Bugün, “Her zaman en iyilerle” mottosuyla yola devam eden Pastarom Gıda, sektör profesyonelleriyle buluşturduğu kaliteli ürünlerle gıda dünyasına değer katmayı sürdürüyor.
--------------
Pastarom Gıda is a food distribution company that brings high-quality brands from around the world to the Turkish market, specializing in pastry and ice cream production. Since its foundation, Pastarom has operated with a vision of introducing innovation and quality to the industry—becoming the first company to bring a cake printer to Turkey in 1998, marking a significant milestone.

With a wide product portfolio, we serve professional establishments across all 81 provinces of Turkey, including patisseries, ice cream shops, and restaurants. Our commitment to high standards and a customer-focused approach has positioned us as a trusted partner in the industry.

After a structural change in 2015, Pastarom temporarily paused operations but returned to the market in 2019 with a renewed focus and strategy.

Today, Pastarom Gıda proudly continues its mission under the motto "Always with the best," offering exceptional products and adding value to the world of gastronomy.

Name: Natur Energi - Solaray & KAL
Description:
Velkommen til Natur Energi – Livskvalitet med omtanke 

Hos Natur Energi tror vi på, at ægte livskvalitet opstår i balancen mellem mennesket og naturen. Vi er et dansk familieejet firma med base i Allerød, og siden 1991 har vi arbejdet for at bringe naturens styrke tættere på mennesker – gennem kvalitetsprodukter, viden og respekt for vores fælles klode.

Vi er eksperter i kosttilskud og samarbejder med specialbutikker, behandlere og kæder over hele landet. Vores sortiment omfatter stærke brands som Solaray, KAL og Krill, og vi tilbyder alt fra rådgivning og undervisning til markedsføringsmateriale og lovgivningssupport.

 Vores mission er at gøre det nemmere at træffe bevidste sundhedsvalg – med naturens ressourcer som fundament.

 Vores værdier er rodfæstet i respekt, ærlighed, innovation og mod. Vi tror på, at man kun skal tage det, man har brug for – ikke mere, ikke mindre. Der er nok til os alle, hvis vi holder balancen.

 Vi klæder vores samarbejdspartnere godt på – med viden, tryghed og materialer, der skaber synlighed og værdi i butikken.

 Vi arbejder hver dag for at være en værdiskabende og innovativ partner i helsekostbranchen – og for at bidrage til en sundere og mere bæredygtig fremtid.

Tak fordi du følger med på rejsen mod livskvalitet med omtanke.

Name: CREDO Coffee Roasters
Description:
CREDO Coffee Roasters is an independent, Orlando-based coffee roastery specializing in wholesale coffee programs and catering for businesses, events, and organizations that care about quality, consistency, and values.
We work with cafés, restaurants, offices, nonprofits, churches, and event partners to provide thoughtfully sourced, freshly roasted coffee backed by reliable service and operational support. Our wholesale partners aren’t just buying beans — they’re getting a roasting partner who understands margins, workflow, and the realities of running a business.
Our approach is simple and disciplined:
Direct relationships with producers whenever possible
Intentional roasting focused on balance, clarity, and versatility
Scalable offerings for both high-volume service and specialty programs
On the catering side, we provide full-service coffee experiences for meetings, conferences, community gatherings, and private events. From batch brew to espresso service, we focus on professionalism, speed, and hospitality — coffee that shows up on time, tastes right, and supports the moment rather than distracting from it.
CREDO was founded on the belief that buying coffee is a big deal — not as a slogan, but as a practical reality. Coffee connects global producers to local businesses, and we take responsibility for that role seriously. Our goal is to circulate value through long-term relationships, dependable service, and work done well.
We’re always open to conversations with wholesale partners, caterers, and organizations looking for a coffee program that’s both high-quality and grounded in real relationships.

Description:
Professionelle Küchen bereiten täglich frisches Essen zu. Vierlande liefert die Zutaten, die sie zum Kochen brauchen – deutschlandweit und innerhalb von zwölf Stunden. Hand drauf! Warum wir dieses Versprechen geben können? Wir sind da, wo Sie sind! Mit einem unserer Standorte sind wir immer in der Nähe, um schnell vor Ort zu sein. Darum kümmern sich unsere Fahrer (m/w/d) in den Vierlande-LKW´s, die in ihrem Revier täglich anliefern. Vierlande ist deutschlandweit regional. Nähe verstehen wir im übertragenen Sinne auch als das Miteinander, das eine Partnerschaft ausmacht. Kurze Wege zum Beispiel, wenn es um Absprachen geht oder wenn kurzfristige Lösungen gebraucht werden. Kundenbindung sagen die einen, „Füreinander da sein“ nennen wir das bei Vierlande. Unsere Kunden (m/w/d) aus der Gastronomie (Restaurants, Imbissbetriebe, Kantinen, Schnell-Restaurants, Caterer (m/w/d) und Gemeinschaftsverpfleger (m/w/d)) schätzen einen Partner (m/w/d), der ihre Sprache spricht. Wann dürfen wir dich beliefern?

Name: HansenCoffee ApS
Description:
Vi er et traditionelt kaffefirma, der fokuserer på at skabe den bedste stemning omkring kaffen, med afsæt i at skabe grundlag for gladere medarbejdere. Vi rådgiver og leverer gode kaffeløsninger til det danske erhvervsliv.

Vores koncept er meget enkelt. Vi sørger for den bedste kaffeløsning til jeres virksomhed. 
Det vil og kan vi fordi vi elsker kaffe, og er en smule nørdede omkring maskinerne. Vi besidder stor viden om drift, logistik og finansiering - Vi sikrer jer en god service til konkurrencedygtige priser, uanset om dit behov er køb, leje eller leasing. Vi har mange års erfaring i at råde og vejlede vores kunder omkring det praktiske i leje og leasing aftaler.

Vi tilbyder et fuldt sortiment bestående af kaffemaskiner/automater med mange af de populære drikke, tevand, chokoladedrikke, vand kølere og alt hvad der ellers hører sig til ved siden af - også hvis det skal være økologisk – så kort fortalt, alt det der skal i og udenom koppen.

Vi har udvalgt de bedste samarbejdspartnere, alle med i Fairtrade-ordningen, så du kan bare stille koppen, trykke på knappen og nyde kaffen med god samvittighed.  Vi er blandt andet partner af Merrild/Lavazza m.fl.

ProOrder is a dynamic platform created to solve real challenges in the restaurant industry, with a clear mission: to simplify and optimize the purchasing process between restaurants and wholesalers.

With dedicated dashboards, bilingual support, and seamless in-app communication, ProOrder brings clarity and control to an often chaotic part of restaurant operations.

We understand the rhythm of the industry and the pressure to deliver—every day. That’s why ProOrder is more than just a platform; it’s a practical solution designed with the everyday needs of restaurant owners and suppliers in mind. By improving the way businesses connect and operate, ProOrder empowers users to focus on what truly matters: quality, service, and growth.

Why Choose Us?
ProOrder was designed with one goal: to make restaurant operations smoother and smarter. With firsthand insight into the industry’s daily demands, our team builds tools that are not only easy to use but make a real impact. We focus on solving actual problems with real solutions—cutting through the noise and delivering what restaurants and wholesalers truly need. By combining thoughtful design with functional innovation, ProOrder is built to support your success, every step of the way.

Name: Pika Hotstuff
Description:
Pika Hotstuff shares spicy world flavors that make life even better. We stand for original flavours, authentic recipes and a healthy lifestyle. Our spicy products are all natural. No added salt, sugar or preservatives. 'Just Mother Nature giving you a kick in the butt'.

Welcome to the Pika Hotstuff family. Our 'Original' is a spicy Caribbean salsa with yellow madame jeanette and red cayenne peppers. 'Makamba' is a mild tropical salsa with green jalapeño peppers. And 'Pidi Pidi' is spicy extra virgin olive oil with red peppers and Mediterranean herbs. All three completely natural and very healthy.

Pika Hotstuff is a growing startup with great ambition. Born on Curaçao, raised in Amsterdam. And our story has only just begun. Because the world's cuisine is our playground, and the amount of flavors we want to share with you is endless. Become part of that journey.

Pika Hotstuff Original, Makamba and Pidi Pidi are available in beautiful glass bottles of 100ml and 200ml. And in specific sizes for catering and retail. Inquire about the B2B possibilities via hello@pikahotstuff.com. Samples available. We'd love to hear from you, join the family.

Name: Rikafi
Description:
Bij Rikafi staan we erop dat er enkel “direct trade” koffie in ons aanbod opgenomen wordt. Direct trade is een business model dat als doel heeft het verbeteren van de relatie tussen de consument in het westen en de producent in het zuiden. Dit trachten we te bereiken door zoveel mogelijk tussenpartijen tussen productie en consumptie uit te schakelen.

Enerzijds zorgt dit ervoor dat de boer in het zuiden een eerlijke prijs voor zijn product kan krijgen, gezien er minder tussenpartijen een deel van de koek moeten ontvangen. Anderzijds heeft direct trade ook als gevolg dat er veel betere controle is op de kwaliteit van het geleverde product.

Name: FIGARVE Figs
Description:
AY Proof Inc. imports wild dry figs under the SFC-Safe Food for Canadians license and produces natural health food under the FHC-Food Handling Certificate, in Oakville, ON, Canada. 

We distribute our dry figs and fig variations to North American retailers under our registered brand FIGARVE dry figs. 

AY Proof Inc. owns the trademark & NFT`s of the FIGARVE brand and operates 
Figarve.com, Figarve.ca, Figarve.uk and Figarve.pt e-commerce websites.

FIGARVE is the first exclusive fig brand in North America and we distribute wild dry figs to health food & chain stores in Canada & USA.

We are proud to influence retailers and consumers with our unique growing/harvesting methodologies and with our 100% natural wild dry figs and their variations. 

We partner with local farmers around the globe to source wild dry figs and train them with old-school growing and harvesting methods that are used for centuries. Our fig products are wild, %100 natural, and free of any fertilizers used for growing or chemicals that are used for sanitizing.

We always aim to have minimum impact on nature and our Alabanda-L, Aphrodisias-M and Baby Caria-XS dry figs are ripened on the world famous Ficus Carica trees, and dried under the Mediterranean sun on its branches -an ancient method of growing figs- dating back 10.000 years. 

Our dry figs are grouped by size -Alabanda-L, Aphrodisias-M, Calabacita-S and Baby Caria-XS- and packed for fig lovers after reaching the ideal moisture level!

We believe in the future of wild food and to the first gift of nature; Figs.

Instagram & Facebook : FigarveFig

Name: Nordic Fish Oy
Description:
Nordic Fish Oy is a Finnish family-owned company that includes the fish farming group Nordic Trout and the fish processing group Kalaneuvos. The companies employ approximately 320 people, and the turnover of the entire Nordic Fish Group was approx. 130 million euros in 2023.

Nordic Trout Ab and its Swedish subsidiary Nordic Trout Sweden AB specialise in fish farming. They have roughly 30 fish farms in mainland Finland, Åland Islands and Sweden. Its fish farms produce around 9 million kilos annually.

Kalaneuvos Oy has been producing high-quality fish products since 1975 in Sastamala Finland. Kalaneuvos is a pioneer in fish processing and the wholesale, import and export of fish. The company develops, produces and markets premium fish products under the Kalaneuvos brand and private label brands for supermarket chains. Skilfully processed and prepared products, farmed and wild fish from clean Finnish waters, and the best imported raw materials guarantee premium quality and superior taste. The Kalaneuvos Group includes Martin Kala Oy, the largest producer of Baltic herring fillets in Finland, which operates in Turku and Kaskinen. The fish processing group processes more than 15 million kilos of fish every year. All Kalaneuvos products are made in Finland.

Description:

"Zait o Khal," which translates to "oil and vinegar" in Arabic, stands as a testament to the land's abundant history.

The brand is committed to delivering products that blend ancient methods with modern standards, ensuring that each jar and bottle reflects the purity, freshness, and natural flavors that characterize Levantine cuisine.

Name: Aunt Carol's Sauce
Description:
Carol Ann Morgan Scott was a young woman with a talent for cooking. When she was just 17 years old in 1977, she came up with a special sauce recipe that would become a beloved family tradition. Her family would have "seafood night" on occasion, where they would cover the dining table with newspaper and eat endless amounts of blue crabs. It was on one of these nights that Carol first introduced her special sauce to her family.

The recipe was a hit, and from then on, the family never had seafood without it. Carol's nephew, Tahjere Lewis, grew up with the sauce as a staple at family gatherings. When he was about to go off to college, he realized he would no longer have access to the sauce and asked his Aunt Carol where he could buy it. To his surprise, she responded, "Baby, I make this." He was astonished by her response and immediately went to telling her how big her sauce could be and that it should be in all stores across the world.

On that day, Tahjere made a promise to his aunt that once he graduated from college, they would make their dream of sharing her sauce with the world into a reality. Unfortunately, during Tahjere's first year of college, Carol passed away from cancer. The loss of his beloved aunt was devastating, but it also propelled Tahjere to take action and honor her memory.

Tahjere never forgot his promise to his aunt, and he decided to pursue their shared dream of sharing her sauce with the world. He spent years perfecting the recipe and finding the right manufacturing partners to bring the sauce to market. Finally, in 2020, while Tahjere was a sophomore at Virginia Tech University, Aunt Carol's sauce came to fruition.

The sauce is now available for purchase online and in select stores, and Tahjere hopes to expand its availability in the future. He wants Aunt Carol's sauce to be a part of more families' traditions, just as it was for his own family. Tahjere believes that the sauce brings people together and that it's a way to honor his aunt.

Name: Meucci1905
Description: La nostra società è stata fondata nel 1905 da Igino Meucci che, giovanissimo, giunse a Milano dalla Toscana qualche tempo prima. Iniziò l’attività come distilleria di aromi ed essenze e solo nel 1907, dopo la conoscenza con un gelatiere siciliano, iniziò la produzione del primo prodotto italiano:“IL GELATO CASKN” marca gallo che è tuttora in produzione dopo quasi 100 anni, con grande nostro orgoglio. Nel 1926 iniziò la produzione dei prodotti a freddo. Nel 1928 fu la prima azienda a produrre coni in Italia con macchine manuali ad una fila, macchine importate dall’Ungheria. Prima esistevano solo cialde piatte in diverse misure per la distribuzione del gelato con apposite macchinette. Nel 1946 Igino Meucci cedette la società ad alcuni figli ed attualmente annovera tra i soci i discendenti di terza generazione. Con l’evolversi dei gusti del mercato, la gamma di produzione si è notevolmente allargata per soddisfare le nuove esigenze dei clienti: dalle basi, alle creme e paste, ai concentrati di frutta naturale per terminare con una vasta gamma di prodotti per pasticceria. Nel 1959 entra in produzione una nostra specialità il “Limone per gelati” e nel 1990 il “Pastonat” il primo prodotto italiano a base di panna naturale. Nel 1982 la società viene trasferita nel nuovo stabilimento di Buccinasco ed il rinnovo completo degli impianti ed il perfezionamento tecnico della produzione hanno permesso un’ulteriore affermazione anche sul mercato internazionale. Infatti, una cospicua percentuale della produzione viene esportata verso i mercati esteri di tutti i continenti dove esistono anche dei concessionari esclusivi. Questa nostra esperienza centenaria si manifesta anche oggi nella qualità superiore dei prodotti che è sempre stata un elemento che ha caratterizzato la Meucci.
