We understand that in the fast-paced culinary world, consistency is as vital as quality. Our operational model is built on providing reliable, high-volume supply chains that empower our partners to scale without compromise.

Why Partner With Us?
We offer more than just products; we offer a robust business model designed for mutual growth:

Scaleable Supply: We specialize in high-capacity fulfillment, providing £12k–£15k in monthly supply per unit. Whether you are managing a single flagship location or a growing brand, our logistics are built to match your pace.

B2B Expertise: Our focus is exclusively on the professional sector. We speak the language of chefs, procurement managers, and business owners, ensuring seamless ordering and professional-grade quality control.

Profitable Growth: We operate with a 15%–20% gross margin, ensuring a sustainable and competitive pricing structure that allows our partners to maintain healthy bottom lines while serving premium products.

Our Specialty
From cold-pressed olive oils and artisanal cheeses to specialty Mediterranean staples, we source only the best of Greece. Our mission is to ensure that every restaurant we serve can deliver an authentic, high-quality experience to their diners, backed by a supply chain they can trust.

Specialties: B2B Food Supply, Greek Wholesale, Restaurant Logistics, Mediterranean Imports, Volume Food Distribution, and Hospitality Procurement.

Notre expertise s'étend à la connaissance approfondie de ce marché ainsi que des exigences et besoins de nos clients français (R.H.F, B.C.T, G.M.S).

Nous avons établi des partenariats solides avec des partenaires fiables et sérieux, qui maitrisent les normes de travail spécifiques aux clients français.
Nous sommes l’intermédiaire entre nos fournisseurs espagnols et nos clients français. 
Nous travaillons principalement pour des grossistes indépendants, ainsi que pour la grande distribution. Nous servons uniquement les professionnels. 

Nos produits : 
- Charcuterie (Jambon Serrano, Jambon Ibérique, Chorizo, Fuet, Lomo…)
- Viande (Porc, Poulet)
- Surgelés (Produits de la Mer, Tapas, Découpes de Porc)
- Divers (Paëlla, Aioli)
Nous pouvons vous livrer dans votre marque en MDD (Marque de distributeur).

Nos prestations : 
- Mise en place de la politique commerciale en France avec le service export
- Élaboration des conditions de vente et des tarifs
- Référencement des marques et des gammes dans les circuits de distribution
- Suivi clientèle - Prise et transmission des commandes - Suivi logistique

Nous avons nos propres marques : Tradition Don Teo et Tapas Papé.

Essa instalação foi a base para o desenvolvimento e expansão da empresa no mercado brasileiro, que uma década depois (em 1988) daria um passo adiante com o início de atividades em São Paulo para atender a crescente demanda nacional no mercado varejista.

Name: American Fulfillment Online, LLC
Description:
American Fulfillment Online works with clients from around the globe to import unique and high-quality wine and food products to the United States. We partner with trusted foreign producers interested in selling to the U.S. market, and American businesses in search of high-quality products from abroad, particularly in Europe.

We are a family-owned company based in the port city of Wilmington, North Carolina. With over 25 years of expertise in eCommerce, automation, and communications- our mission is to open up the eCommerce revolution to traditional, high quality products from abroad.

In 2015, we moved from Italy to the United States and immediately realized that small and medium-sized European businesses were having a hard time getting high-quality, traditional products to the American eCommerce markets. As citizens of Europe and the United States, we can freely move and communicate across continents to find the best products at the best prices, and import them for American consumers and businesses.

If English isn't your first language, we speak German, Italian, Romanian, and French as well. Contact us for more information today!

Name: Merchant Brothers
Description:
Merchant Brothers Pte Ltd, established in Singapore in April 2020 by José Rodrigues and Ray Poh, is a distinguished trading company specialising in fine food products from Portugal and various parts of the world. In collaboration with the Rodrigues family, who operates Sabores Alentejanos, a renowned Macau distributor of foodstuff throughout Macau, Hong Kong, and China, Merchant Brothers has successfully carved a niche in delivering exceptional culinary experiences.

José Rodrigues, driven by his profound love for Portuguese culture and tradition, embarked on this venture to address the scarcity of authentic Portuguese food products in the Asian region. His extensive knowledge and passion for nature and agriculture prompted frequent visits to his family's hometown in the rustic Alentejo region of Portugal and Europe. Recognising that the foundation of excellent cuisine lies in the use of quality ingredients, José curated and individually sourced products, elevating Sabores Alentejanos to one of the premier food suppliers in Macau.

Merchant Brothers, inspired by this culinary journey, aspires to take the Singaporean palate on an extraordinary voyage to explore the flavours of Portugal and beyond. Since November 2023, we have increased our product portfolio to include a wider array of seafood and fine meats, enhancing our commitment to providing diverse and high-quality food options to our valued customers. This expansion aligns with our vision to bring a rich tapestry of flavours, rooted in European culinary traditions, to the vibrant culinary scene of Singapore. As we grow, our dedication to sourcing the finest products remains unwavering, ensuring that every experience with Merchant Brothers is a delightful celebration of exquisite taste and cultural richness.

KAIROS serves those for whom luxury is not display, but alignment.

Provenance, Discretion, Coherence

Name: OPA Foods
Description:
Welcome to OPA - On the Go, Pure Appetite.

In a world full of sugar loaded snacks and confusing labels, OPA was created to simplify snacking. We’re a clean label, health first brand offering guilt free indulgence without compromise.

From large, crunchy Makhana to premium dry fruits and seed mixes, our snacks are crafted for the modern lifestyle one that’s fast paced, health conscious, and always craving better choices.

We’re proudly Indian and source our ingredients responsibly to bring you the perfect balance of taste, nutrition, and freshness.

 The Spark Behind OPA
Founded by Bharat Chang, a Chartered Accountant turned entrepreneur, OPA was born from experience and intention. With 10+ years in finance and scaling startups, Bharat left spreadsheets to build something he truly believed in a brand that transforms the way India snacks.

What started as a simple idea became a movement toward snacking with purpose.

 Our Mission
To create honest, nourishing snacks that align with a healthy lifestyle without ever compromising on flavor.
We believe real food beats junk food, every single time.

 Our Vision
To become a household name for clean snacking across India and beyond trusted by all age groups for daily energy, focus, and joy.

 Why OPA Stands Out
 Big, bold, and balanced flavors
 Premium, handpicked ingredients
 No preservatives or artificial colors
 Founder led creativity and care in every pack

 Let’s Connect If You Are
 A retailer or distributor in the FMCG/health space
 An investor looking to support high potential D2C brands
 A nutrition, wellness, or fitness expert
 A conscious consumer or growth focused entrepreneur

 Join Our Journey
OPA isn’t just a brand it’s a movement.
From corporate desks to travel bags, school tiffins to binge time bowls let’s snack better, together.

 www.opafoods.in

Základem naší práce je komunikace. Společně s našimi zákazníky nacházíme řešení pro jejich aktuální či dlouhodobá přání a individuální potřeby, které se týkají závozu gastronomických provozoven.

Name: Livell OÜ
Description:
Livell, mille nimi tuleneb väljendist "live well" (ela hästi), seisab tervisliku eluviisi eest. Meie jaoks tähendab see kvaliteetseid toitaineid, rahulikku meelt ja loodusest hoolimist.

Oleme premium tervislike toidubrändide maaletooja Eestis, tuues turule hoolikalt valitud kvaliteetseid tooteid, mis toetavad tervislikku eluviisi ilma maitseelamusi ohverdamata.

Meie brändid:
Brite – Naturaalsed energiajoogid parema fookuse ja vaimse soorituse jaoks. Kolm maitset: ananass-mango, vaarikas-münt ja sidrun-laim. Kofeiini ja taimsete ekstraktide läbimõeldud kombinatsioon annab energiat ilma järsu kukkumiseta, mida põhjustavad tavalised energiajoogid.

Dig – Rootsi päritolu orgaanilised maiustused, mis on 100% looduslikud, gluteenivabad ja ilma kunstlike lisaaineteta. Paljude maailmaturul tuntud maiustuste ja snäkkide seas eristub Dig oma puhtuse ja läbipaistvusega koostisosade osas.

Applite – Õunapõhised tervislikud maiustused, mis koosnevad 99% õuntest, sisaldavad rohkelt vitamiine ja kiudaineid. Eriliselt õhuline tekstuur ja lai maitsevalik muudavad need ideaalseks tervislikuks suupisteks.

Vieve – Valgurikka kollageeniga valmistatud joogid, mis sisaldavad 20g kollageenvalku ja vaid 80 kalorit.

Meie tooteid leiab üle Eesti kvaliteetsetest jaekettidest (Rimi, R-Kiosk, Kaubamaja, Coop, Stockmann, Kaupmees, Blender, Apollo Kino, Boost), kohvikutest ja e-poodidest. Oleme pühendunud sellele, et tuua Eesti tarbijateni toidud ja joogid, mis on uuenduslikud, kvaliteetsed ja tervislikud.

Missioon: Teha tervislikud valikud kättesaadavaks ja nauditavaks, et toetada inimeste heaolu ja kvaliteetsemat elu.

Name: BOLCI UK
Description:
BOLÇİ is a renowned and registered chocolate producer from Bolu, Türkiye—known for its natural beauty and long-standing confectionery tradition.
Our journey began in 1998 with the creation of Bolu Chocolate, made by coating crunchy croquant pieces of hazelnuts, pistachios, almonds, and peanuts with rich chocolate. Today, BOLÇİ offers over 1,000 varieties, produced in a modern 18,000 m² facility, and enjoyed by chocolate lovers in over 40 countries.
BOLÇİ’s mission is to prioritise quality and customer satisfaction, continuously expanding its domestic sales network while strengthening its global presence through increased exports. With the motto “A Very Different BOLÇİ”, the brand has added Beyoğlu Chocolate, Specialty Chocolates, Truffles, Madlen, Roche, Dragees, Mushroom Chocolates and more to its portfolio, each crafted with expert skill. Our R&D team works continuously to introduce new and innovative flavours.
Quality and trust are core to our brand. BOLÇİ uses only premium raw materials and adopts the highest food safety standards in its state-of-the-art production facility. All products are free from alcohol, lard, and chemical additives.
What began in a 16 m² workshop has grown into a factory with a monthly production capacity of 250 tons, staffed by 350 trained employees dedicated to delivering exceptional chocolate experiences.

Description:
Elevate Your Culinary Experience with Sky Agri Export

At Sky Agri Export, we're passionate about bringing the vibrant flavours of the world to your table. As a leading spice exporting company, we specialize in sourcing the finest quality spices from across the globe and delivering them to kitchens worldwide.

With decades of experience in the spice industry, we've built a reputation for excellence, integrity, and unparalleled customer service. Our extensive network of trusted suppliers enables us to procure a diverse range of spices, from exotic herbs and rare peppers to staple seasonings and aromatic blends.

What sets us apart is our unwavering commitment to quality at every step of the process. From meticulous sourcing and rigorous testing to careful packaging and prompt delivery, we ensure that every spice that bears our name meets the highest standards of freshness, purity, and flavour.

Whether you're a professional chef looking to elevate your culinary creations or a home cook seeking to explore new flavours and cuisines, we have the perfect spice for every dish and palate. Our comprehensive product catalogue features a wide variety of spices, herbs, blends, and specialty seasonings, carefully curated to inspire your culinary adventures.

But our dedication to excellence doesn't end with our products. We're also committed to sustainability, ethical sourcing practices, and supporting the communities that grow and harvest our spices. By partnering with us, you're not just getting exceptional spices – you're also joining us in our mission to make a positive impact on the planet and the people who call it home.

Whether you're a restaurant owner, food manufacturer, retailer, or passionate home cook, we invite you to experience the difference that Sky Agri Export spices can make in your kitchen. Join us on a journey of flavour discovery and let us help you unlock the full potential of your culinary creations. Spice up your life with Sky Agri Export today!

Name: B. CATALANI, INC
Description:
B. Catalani, Inc. dates back to 1888.  As a young man, Blas Catalani was working for his father-in-law at Talerico Produce - Domestics and Tropical Fruit and Produce. With a true entrepreneurial spirit, Blas wanted to be the first distributor to bring lettuce to Texas by rail during the months lettuce could not be grown here. In 1914, B. Catalani Produce. was born, and became  the first distributor to ship lettuce and other fresh fruits and vegetables on ice via rail from California, enabling his customers to purchase fresh fruits and vegetables year round.

For nearly a century, the family has been working hard to carry out B. Catalani’s vision of being the premier provider of fresh fruits and vegetables to the customers it serves. B. Catalani’s longevity in the produce industry has led to more accurate forecasts, and impressive buying power as a result of many long-term relationships with growers.

We have an unwavering commitment to deliver the level of customer service our clients expect. It’s all a part of our effort to be the premier provider of fresh fruits and vegetables to the customers we serve.

Name: Vinos of Uruguay
Description:
Leo Guerrero founded Vinos of Uruguay in 2023 after at return trip to Uruguay inspired him to share the beautiful culture of small production, boutique wines from his families home land in Uruguay with his new home in Australia.

Leo selected Bodega Bouza and Cerro del Torro as the first wineries due to their incredible quality, superb selection, reputation, wine awards, reviews and accreditations. In just these two wineries Leo found easy drinking blends and varietals all the way to premium reserve limited edition single origin bottles. 

Uruguay ranks fourth as a producer in the South American continent and it is the only one with an Atlantic climate influence, which has allowed it to develop balanced wines with unique and internationally recognised characteristics.

The wines here are closer in structure, style, and taste to Old World wines. The wineries are small and still family-owned and run; virtually all hand-made every step of the way, and infused with the passion and enthusiasm of these families, resulting in unique wines with characteristics that reflect both the terroir of the vineyard and the personality of the individual winemaker.

Name: RSA Group Local Market Network
Description:
The RSA Group Local Market Network (LMN) incorporates 11 fresh produce markets operating in different areas of the country. It offers farmers unprecedented sales channel reach and control over the execution of their marketing strategy, all through a single point of relationship contact with RSA Group. 
    RSA Group’s LMN includes markets operating in a range of different locations, including some traditionally classified as ‘metro’. The business model focuses on ensuring that producers and buyers are given access to services and commercial opportunities across the entire network, regardless of their specific area of operation. 

    RSA Group is a South African based company, founded in 1984, that specialises in the sale and marketing of fresh fruit and vegetables on behalf of farmers in all marketing channels: markets, export, retail and e-commerce. The group has a strong industry reputation as a fresh produce growth partner, thanks to its ability to add a sales edge to marketing strategies that delivers clear commercial value for producers. 
We are passionate about fresh produce sales, and everything we do is rooted in our Farmer-First philosophy.

    NORTHEASTERN: RSA Mooketsi, RSA Polokwane, RSA Nelspruit, RSA Ekurhuleni, RSA Rustenburg

Name: Nutshell GmbH
Description:
Nutshell, a brand owned by GDF GmbH, is a notable player in the market for bulk nuts, offering a wide selection of premium nut varieties. With a strong focus on promoting healthiness through their products, Nutshell caters to a diverse clientele looking for high-quality nuts, including pistachios, almonds, hazelnuts, and cashews.

1. Pistachios: Nutshell offers bulk pistachios that are known for their irresistible taste and vibrant green color. Pistachios are not only a delicious snack but are also rich in essential nutrients, making them a popular choice for health-conscious consumers.

2. Almonds: Almonds are a versatile and nutritious nut, and Nutshell provides them in bulk quantities. Almonds are celebrated for their heart-healthy benefits, and they are a key ingredient in various culinary creations, from salads to desserts.

3. Hazelnuts: Hazelnuts are known for their rich, slightly sweet flavor and are used in a wide range of recipes, including chocolates, pastries, and savory dishes.

4. Cashews: Cashews are another beloved nut variety that Nutshell offers in bulk. They are popular for their creamy texture and sweet taste. Cashews are versatile and can be enjoyed on their own or used in cooking and baking.

By providing these high-quality nuts in bulk quantities, Nutshell caters to a diverse customer base, including individuals, retailers, restaurants, and food manufacturers. The availability of these nuts in bulk allows businesses and individuals to meet their various culinary and nutritional needs efficiently.

Name: Green Star Distribution UK
Description:
GreenStar Distribution UK is a specialized food import and distribution company connecting UK retailers with authentic, high-quality products from Morocco, the UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Egypt.

Our mission is to bridge the gap between suppliers in the MENA region and ethnic retailers across the UK. We work directly with trusted producers and manufacturers to provide a consistent, cost-effective supply of:
	•	Traditional and ethnic groceries
	•	Halal-certified foods
	•	Pantry staples, snacks, and beverages

We understand the cultural and economic needs of the communities we serve, and we are committed to helping shop owners increase profitability through tailored product ranges, competitive pricing, and reliable logistics.

Whether you’re a corner shop, ethnic supermarket, or wholesale buyer — GreenStar Distribution is your trusted partner for authentic, affordable, and in-demand products from North Africa and the Middle East.

⸻

 Our Services

 Product Sourcing & Importing
We work directly with vetted suppliers in Morocco, UAE, KSA, and Egypt to source high-quality goods for the UK market.

Partenaires de nombreux pays, nous entretenons une expérience unique en matière de logistique et de législation dans l’approvisionnement en fruits et légumes transformés.

Nous proposons une offre variée et adaptée à chacun de nos clients

L'ACTIVITÉ.

Comme distributeur, nous proposons à nos clients agro-industriels, différents produits alimentaires intermédiaires suivant leurs besoins d’utilisation :

• Recherche de fabrications adaptées, développement de nouveaux produits et créations, suivi des marchandises (qualité, adaptation, mélange, etc.)

• Information des récoltes et des disponibilités

• Respect des cahiers des charges

• Logistique des contrats et commandes

• Organisation du transport des marchandises depuis les usines de production ou stockeurs

• Traçabilité et suivi analytique avec nos laboratoires partenaires (physico chimiques, microbiologiques, etc.)

• Gestion des non conformités

Nous commercialisons des produits conventionnels, biologiques (Ecocert, US) et de culture raisonnée. Nous sommes également partenaires de la filière équitable (Fairtrade, Flocert…)
Nous sommes également certifiés IFS Broker, certification essentielle dans notre engagement d'amélioration continue envers la qualité et le respect des normes les plus exigeantes de notre secteur.



NOS VALEURS.

Nous offrons à nos clients agro-industriels une palette de produits alimentaires intermédiaires propres à chacun de leurs besoins.

Véritable relais et collaborateurs entre producteurs et utilisateurs, 
nous suivons chaque innovation et permettons ainsi aux acteurs 
de la filière de se renouveler continuellement.

La fiabilité de notre partenariat que nous cultivons avec 
nos fournisseurs et nos clients font de notre société un acteur incontournable du secteur agro-alimentaire en France.

شركة خلفاء مجلي أحمد بامجلي هي شركة سعودية رائدة في مجال المواد الغذائية وضع لبناتها الأولى منذ عام 1344 هـ الموافق 1925 م وهو أحد قدامى التجارة في مدينة جدة وهو الشيخ مجلي احمد بامجلي يرحمه الله. ثم حمل الراية من بعده ابنه الشيخ/ محسن مجلي احمد بامجلي منذ عام 1354 هـ الموافق 1935 م والذي حرص على إدارة كافة إعماله ونشاطاته بنفسه ويقوم بإدارتها وفق احدث النظم  والأساليب الإدارية حتى أصبحت الشركة في مصاف الشركات السعودية التي يشار اليها بالبنان في مجال نشاطها.

 
والشيخ محسن بامجلي الذي شهدت مدينة جدة إنطلاقته الأولى في عالم التجارة بدء نشاطه في عمارة متواضعة بوسط المدينة يرى أن ما تحقق بفضل الله من نمو وإزدهار للشركة لم يكن ليتحقق لو لم يضع نصب عينيه طوال رحلته الطويلة في عالم التجارة مخافة الله وتقواه في كل ما يقوم به ويقول يكفي الانسان شرفاً أن يمتهن مهنة المصطفى صلى الله عليه وسلم الذي قال عليكم بالتجارة والجسارة فإن فيهما تسعة أعشار الرزق. صدق رسول الله.

Name: JJ Agro Growers
Description:
JJ Agro Growers Ltd. is a family-owned agricultural company based in Tanzania, founded in 2018. The company is dedicated to empowering local smallholder farmers through sustainable agricultural practices, while providing high-quality, ethically sourced products to both local and international markets. JJ Agro Growers specializes in a wide range of agricultural products, including spices, nuts, herbs, and coffee.

The company offers a variety of products such as turmeric, black pepper, cinnamon, cardamom, cloves, ginger, chili, and cashews, all of which are sourced from smallholder farmers in Tanzania's fertile regions, including Mtwara, Morogoro, Mbeya, and the Southern Highlands.

JJ Agro Growers also provides essential services to farmers, including training in Good Agricultural Practices (GAP), farm certification (such as Global GAP), and access to local and international markets. The company promotes sustainability by ensuring that farming practices are environmentally friendly and that farmers, particularly women and youth, are empowered through capacity-building initiatives.

Through its subsidiary Enjoy, JJ Agro Growers also produces and markets a range of spices and seasoning blends aimed at food lovers who seek new, exciting flavors. The goal is to inspire culinary creativity while supporting sustainable farming practices and improving the livelihoods of local farmers.

Introducing Tribe & Tales, a brand dedicated to the ethical sourcing of products originating from tribal communities and indigenous artisans.
Our mission is simple "To enhance the daily Nutritional value of our customers while preserving the vibrant forest culture & empowering our forest dependent communities"  our commitment to sustainability is reflected in our 100% natural products and environmental friendly process from initial sourcing to final packaging.
The biodiversity , natural pollination and No-industrial processing in the tribal region increases the nutritional value of the grown food products higher then the conventionally grown products. 
We are committed to making our process transparent, allowing customers to easily access information about the source and origin of our products. Some natural food items may be promoted as healthier and more sustainable than they truly are, potentially misleading consumers. That's why we ensure all our products have lab-certified nutritional values, providing our customers with accurate and reliable information.

Description:
E&S Food, Inc., was started in 1980 by Settimo Guttilla in his car garage in Garfield NJ. Delivering products throughout the New York metro market with his car. After six years Settimo’s entire family wife Antonina and sons Joe, Jerry, and Sandro all joined in becoming part of the company. From that turning point Settimo created a house brand of Antonina named after his loving wife and with the help of great vendors such as Grande Cheese, Stanislaus Tomatoes, Barilla pasta and of course the original vendor Orlando foods E&S began to flourish. Name: Sensible Edibles
Description:
Sensible Edibles Bakery has created delicious, handmade, healthy baked goods for New York City since 1992. Baked fresh daily in our LIC wholesale location.
We believe in simple food. We value ingredients you can recognize and pronounce, made by hand with love. We aim to turn guilty pleasures into healthy snacks. We are aware of today’s prevalent food allergies and ingredient sensitivity, whether its nut-free, plant-based, or gluten-free. We are here to create foods to live by. 
Ask what goes into your food. Question how your body feels after eating. learn about the nutritional value of the ingredients or lack thereof. Invest in the food that supports what’s most important, your health. 
Great food should be in your neighborhood and wherever you go. That’s why we believe in wholesale distribution. We know how hard it can be to find clean food, so we are partnering with local businesses throughout New York to change the standard as it stands today. 
We believe in community and happiness. So, we believe in health. That means sweets when you’re feeling good and when you’re feeling down. We believe in love.  Hands are meant to be held and hold great things. We believe in simple. We believe in Sensible.

We also believe in taking care of our planet and precious resources. That is why we package our water in eternally recyclable aluminum cans and source our water close to where it will be consumed. Our water comes from a Great Lakes aquifer, traveling through crystals and minerals before it is purified and made ready for you. Name: Japan Food Solutions
Description:
JFS – Japanese Food Solutions is a specialized food-processing and export company dedicated to delivering premium-quality frozen fruits and vegetables to the world’s most demanding markets. As the industrial arm of Nile International Co. – Tokyo, we combine Japanese precision with Egyptian manufacturing strength to provide consistent, safe, and high-standard products for global B2B clients.

At JFS, we focus on the production of IQF frozen fruits and vegetables, with IQF strawberries being our flagship product. Our operations follow strict Japanese quality protocols, ensuring full compliance with international food-safety systems, traceability requirements, and the expectations of multinational manufacturers. We maintain advanced sorting, cleaning, freezing, and packaging processes designed to guarantee product integrity from the farm to the factory.

Around 40% of our total production is supplied to the Japanese market, serving food manufacturers, beverage companies, dessert producers, and industrial clients that require exceptional reliability and consistency. The remaining production is exported to 15+ countries across Asia, Europe, and the Americas, making JFS a trusted global supplier for IQF ingredients.
Through strong supplier relationships, rigorous quality control, and a deeply integrated logistics network, we provide our international partners with continuous availability, stable volumes, and responsive customer support.
Our mission is to deliver dependable IQF solutions that support industrial innovation, enhance product performance, and meet the highest global standards.

With a solid understanding of fish and the fishers that take care of their catch, Sundance Seafoods began offering gourmet quality, smoked salmon products under the brand “West Coast Select”.

From its humble beginnings, Sundance Seafoods has built the brand with a passion and an attention to detail, ensuring the highest quality possible. Adhering to these higher standards, our fishers properly handle, clean or dress the fish then deliver them in a timely manner; all necessary in order to bear our brand of West Coast Select.

Name: Audacia Handcrafted Elixirs
Description:
Welcome to Audacia. Where the audacity to believe in alchemy, commitment to quality and a deep reverence for slowing down creates an unparalleled drinking experience. Our elixirs are crafted with organic, whole ingredients, water & Icelandic salt. That's it.

Our ethos is in our name.

Audacia means “boldness” it is where the English word “audacity” originates. Additional definitions include: courage, originality & innovation. From inception, it has been our mission to practice this ethos in everything we do.

In 2020 our research and development began with one goal in mind, create the world’s purest, highest quality non-alcoholic spirit. Three years later we are beyond excited to introduce our handcrafted elixirs into the market.

Audacia is reimagining drinking through elevating the art of non-alcoholic spirit offerings. 

In a booming market, Audacia stands out by not attempting to recreate classic flavors or take shortcuts. 

Our elixirs are produced without additives, sugar, flavorings, extracts, acids or ingredients in which you could never hope to pronounce.

Truthfully, we didn’t know whether or not this would be possible and we are over-the-moon excited to debut our line of elixirs without compromise. Check out our list of ingredients on our website.

In many ways, our approach was not create from within the current reality that exists and instead, create from the world in which we want to live in. This is only the beginning of our journey and we’d love for you to join us in cultivating a more resilient future. We are here for anyone with the audacity to believe something beyond our current reality is possible.

This is Drinking Reimagined.

Name: Mala Caviar Paris
Description:
As a Beluga caviar wholesaler, we take great pride in the quality and craftsmanship of our caviar. Our caviar farm, located in the pristine waters of the Caspian sea, is dedicated to the sustainable and ethical production of some of the finest caviar in the world.


We understand that caviar is a luxury product, and we are committed to providing our customers with the best possible experience. This is why we only use the freshest eggs, and why we take great care in the packaging and shipping of our caviar.
We also pride ourselves in being transparent about our farming process and the sourcing of our sturgeons. 

Our farm is sustainably run, and we take great care to ensure that our sturgeons are well-cared for and that our farming practices have minimal impact on the environment.

Our caviar is carefully harvested from only the most mature and healthy Beluga sturgeon, ensuring a rich buttery taste that is truly unmatched. The delicate roe is then hand-graded and hand-packed to ensure the highest level of quality and freshness.

One of the unique features of our business is the ability to customize packages for our customers. Whether you are a gourmet chef looking for caviar to serve at a fancy restaurant, or a private individual looking to host a caviar-tasting party, we can provide you with the perfect package to suit your needs.

At Mala Caviar, we are committed to providing our customers with the very best caviar, and we stand behind our products with a 100% satisfaction guarantee. We invite you to taste the difference that our commitment to quality makes and experience the luxury of our Beluga caviar.

So whether you are a caviar connoisseur or new to the world of caviar, we invite you to experience the fine taste of our Beluga royal and imperial caviar and discover for yourself why it is considered the ultimate luxury food.

Email: info@malacaviar.co

Name: GE's GREEN EVOLUTION
Description:
Green Evolution, a dedicated Indian export company specializing in high-quality fruits, vegetables, and spices for the international market. Our mission is to deliver the finest produce from India’s rich agricultural heritage to the global community.

Why Partner with Green Evolution?
1. High Quality:
We ensure excellence at every step—from seed selection and proper irrigation to pest-free cultivation, meticulous harvesting, and careful packaging. Our attention to detail guarantees export-grade quality products that meet stringent international standards.

2. Innovation:
Our team consistently innovates to enhance cultivation techniques, implement advanced pest-control measures, and adopt modern packaging solutions. These efforts ensure our produce reaches our customers in pristine, damage-free condition.

3. Efficient Logistics:
Balancing precision in cultivation with speed in operations, we utilize state-of-the-art logistics solutions, including freight forwarding, customs handling, and transportation via land, sea, and air, to ensure timely delivery without compromising quality.

4. Customization:
We offer tailor-made services to meet the specific needs of our clients, such as customized packaging and providing produce at different stages of growth to cater to diverse preferences.

Why Green Evolution?
Our commitment to quality, innovation, efficiency, and customization makes us a reliable partner for sourcing Indian agricultural produce. You can count on us for exceptional products and services tailored to your unique requirements.

Name: Aji Pepper Sauce
Description:
Aji Pepper Sauce is a modern Peruvian condiment brand built on a simple belief: the pepper should lead.

Each sauce begins with real Peruvian Aji peppers - Amarillo, Verde, and Rojo - crafted to highlight their natural flavor, color, and character. These are not vinegar-forward hot sauces or mayo-based emulsions. The foundation is the pepper itself, prepared using authentic, homestyle Peruvian recipes that respect tradition while fitting seamlessly into modern kitchens.

The result is a line of sauces that moves easily across the kitchen. Aji Pepper Sauce works as a condiment, dip, marinade, or cooking base, fitting naturally into everyday meals without losing its identity. The flavor is bold but clean, with heat that shows up upfront and steps aside, allowing the pepper to remain the star.

Rooted in Peruvian culinary tradition and inspired by the way these sauces are made at home, our sauces bridge authenticity and versatility. Ingredients are minimal and intentional. There are no fillers, no sugar added, and no unnecessary shortcuts. Every sauce is vegan and plant-based; not to follow trends, but because that’s how these sauces are meant to be made.

Visually, the brand is vibrant and confident, inspired by the natural colors of Peru’s peppers and landscapes. The tone is knowledgeable yet approachable, proud but never precious. Aji Pepper Sauce is made for food lovers who care about flavor first, for cooks who want something global but practical, and for customers who want sauces that integrate into real life, not just sit on a shelf.

Aji Pepper Sauce isn’t trying to reinvent condiments or chase heat for shock value. It’s focused on doing one thing exceptionally well: bringing real, pepper-forward Peruvian flavor into everyday cooking - cleanly, honestly, and without compromise.

Name: Made with Love and Hope, LLC
Description:
At Made with Love and Hope, we understand the pain and devastation that suicide can bring to families and communities. That's why we have made it our mission to help raise awareness and prevent suicide through the power of baking. Our founder/owner was inspired to start this organization after the tragic loss of his nephew, Matthew Lane Hobby. Matthew was a gifted teenage musician (and skateboarder) who struggled with depression and anxiety, yet he always had a heart for helping others and had a smile that could brighten anyone's day.

When Matthew died by suicide at just 14 years old, his family and friends were left heartbroken and grappling with the question of why. It was in the aftermath of this tragedy that our founder decided to channel his grief into something positive. He began baking and selling cookies to raise money for suicide prevention organizations and Made with Love and Hope was born.

Today, we continue to bake with purpose, using our delicious treats to spread awareness about suicide prevention and raise funds for nonprofit organizations that support mental health. We believe that every life is precious and that by working together, we can help prevent suicide and support those who are struggling with mental illness. Thank you for joining us in this mission.

Name: Icebreakers Artesian Spring Water LLC
Description: Introducing Our Water For countless generations, the Oak Creek Canyon of Sedona has been revered for its remarkable artesian spring water. This water, known for both its unparalleled purity and its mystical healing properties, has captured the hearts of many. Over hundreds of years, rain and snowfall have sculpted the water, naturally filtering it through the canyon's rocks, creating a truly sacred source. It remains untouched by human hands, unequivocally superior, and possesses the power to restore and nourish. The origin of this exceptional spring water can be traced to a registered and protected Artesian Spring nestled in Oak Creek Canyon, Sedona, Arizona. With a pH level ranging from 7.3 to 8, it stands as one of the most distinguished springs in the Southwest. This pristine water contains natural electrolytes and is entirely sodium-free, further enhancing its quality. Its lower acidity, attributed to its natural pH level, contributes to the detoxification of the body, promoting optimal health and vitality. Our artesian water undergoes a meticulous natural filtration process that not only eliminates contaminants but also retains essential minerals. This filtration ensures that every sip delights the taste buds while offering enhanced nutritional benefits.

Name: LiquidGold culinary Argan oil
Description:
Argan trees grow only in Morocco, on a narrow strip of desert between Marrakesh and Essaouira.  They can survive incredibly harsh conditions where few other trees can’t, and the process of extracting their oil is highly labor-intensive. Most of this work is done by female farmworkers who must manually displace the fruit from the thorny tree branches, remove the flesh, and then crack the internal kernel with a rock to extract the precious oil. It takes 15 hours of labor to produce one liter of Argan oil.
￼
Health benefits of Argan Oil:

Switch your usual oil for Argan cooking oil and you’ll be consuming healthier omega 3’s, more vitamin E, and more antioxidants than before.

The essence of Argan has produced a culinary Argan Oil that is rich in flavor and a great compliment to a range of dishes and recipes. Great for dipping bread, drizzling over salads, and for adding to couscous, the uses are endless and you’ll be wondering why you’ve waited until now to add it to your diet. 

* 100% ECO-CERTIFIED ORGANIC – tested and proven for its limitless benefits, Moroccan Argan Oil is considered to be one of the purest oils in the world making it a healthy and premium culinary oil
* VERSATILE – being food-grade, this Argan organic oil is fully edible and can be used in place of olive oil for salad dressing and bread dipping
* ORIGIN – Argan Oil originates from the kernels of the Argan tree which are native to Morocco in North Africa
* PERFECT FINISHES – This organic oil improves dishes by drizzling over salads, soups, roasted vegetables, oatmeal, and even creamy desserts!

Since the Argan Tree grows only in one place in the world - the South of Morocco, its supplies are limited. In recent years, the Argan tree has been threatened by social and climatic factors, such as increased agriculture and over-exploitation. By using an accredited all-women cooperative network as its sole supplier, we play a role in helping to support the integration of women in Moroccan society

2020: Lancio di Idea Food Service

Questo servizio, pensato sia per il mondo dei coloniali e dolciumi sia per il settore HORECA (Hotellerie-Restaurant-Café), fornisce prodotti di alta qualità e un supporto costante ai professionisti del settore.

2024: Acquisizione di Idea Sweet Store

Situato a Nocera Inferiore, questo punto vendita offre una selezione esclusiva di prodotti dolciari e coloniali, oltre a un angolo enoteca con vini pregiati. Description:
Departamento de exportación de bodegas cuyo objetivo es la internacionalización y comercialización de sus vinos, trabajando codo con codo con todos los miembros de la bodega, como una parte más del equipo.

En VinEmotion, entendemos que cada bodega tiene una historia única que contar, un legado que compartir y unos vinos que emocionan. Nuestro servicio de export manager compartido está diseñado para ayudar a las bodegas a llevar su producto más allá de las fronteras, sin la necesidad de asumir el costo de un export manager exclusivo. Creemos que la colaboración es la clave para el éxito en el competitivo mundo del vino.

Nuestra misión es empoderar a las pequeñas y medianas bodegas, para que puedan acceder a mercados internacionales, potenciando su crecimiento y visibilidad. A través de un enfoque personalizado y estratégico, ayudamos a las bodegas a encontrar su lugar en el mundo, asegurando que cada botella cuente su propia historia y despierte emociones en los consumidores.

En VinEmotion, aspiramos a ser el puente entre las bodegas y el mundo, creando su red de distribución y la apreciación del vino. Queremos que cada bodega, sin importar su tamaño, tenga la oportunidad de brillar en el mercado global.

Mi objetivo como Export Manager, es el de mantener e incrementar la cartera de clientes fuera de nuestras fronteras de cada una de las bodegas a las que represento.  
De igual modo, la asistencia a ferias, misiones directas e inversas, y viajes comerciales son siempre una ventaja para las bodegas, ya que los costes de estas actividades son compartidos entre las bodegas representadas, lo que supone una gran ventaja y una mayor rentabilidad para las bodegas, que la de acciones individuales por separado.

Name: OrderTron
Description:
WHAT is OrderTron?
OrderTron is a scalable B2B Order Management System (OMS) designed for fast, easy, and accurate order processing in the food and beverage distribution industry. This SaaS solution is available via an intuitive desktop platform and iOS/Android mobile apps.

WHY does it matter?
Many distributors still process orders manually, leading to errors, delays, and inefficiencies. This impacts both distributors selling products and the retail and food service businesses purchasing them. Manually processing an order can take up to 15 minutes, costing distributors valuable time and money—ultimately affecting their profitability, productivity, and customer experience.

WHO trusts OrderTron?
OrderTron is trusted by customers across the USA, Australia, and New Zealand for its exceptional customer support and product functionality. We are passionate about empowering the food and beverage distribution industry with the fastest, easiest, and most accurate order processing—while also addressing food wastage.

HOW does OrderTron work?
OrderTron is a modern order processing software that simplifies order processing with an intuitive, visually clear dashboard where distributors can effortlessly track, manage, and process all incoming orders and gain instant access to reports for better decision-making.
Their customers—small retailers and food service businesses—can easily place orders through a user friendly mobile app, accessible anytime, anywhere. 
Plus, OrderTron seamlessly integrates with established ERPs and accounting platforms, ensuring smooth operations without disrupting existing workflows

We continuously improve our user experience and customer support, guided by feedback from customers, partners, and industry experts.

Contact us to experience the product, partner with us, or talk food tech.

Founded in 1967 by brothers Angelo and Peter Mardas, Aliments AMGA was initially established as a poultry and egg distributor.  During those early years, the brothers worked side by side out of a small location on Henri Julien in the heart of La Petite Patrie.

In the years that followed, the company expanded to their product offering to include high quality meats, seafood and dairy products and in 1972 they moved to a larger location on rue Jeanne-Mance.

In the mid 1980’s, to better serve the needs of their growing client base, they expanded the building, effectively doubling its size. This remained the head office and meat packing facilities for AMGA until mid-2015, when they made the move to their current location off the Transcanada Highway.

Description:
My name is Humberto "The Chori-Man" Raygoza, a 4th generation artisan chorizo maker. After years of learning my craft from my Dad and uncles back in Zacatecas, Mexico I decided to start my own business. My journey began in West L.A. and DTLA and took me to my current brick and mortar in San Pedro, CA.

In March 2013, I launched "The Chori-Man Artisan Chorizos & Sausages." When I first started, I made 100 lbs every three months and sold my product door to door from a little cooler on wheels, which I named The Chori-Mobile. Within the year I increased to 400 lbs a month, and we now sell over a few thousand pounds per month, and counting.

What began with my first partnerships with Del Rey Deli Co., The Federal Bars in Long Beach and North Hollywood, and the Hudson House has now grown to a partnership with over 20 amazing restaurants, boutique markets, and distributors in the greater Los Angeles supplied by our Wholesale Company, Salchicha Foods.

Covid put us through the wringer, but I am incredibly thankful to still be here to feed you, serve you, and grow, with your continued love and support. 

Gracias por todo.

Description:
We process fruits and vegetables on demand for wholesale sales.

As UNESCO has included pumpkin soup in the intangible cultural heritage of humanity, we transform the pumpkin into powder in order to facilitate the cooking of the soup and its export.

We support the fight against food insecurity in Haiti. First, we transform organic products from Haiti to produce foods rich in calories, vitamins and proteins to fight malnutrition and undernutrition among children, pregnant women, people with HIV... Then, we organize training and community mobilization sessions to educate the community on food intake and nutrition in general.

We also support farmers' associations by providing them with agribusiness training and facilitating the purchase of equipment abroad.

Name: Testoni Beverage Sassari
Description:
La Testoni Bibite è un ingrosso di beverage operante nel mondo della distribuzione HO.RE.CA, costituita nel 1984 dai fratelli Bachisio e Domenico Testoni e avente sede nel nord-ovest Sardegna, nella città di Sassari. Negli ultimi due anni è in atto il cambio generazionale con l’ingresso, all’interno della struttura, delle rispettive figlie.
 

L’azienda nel corso degli anni ha ampliato sempre più la sua attività ricercando e selezionando prodotti specifici e dedicati al consumo fuori casa, raggiungendo una capillare copertura del territorio sulle zone di: Sassari, Porto Torres, Stintino, Castelsardo, Alghero, Macomer, Bonorva, Usini, Ossi, ed altre zone limitrofe.

Sin dai primi anni la Testoni Bibite, oltre a commercializzare un’ampia gamma di articoli conosciuti in tutto il mondo, ha selezionato marchi e aziende con cui collaborare al fine di distribuire prodotti unici sul territorio e differenziare la sua offerta, dando un valore aggiunto alla propria clientela.

 

Una delle priorità che si pone l’impresa è quella di stare al passo con l’evoluzione del mercato e con le nuove tendenze, ricercando referenze innovative e di qualità. Sin dai primi anni la Testoni Bibite si è dedicata all’attività d’importazione delle birre estere in particolare dalla Germania, dall’Austria, dall’Irlanda, dall’Inghilterra etc.; segue l’attenzione per le Birre Artigianali, il Valdobbiadene, le Bevande Bio e altri prodotti di nicchia, avendo di tutto ciò la distribuzione “in esclusiva” sul territorio di competenza.

 

Oltre a occuparsi della distribuzione di bevande, la Testoni Bibite installa impianti di spillatura, fornendo tutta l’assistenza e la consulenza necessaria.

 

ll rapporto diretto e di fiducia con il cliente è uno dei valori su cui l’intera azienda, basa il proprio operato, cercando di soddisfare al massimo le sue esigenze e cercando sempre di offrire un costante e puntuale servizio.

Description:
EFH Farms was founded in 2023 by a group of young entrepreneurs to ensuring a diverse range of high-quality agricultural products.

Our key focus areas include fruits, vegetables, dry fruits, and a dehydrated range of fruits & spices. We are committed to producing and sourcing only the freshest and finest products, ensuring that our clients receive the best quality ingredients for their businesses and consumers.

We also leverage the latest advancements in Agri Tech to optimize our operations and deliver superior outcomes in all stages of the food supply chain.

As a result of our dedication to quality and innovation, we have built a vast clientele in both developed and developing markets. Our products are supplied to various retail outlets, e-commerce platforms, as well as local and international marketplaces.

Name: Huayan Collagen Technology Co., Ltd
Description:
Established in July 2005, Hainan Huayan Collagen Technology Co., Ltd.is a national high-tech enterprise integrating product research and development, production and sales, with the registered capital of 22 million yuan. Its headquarters is located in Haikou, Hainan. The company has R&D center and key laboratory of nearly 1,000 square meters, currently has more than 40 patents, 20 corporate standards and 10 complete product systems. The company has invested nearly 100 million yuan to build the largest industrialization base of fish collagen peptide in Asia, with a production capacity of more than 4,000 tons. It is the earliest domestic enterprise engaged in the production of hydrolyzed collagen peptide and the first enterprise that has obtained the production license of fish collagen peptide in China.

The company has successively passed many certifications such as ISO45001, IS09001, ISO22000, SGS, HACCP, HALAL, MUI HALAL and FDA. Our products meet the requirements of the WHO and national standards, mainly exported to Europe, America, Australia, Russia, Japan, South Korea, Singapore, Thailand and some countries and regions in Southeast Asia.
Over the past 18 years, all colleagues of our company have persistently adhered to the purpose of "committing to the collagen business and serving human health", continuously researching and developing, innovating and improving the production process, adopting internationally advanced low-temperature enzymatic hydrolysis, low-temperature concentration and other advanced production process, which has successfully launched fish collagen peptide，oyster peptide, sea cucumber peptide, earthworm peptide, walnut peptide, soybean  peptide, pea peptide, and many other small-molecule animal and plant biologically active peptides. The products are widely used in all kinds of fields such as food, cosmetic and pharmaceutical.

Description:
HOLY WATER by Alta Gracia is the ultimate elixir of life. We are here to lift and refresh your spirit and remind you to hydrate your higher self. We believe there is enough death, negativity, and divisiveness in the world, and we are here to inspire and unite the highest version of ourselves.

We also believe in taking care of our planet and precious resources. That is why we package our water in eternally recyclable aluminum cans and source our water close to where it will be consumed. Our water comes from a Great Lakes aquifer, traveling through crystals and minerals before it is purified and made ready for you. Our perfectly balanced pH of 7 is pure, clean, and tastes like heaven.

Beyond bringing the world the most divinely delicious water, each ounce of water you buy from us goes towards building our foundation for preventative mental health care education to fortify the minds of the next generations to come so they are better equipped to steward themselves and our planet.

Each bottle reflects our farm-to-bottle commitment - honest ingredients, clean fermentation, and bold, refreshing taste.

We specialize in tailored support & system flow to boost Kombucha sales right from the very beginning. One partner of ours did 95L within 45 days.

Beyond brewing, we actively support marine conservation. In Phu Quoc, Fuwok Cha partners with Sasa Marine Rescue Team on coral planting and environmental education because what we bottle is just one part of the impact we aim to make. Vary your CSR with us !

Farm to Bottle - Small batch. Big taste

Our brands

IDEAL

“Семеновна”

“Сказка”

The “Сказка” sunflower oil is produced from selected sunflower seeds of the highest quality harvested in the fields of southern Russia.

Golden Drop

Golden drop sunflower oil is a natural product that does not contain GMOs and other harmful impurities. The Golden Drop oil is successfully sold in the CIS countries. 

B2B & HORECA

Redan från start fanns en vision att i samarbete med de bästa tillverkarna inom sin nisch producera och saluföra ekologiska och tillsatsfria livsmedel till den svenska marknaden. Trots skepsis från omgivningen om ekologins ” vara eller inte vara ” fanns det aldrig några tveksamheter att driva affärsidén vidare.
Tiden den går. Idag är det tjugofem år senare och vår vardag ser helt annorlunda ut. 
Människor är medvetna om vad de stoppar i sig och ekologi har inte längre ett nostalgiskt skimmer över sig. Numera är det en självklarhet att det ska finnas ekologiska och tillsatsfria livsmedel att tillgå.
Vi är glada över att ha varit med och bidragit till att marknaden ser ut så idag, och att vi med stor samlad kunskap och erfarenhet är en bättre partner att förse den svenska marknaden med goda livsmedel.

Fast 75 Jahre Erfahrung, Leidenschaft für Lebensmittel, Top-Service und Qualität spiegeln sich in hoher Kundenzufriedenheit wider. Wir liefern regionale und internationale Spezialitäten von Obst und Gemüse über Molkerei, Tiefkühl- und Trockenprodukte bis hin zu Non-Food-Artikeln.

Als Teil der Service-Bund Gruppe profitieren wir außerdem von einem deutschlandweiten Foodservice-Netzwerk, professioneller Qualitätssicherung und einem umfassenden Webshop.

An unserem Standort in Tönning beschäftigen wir rund 50 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Durch unser vielfältiges Angebot an Waren und Dienstleistungen in einer dynamischen, innovativen Branche entstehen immer wieder neue und spannende Aufgaben. Wir legen viel Wert auf ein respektvolles, verbindliches und unterstützendes Miteinander. Weitere Infos und aktuelle Jobs unter https://karriere.servicebund.de/bast

Name: B-SIDES
Description:
Hey, we're B-Sides, a sustainable food company that's raising the bar for every other snack brand out there. Our gluten-free, soy-free, dairy-free, plant-based and protein-packed upcycled Crunch Puffs taste like summer camp and save the world. 

We founded B-Sides based on a super simple question: what happens to all the leftover oats after they make oat milk?

The answer - those oats usually get thrown out - seemed totally insane, so we asked a new question: What else can we make with those oats besides oat milk?

Enter: Delicious, upcycled crunch puffs that save the world.

Our goal is to build the most sustainable snack company in the world - and have it mean something when we say it. We can reduce food waste, mitigate climate change, and eat a little better, all at the same time. 

Come along for the ride—@enjoyBSIDES.

Name: D'Origen
Description:
"En D'Origen, nuestro propósito es traer una auténtica experiencia culinaria a los corazones y mesas de todo el mundo. Somos una empresa apasionada dedicada a la importación de alimentos nostálgicos de América Latina, trayendo los sabores más genuinos y tradicionales a los paladares más exigentes.

Nuestra misión es crear momentos de alegría y conexión a través de la comida, celebrando las ricas tradiciones culinarias que forman parte de nuestra identidad. Trabajamos incansablemente para traer productos de la más alta calidad y autenticidad, compartiendo la riqueza y diversidad de la gastronomía latinoamericana con aquellos que buscan una experiencia verdaderamente única.

En D'Origen, la pasión por la autenticidad se combina con la innovación constante. Nuestro equipo está comprometido en descubrir y presentar productos que evocan recuerdos, despiertan emociones y fomentan el amor por la buena comida. Valoramos la creatividad, la colaboración y el enfoque en la calidad, y estamos decididos a trascender fronteras culinarias para crear un mundo donde cada bocado cuente una historia.

Únete a nosotros en este emocionante viaje para explorar sabores, celebrar tradiciones y crear recuerdos duraderos a través de la magia de la gastronomía. En D'Origen, estamos transformando la manera en que experimentamos la comida y estamos emocionados de compartir esta apasionante travesía contigo."

Perché Collaborare con Noi

• Qualità Garantita: I nostri prodotti sono realizzati con materie prime biologiche e seguono metodi produttivi artigianali che garantiscono eccellenza e autenticità.
• Servizio Personalizzato: Offriamo un servizio clienti dedicato e personalizzato, con soluzioni flessibili per soddisfare le specifiche esigenze di business dei nostri partner.

Name: Bodegas Piedemonte, S.C.
Description:
Our winery is located in the town of Olite, in Navarra. It was founded in 1992 thanks to the enthusiasm and dedication of a group of winegrowers, with the desire to produce quality wines by combining tradition with modern winemaking techniques.

It is named after the geographical area where it is situated, “Piedemonte Olite-Tafalla”: a plain located between the Pyrenees and the Ebro Valley, bordered by the hills of Ujué and the Cidacos River.

Today, Olite brings together all the key organizations and institutions of the sector: the Navarra Viticulture and Oenology Station (EVENA), the Navarra Denomination of Origin Council, the headquarters of the Navarra Wine Guild, and the Museum of the Vine and Wine.

Piedemonte’s excellence begins in the vineyards, with meticulous and careful work by the winegrowers: the raw materials are selected, nurtured, and cherished from the very start. Then, all areas of wine production and quality control are overseen by a young, dynamic, and driven team of professionals who have modernized and streamlined the daily operations at the winery.

Our products come from selected partners and artisan producers in Europe, who are constantly looking for quality, taste and authenticity.

We are proud to share our passion, expertise and knowledge of premium, quality food products with our customers. We are proud to support culinary operations of the best chefs around the World. Vision: To become the cornerstone of every baker's masterpiece, empowering creativity and elevating baking experiences worldwide.

As industry insiders, the founders intimately grasped the challenges confronting smaller-scale kitchens in the F&B and Hospitality sector. This wasn’t merely about introducing a product; it was a strategic move to offer a cost-effective, time-saving solution that upheld the uncompromising quality synonymous with authentic Italian baking.

For the Artisan Bakers, Giorgio Food Aisa has also curated the finest Baking Ingredients such as [Bongiovanni] Italian Flour tailored for specific products and Innovative Baking Solutions like [Biocreations] Sourdough Concentrate that replaces the need for a starter), empowering bakers of all levels to achieve exceptional results in their creations. 

Giorgio Food Asia is also at the forefront of addressing industry trends like the demand for Clean Label products, offering 100% natural shelf-life extension solutions and a spectrum of chemical-free baking solutions for manufacturers and industrial bakers.

Name: Swiss Prime Taste AG
Description:
Swiss Prime Taste AG: ein einziger Kontakt mit einer Welt voller Möglichkeiten. Als Produzent und Direkt-Importeur, gewährleisten wir eine vollständige vertikale Integration in der Qualitätskontrolle sowie im Produktfluss vom Fang bis zum Kunden. Im vertikalen Produktionsprozess wird die Sicherheit entlang der gesamten Linie vom Fang bis zur Lieferung durch die eigenen Kontrollmaßnahmen gewährleistet. Unser QM prüft die eingehenden Lieferungen unserer Produktion, bevor die Produkte in ganz Europa vertrieben werden.

Wir arbeiten seither effektiv und erfolgreich, als Beschaffungspartner mit unseren Kunden und Lieferanten zusammen. Unser Team von Experten verfügt nicht nur über praxisorientierte Sachkenntnisse rund um das Thema Fisch / Seafood, sondern darüber hinaus über große Erfahrungen im Bereich Import- und Exportabwicklungsaufgaben. Diese decken die gesamte Bandbreite von der Dokumentation über Zollabfertigung bis hin zur Etikettierung und Lagerhaltung ab. 
Aus diesen Synergien, begleitet durch unseren in Jahrzehnten gewachsenen Erfahrungsschatz, ziehen unsere zahlreichen in- und ausländischen Kunden den allergrößten Nutzen. Wir bieten ihnen nicht nur ein Höchstmaß an Qualitätsware, die durch unsere stetige Wareneingangskontrolle überwacht wird, sondern darüber hinaus ein umfassendes Sortiment an Seafood & Fisch. Dieses halten wir durch dauerhafte Kontrollen innerhalb der Produktion auf höchstem Niveau. Sowohl unsere Kunden als auch unsere Lieferanten werden stetig durch unsere Spezialisten mit aktuellen Marktinformationen versorgt und wir bieten ihnen des Weiteren professionelle Beratung und Betreuung bis hin zur Beschaffung, Entwicklung und Vermarktung.

With over a decade of experience, working with and getting to know hundreds of suppliers - I understand the common pitfalls in sales team optimisation and customer interaction.

I’ve seen many companies waste too much time on low-profit clients, dedicating over 50% of their resource to customers adding less than 10% to the bottom line— imagine if your team could focus on what’s going to push the needle.

If these challenges sound familiar, let's have a chat about streamlining your operations and see what we could do to get better revenue and stronger customer loyalty.

I’m a family man, with two incredible daughters. Even with 10+ years in the industry, those two still teach me about negotiation! But I believe in the power of relationships and that you likely have the right people — they just need the right support.

Name: HERR GURKA AB
Description:
Herr Gurka har ett mycket bra utbud av grönt, kolonial, mejeri, frukt och fryst kött, fisk, fågel framtaget för dig som arbetar professionellt inom restaurang, servicehandel och storkök. Dessutom till riktigt bra grossist-priser riktat mot restaurang. Men det som våra kunder brukar ta fasta på är att vi kan våra saker, att vi är lätta att jobba med och att vi håller vad vi lovar.

Yrkesstolthet och glädje i jobbet är viktigt för oss som grossist för restaurang. Sedan decennier tillbaka har våra inköpare koll på vilka länder och säsonger som är bäst för odling av frukt och grönt. Hur man mognar varorna och vilket klimatrum sakerna ska ligga i.

När du beställer en leverans från Herr Gurka kommer vi att göra allt för att förstå och uppfylla dina behov. Har vi varorna hemma ordnar vi leverans till nästa dag, eller om en halvtimme om du sitter riktigt i knipa.

Vill du ha något speciellt, kanske myror i choklad, lovar vi att fixa det med.

Första beställningen du lägger hos oss är speciell. Ring oss på 08-206524 så snackar vi igenom allt.

Name: Diamond Cubic Nuts & Spices
Description:
At Diamond Cubik Nuts & Spices, we don’t just trade in products, we nurture a tradition. Food has the power to connect people, cultures, and generations, and we take pride in being part of that story by delivering the finest nuts and spices from trusted sources across the globe.

Our journey began with a simple idea: quality should never be compromised. Over the years, that idea has shaped into our guiding principle. Every almond, pistachio, walnut, or cashew we supply, every spice we carefully select,  carries the promise of purity, authenticity, and excellence.

We understand that in today’s world, food businesses and consumers alike look for more than just ingredients. They look for reliability, transparency, and consistency. That’s why we have built a reputation as a brand that prioritizes quality control at every stage,  from sourcing directly from farmers and growers, to packaging and delivering with care.

Our offerings include:
 Authentic Spices – Known for their aroma, flavor, and natural richness.
 Premium Nuts – Handpicked and packed to retain freshness and nutrition.
 Bulk & Customized Supply – For wholesalers, retailers, food manufacturers, and hospitality businesses.

Behind every product we deliver is a team passionate about what they do. We value relationships as much as we value quality, whether it’s with our farmers, our business partners, or our end consumers. That human connection is what sets Diamond Cubik apart.

As we grow our global presence, our mission remains clear: to bring the best of nature’s bounty to tables worldwide, while upholding integrity, trust, and excellence in everything we do.

 Diamond Cubik Nuts & Spices – Adding Flavor, Building Trust.

As a result, it doesn’t lose its properties and provides our body with the following vitamins: A, PP, C, B12, B6, B2, as well as iron, magnesium, phosphorus, potassium and calcium. 2) Our compostable packaging was made of the materials, which are biodegradable in household conditions. Na základě zkušeností z domácího i zahraničního trhu stále rozšiřujeme portfolio surovin tak, abychom byli schopni uspokojit i nejnáročnější zákazníky. 

Mezi naše nejobrátkovější položky patří pistácie, kešu a pinové oříšky, které rovněž dovážíme přímo ze země původu.

V našem výrobním provozu disponujeme plochou 12 000 m2, kde využíváme moderní technologie v souvislosti s FSSC 22000.

Kromě velkoobchodní činnosti se zabýváme také balením surovin. Našim zákazníkům nabízíme možnost velkoobchodního balení, gastro balení i spotřebitelské balení pro koncové zákazníky. 

V letošním roce jsme získali certifikaci FSSC 22000. Neustále pracujeme na modernizaci strojů a zařízení, které nám umožňují uchovávat potřebnou kvalitu našich surovin. 

Díky dlouholetým zkušenostem v oblasti logistiky zajistíme rychlé dodání surovin v nejen v rámci ČR, ale i v rámci celého světa.

Name: LA EMBAJADA DEL ACEITE SL
Description:
La Embajada del Aceite - Spain

Con sede en la hermosa ciudad de Sevilla, La Embajada del Aceite se dedica a la distribución de los mejores Aceites de Oliva Virgen Extra (AOVE) del sur de España. Nuestra empresa nació de la pasión de nuestra fundadora, Paz Jiménez, una catadora internacional reconocida por su profundo conocimiento y amor por el "oro líquido" andaluz. Su visión ha sido conectar a las personas de todo el mundo con los sabores, tradiciones y beneficios de los AOVE de alta gama.

Representamos a productores icónicos como Almazara de la Subbética, Finca La Torre, Castillo de Canena, Azahara, Picualia, y Goya, cuyos aceites han sido premiados internacionalmente por su calidad excepcional. Cada botella que distribuimos es el resultado de siglos de tradición, métodos de cultivo sostenibles y un compromiso inquebrantable con la excelencia.

Además de la distribución, organizamos catas exclusivas y experiencias formativas diseñadas para chefs, profesionales del sector, y amantes de la gastronomía que desean explorar el arte y la ciencia detrás del AOVE. Nuestro enfoque se centra en educar y elevar la apreciación de este tesoro culinario, resaltando su versatilidad en la cocina y sus extraordinarios beneficios para la salud.

En La Embajada del Aceite, nuestro compromiso va más allá de ofrecer un producto premium. Promovemos la rica herencia cultural de Andalucía, destacando el papel del aceite de oliva como un símbolo de calidad, tradición y bienestar.

Para nosotros, cada gota de AOVE es una conexión con la tierra, la historia y la innovación. 

Más información: www.embajadadelaceite.co.uk
Síguenos en Instagram: @laembajadadelaceiteUK

Name: RØROSMAT SA
Description:
Rørosmat SA er et andelslag med 20 aktive matprodusenter som eiere. Selskapet Rørosmat SA og merket «Røros – mat fra Røros-traktene» skal være Norges tydeligste merkevare innen lokalmat, og bidra til verdiskaping for våre medlemmer. 
Med ett kontaktpunkt, én ordre og én levering betjener vi det norske dagligvare- og storhusholdningsmarkedet og formidler det mangfoldet av varer som våre medlemmer produserer. 


Flere av produsentene har utmerket seg med nasjonale priser over lengre tid. Mat og drikkemiljøet i Rørosregionen er unikt i norsk sammenheng. 
I Røros-traktene har vi skapt et moderne mateventyr. Det har vi fått til fordi vi er mange som står sammen og fordi vi brenner for å skape verdier ut av de ressursene vi har. 
Vi som jobber i Rørosmat SA er produsentenes forlengede arm, og er stolte over - og glade for å kunne samarbeide med så mange dyktige produsenter som brenner for det de gjør.

Name: Tayyib Global Halal Foods
Description:
Tayyib Global Halal Foods is a Brazil-based technology company building the definitive ecosystem for the global Halal market. As the first operational entity of the Tayyib Global Halal Group (TGHG), we are the foundation of a broader vision to create a global TradeTech and ethical Fintech ecosystem.

Our Mission: To solve the critical trust, access, and efficiency challenges in the multi-trillion-dollar Halal supply chain. We do this by integrating two core pillars:

 TradeTech: Our B2B marketplace is more than a platform; it's a channel for growth. Powered by our proprietary TayyibTrust system (AI & Blockchain), we offer:
•	For Producers: Direct access to a verified global network of distributors, supply chain financing, and the ability to add significant value to products through end-to-end traceability.

•	For Distributors: A secure environment for sourcing certified Halal products, with payment protection via escrow and unparalleled quality assurance.

 Ethical Fintech: A financial services layer (tayibPay & tayibank) that facilitates secure cross-border payments and provides Sharia-compliant trade finance, solving the working capital challenges that hinder international trade.

We are building a global supply chain for Halal food trade, powered by Brazilian production and validated by technology.

Name: KiS Coffee Co.
Description:
KIS Coffee – Real Coffee, No Pretense. Roasted for All, Shared by Many.

At KIS Coffee, we’re redefining what coffee culture looks and feels like. Gone are the days of intimidating menus and elitist coffee experiences. We believe that exceptional coffee should be fun, approachable, and welcoming to everyone, regardless of how much they know about beans, brews, or origins. Our name says it all: Keep It Simple. And that’s exactly what we do, every cup, every time.

We roast high-quality coffee with care and expertise, but never lose sight of the bigger picture: creating a space where people can laugh, connect, and feel like they belong. Whether you're a coffee geek or a casual drinker, KIS Coffee offers a refreshing, laid-back atmosphere where great conversations and creative energy flow freely.

Our mission is built on four pillars: simplify the coffee experience, deliver quality without compromise, foster a strong sense of community, and infuse humor and personality into every interaction. We don't just want you to drink great coffee, we want you to feel great doing it.

Our vision is to become a cultural hub in the coffee industry, where creativity, quality, and humor collide to create a new kind of inclusive coffee movement. We aspire to be one of the most recognized micro coffee roasters in the region, known not just for our beans, but for the way we make people feel.

At KIS, coffee is more than just a beverage. It’s a bridge between people. A spark for ideas. A reason to slow down and smile. And as we continue to grow, our focus will remain the same: keep it real, keep it simple, and keep sharing the love - one cup at a time.

Name: BalTraWed OÜ
Description:
BalTraWed OÜ is an Estonian company offering direct, full-cycle cocoa supply solutions to food manufacturers and processing companies across Europe.

We specialize in direct sourcing from our own and partner plantations in West Africa, ensuring full control from harvest to delivery — with no intermediaries involved. Every stage is managed in-house: origin-side treatment, quality control, certified European processing, and final delivery to clients.

Our operations span West African plantations, a central logistics hub in Amsterdam (Steinweg), and certified processing partners across Europe.

We manage the entire value chain — including:
 • Sourcing
 • Processing
 • Packaging
 • Financing
 • Warehousing
 • Logistics

Our cocoa product range includes:
 • Raw cocoa beans
 • Cocoa mass
 • Cocoa butter
 • Cocoa powder
 • Industrial chocolate drops

Each batch is ethically sourced, lab-tested, and fully traceable — meeting the highest industrial standards for consistency, sustainability, and compliance.

Why partners choose BalTraWed:
 • Direct sourcing through our own local companies at origin
 • Pre-shipment treatment and internal quality control
 • Central logistics hub at Steinweg (Amsterdam)
 • Certified European processing under tolling contracts
 • Scalable supply tailored to client specification and volume
 • Full traceability from plantation to production

BalTraWed is Rainforest Alliance (RFA) certified and is actively preparing its own plantations for compliance with the EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR), which becomes mandatory in 2026.

BalTraWed serves B2B clients and food manufacturers across Europe, offering flexible, long-term cocoa supply solutions that meet today’s quality and sustainability standards.

With operational presence in Africa, a logistics base in Amsterdam, and trusted partnerships across the EU, BalTraWed helps clients secure a stable and transparent cocoa supply chain — from plantation to production.

 info@baltrawed.eu

Name: Healthy Foods Essentials, LLC
Description:
We're importers and distributors of banana derivatives from Ecuador. 

Our current portfolio is composed of green banana flour, and ripe banana powder in conventional and organic production; furthermore, green banana flour with peel and peel banana four, both for industrial applications. 

All of our products have 100% export quality and are made from selected green, ripe bananas; those are handly set in optimal sanity conditions. 

Mechanical mills are used to transform bananas into power once it has been dried and then are elaborated and packaged under a regulated environment and hygienic conditions.

The shelf life is one year.

Bananas are rich in antioxidants that help minimize free radical damage and reduce the risk of certain diseases.

It has been observed that unripe plantain contains antioxidant compounds that help prevent diseases and provide vitamins. It generates a slow release of glucose and may help prevent colon cancer and constipation while lowering cholesterol and triglycerides in the blood.

Rich in vitamins, minerals, fiber, and antioxidants, plantain flour is good for you. It's a great alternative to regular flour and can contribute to a healthier lifestyle.

One large unripe plantain contains 4 grams of dietary fiber, which makes it a perfect fruit for weight loss. Dietary fiber helps you to burn fat. 

Starch provides glucose for energy which burns fat. Unripe plantain has resistant starch which works way better than simple starch.

Fiber-rich plantains may also help you stay regular if you get blocked up occasionally sure: Plantains are also rich in potassium. This nutrient can help with high blood pressure because it helps work against the sodium in your diet.

Unripe plantain is a natural source of resistant starch that helps to reduce blood glucose levels, so it is considered an excellent ingredient for food fortification.

Our offer is complemented by breakfast boosters such as banana flakes and banana crunchies.

Description:
Die Firma Ruppert ist seit 20 Jahren Ihr Spezialist für Getränke, Event-Material, Vermietung von Kühl- und Ausschankwagen und mehr.

2019 ist das Unternehmen mit Logistik, Getränkevertrieb und Verwaltung an einen neuen Standort im Gewerbegebiet Potaschberg in Grevenmacher umgezogen. Der Getränkemarkt, die Vinothek und das Gartenfachgeschäft mit Blumen sind weiterhin an der bekannten Adresse in Oberdonven zu finden. Dort können Sie wie gewohnt einkaufen. Ihre Einkäufe werden Ihnen bequem ins Auto getragen.

Die Firma Ruppert beschäftigt derzeit 60 Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter. Der Fuhrpark besteht aus über 20 Lieferfahrzeugen und 40 Kühl- und Ausschankwagen, mit denen Privatkunden, Vereine, Büros und die Gastronomie in ganz Luxemburg beliefert werden.

Die Leitung des Unternehmens liegt nach wie vor in den Händen der Familie: Marc, Paul, Philippe und Nico Ruppert sind für die verschiedenen Bereiche des Unternehmens verantwortlich. Auch die Firmengründer Jeanny und Marcel Ruppert stehen noch im täglichen Kontakt mit den Kunden.

Unsere Philosophie:
Healthy Food: Wir verzichten auf künstliche Aromen, Farb- und Konservierungsstoffe.
Exakte Portionierung: Präzise und individuelle Lösungen für Ihre Küchenabläufe.
Ständige Innovation: Arbeitserleichternde Produkte, die begeistern und Kalkulationssicherheit bieten.
Höchste Qualitätsstandards: IFS Progress Food, MSC und ASC zertifiziert.

Entdecken Sie die Welt des Fischgenusses mit Christian Goedeken jr. – wo Leidenschaft für Fisch auf erstklassige Handwerkskunst trifft.

Our products are shipped only by road from Italy to our warehouses in Thatcham, Newbury Berkshire, it is from here that we ship directly to our customers across the UK. 

Since we started our company in 2014, we have won 56 Great Taste awards, 6 this year!
Our ethos is to supply the best quality food products from Italy to the UK market. We work directly with our customers and not through distributors which means that our products are competitively priced. 
Our customers on average make 35% to 40% GPM – some more! 

Servicing our customers directly is very important to us as it allows us to have a close relationship and give each of our customers personal service. Regarding delivery of products, we would deliver to you with our own refrigerated van ensuring that everything arrives in perfect condition.
