Description:
At Fruit Fresh Spain we have been producers, processors and exporters of citrus and fresh fruit for more than 10 years. Our main value is the quality of all our products, which allows us to achieve and maintain our commercial relations with our clients in both national and international markets.

Our headquarters are located in Murcia, the so-called “Huerta de Europa”, the microclimate of this region makes the fruit and citrus fruits have a supreme quality.

We have around 100 hectares of our own production which allows us to have greater control over our production, more competitive and above all our excellent quality.

Working with local agricultural producers who are both partners and suppliers, means that the company has direct access to a wide variety of crops near our factories. Our suppliers have extensive experience in agricultural production which allows Frozen Juices Spain to obtain high quality fruits.

The proximity of the crops to the plant and the speed of processing of the products guarantees maximum freshness.

Name: Skovens Kaffe
Description:
Hos Skovens Kaffe tror vi på, at den bedste kaffe ikke kun skal smage godt, men også gøre godt. Vi tilbyder kaffe af højeste kvalitet, nøje udvalgt fra økologiske og bæredygtige producenter i Peru, Honduras og Etiopien. Vores kaffe stammer fra producenter, der dyrker under bæredygtige forhold og med fokus på at beskytte både natur og klima. For os handler det om mere end blot smagen – det handler om at skabe en positiv indvirkning på verden.

Når du samarbejder med Skovens Kaffe, kan du tilbyde dine kunder en bæredygtig og Fairtrade-certificeret kaffe, som ikke bare glæder smagsløgene, men også naturen. Ved at vælge vores kaffe kan virksomheder integrere dette i deres CSR-regnskab og fremme deres bæredygtighedsindsats. Det er en fremragende mulighed for at imødekomme medarbejdere og kunder, der værdsætter kvalitet, ansvarlighed og en positiv indvirkning på miljøet.

Vores samarbejde med Verdens Skove betyder, at hver gang du køber et kilo kaffe fra os, donerer vi 5 kroner til at bevare regnskoven – det svarer til at beskytte ca. 12 kvadratmeter regnskov per kilo kaffe. Dette bidrager direkte til at beskytte vores klima og bevare dyrelivet i disse sårbare områder. På den måde får du ikke kun fantastisk kaffe, men også muligheden for at fortælle en stærk bæredygtighedshistorie, som vil glæde både kunder og medarbejdere.
Med sin indsats har Skovens Kaffe allerede bevaret over 128.000 kvm skov i Bolivia, Honduras, Panama, Nicaragua, Uganda og Etiopien.

Skovens Kaffe er stiftet af Thomas, Christian og Marko, som efter flere besøg på kaffeplantager i de kaffeproducerende lande blev inspireret til at skabe en virksomhed, der gavner både kaffedrikkere, lokale producenter og naturen. Med vores kaffe kan du gøre en forskel – én kop kaffe ad gangen.

Sammen kan vi levere kaffe, der både smager godt og gør godt for vores klode.

Name: Bushfood Farms Australia
Description:
Bushfood Farms Australia is focused on collaborative partnerships to build a truly sustainable future for the growing native products industry. Founded by Ecologists with a commitment to conserving Australian native plants and improving fragile ecosystems, our primary objective is to reduce some of the wild harvests impacts on the environment and native animal resources. We are doing this through public education, actively growing and supporting a national farming network, collaborating with Indigenous peoples, corporations and communities and supporting Aussie farmers to stay on farms and diversify their income potential. We are partnering with new farmers to the industry and working with first nations' visions to make new 'to market' products available, where previously there has been limited supply that our extensive network of wholesale customers couldn't rely on.

Bushfood Farms Australia is a national wholesale supplier of Australian native products and a forward-thinking, integrity and ethics driven business, dedicated to a new future in collaborative, sustainable, native food farming.

Na NewBerry, acreditamos que fruta bem cuidada faz toda a diferença — no sabor, na segurança e na confiança de quem escolhe a nossa marca.

Description:
Unifresca: Transforming the World through Fruit Distribution

Unifresca is a dynamic and innovative company dedicated to revolutionizing the fruit distribution industry on a global scale. With a strong presence in the worldwide market, we connect growers, distributors, and consumers to ensure the seamless flow of fresh and high-quality fruits from farm to table.

By adhering to rigorous standards and leveraging advanced logistics technologies, we ensure that our customers receive fresh, flavorful, and nutritious fruits that surpass their expectations.

Join us and be a part of our exciting journey. We offer a dynamic work environment that fosters personal and professional growth. With a focus on talent development and ongoing learning, we empower our team members to expand their knowledge, hone their skills, and embrace new challenges.

Unifresca is more than just a fruit distribution company. We are agents of change, working towards a healthier, more connected, and sustainable world. Together, let's transform the way fruits reach global markets, promote well-being, and contribute to a brighter future for all. Connect with us on LinkedIn and be a part of the Unifresca family. 

#FruitDistribution #GlobalReach

Name: E Indian Grocery
Description:
At E Indian Grocery, we believe that food is more than just nourishment — it’s culture, memory, and connection. Our story began over three generations ago in Rajasthan, India, where our family ran a small Kirana store (Grocery Store). 

For decades, it was more than a shop; it was a place where neighbors gathered, traditions were shared, and trust was built one transaction at a time.

Though that store eventually closed its doors in India, the values it stood for — honesty, quality, and care — are the same ones we carry forward today in the United States.

 Our Promise
We built E Indian Groceries with a simple philosophy:
Treat customers the way we want to be treated.

Every product you see on our shelves, every description you read, and every order we pack is guided by that principle. That means:

Quality First – Only authentic, trusted brands and handpicked staples.

Transparency – Clear product details, consistent packaging, no shortcuts.

Care in Every Detail – From professional images to carefully packed deliveries.

We know that groceries are personal. They shape your home, your meals, and your traditions. That’s why we go the extra mile to deliver an experience you can trust.

 What Makes Us Different

 Heritage You Can Trust – Rooted in a 300-year-old grocery tradition, carried forward by three generations.

 Technology-Enabled Simplicity – Using AI and automation to streamline operations so you get consistency, accuracy, and fast service.

 A Cultural Experience – From brass thalis and mandalas in our visuals to curated festival bundles, we bring Indian culture to life with every order.

 Customer-Centric Approach – We see you not just as a customer, but as part of our community.

 Our Vision

To be more than a grocery delivery service.

We aim to create a cultural bridge for Indian families abroad — a place where you find authentic ingredients, discover new favorites, and celebrate traditions without compromise from the comfort of your home.

Name: Ecuamaki, Inc.
Description:
Importers and distributors of premium banana peel powder as a natural fertilizer from Ecuador, along with super-foods such as quinoa.

Banana peel powder can be used as a safe and effective fertilizer to improve the growth and health of plants or crops, it's a trustable source of Potassium, Phosphorous, Calcium, Sodium, Magnesium, and Manganese, which are a vital nutrient for plants; potassium helps to regulate plant growth, water balance, and photosynthesis, furthermore helps to strengthen plant stems and roots.

This natural fertilizer can be used as a foliar spray or as a soil amendment. Banana peel powder is a versatile and beneficial product that can be used in a variety of ways in the garden.

It is a safe, natural, and sustainable way to improve the health and growth of your plants.

Ecuamki's Peel Banana Powder is produced totally in Ecuador as a natural fertilizer, specially formulated for plants, gardens, and fruits. Is 100% pure peel banana powder.

Ecuador is the cradle of the best bananas in the world, no doubt related to it, the point is that this small country produces more than 7.35 million tons per year, with an average of 5% of rejection due to external issues such as thickness, weight, peel color, etc.

Our peel banana powder is sourced from export-reject bananas, thus helping to create a circular economy and sustainable supply.

We're an enthusiastic group of eco-entrepreneurs who look forward to leaving a better world to the next generation than we receive from the earlier one.

In sight of the bananas rejections all over the planet, we found a nice opportunity to spark a circular economy through the production of peel. banana powder.

Now, we've got a part of the solution to avoid waste and the consequences of global pollution givin' the chance to feed plants, 
fruits and gardens.

We create business scenarios leveraging waste to build prosperous and sustainable economies.

Name: JMB Exporters & Importers
Description:
Welcome to JMB Group, your trusted partner in the world of fresh produce. At JMB, we specialize in producing and trading high-quality fresh fruits and vegetables sourced from our farms and carefully handled throughout the supply chain to reach our valued clients worldwide.

Our Expertise:
With a strong presence as one of Pakistan's leading exporters and importers, JMB Group has established itself as a frontrunner in the fresh produce industry. Our extensive network is comprised of fresh fruit and vegetable farms, state-of-the-art processing units, cold storage facilities, efficient transportation systems, and seamless import and export operations.

Our Product Portfolio:
We take pride in exporting the finest, best-quality fresh fruits, including oranges, mangoes, apples, pomegranates, and watermelons. Additionally, we offer top-notch vegetables, specializing in potatoes and onions, while supplying various seasonal fruits and vegetables available in Pakistan.

Our Commitment to Excellence:
At JMB, our vision is to be the supplier of choice, and we achieve this by consistently delivering outstanding customer service, producing quality sanitized and processed fruits and vegetables, adhering to ethical business practices, and maintaining a position of leadership through innovation and service excellence within the fresh produce supply industry.

Infrastructure and Quality Assurance:
Our processing capabilities are second to none, making JMB Group a preferred choice among fruit and vegetable exporters and importers. We proudly manage over 2000 acres of fresh fruit farms, all maintained under the strict supervision of HACCP and Global GAP standards. Our extensive network includes multiple processing units located across different cities, each equipped with the latest machinery and staffed by highly qualified and trained professionals.

Why Choose JMB Group?

Quality Assurance | Global Reach | Customer-Centric
